papers.title: HiFloat4 Format for Language Model Pre-training on Ascend NPUs
papers.abstract: Large foundation models have become central to modern machine learning, with performance scaling predictably with model size and data. However, training and deploying such models incur substantial computational and memory costs, motivating the development of low-precision training techniques. Recent work has demonstrated that 4-bit floating-point (FP4) formats--such as MXFP4 and NVFP4--can be successfully applied to linear GEMM operations in large language models (LLMs), achieving up to 4x improvements in compute throughput and memory efficiency compared to higher-precision baselines. In this work, we investigate the recently proposed HiFloat4 FP4 format for Huawei Ascend NPUs and systematically compare it with MXFP4 in large-scale training settings. All experiments are conducted on Ascend NPU clusters, with linear and expert GEMM operations performed entirely in FP4 precision. We evaluate both dense architectures (e.g., Pangu and LLaMA-style models) and mixture-of-experts (MoE) models, where both standard linear layers and expert-specific GEMMs operate in FP4. Furthermore, we explore stabilization techniques tailored to FP4 training that significantly reduce numerical degradation, maintaining relative error within 1% of full-precision baselines while preserving the efficiency benefits of 4-bit computation. Our results provide a comprehensive empirical study of FP4 training on NPUs and highlight the practical trade-offs between FP4 formats in large-scale dense and MoE models.

analysis.tldr: 提出HiFloat4格式用于华为Ascend NPU上的大语言模型预训练，实现4位浮点精度训练并保持相对误差在1%以内。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型训练计算和内存成本高昂，低精度训练技术可显著提升效率，但现有4位浮点格式在NPU上的适用性和稳定性尚未充分研究。
analysis.problem: 如何在华为Ascend NPU上有效应用4位浮点格式进行大语言模型预训练，同时保持数值精度和训练稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HiFloat4格式，并在Ascend NPU集群上对密集架构（如Pangu、LLaMA）和混合专家模型进行全FP4精度的线性与专家GEMM操作训练，同时引入定制化稳定化技术减少数值退化。
contributions: 提出HiFloat4格式并系统比较其与MXFP4在大规模训练中的表现。
在Ascend NPU上实现密集和MoE模型的完全FP4精度训练，并验证稳定化技术可将相对误差控制在1%以内。
analysis.experiments: 在Ascend NPU集群上对Pangu、LLaMA等密集模型和MoE模型进行实验，线性与专家GEMM操作均采用FP4精度，并与全精度基线对比相对误差。
limitations: 实验仅在华为Ascend NPU上进行，泛化到其他硬件平台未知。
摘要未提供具体性能提升数值（如吞吐量、内存节省）或模型最终精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HiFloat4格式用于华为Ascend NPU上的大语言模型预训练，实现4位浮点精度训练并保持相对误差在1%以内。

papers.title: ExecTune: Effective Steering of Black-Box LLMs with Guide Models
papers.abstract: For large language models deployed through black-box APIs, recurring inference costs often exceed one-time training costs. This motivates composed agentic systems that amortize expensive reasoning into reusable intermediate representations. We study a broad class of such systems, termed Guide-Core Policies (GCoP), in which a guide model generates a structured strategy that is executed by a black-box core model. This abstraction subsumes base, supervised, and advisor-style approaches, which differ primarily in how the guide is trained. We formalize GCoP under a cost-sensitive utility objective and show that end-to-end performance is governed by guide-averaged executability: the probability that a strategy generated by the guide can be faithfully executed by the core. Our analysis shows that existing GCoP instantiations often fail to optimize executability under deployment constraints, resulting in brittle strategies and inefficient computation. Motivated by these insights, we propose ExecTune, a principled training recipe that combines teacher-guided acceptance sampling, supervised fine-tuning, and structure-aware reinforcement learning to directly optimize syntactic validity, execution success, and cost efficiency. Across mathematical reasoning and code-generation benchmarks, GCoP with ExecTune improves accuracy by up to 9.2% over prior state-of-the-art baselines while reducing inference cost by up to 22.4%. It enables Claude Haiku 3.5 to outperform Sonnet 3.5 on both math and code tasks, and to come within 1.7% absolute accuracy of Sonnet 4 at 38% lower cost. Beyond efficiency, GCoP also supports modular adaptation by updating the guide without retraining the core.

analysis.tldr: 提出ExecTune训练方法，通过引导模型优化黑盒LLM的推理效率与准确性，在数学和代码任务上实现最高9.2%的准确率提升和22.4%的成本降低。
analysis.research_motivation: 黑盒LLM的推理成本常超过训练成本，现有组合式系统（如Guide-Core策略）在部署约束下未能充分优化策略的可执行性，导致策略脆弱且计算低效。
analysis.problem: 如何训练一个引导模型，使其生成的策略能被黑盒核心模型高效且准确地执行，同时最小化推理成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有GCoP实例在部署约束下未能优化引导平均可执行性，导致策略脆弱和计算低效。
analysis.method: ExecTune：结合教师引导的接受采样、监督微调和结构感知强化学习，直接优化语法有效性、执行成功率和成本效率。
contributions: 形式化定义了Guide-Core策略（GCoP）框架及其成本敏感效用目标，揭示了引导平均可执行性的关键作用。
提出ExecTune训练方法，在数学推理和代码生成基准上实现最高9.2%的准确率提升和22.4%的成本降低。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理和代码生成基准上，GCoP with ExecTune相比先前最先进基线，准确率提升最高9.2%，推理成本降低最高22.4%；Claude Haiku 3.5在数学和代码任务上超越Sonnet 3.5，并以38%更低成本达到Sonnet 4的1.7%绝对准确率差距。
limitations: 可能依赖特定类型的引导模型和核心模型组合。
未讨论在更广泛任务（如开放域对话）上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ExecTune训练方法，通过引导模型优化黑盒LLM的推理效率与准确性，在数学和代码任务上实现最高9.2%的准确率提升和22.4%的成本降低。

papers.title: SenBen: Sensitive Scene Graphs for Explainable Content Moderation
papers.abstract: Content moderation systems classify images as safe or unsafe but lack spatial grounding and interpretability: they cannot explain what sensitive behavior was detected, who is involved, or where it occurs. We introduce the Sensitive Benchmark (SenBen), the first large-scale scene graph benchmark for sensitive content, comprising 13,999 frames from 157 movies annotated with Visual Genome-style scene graphs (25 object classes, 28 attributes including affective states such as pain, fear, aggression, and distress, 14 predicates) and 16 sensitivity tags across 5 categories. We distill a frontier VLM into a compact 241M student model using a multi-task recipe that addresses vocabulary imbalance in autoregressive scene graph generation through suffix-based object identity, Vocabulary-Aware Recall (VAR) Loss, and a decoupled Query2Label tag head with asymmetric loss, yielding a +6.4 percentage point improvement in SenBen Recall over standard cross-entropy training. On grounded scene graph metrics, our student model outperforms all evaluated VLMs except Gemini models and all commercial safety APIs, while achieving the highest object detection and captioning scores across all models, at $7.6\times$ faster inference and $16\times$ less GPU memory.

analysis.tldr: 提出SenBen基准和紧凑学生模型，实现可解释的敏感内容审核，性能优于多数VLM和商业API。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有内容审核系统缺乏空间定位和可解释性，无法解释检测到的敏感行为、涉及对象及位置，亟需可解释的细粒度审核方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建具有空间可解释性的敏感内容审核系统，并实现高效推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准交叉熵训练在自回归场景图生成中存在词汇不平衡问题，导致召回率低。
analysis.method: 提出SenBen基准（含13,999帧、场景图标注和敏感标签），并蒸馏VLM为241M学生模型，采用多任务训练：后缀对象身份、词汇感知召回损失、解耦Query2Label标签头和非对称损失。
contributions: 首个大规模敏感内容场景图基准SenBen，含详细标注和敏感标签。
紧凑学生模型，在SenBen召回率上比标准交叉熵提升6.4个百分点，推理速度7.6倍、GPU内存减少16倍。
analysis.experiments: 在SenBen基准上评估，学生模型在场景图指标上优于除Gemini外的所有VLM和商业安全API，并取得最高目标检测和字幕分数。
limitations: 仅基于电影帧，可能不覆盖所有真实场景。
学生模型性能仍不及Gemini，存在提升空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SenBen基准和紧凑学生模型，实现可解释的敏感内容审核，性能优于多数VLM和商业API。

papers.title: Towards Responsible Multimodal Medical Reasoning via Context-Aligned Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) show strong performance on radiology tasks but often produce fluent yet weakly grounded conclusions due to over-reliance on a dominant modality. We introduce a context-aligned reasoning framework that enforces agreement across heterogeneous clinical evidence before generating diagnostic conclusions. The proposed approach augments a frozen VLM with structured contextual signals derived from radiomic statistics, explainability activations, and vocabulary-grounded semantic cues. Instead of producing free-form responses, the model generates structured outputs containing supporting evidence, uncertainty estimates, limitations, and safety notes. We observe that auxiliary signals alone provide limited benefit; performance gains emerge only when these signals are integrated through contextual verification. Experiments on chest X-ray datasets demonstrate that context alignment improves discriminative performance (AUC 0.918 to 0.925) while maintaining calibrated uncertainty. The framework also substantially reduces hallucinated keywords (1.14 to 0.25) and produces more concise reasoning explanations (19.4 to 15.3 words) without increasing model confidence (0.70 to 0.68). Cross-dataset evaluation on CheXpert further reveals that modality informativeness significantly influences reasoning behavior. These results suggest that enforcing multi-evidence agreement improves both reliability and trustworthiness in medical multimodal reasoning, while preserving the underlying model architecture.

analysis.tldr: 通过上下文对齐的多证据验证提升医学VLM推理的可靠性和可信度。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉语言模型在放射学任务中表现强劲，但常因过度依赖单一模态而产生流畅但缺乏依据的结论，影响临床可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决医学VLM在多模态推理中因模态主导性导致的幻觉和推理不严谨问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 辅助信号单独作用有限，仅当通过上下文验证整合时才能提升性能；模态信息量显著影响推理行为。
analysis.method: 在冻结VLM基础上，引入放射组学统计、可解释性激活和词汇语义线索的结构化上下文信号，通过上下文验证强制多证据一致后生成结构化输出（含支持证据、不确定性、局限性和安全说明）。
contributions: 提出上下文对齐推理框架，通过多证据验证提升医学VLM的判别性能和校准不确定性。
显著减少幻觉关键词并生成更简洁的推理解释，同时保持模型架构不变。
analysis.experiments: 在胸部X光数据集上实验，AUC从0.918提升至0.925，幻觉关键词从1.14降至0.25，推理字数从19.4降至15.3，不确定性校准保持；跨数据集CheXpert评估显示模态信息量影响推理行为。
limitations: 仅针对胸部X光任务验证，泛化性需更多模态验证。
结构化输出可能增加推理复杂度，实际部署效率待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过上下文对齐的多证据验证提升医学VLM推理的可靠性和可信度。

papers.title: R2G: A Multi-View Circuit Graph Benchmark Suite from RTL to GDSII
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are increasingly applied to physical design tasks such as congestion prediction and wirelength estimation, yet progress is hindered by inconsistent circuit representations and the absence of controlled evaluation protocols. We present R2G (RTL-to-GDSII), a multi-view circuit-graph benchmark suite that standardizes five stage-aware views with information parity (every view encodes the same attribute set, differing only in where features attach) over 30 open-source IP cores (up to $10^6$ nodes/edges). R2G provides an end-to-end DEF-to-graph pipeline spanning synthesis, placement, and routing stages, together with loaders, unified splits, domain metrics, and reproducible baselines. By decoupling representation choice from model choice, R2G isolates a confound that prior EDA and graph-ML benchmarks leave uncontrolled. In systematic studies with GINE, GAT, and ResGatedGCN, we find: (i) view choice dominates model choice, with Test R$^2$ varying by more than 0.3 across representations for a fixed GNN; (ii) node-centric views generalize best across both placement and routing; and (iii) decoder-head depth (3--4 layers) is the primary accuracy driver, turning divergent training into near-perfect predictions (R$^2$$>$0.99). Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/ShenShan123/R2G.

analysis.tldr: R2G 是一个多视角电路图基准套件，标准化了从 RTL 到 GDSII 的五个阶段视图，揭示了视图选择主导模型选择的关键发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 图神经网络在物理设计任务中应用日益增多，但电路表示不一致和缺乏受控评估协议阻碍了进展。
analysis.problem: 现有 EDA 和图 ML 基准未控制表示选择与模型选择的混杂因素，导致难以公平评估 GNN 在电路图上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视图选择主导模型选择，固定 GNN 下不同视图的 Test R² 差异超过 0.3；节点中心视图在布局和布线阶段泛化最佳；解码器头深度（3-4 层）是准确性的主要驱动因素。
analysis.method: 提出 R2G 基准套件，包含 30 个开源 IP 核的五个阶段视图（信息对等但特征附着位置不同），并提供端到端 DEF 到图流水线、加载器、统一划分、领域指标和可复现基线。
contributions: 标准化了多视角电路图基准，包含五个阶段视图和信息对等设计，覆盖 30 个开源 IP 核。
通过系统实验揭示了视图选择对 GNN 性能的主导作用，以及节点中心视图和解码器头深度的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在 GINE、GAT 和 ResGatedGCN 上进行了系统研究，发现视图选择主导模型选择，节点中心视图泛化最佳，解码器头深度是主要准确性驱动因素。
limitations: 基准仅包含 30 个开源 IP 核，可能无法完全代表工业级设计。
未探索其他图神经网络架构或更复杂的物理设计任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: R2G 是一个多视角电路图基准套件，标准化了从 RTL 到 GDSII 的五个阶段视图，揭示了视图选择主导模型选择的关键发现。

papers.title: Building Better Environments for Autonomous Cyber Defence
papers.abstract: In November 2025, the authors ran a workshop on the topic of what makes a good reinforcement learning (RL) environment for autonomous cyber defence (ACD). This paper details the knowledge shared by participants both during the workshop and shortly afterwards by contributing herein. The workshop participants come from academia, industry, and government, and have extensive hands-on experience designing and working with RL and cyber environments. While there is now a sizeable body of literature describing work in RL for ACD, there is nevertheless a great deal of tradecraft, domain knowledge, and common hazards which are not detailed comprehensively in a single resource. With a specific focus on building better environments to train and evaluate autonomous RL agents in network defence scenarios, including government and critical infrastructure networks, the contributions of this work are twofold: (1) a framework for decomposing the interface between RL cyber environments and real systems, and (2) guidelines on current best practice for RL-based ACD environment development and agent evaluation, based on the key findings from our workshop.

analysis.tldr: 通过研讨会总结，提出构建自主网络防御RL环境的框架和最佳实践指南。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主网络防御（ACD）的强化学习（RL）研究虽多，但缺乏系统性的环境构建和评估指南，导致研究可复现性和实用性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地设计和评估用于网络防御场景的RL环境，以提升智能体的训练效果和实际部署能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过组织研讨会汇集学术界、工业界和政府专家的经验，提出环境分解框架和最佳实践指南。
contributions: 提出一个将RL网络环境与真实系统接口进行分解的框架。
基于研讨会关键发现，提供当前RL-based ACD环境开发和智能体评估的最佳实践指南。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 指南基于专家经验而非大规模实证验证。
可能未涵盖所有新兴攻击和防御场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过研讨会总结，提出构建自主网络防御RL环境的框架和最佳实践指南。

papers.title: Scrapyard AI
papers.abstract: This paper considers AI model churn as an opportunity for frugal investigation of large AI models. It describes how the incessant push for ever more powerful AI systems leaves in its wake a collection of obsolete yet powerful AI models, discarded in a veritable scrapyard of AI production. This scrapyard offers a potent opportunity for resource-constrained experimentation into AI systems. As in the physical scrapyard, nothing ever truly disappears in the AI scrapyard, it is just waiting to be reconfigured into something else. Project Nudge-x is an example of what can emerge from the AI scrapyard. Nudge-x seeks to manipulate legacy AI models to describe how mining sites across the planet are impacting landscapes and lives. By sharing this collection of brutal landscape interventions with people and AI systems alike, Nudge-x creates a venue for the appreciation of a history sadly shared between AI and people.

analysis.tldr: 利用废弃AI模型进行资源受限的实验，以Nudge-x项目为例展示其应用。
analysis.research_motivation: AI模型快速迭代导致大量废弃但强大的模型，这些模型为资源受限的实验提供了低成本机会。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用废弃AI模型进行资源受限的探索性研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出“AI模型废弃场”概念，并通过Nudge-x项目实例化，利用遗留模型分析采矿对景观和人类的影响。
contributions: 提出利用废弃AI模型进行资源受限实验的新视角
通过Nudge-x项目展示该方法的实际应用
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏对废弃模型性能的系统评估
应用场景可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用废弃AI模型进行资源受限的实验，以Nudge-x项目为例展示其应用。

papers.title: MeshOn: Intersection-Free Mesh-to-Mesh Composition
papers.abstract: We propose MeshOn, a method that finds physically and semantically realistic compositions of two input meshes. Given an accessory, a base mesh with a user-defined target region, and optional text strings for both meshes, MeshOn uses a multi-step optimization framework to realistically fit the meshes onto each other while preventing intersections. We initialize the shapes' rigid configuration via a structured alignment scheme using Vision-to-Language Models, which we then optimize using a combination of attractive geometric losses, and a physics-inspired barrier loss that prevents surface intersections. We then obtain a final deformation of the object, assisted by a diffusion prior. Our method successfully fits accessories of various materials over a breadth of target regions, and is designed to fit directly into existing digital artist workflows. We demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of our pipeline by comparing it with generative approaches and traditional registration algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无交点的网格组合方法，通过多步优化框架实现两个网格的物理和语义真实组合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有网格组合方法常产生表面交叉或缺乏物理真实性，难以直接用于数字艺术工作流。
analysis.problem: 如何将两个输入网格（如配件和基座）以无交点、物理真实且语义合理的方式组合在一起。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多步优化框架：先利用视觉-语言模型进行结构化对齐初始化，再结合吸引几何损失和物理启发的屏障损失优化刚体配置，最后通过扩散先验辅助变形。
contributions: 提出一种无交点的网格组合方法，结合视觉-语言模型和物理启发损失。
方法可直接融入现有数字艺术家工作流，支持多种材料和目标区域。
analysis.experiments: 与生成方法和传统配准算法比较，展示了鲁棒性和准确性，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂拓扑或高精度要求场景效果有限。
依赖用户定义的目标区域和可选文本，自动化程度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无交点的网格组合方法，通过多步优化框架实现两个网格的物理和语义真实组合。

papers.title: Lessons Without Borders? Evaluating Cultural Alignment of LLMs Using Multilingual Story Moral Generation
papers.abstract: Stories are key to transmitting values across cultures, but their interpretation varies across linguistic and cultural contexts. Thus, we introduce multilingual story moral generation as a novel culturally grounded evaluation task. Using a new dataset of human-written story morals collected across 14 language-culture pairs, we compare model outputs with human interpretations via semantic similarity, a human preference survey, and value categorization. We show that frontier models such as GPT-4o and Gemini generate story morals that are semantically similar to human responses and preferred by human evaluators. However, their outputs exhibit markedly less cross-linguistic variation and concentrate on a narrower set of widely shared values. These findings suggest that while contemporary models can approximate central tendencies of human moral interpretation, they struggle to reproduce the diversity that characterizes human narrative understanding. By framing narrative interpretation as an evaluative task, this work introduces a new approach to studying cultural alignment in language models beyond static benchmarks or knowledge-based tests.

analysis.tldr: 通过多语言故事道德生成任务评估LLM的文化对齐，发现模型虽能匹配人类道德中心趋势，但缺乏跨语言多样性。
analysis.research_motivation: 故事是跨文化传递价值观的关键载体，但现有文化对齐评估多依赖静态基准或知识测试，缺乏对叙事理解中文化差异的动态评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能反映文化多样性的评估任务，以检测LLM在跨语言叙事理解中的文化对齐程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿模型（如GPT-4o、Gemini）生成的故事道德在语义上与人类相似且受偏好，但跨语言变异性显著低于人类，且集中于少数共享价值观。
analysis.method: 提出多语言故事道德生成任务，构建包含14种语言-文化对的人类编写道德数据集，通过语义相似度、人类偏好调查和价值观分类比较模型与人类输出。
contributions: 引入多语言故事道德生成作为新颖的文化对齐评估任务
构建跨14种语言-文化的人类道德数据集
揭示LLM在文化多样性上的局限性
analysis.experiments: 使用GPT-4o和Gemini等前沿模型，通过语义相似度、人类偏好调查和价值观分类进行对比分析。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖14种语言-文化对，可能不全面
评估指标（语义相似度等）可能无法完全捕捉文化细微差异
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过多语言故事道德生成任务评估LLM的文化对齐，发现模型虽能匹配人类道德中心趋势，但缺乏跨语言多样性。

papers.title: eBandit: Kernel-Driven Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Video Streaming
papers.abstract: User-space Adaptive Bitrate (ABR) algorithms cannot see the transport layer signals that matter most, such as minimum RTT and instantaneous delivery rate, and they respond to network changes only after damage has already propagated to the playout buffer. We present eBandit, a framework that relocates both network monitoring and ABR algorithm selection into the Linux kernel using eBPF. A lightweight epsilon-greedy Multi-Armed Bandit (MAB) runs inside a sockops program, evaluating three ABR heuristics against a reward derived from live TCP metrics. On an adversarial synthetic trace eBandit achieves $416.3 \pm 4.9$ cumulative QoE, outperforming the best static heuristic by $7.2\%$. On 42 real-world sessions eBandit achieves a mean QoE per chunk of $1.241$, the highest across all policies, demonstrating that kernel-resident bandit learning transfers to heterogeneous mobile conditions.

analysis.tldr: 将ABR算法嵌入Linux内核，用eBPF驱动的多臂赌博机实时选择最优策略，提升视频流QoE。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户态ABR算法无法直接获取传输层关键信号（如最小RTT、瞬时传输速率），且只能在网络损伤传播到播放缓冲区后才做出反应，导致响应滞后。
analysis.problem: 如何让ABR算法实时感知传输层状态并快速自适应网络变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将网络监控和ABR算法选择迁移到Linux内核，使用eBPF实现轻量级epsilon-greedy多臂赌博机，基于实时TCP指标计算奖励，动态选择三种ABR启发式策略。
contributions: 提出eBandit框架，首次将ABR算法嵌入内核，实现低延迟网络感知。
在合成对抗性轨迹和真实移动网络会话上验证了内核驻留MAB的有效性，QoE优于静态启发式策略。
analysis.experiments: 在合成对抗性轨迹上，eBandit累积QoE为416.3±4.9，优于最佳静态启发式7.2%；在42个真实移动网络会话上，每块平均QoE为1.241，为所有策略中最高。
limitations: 仅评估了三种启发式策略，可能未覆盖更优的ABR算法。
实验规模有限（42个真实会话），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将ABR算法嵌入Linux内核，用eBPF驱动的多臂赌博机实时选择最优策略，提升视频流QoE。

papers.title: STaR-DRO: Stateful Tsallis Reweighting for Group-Robust Structured Prediction
papers.abstract: Structured prediction requires models to generate ontology-constrained labels, grounded evidence, and valid structure under ambiguity, label skew, and heterogeneous group difficulty. We present a two-part framework for controllable inference and robust fine-tuning. First, we introduce a task-agnostic prompting strategy that combines XML-based instruction structure, disambiguation rules, verification-style reasoning, schema constraints, and self-validation to address format drift, label ambiguity, evidence hallucination, and metadata-conditioned confusion in in-context structured generation. Second, we introduce STaR-DRO, a stateful robust optimization method for group heterogeneity. It combines Tsallis mirror descent with momentum-smoothed, centered group-loss signals and bounded excess-only multipliers so that only persistently hard groups above a neutral baseline are upweighted, concentrating learning where it is most needed while avoiding volatile, dense exponentiated-gradient reweighting and unnecessary loss from downweighting easier groups. We evaluate the combined framework on EPPC Miner, a benchmark for extracting hierarchical labels and evidence spans from patient-provider secure messages. Prompt engineering improves zero-shot by +15.44 average F1 across Code, Sub-code, and Span over four Llama models. Building on supervised fine-tuning, STaR-DRO further improves the hardest semantic decisions: on Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, Code F1 rises from 79.24 to 81.47 and Sub-code F1 from 67.78 to 69.30, while preserving Span performance and reducing group-wise validation cross-entropy by up to 29.6% on the most difficult clinical categories. Because these rare and difficult groups correspond to clinically consequential communication behaviors, these gains are not merely statistical improvements: they directly strengthen communication mining reliability for patient-centered care analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出STaR-DRO方法，结合提示工程与鲁棒优化，提升结构化预测中困难组的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 结构化预测面临标签模糊、组间难度不均等问题，现有方法在困难组上表现不佳，且优化过程不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何实现可控的结构化推理并对组间异质性进行鲁棒微调，以提升困难组的预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 困难组（如罕见临床类别）的损失较高，传统重加权方法易导致不稳定或过度惩罚简单组。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：1）任务无关的提示策略（XML结构、消歧规则、验证推理等）；2）STaR-DRO：基于Tsallis镜像下降的状态鲁棒优化，使用动量平滑的居中组损失和有界超额乘子，仅对持续困难组上加权。
contributions: 提出任务无关的提示策略，解决格式漂移、标签模糊等问题。
提出STaR-DRO优化方法，稳定地提升困难组性能。
analysis.experiments: 在EPPC Miner基准上，提示工程使零样本F1平均提升+15.44；结合STaR-DRO微调，Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct的Code F1从79.24升至81.47，Sub-code F1从67.78升至69.30，困难组验证交叉熵降低29.6%。
limitations: 仅在一个医疗消息数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
方法复杂度较高，可能增加训练开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STaR-DRO方法，结合提示工程与鲁棒优化，提升结构化预测中困难组的性能。

papers.title: Graph Query Generation with Constraint-guided Large Language Agents
papers.abstract: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) has advanced through structured query generation, yet most efforts target RDF/SPARQL, leaving Cypher and property graphs underexplored, despite increasing demand for unified KGQA in industry settings. We propose UniQGen, a novel constraint-based framework that employs LLM agents to dynamically extract and refine representative graph query clauses into executable, intent-aligned graph queries across query languages. The foundation of our method is a variant of Chase & Backchase, a family of algorithms for query optimization and reformulation. We extend Chase & Backchase with a dynamic reasoning process over query constraints that also interact with LLMs for query quality estimation. With a Cypher-supported Freebase graph deployed on Amazon Neptune, we extensively evaluate our approach on popular KGQA benchmarks (GraphQ, GrailQA, and WebQSP). We demonstrate that UniQGen outperforms state-of-the-art graph query generation techniques in both accuracy and efficiency, with F1 gains of 31.6% on GraphQ and 4.9% on GrailQA. Unlike prior methods, our framework does not require fine-tuning for schema matching, making it more extensible to schema-less graphs and semantics in query workloads, and is more suitable for enterprise-grade KGQA. We release Cypher outputs and a Neptune-ready Freebase snapshot to support reproducible, cross-language KGQA research.

analysis.tldr: 提出UniQGen框架，利用LLM代理和约束引导的Chase & Backchase变体，在Cypher属性图上生成高质量图查询，显著提升KGQA准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有KGQA研究多聚焦RDF/SPARQL，而工业界对Cypher和属性图的需求日益增长，但相关查询生成方法缺乏，且现有方法依赖模式匹配微调，难以扩展至无模式图。
analysis.problem: 如何为Cypher属性图生成准确且符合意图的图查询，同时避免模式匹配微调，实现跨查询语言的统一KGQA。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UniQGen框架，基于Chase & Backchase算法的变体，通过LLM代理动态提取和优化查询约束，并与LLM交互进行查询质量估计，生成可执行的图查询。
contributions: 提出UniQGen，首个面向Cypher属性图的约束引导LLM代理图查询生成框架。
扩展Chase & Backchase算法，引入动态推理过程与LLM交互，提升查询质量。
在GraphQ、GrailQA和WebQSP基准上取得SOTA，F1提升31.6%和4.9%，且无需模式匹配微调。
analysis.experiments: 在Amazon Neptune上部署Cypher支持的Freebase图，使用GraphQ、GrailQA和WebQSP基准评估，UniQGen在准确率和效率上均优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，对复杂约束的处理效果未知。
仅验证了Cypher语言，对其他图查询语言的泛化性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UniQGen框架，利用LLM代理和约束引导的Chase & Backchase变体，在Cypher属性图上生成高质量图查询，显著提升KGQA准确率。

papers.title: PSIRNet: Deep Learning-based Free-breathing Rapid Acquisition Late Enhancement Imaging
papers.abstract: Purpose: To develop and evaluate a deep learning (DL) method for free-breathing phase-sensitive inversion recovery (PSIR) late gadolinium enhancement (LGE) cardiac MRI that produces diagnostic-quality images from a single acquisition over two heartbeats, eliminating the need for 8 to 24 motion-corrected (MOCO) signal averages. Materials and Methods: Raw data comprising 800,653 slices from 55,917 patients, acquired on 1.5T and 3T scanners across multiple sites from 2016 to 2024, were used in this retrospective study. Data were split by patient: 640,000 slices (42,822 patients) for training and the remainder for validation and testing, without overlap. The training and testing data were from different institutions. PSIRNet, a physics-guided DL network with 845 million parameters, was trained end-to-end to reconstruct PSIR images with surface coil correction from a single interleaved IR/PD acquisition over two heartbeats. Reconstruction quality was evaluated using SSIM, PSNR, and NRMSE against MOCO PSIR references. Two expert cardiologists performed an independent qualitative assessment, scoring image quality on a 5-point Likert scale across bright blood, dark blood, and wideband LGE variants. Paired superiority and equivalence (margin = 0.25 Likert points) were tested using exact Wilcoxon signed-rank tests at a significance level of 0.05 using R version 4.5.2. Results: Both readers rated single-average PSIRNet reconstructions superior to MOCO PSIR for dark blood LGE (conservative P = .002); for bright blood and wideband, one reader rated it superior and the other confirmed equivalence (all P < .001). Inference required approximately 100 msec per slice versus more than 5 sec for MOCO PSIR. Conclusion: PSIRNet produces diagnostic-quality free-breathing PSIR LGE images from a single acquisition, enabling 8- to 24-fold reduction in acquisition time.

analysis.tldr: PSIRNet 利用深度学习从单次两心跳采集重建诊断质量的自由呼吸 PSIR LGE 心脏 MRI 图像，实现 8-24 倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统 PSIR LGE 心脏 MRI 需要多次屏气采集和运动校正平均，扫描时间长、患者配合度要求高，限制了临床应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从单次自由呼吸采集（两心跳）中重建出诊断质量的 PSIR LGE 图像，替代需要 8-24 次信号平均的 MOCO PSIR。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 PSIRNet，一个 8.45 亿参数的物理引导深度学习网络，端到端地从单次交错 IR/PD 采集（两心跳）重建 PSIR 图像，并包含表面线圈校正。
contributions: 提出 PSIRNet，实现从单次两心跳自由呼吸采集重建诊断质量 PSIR LGE 图像，加速 8-24 倍。
在大规模多中心数据集（55,917 患者，800,653 切片）上验证，两名专家评估显示单次 PSIRNet 在暗血 LGE 上优于 MOCO PSIR，在亮血和宽带 LGE 上等效或更优。
analysis.experiments: 使用 55,917 名患者的 800,653 切片数据（训练 42,822 患者 640,000 切片，测试来自不同机构），定量评估 SSIM、PSNR、NRMSE，两名心脏病专家进行 5 点 Likert 定性评分，采用 Wilcoxon 符号秩检验（显著性水平 0.05）。
limitations: 可能依赖特定 MRI 采集协议，泛化到其他序列或场强需验证。
网络参数巨大（8.45 亿），训练和部署资源需求高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PSIRNet 利用深度学习从单次两心跳采集重建诊断质量的自由呼吸 PSIR LGE 心脏 MRI 图像，实现 8-24 倍加速。

papers.title: InstrAct: Towards Action-Centric Understanding in Instructional Videos
papers.abstract: Understanding instructional videos requires recognizing fine-grained actions and modeling their temporal relations, which remains challenging for current Video Foundation Models (VFMs). This difficulty stems from noisy web supervision and a pervasive "static bias", where models rely on objects rather than motion cues. To address this, we propose InstrAction, a pretraining framework for instructional videos' action-centric representations. We first introduce a data-driven strategy, which filters noisy captions and generates action-centric hard negatives to disentangle actions from objects during contrastive learning. At the visual feature level, an Action Perceiver extracts motion-relevant tokens from redundant video encodings. Beyond contrastive learning, we introduce two auxiliary objectives: Dynamic Time Warping alignment (DTW-Align) for modeling sequential temporal structure, and Masked Action Modeling (MAM) for strengthening cross-modal grounding. Finally, we introduce the InstrAct Bench to evaluate action-centric understanding, where our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art VFMs on semantic reasoning, procedural logic, and fine-grained retrieval tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出InstrAct框架，通过动作中心表示学习提升教学视频理解，在多个任务上超越现有视频基础模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前视频基础模型（VFMs）在理解教学视频中的细粒度动作和时间关系时表现不佳，主要受限于网络噪声监督和静态偏差（模型依赖物体而非运动线索）。
analysis.problem: 如何从教学视频中学习动作中心的表示，以准确识别细粒度动作并建模其时间关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VFMs存在静态偏差，即模型更关注物体特征而非运动线索，且网络监督数据包含噪声，导致动作理解困难。
analysis.method: 提出InstrAct预训练框架，包括：1）数据驱动策略过滤噪声描述并生成动作中心硬负样本；2）Action Perceiver提取运动相关token；3）DTW-Align对齐时序结构；4）Masked Action Modeling增强跨模态定位。
contributions: 提出InstrAct框架，实现教学视频的动作中心表示学习。
引入InstrAct Bench基准，用于评估动作中心理解。
在语义推理、程序逻辑和细粒度检索任务上超越现有VFMs。
analysis.experiments: 在InstrAct Bench上评估，方法在语义推理、程序逻辑和细粒度检索任务中一致优于现有视频基础模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定教学视频领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
辅助目标的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出InstrAct框架，通过动作中心表示学习提升教学视频理解，在多个任务上超越现有视频基础模型。

papers.title: State Space Models are Effective Sign Language Learners: Exploiting Phonological Compositionality for Vocabulary-Scale Recognition
papers.abstract: Sign language recognition suffers from catastrophic scaling failure: models achieving high accuracy on small vocabularies collapse at realistic sizes. Existing architectures treat signs as atomic visual patterns, learning flat representations that cannot exploit the compositional structure of sign languages-systematically organized from discrete phonological parameters (handshape, location, movement, orientation) reused across the vocabulary. We introduce PHONSSM, enforcing phonological decomposition through anatomically-grounded graph attention, explicit factorization into orthogonal subspaces, and prototypical classification enabling few-shot transfer. Using skeleton data alone on the largest ASL dataset ever assembled (5,565 signs), PHONSSM achieves 72.1% on WLASL2000 (+18.4pp over skeleton SOTA), surpassing most RGB methods without video input. Gains are most dramatic in the few-shot regime (+225% relative), and the model transfers zero-shot to ASL Citizen, exceeding supervised RGB baselines. The vocabulary scaling bottleneck is fundamentally a representation learning problem, solvable through compositional inductive biases mirroring linguistic structure.

analysis.tldr: 提出PHONSSM模型，利用手语音系组合性实现词汇级识别，在最大ASL数据集上超越RGB方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 手语识别面临灾难性扩展失败：小词汇量高精度模型在真实规模下性能崩溃，现有架构将手势视为原子视觉模式，无法利用手语系统性的音系组合结构。
analysis.problem: 解决手语识别中词汇规模扩展时的表征学习瓶颈，即如何利用音系组合性实现可扩展的识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出手语识别存在灾难性扩展失败，现有方法将手势视为原子模式导致表征扁平化，无法复用跨词汇的音系参数。
analysis.method: PHONSSM通过解剖学引导的图注意力强制音系分解、正交子空间显式分解和原型分类实现少样本迁移，仅使用骨架数据。
contributions: 提出PHONSSM模型，利用音系组合性解决手语识别的词汇规模扩展问题。
在最大ASL数据集（5,565个符号）上达到72.1%准确率，超越骨架SOTA 18.4个百分点，并零样本迁移至ASL Citizen数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在WLASL2000和ASL Citizen数据集上评估，少样本场景相对提升225%，零样本迁移超过有监督RGB基线。
limitations: 仅使用骨架数据，可能忽略手部细微纹理等视觉信息。
方法依赖音系参数的手工定义，可能难以推广到所有手语变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PHONSSM模型，利用手语音系组合性实现词汇级识别，在最大ASL数据集上超越RGB方法。

papers.title: SIC3D: Style Image Conditioned Text-to-3D Gaussian Splatting Generation
papers.abstract: Recent progress in text-to-3D object generation enables the synthesis of detailed geometry from text input by leveraging 2D diffusion models and differentiable 3D representations. However, the approaches often suffer from limited controllability and texture ambiguity due to the limitation of the text modality. To address this, we present SIC3D, a controllable image-conditioned text-to-3D generation pipeline with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). There are two stages in SIC3D. The first stage generates the 3D object content from text with a text-to-3DGS generation model. The second stage transfers style from a reference image to the 3DGS. Within this stylization stage, we introduce a novel Variational Stylized Score Distillation (VSSD) loss to effectively capture both global and local texture patterns while mitigating conflicts between geometry and appearance. A scaling regularization is further applied to prevent the emergence of artifacts and preserve the pattern from the style image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SIC3D enhances geometric fidelity and style adherence, outperforming prior approaches in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations.

analysis.tldr: SIC3D 提出一种两阶段文本到3D生成方法，通过变分风格化分数蒸馏损失实现参考图像风格迁移，提升几何保真度和风格一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法因文本模态限制，存在可控性差和纹理模糊问题，难以精确控制生成物体的外观风格。
analysis.problem: 如何从文本描述生成3D物体，并利用参考图像控制其纹理风格，同时避免几何与外观冲突。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：第一阶段用文本到3DGS模型生成基础3D内容；第二阶段引入变分风格化分数蒸馏（VSSD）损失和缩放正则化，从参考图像迁移风格到3DGS。
contributions: 提出SIC3D，一种结合文本和图像条件的可控3D生成方法。
设计VSSD损失，有效捕获全局和局部纹理模式，缓解几何与外观冲突。
引入缩放正则化防止伪影，保持风格图像模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量参考图像，对风格迁移效果有影响。
两阶段流水线可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SIC3D 提出一种两阶段文本到3D生成方法，通过变分风格化分数蒸馏损失实现参考图像风格迁移，提升几何保真度和风格一致性。

papers.title: Cards Against LLMs: Benchmarking Humor Alignment in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Humor is one of the most culturally embedded and socially significant dimensions of human communication, yet it remains largely unexplored as a dimension of Large Language Model (LLM) alignment. In this study, five frontier language models play the same Cards Against Humanity games (CAH) as human players. The models select the funniest response from a slate of ten candidate cards across 9,894 rounds. While all models exceed the random baseline, alignment with human preference remains modest. More striking is that models agree with each other substantially more often than they agree with humans. We show that this preference is partly explained by systematic position biases and content preferences, raising the question whether LLM humor judgment reflects genuine preference or structural artifacts of inference and alignment.

analysis.tldr: LLM在幽默对齐上表现一般，模型间一致性远高于与人类的一致性，且受位置偏差和内容偏好影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 幽默是文化嵌入且社会重要的沟通维度，但作为LLM对齐维度尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在幽默判断上与人类偏好的对齐程度，并分析其偏差来源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型超过随机基线，但与人类偏好对齐程度有限；模型间一致性显著高于与人类的一致性；存在系统性的位置偏差和内容偏好。
analysis.method: 让五个前沿LLM玩Cards Against Humanity游戏，从十个候选卡片中选择最有趣的回答，共9894轮，比较模型选择与人类偏好。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM在幽默对齐上的表现
揭示模型间一致性高于人机一致性，并分析位置偏差和内容偏好
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用单一游戏（CAH）和有限模型
未深入分析不同文化背景下的幽默差异
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在幽默对齐上表现一般，模型间一致性远高于与人类的一致性，且受位置偏差和内容偏好影响。

papers.title: Artifacts as Memory Beyond the Agent Boundary
papers.abstract: The situated view of cognition holds that intelligent behavior depends not only on internal memory, but on an agent's active use of environmental resources. Here, we begin formalizing this intuition within Reinforcement Learning (RL). We introduce a mathematical framing for how the environment can functionally serve as an agent's memory, and prove that certain observations, which we call artifacts, can reduce the information needed to represent history. We corroborate our theory with experiments showing that when agents observe spatial paths, the amount of memory required to learn a performant policy is reduced. Interestingly, this effect arises unintentionally, and implicitly through the agent's sensory stream. We discuss the implications of our findings, and show they satisfy qualitative properties previously used to ground accounts of external memory. Moving forward, we anticipate further work on this subject could reveal principled ways to exploit the environment as a substitute for explicit internal memory.

analysis.tldr: 将环境作为智能体外部记忆的理论框架，证明特定观察（人工制品）可减少强化学习中的记忆需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 认知的情境观认为智能行为依赖于环境资源，但强化学习中缺乏形式化理论来理解环境如何作为记忆。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化环境作为智能体外部记忆的功能，并证明某些观察可降低历史表征所需的信息量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，当智能体观察空间路径时，学习高效策略所需的记忆量减少，且该效应是隐式通过感官流产生的。
analysis.method: 提出数学框架，定义人工制品（artifacts）为能减少历史信息需求的观察，并通过理论证明和实验验证。
contributions: 形式化了环境作为智能体外部记忆的数学框架
证明人工制品可降低强化学习中的记忆需求
analysis.experiments: 在空间路径观察任务中验证了理论，显示记忆需求减少。
limitations: 实验仅在简单空间路径场景中验证
未讨论复杂环境或连续控制任务中的适用性
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将环境作为智能体外部记忆的理论框架，证明特定观察（人工制品）可减少强化学习中的记忆需求。

papers.title: LLMs Underperform Graph-Based Parsers on Supervised Relation Extraction for Complex Graphs
papers.abstract: Relation extraction represents a fundamental component in the process of creating knowledge graphs, among other applications. Large language models (LLMs) have been adopted as a promising tool for relation extraction, both in supervised and in-context learning settings. However, in this work we show that their performance still lags behind much smaller architectures when the linguistic graph underlying a text has great complexity. To demonstrate this, we evaluate four LLMs against a graph-based parser on six relation extraction datasets with sentence graphs of varying sizes and complexities. Our results show that the graph-based parser increasingly outperforms the LLMs, as the number of relations in the input documents increases. This makes the much lighter graph-based parser a superior choice in the presence of complex linguistic graphs.

analysis.tldr: LLM在复杂图关系抽取任务上不如轻量级图解析器。
analysis.research_motivation: 关系抽取是知识图谱构建的关键，LLM被广泛用于该任务，但在复杂语言图场景下性能可能不足，需要评估其与专用图解析器的差距。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM与图解析器在复杂图关系抽取任务上的性能差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着输入文档中关系数量增加，图解析器相对于LLM的性能优势扩大。
analysis.method: 在六个关系抽取数据集上，比较四种LLM与一个图解析器的性能，数据集包含不同大小和复杂度的句子图。
contributions: 发现LLM在复杂图关系抽取中不如图解析器。
揭示了图复杂度对LLM性能的影响规律。
analysis.experiments: 在六个关系抽取数据集上评估了四种LLM与一个图解析器，结果显示图解析器在复杂图上表现更好。
limitations: 仅评估了特定LLM和图解析器，可能不具普遍性。
未深入分析LLM失败的具体原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在复杂图关系抽取任务上不如轻量级图解析器。

papers.title: AniGen: Unified $S^3$ Fields for Animatable 3D Asset Generation
papers.abstract: Animatable 3D assets, defined as geometry equipped with an articulated skeleton and skinning weights, are fundamental to interactive graphics, embodied agents, and animation production. While recent 3D generative models can synthesize visually plausible shapes from images, the results are typically static. Obtaining usable rigs via post-hoc auto-rigging is brittle and often produces skeletons that are topologically inconsistent with the generated geometry. We present AniGen, a unified framework that directly generates animate-ready 3D assets conditioned on a single image. Our key insight is to represent shape, skeleton, and skinning as mutually consistent $S^3$ Fields (Shape, Skeleton, Skin) defined over a shared spatial domain. To enable the robust learning of these fields, we introduce two technical innovations: (i) a confidence-decaying skeleton field that explicitly handles the geometric ambiguity of bone prediction at Voronoi boundaries, and (ii) a dual skin feature field that decouples skinning weights from specific joint counts, allowing a fixed-architecture network to predict rigs of arbitrary complexity. Built upon a two-stage flow-matching pipeline, AniGen first synthesizes a sparse structural scaffold and then generates dense geometry and articulation in a structured latent space. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AniGen substantially outperforms state-of-the-art sequential baselines in rig validity and animation quality, generalizing effectively to in-the-wild images across diverse categories including animals, humanoids, and machinery. Homepage: https://yihua7.github.io/AniGen-web/

analysis.tldr: AniGen通过统一S³场直接生成可动画化的3D资产，无需后处理自动绑定。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D生成模型通常输出静态几何，后处理自动绑定脆弱且骨架与几何拓扑不一致，难以直接用于动画制作。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张图像直接生成具有一致骨架和蒙皮权重的可动画化3D资产。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出S³场（形状、骨架、蒙皮）统一表示，并引入置信度衰减骨架场和双蒙皮特征场，基于两阶段流匹配管道生成。
contributions: 提出S³场统一表示形状、骨架和蒙皮，实现端到端可动画化3D资产生成。
引入置信度衰减骨架场处理Voronoi边界几何模糊性，双蒙皮特征场解耦蒙皮权重与关节数量。
analysis.experiments: 在动物、人形、机械等多类别图像上评估，在骨架有效性和动画质量上显著优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能对复杂拓扑或极端姿态的泛化能力有限。
两阶段流程可能引入累积误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AniGen通过统一S³场直接生成可动画化的3D资产，无需后处理自动绑定。

papers.title: LPLCv2: An Expanded Dataset for Fine-Grained License Plate Legibility Classification
papers.abstract: Modern Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) systems achieve outstanding performance in controlled, well-defined scenarios. However, large-scale real-world usage remains challenging due to low-quality imaging devices, compression artifacts, and suboptimal camera installation. Identifying illegible license plates (LPs) has recently become feasible through a dedicated benchmark; however, its impact has been limited by its small size and annotation errors. In this work, we expand the original benchmark to over three times the size with two extra capture days, revise its annotations and introduce novel labels. LP-level annotations include bounding boxes, text, and legibility level, while vehicle-level annotations comprise make, model, type, and color. Image-level annotations feature camera identity, capture conditions (e.g., rain and faulty cameras), acquisition time, and day ID. We present a novel training procedure featuring an Exponential Moving Average-based loss function and a refined learning rate scheduler, addressing common mistakes in testing. These improvements enable a baseline model to achieve an 89.5% F1-score on the test set, considerably surpassing the previous state of the art. We further introduce a novel protocol to explicitly addresses camera contamination between training and evaluation splits, where results show a small impact. Dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/lmlwojcik/LPLCv2-Dataset.

analysis.tldr: 扩展了车牌清晰度分类数据集LPLCv2，规模扩大三倍，并引入新训练方法提升F1-score至89.5%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有ALPR系统在真实场景中因低质量图像、压缩伪影和相机安装问题而性能下降，且原有基准数据集规模小、标注有误，限制了研究进展。
analysis.problem: 解决车牌清晰度分类任务中数据集规模不足、标注错误以及训练-评估数据泄露的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展数据集至原规模三倍，修正标注并新增标签；提出基于指数移动平均的损失函数和优化学习率调度器的训练流程。
contributions: 构建了LPLCv2数据集，规模扩大三倍，包含更多标注信息（车牌级、车辆级、图像级）。
提出新的训练方法（EMA损失函数和优化学习率调度器），使基线模型F1-score达89.5%，超越先前最优。
引入明确处理训练-评估相机污染的新协议，并验证其影响较小。
analysis.experiments: 在测试集上基线模型达到89.5% F1-score，显著超越先前最优；相机污染协议实验显示影响较小。
limitations: 数据集仍可能受限于特定地域或拍摄条件。
新训练方法的泛化性未在其他数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩展了车牌清晰度分类数据集LPLCv2，规模扩大三倍，并引入新训练方法提升F1-score至89.5%。

papers.title: Static Program Slicing Using Language Models With Dataflow-Aware Pretraining and Constrained Decoding
papers.abstract: Static program slicing is a fundamental software engineering technique for isolating code relevant to specific variables. While recent learning-based approaches using language models (LMs) show promise in automating slice prediction, they suffer from inaccurate dependency modeling and unconstrained generation, where LMs fail to capture precise data flow relations and produce slices containing hallucinated tokens and statements. To address these challenges, we propose Sliceformer, a novel approach that reformulates static program slicing as a sequence-to-sequence task using small language models such as CodeT5+. Sliceformer introduces two key innovations that directly target the identified limitations. First, to improve dependency modeling, we design dataflow-aware pretraining objectives that leverage data flow graphs (DFG) to teach models data dependencies through dataflow-preserving statement permutation and dataflow-aware span corruption. Second, to eliminate hallucination, we develop a constrained decoding mechanism that enforces both lexical and syntactic constraints. We evaluate Sliceformer on Java and Python program slicing benchmarks, demonstrating consistent improvements over state-of-the-art baselines with up to 22% gain in ExactMatch.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Sliceformer，通过数据流感知预训练和约束解码提升语言模型在静态程序切片任务中的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 静态程序切片是软件工程的基础技术，但现有基于语言模型的方法因依赖建模不准确和生成不受约束而导致切片包含幻觉标记和语句，亟需改进。
analysis.problem: 语言模型在静态程序切片中无法精确捕获数据流关系，且生成过程缺乏约束导致输出不合法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有LM方法在切片预测中依赖建模不准确，且无约束生成导致幻觉。
analysis.method: 提出 Sliceformer，基于CodeT5+，引入数据流感知预训练（数据流保持语句置换和数据流感知跨度破坏）和约束解码（词汇和句法约束）。
contributions: 提出数据流感知预训练目标，利用数据流图增强模型对数据依赖的建模能力。
设计约束解码机制，消除生成切片中的幻觉标记和语句。
analysis.experiments: 在Java和Python程序切片基准上评估，相比基线方法在ExactMatch上最高提升22%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于小语言模型如CodeT5+，扩展性未知。
约束解码可能增加推理时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Sliceformer，通过数据流感知预训练和约束解码提升语言模型在静态程序切片任务中的准确性。

papers.title: Functional Emotions or Situational Contexts? A Discriminating Test from the Mythos Preview System Card
papers.abstract: The Claude Mythos Preview system card deploys emotion vectors, sparse autoencoder (SAE) features, and activation verbalisers to study model internals during misaligned behaviour. The two primary toolkits are not jointly reported on the most alignment-relevant episodes. This note identifies two hypotheses that are qualitatively consistent with the published results: that the emotion vectors track functional emotions that causally drive behaviour, or that they are a projection of a richer situational-context structure onto human emotional axes. The hypotheses can be distinguished by cross-referencing the two toolkits on episodes where only one is currently reported: most directly, applying emotion probes to the strategic concealment episodes analysed only with SAE features. If emotion probes show flat activation while SAE features are strongly active, the alignment-relevant structure lies outside the emotion subspace. Which hypothesis is correct determines whether emotion-based monitoring will robustly detect dangerous model behaviour or systematically miss it.

analysis.tldr: 通过交叉引用两种工具包区分情感向量是功能性情绪还是情境上下文投影。
analysis.research_motivation: 对齐相关行为中模型内部状态的理解至关重要，但现有工具包（情感向量和SAE特征）未在关键场景联合分析，导致无法判断情感监控的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 区分两种假设：情感向量反映驱动行为的因果情绪，还是仅将丰富情境上下文投影到人类情感轴。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两种假设均与已发表结果定性一致，但可通过在仅SAE特征报告的隐藏行为片段上应用情感探针来区分。
analysis.method: 提出交叉引用两种工具包的实验设计：在战略隐藏行为片段上应用情感探针，若情感激活平坦而SAE特征强烈，则对齐相关结构在情感子空间之外。
contributions: 明确区分两种竞争假设的实验方案
为情感监控的鲁棒性提供判别性测试
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅提出实验设计，未给出实际结果
假设基于特定系统卡，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过交叉引用两种工具包区分情感向量是功能性情绪还是情境上下文投影。

papers.title: Decomposing the Delta: What Do Models Actually Learn from Preference Pairs?
papers.abstract: Preference optimization methods such as DPO and KTO are widely used for aligning language models, yet little is understood about what properties of preference data drive downstream reasoning gains. We ask: what aspects of a preference pair improve a reasoning model's performance on general reasoning tasks? We investigate two distinct notions of quality delta in preference data: generator-level delta, arising from the differences in capability between models that generate chosen and rejected reasoning traces, and sample-level delta, arising from differences in judged quality differences within an individual preference pair. To study generator-level delta, we vary the generator's scale and model family, and to study sample-level delta, we employ an LLM-as-a-judge to rate the quality of generated traces along multiple reasoning-quality dimensions. We find that increasing generator-level delta steadily improves performance on out-of-domain reasoning tasks and filtering data by sample-level delta can enable more data-efficient training. Our results suggest a twofold recipe for improving reasoning performance through preference optimization: maximize generator-level delta when constructing preference pairs and exploit sample-level delta to select the most informative training examples.

analysis.tldr: 偏好优化中，生成器能力差异（generator-level delta）和样本质量差异（sample-level delta）对推理性能的影响被分解研究，发现前者稳定提升泛化，后者可提高数据效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 偏好优化方法（如DPO、KTO）广泛用于语言模型对齐，但偏好数据中哪些属性驱动推理能力提升尚不明确，理解这些因素有助于更高效地构建训练数据。
analysis.problem: 探究偏好数据中两种质量差异（生成器级差异和样本级差异）对推理模型在通用推理任务上性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出生成器级差异的增大稳定提升跨域推理性能，而样本级差异的过滤可实现更数据高效的训练。
analysis.method: 通过改变生成器的规模和模型家族来研究生成器级差异；使用LLM-as-a-judge对生成轨迹按多个推理质量维度评分来研究样本级差异。
contributions: 首次分解偏好数据中的生成器级差异和样本级差异，并分别研究其对推理性能的影响。
提出一个两阶段配方：最大化生成器级差异构建偏好对，利用样本级差异选择信息量最大的训练样本。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于推理任务，对其他对齐目标（如安全性）的泛化性未知。
LLM-as-a-judge的评分质量可能影响样本级差异的可靠性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 偏好优化中，生成器能力差异（generator-level delta）和样本质量差异（sample-level delta）对推理性能的影响被分解研究，发现前者稳定提升泛化，后者可提高数据效率。

papers.title: AI Driven Soccer Analysis Using Computer Vision
papers.abstract: Sport analysis is crucial for team performance since it provides actionable data that can inform coaching decisions, improve player performance, and enhance team strategies. To analyze more complex features from game footage, a computer vision model can be used to identify and track key entities from the field. We propose the use of an object detection and tracking system to predict player positioning throughout the game. To translate this to positioning in relation to the field dimensions, we use a point prediction model to identify key points on the field and combine these with known field dimensions to extract actual distances. For the player-identification model, object detection models like YOLO and Faster R-CNN are evaluated on the accuracy of our custom video footage using multiple different evaluation metrics. The goal is to identify the best model for object identification to obtain the most accurate results when paired with SAM2 (Segment Anything Model 2) for segmentation and tracking. For the key point detection model, we use a CNN model to find consistent locations in the soccer field. Through homography, the positions of points and objects in the camera perspective will be transformed to a real-ground perspective. The segmented player masks from SAM2 are transformed from camera perspective to real-world field coordinates through homography, regardless of camera angle or movement. The transformed real-world coordinates can be used to calculate valuable tactical insights including player speed, distance covered, positioning heatmaps, and more complex team statistics, providing coaches and players with actionable performance data previously unavailable from standard video analysis.

analysis.tldr: 利用计算机视觉（YOLO、Faster R-CNN、SAM2）和单应性变换，从足球比赛视频中提取球员位置和战术数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 体育分析对团队表现至关重要，但传统视频分析难以自动提取复杂特征（如球员速度、覆盖距离、热图等），需要计算机视觉模型来自动化这一过程。
analysis.problem: 如何从足球比赛视频中准确检测、跟踪球员并计算其真实世界坐标，以获取战术洞察。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用YOLO或Faster R-CNN进行球员检测，SAM2进行分割和跟踪；同时用CNN模型预测球场关键点，通过单应性变换将球员位置从相机视角映射到真实场地坐标，进而计算战术指标。
contributions: 提出结合目标检测、分割和单应性变换的足球分析流水线
评估YOLO和Faster R-CNN在自定义视频上的检测精度
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量标注数据
单应性变换在极端视角下可能不准确
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用计算机视觉（YOLO、Faster R-CNN、SAM2）和单应性变换，从足球比赛视频中提取球员位置和战术数据。

papers.title: Demystifying the Silence of Correctness Bugs in PyTorch Compiler
papers.abstract: Performance optimization of AI infrastructure is key to the fast adoption of large language models (LLMs). The PyTorch compiler (torch.compile), a core optimization tool for deep learning (DL) models (including LLMs), has received due attention. However, torch.compile is prone to correctness bugs, which cause incorrect outputs of compiled DL models without triggering exceptions, crashes, or warnings. These bugs pose a serious threat to the reliability of downstream LLM applications. Data from the PyTorch community shows that 19.2% of high-priority issues are incorrect outputs of compiled DL models induced by torch.compile bugs, the second-most-common bug category (only behind program crashes at 19.57%). However, no systematic study has been conducted to specifically characterize and thereby detect these bugs. In this paper, we present the first empirical study of the correctness bugs in torch.compile, examine their characteristics, and assess the effectiveness of existing fuzzers in detecting them. Based on our findings, we propose a proof-of-concept testing technique named AlignGuard, tailored specifically for detecting correctness bugs in torch.compile. AlignGuard incorporates bug characteristics distilled from our empirical study, applying LLM-based test mutation to existing test cases for correctness bug detection. At the time of writing, AlignGuard has successfully detected 23 new correctness bugs in recent torch.compile. All these bugs have been confirmed or fixed by the PyTorch development team, and over half (14/23) of them are even marked as high-priority bugs, underscoring the usefulness of our technique.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统研究PyTorch编译器正确性bug，提出基于LLM的测试工具AlignGuard，已发现23个新bug。
analysis.research_motivation: PyTorch编译器（torch.compile）的正确性bug会导致模型输出错误且无异常提示，严重威胁LLM应用可靠性，但缺乏系统性研究。
analysis.problem: torch.compile中的正确性bug未被系统表征和检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 19.2%的高优先级问题是torch.compile引起的正确性bug，仅次于程序崩溃（19.57%），且现有fuzzer检测效果有限。
analysis.method: 通过实证研究提取bug特征，提出AlignGuard，利用LLM对现有测试用例进行变异以检测正确性bug。
contributions: 首次对torch.compile正确性bug进行实证研究，揭示其特征。
提出AlignGuard测试技术，基于LLM变异检测正确性bug，发现23个新bug，其中14个为高优先级。
analysis.experiments: AlignGuard检测到23个新正确性bug，均被PyTorch团队确认或修复，超过一半标记为高优先级。
limitations: 仅针对torch.compile，可能不适用于其他编译器。
依赖LLM变异，可能受限于测试用例覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统研究PyTorch编译器正确性bug，提出基于LLM的测试工具AlignGuard，已发现23个新bug。

papers.title: LMGenDrive: Bridging Multimodal Understanding and Generative World Modeling for End-to-End Driving
papers.abstract: Recent years have seen remarkable progress in autonomous driving, yet generalization to long-tail and open-world scenarios remains a major bottleneck for large-scale deployment. To address this challenge, some works use LLMs and VLMs for vision-language understanding and reasoning, enabling vehicles to interpret rare and safety-critical situations when generating actions. Others study generative world models to capture the spatio-temporal evolution of driving scenes, allowing agents to imagine possible futures before acting. Inspired by human intelligence, which unifies understanding and imagination, we explore a unified model for autonomous driving. We present LMGenDrive, the first framework that combines LLM-based multimodal understanding with generative world models for end-to-end closed-loop driving. Given multi-view camera inputs and natural-language instructions, LMGenDrive generates both future driving videos and control signals. This design provides complementary benefits: video prediction improves spatio-temporal scene modeling, while the LLM contributes strong semantic priors and instruction grounding from large-scale pretraining. We further propose a progressive three-stage training strategy, from vision pretraining to multi-step long-horizon driving, to improve stability and performance. LMGenDrive supports both low-latency online planning and autoregressive offline video generation. Experiments show that it significantly outperforms prior methods on challenging closed-loop benchmarks, with clear gains in instruction following, spatio-temporal understanding, and robustness to rare scenarios. These results suggest that unifying multimodal understanding and generation is a promising direction for more generalizable and robust embodied decision-making systems.

analysis.tldr: LMGenDrive 首次将 LLM 多模态理解与生成式世界模型统一，用于端到端自动驾驶，在闭环基准上显著优于先前方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶在长尾和开放世界场景中泛化能力不足，现有方法要么依赖 LLM/VLM 进行视觉语言理解与推理，要么使用生成式世界模型进行时空演化建模，但两者分离，缺乏人类统一理解与想象的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将多模态理解与生成式世界模型统一到一个框架中，实现端到端闭环驾驶，同时提升指令跟随、时空理解和罕见场景鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 LMGenDrive 框架，结合 LLM 多模态理解与生成式世界模型，输入多视角相机图像和自然语言指令，输出未来驾驶视频和控制信号；采用渐进式三阶段训练策略（视觉预训练、多步长时域驾驶）。
contributions: 首次将 LLM 多模态理解与生成式世界模型统一用于端到端闭环驾驶。
提出渐进式三阶段训练策略，提升稳定性和性能。
在挑战性闭环基准上显著优于先前方法，在指令跟随、时空理解和罕见场景鲁棒性方面有明确提升。
analysis.experiments: 在挑战性闭环基准上评估，LMGenDrive 显著优于先前方法，在指令跟随、时空理解和罕见场景鲁棒性方面有明确提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练数据和计算资源。
闭环驾驶的安全性验证可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LMGenDrive 首次将 LLM 多模态理解与生成式世界模型统一，用于端到端自动驾驶，在闭环基准上显著优于先前方法。

papers.title: Accelerating Transformer-Based Monocular SLAM via Geometric Utility Scoring
papers.abstract: Geometric Foundation Models (GFMs) have recently advanced monocular SLAM by providing robust, calibration-free 3D priors. However, deploying these models on dense video streams introduces significant computational redundancy. Current GFM-based SLAM systems typically rely on post hoc keyframe selection. Because of this, they must perform expensive dense geometric decoding simply to determine whether a frame contains novel geometry, resulting in late rejection and wasted computation. To mitigate this inefficiency, we propose LeanGate, a lightweight feed-forward frame-gating network. LeanGate predicts a geometric utility score to assess a frame's mapping value prior to the heavy GFM feature extraction and matching stages. As a predictive plug-and-play module, our approach bypasses over 90% of redundant frames. Evaluations on standard SLAM benchmarks demonstrate that LeanGate reduces tracking FLOPs by more than 85% and achieves a 5x end-to-end throughput speedup. Furthermore, it maintains the tracking and mapping accuracy of dense baselines. Project page: https://lean-gate.github.io/

analysis.tldr: LeanGate通过轻量级帧门控网络预测几何效用分数，在密集视频流中跳过90%以上冗余帧，实现单目SLAM的85%+计算量降低和5倍吞吐加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于几何基础模型（GFM）的单目SLAM在密集视频流上存在大量计算冗余，现有方法依赖事后关键帧选择，导致昂贵的几何解码浪费在冗余帧上。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损失跟踪与建图精度的前提下，在密集视频流中高效识别并跳过几何冗余帧，避免不必要的GFM特征提取与匹配计算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前GFM-SLAM系统需对每一帧执行密集几何解码才能判断其是否包含新几何信息，导致“晚拒绝”和计算浪费；实际视频流中大量帧的几何信息是冗余的。
analysis.method: 提出LeanGate，一个轻量级前馈帧门控网络，在GFM特征提取与匹配之前预测帧的几何效用分数，根据分数决定是否跳过该帧；作为即插即用模块，可集成到现有GFM-SLAM系统中。
contributions: 提出LeanGate，一种预测性帧门控网络，在密集视频流中高效跳过几何冗余帧，避免计算浪费。
在标准SLAM基准上实现85%+的跟踪FLOPs减少和5倍端到端吞吐加速，同时保持密集基线的跟踪与建图精度。
analysis.experiments: 在标准SLAM基准上评估，LeanGate减少了超过85%的跟踪FLOPs，实现了5倍端到端吞吐加速，并保持了密集基线的跟踪与建图精度。
limitations: 可能依赖GFM的特定架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
门控网络本身引入少量额外计算，在极低冗余场景下收益可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LeanGate通过轻量级帧门控网络预测几何效用分数，在密集视频流中跳过90%以上冗余帧，实现单目SLAM的85%+计算量降低和5倍吞吐加速。

papers.title: What Matters in Virtual Try-Off? Dual-UNet Diffusion Model For Garment Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Virtual Try-On (VTON) has seen rapid advancements, providing a strong foundation for generative fashion tasks. However, the inverse problem, Virtual Try-Off (VTOFF)-aimed at reconstructing the canonical garment from a draped-on image-remains a less understood domain, distinct from the heavily researched field of VTON. In this work, we seek to establish a robust architectural foundation for VTOFF by studying and adapting various diffusion-based strategies from VTON and general Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs). We focus our investigation on the Dual-UNet Diffusion Model architecture and analyze three axes of design: (i) Generation Backbone: comparing Stable Diffusion variants; (ii) Conditioning: ablating different mask designs, masked/unmasked inputs for image conditioning, and the utility of high-level semantic features; and (iii) Losses and Training Strategies: evaluating the impact of the auxiliary attention-based loss, perceptual objectives and multi-stage curriculum schedules. Extensive experiments reveal trade-offs across various configuration options. Evaluated on VITON-HD and DressCode datasets, our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance with a drop of 9.5\% on the primary metric DISTS and competitive performance on LPIPS, FID, KID, and SSIM, providing both stronger baselines and insights to guide future Virtual Try-Off research.

analysis.tldr: 提出Dual-UNet扩散模型用于虚拟试脱任务，通过系统消融设计实现SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 虚拟试穿（VTON）已取得显著进展，但其逆问题——虚拟试脱（VTOFF）——即从穿着图像重建标准服装，仍研究不足，缺乏稳健的架构基础。
analysis.problem: 如何为VTOFF任务设计有效的扩散模型架构，并系统分析生成主干、条件设计、损失与训练策略的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用Dual-UNet扩散模型架构，从三个维度进行消融研究：生成主干（比较Stable Diffusion变体）、条件设计（不同掩码设计、掩码/非掩码输入、高层语义特征）、损失与训练策略（辅助注意力损失、感知目标、多阶段课程调度）。
contributions: 首次系统研究VTOFF任务，建立Dual-UNet扩散模型架构基线。
通过大量消融实验揭示不同配置的权衡，并在VITON-HD和DressCode数据集上实现SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在VITON-HD和DressCode数据集上评估，主要指标DISTS降低9.5%，LPIPS、FID、KID、SSIM上表现有竞争力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定服装类型或图像条件。
计算成本可能较高，未讨论推理效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Dual-UNet扩散模型用于虚拟试脱任务，通过系统消融设计实现SOTA性能。

papers.title: Model Space Reasoning as Search in Feedback Space for Planning Domain Generation
papers.abstract: The generation of planning domains from natural language descriptions remains an open problem even with the advent of large language models and reasoning models. Recent work suggests that while LLMs have the ability to assist with domain generation, they are still far from producing high quality domains that can be deployed in practice. To this end, we investigate the ability of an agentic language model feedback framework to generate planning domains from natural language descriptions that have been augmented with a minimal amount of symbolic information. In particular, we evaluate the quality of the generated domains under various forms of symbolic feedback, including landmarks, and output from the VAL plan validator. Using these feedback mechanisms, we experiment using heuristic search over model space to optimize domain quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出在反馈空间中进行模型空间搜索以生成规划领域，利用符号反馈提升LLM生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 从自然语言描述生成规划领域仍是一个开放问题，现有LLM生成的领域质量远未达到实际部署标准。
analysis.problem: 如何利用符号反馈机制引导LLM生成高质量、可部署的规划领域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建智能体语言模型反馈框架，在模型空间中进行启发式搜索，利用地标和VAL验证器等符号反馈优化领域生成。
contributions: 提出一种结合符号反馈的模型空间搜索方法用于规划领域生成。
实验评估了多种符号反馈形式（地标、VAL验证器）对领域质量的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖符号反馈的完整性和准确性。
搜索效率可能受限于模型空间大小。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在反馈空间中进行模型空间搜索以生成规划领域，利用符号反馈提升LLM生成质量。

papers.title: Deep Learning-Based Tracking and Lineage Reconstruction of Ligament Breakup
papers.abstract: The disintegration of liquid sheets into ligaments and droplets involves highly transient, multi-scale dynamics that are difficult to quantify from high-speed shadowgraphy images. Identifying droplets, ligaments, and blobs formed during breakup, along with tracking across frames, is essential for spray analysis. However, conventional multi-object tracking frameworks impose strict one-to-one temporal associations and cannot represent one-to-many fragmentation events. In this study, we present a two-stage deep learning framework for object detection and temporal relationship modeling across frames. The framework captures ligament deformation, fragmentation, and parent-child lineage during liquid sheet disintegration. In the first stage, a Faster R-CNN with a ResNet-50 backbone and Feature Pyramid Network detects and classifies ligaments and droplets in high-speed shadowgraphy recordings of an impinging Carbopol gel jet. A morphology-preserving synthetic data generation strategy augments the training set without introducing physically implausible configurations, achieving a held-out F1 score of up to 0.872 across fourteen original-to-synthetic configurations. In the second stage, a Transformer-augmented multilayer perceptron classifies inter-frame associations into continuation, fragmentation (one-to-many), and non-association using physics-informed geometric features. Despite severe class imbalance, the model achieves 86.1% accuracy, 93.2% precision, and perfect recall (1.00) for fragmentation events. Together, the framework enables automated reconstruction of fragmentation trees, preservation of parent-child lineage, and extraction of breakup statistics such as fragment multiplicity and droplet size distributions. By explicitly identifying children droplets formed from ligament fragmentation, the framework provides automated analysis of the primary atomization mode.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段深度学习框架，结合Faster R-CNN和Transformer增强MLP，实现液膜破碎中韧带与液滴的检测、跟踪及谱系重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 液膜破碎涉及高度瞬态的多尺度动力学，传统多目标跟踪框架无法处理一对多的破碎事件，难以从高速阴影图像中量化分析韧带和液滴的形成与演化。
analysis.problem: 如何从高速阴影图像中自动检测韧带和液滴，并跨帧建立时间关联，特别是处理破碎事件中的一对多关系，重建父-子谱系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段深度学习框架：第一阶段使用Faster R-CNN（ResNet-50骨干+FPN）检测和分类韧带与液滴，并通过形态保持的合成数据增强训练；第二阶段使用Transformer增强的多层感知机，基于物理几何特征将帧间关联分类为延续、破碎（一对多）和无关联。
contributions: 提出能处理一对多破碎事件的跟踪框架，实现韧带破碎的父-子谱系重建。
设计形态保持的合成数据生成策略，提升检测性能（F1最高0.872）。
在严重类别不平衡下，破碎事件分类达到86.1%准确率、93.2%精度和100%召回率。
analysis.experiments: 在高速阴影图像数据集上评估，检测阶段F1最高0.872，关联分类准确率86.1%，精度93.2%，破碎事件召回率1.00。
limitations: 可能依赖特定实验设置（Carbopol凝胶射流），泛化性需验证。
合成数据策略可能无法完全覆盖真实物理场景的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段深度学习框架，结合Faster R-CNN和Transformer增强MLP，实现液膜破碎中韧带与液滴的检测、跟踪及谱系重建。

papers.title: Every Response Counts: Quantifying Uncertainty of LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems through Tensor Decomposition
papers.abstract: While Large Language Model-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) consistently outperform single-agent systems on complex tasks, their intricate interactions introduce critical reliability challenges arising from communication dynamics and role dependencies. Existing Uncertainty Quantification methods, typically designed for single-turn outputs, fail to address the unique complexities of the MAS. Specifically, these methods struggle with three distinct challenges: the cascading uncertainty in multi-step reasoning, the variability of inter-agent communication paths, and the diversity of communication topologies. To bridge this gap, we introduce MATU, a novel framework that quantifies uncertainty through tensor decomposition. MATU moves beyond analyzing final text outputs by representing entire reasoning trajectories as embedding matrices and organizing multiple execution runs into a higher-order tensor. By applying tensor decomposition, we disentangle and quantify distinct sources of uncertainty, offering a comprehensive reliability measure that is generalizable across different agent structures. We provide comprehensive experiments to show that MATU effectively estimates holistic and robust uncertainty across diverse tasks and communication topologies.

analysis.tldr: 提出MATU框架，通过张量分解量化LLM多智能体系统的不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM多智能体系统在复杂任务上表现优于单智能体，但其内部通信动态和角色依赖引入了可靠性挑战，现有不确定性量化方法无法处理多步推理的级联不确定性、智能体间通信路径的变异性和通信拓扑的多样性。
analysis.problem: 如何有效量化LLM多智能体系统的不确定性，以解决多步推理、通信路径和拓扑多样性带来的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MATU框架，将整个推理轨迹表示为嵌入矩阵，并将多次执行组织成高阶张量，通过张量分解分离和量化不同来源的不确定性。
contributions: 提出MATU框架，首次通过张量分解量化LLM多智能体系统的不确定性。
MATU能够处理多步推理的级联不确定性、通信路径变异性和拓扑多样性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在多种任务和通信拓扑上进行了综合实验，但未提供具体结果。
limitations: 可能依赖张量分解的计算效率，大规模系统下开销较大。
未讨论不同张量分解方法的选择对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MATU框架，通过张量分解量化LLM多智能体系统的不确定性。

papers.title: Parameterized Complexity Of Representing Models Of MSO Formulas
papers.abstract: Monadic second order logic (MSO2) plays an important role in parameterized complexity due to the Courcelle's theorem. This theorem states that the problem of checking if a given graph has a property specified by a given MSO2 formula can be solved by a parameterized linear time algorithm with respect to the treewidth of the graph and the size of the formula. We extend this result by showing that models of MSO2 formula with free variables can be represented with a decision diagram whose size is parameterized linear in the above mentioned parameter. In particular, we show a parameterized linear upper bound on the size of a sentential decision diagram (SDD) when treewidth is considered and a parameterized linear upper bound on the size of an ordered binary decision diagram (OBDD) when considering the pathwidth in the parameter. In addition, building on a lower bound on the size of OBDD by Razgon (2014), we show that there is an MSO2 formula and a class of graphs with bounded treewidth which do not admit an OBDD with the size parameterized by the treewidth. Our result offers a new perspective on the Courcelle's theorem and connects it to the area of knowledge representation.

analysis.tldr: 将MSO2公式的模型表示为决策图，并证明其大小在树宽/路径宽参数下具有参数化线性上界。
analysis.research_motivation: Courcelle定理是参数化复杂度中的核心结果，但仅处理判定问题；将MSO2公式的模型表示为紧凑的决策图，可连接知识表示领域并扩展定理的应用范围。
analysis.problem: 如何将MSO2公式的模型（自由变量赋值）表示为决策图，并分析其大小在树宽/路径宽参数下的复杂度边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用树宽和路径宽参数，分别构造sentential decision diagram (SDD)和ordered binary decision diagram (OBDD)来表示MSO2公式的模型，并证明上界；同时基于Razgon的下界构造反例。
contributions: 证明MSO2公式的模型可表示为SDD，其大小在树宽参数下是参数化线性的。
证明MSO2公式的模型可表示为OBDD，其大小在路径宽参数下是参数化线性的。
证明存在MSO2公式和图类（有界树宽）使得OBDD大小不能参数化地由树宽界定。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅理论分析，未涉及实际应用或实验验证。
下界结果仅针对OBDD，SDD是否也有类似下界未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将MSO2公式的模型表示为决策图，并证明其大小在树宽/路径宽参数下具有参数化线性上界。

papers.title: RS-OVC: Open-Vocabulary Counting for Remote-Sensing Data
papers.abstract: Object-Counting for remote-sensing (RS) imagery is attracting increasing research interest due to its crucial role in a wide and diverse set of applications. While several promising methods for RS object-counting have been proposed, existing methods focus on a closed, pre-defined set of object classes. This limitation necessitates costly re-annotation and model re-training to adapt current approaches for counting of novel objects that have not been seen during training, and severely inhibits their application in dynamic, real-world monitoring scenarios. To address this gap, in this work we propose RS-OVC - the first Open Vocabulary Counting (OVC) model for Remote-Sensing and aerial imagery. We show that our model is capable of accurate counting of novel object classes, that were unseen during training, based solely on textual and/or visual conditioning.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向遥感图像的开集计数模型，支持基于文本或视觉提示对未见类别进行计数。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像计数在众多应用中至关重要，但现有方法局限于预定义类别，无法处理新出现的物体，导致高昂的重新标注和模型训练成本。
analysis.problem: 解决遥感图像中开放词汇计数问题，即对训练时未见过的物体类别进行准确计数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RS-OVC模型，利用文本和/或视觉条件实现开放词汇计数。
contributions: 首次提出面向遥感图像的开集计数任务和模型RS-OVC。
模型仅依赖文本或视觉提示即可对未见类别进行计数。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉-语言模型，对罕见类别或复杂场景的泛化能力待验证。
未提及计数精度与现有闭集方法的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向遥感图像的开集计数模型，支持基于文本或视觉提示对未见类别进行计数。

papers.title: Unified Multimodal Uncertain Inference
papers.abstract: We introduce Unified Multimodal Uncertain Inference (UMUI), a multimodal inference task spanning text, audio, and video, where models must produce calibrated probability estimates of hypotheses conditioned on a premise in any modality or combination. While uncertain inference has been explored in text, extension to other modalities has been limited to single-modality binary entailment judgments, leaving no framework for fine-grained probabilistic reasoning in or across other modalities. To address this, we curate a human-annotated evaluation set with scalar probability judgments across audio, visual, and audiovisual settings, and additionally evaluate on existing text and audio benchmarks. We introduce CLUE (Calibrated Latent Uncertainty Estimation), which combines self-consistent teacher calibration and distribution-based confidence probing to produce calibrated predictions. We demonstrate that our 3B-parameter model achieves equivalent or stronger performance than baselines up to 32B parameters across all modalities.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一多模态不确定推理任务及CLUE方法，3B模型性能媲美32B基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有不确定推理局限于文本，多模态场景缺乏细粒度概率推理框架，阻碍了模型在跨模态场景下的可靠决策。
analysis.problem: 如何构建多模态（文本、音频、视频）下的校准概率估计推理任务，并设计高效方法实现跨模态校准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CLUE方法，结合自一致教师校准和基于分布的置信度探测，生成校准预测。
contributions: 提出统一多模态不确定推理任务UMUI，覆盖文本、音频、视频及跨模态场景。
构建人工标注的标量概率评估集，涵盖音频、视觉和视听设置。
提出CLUE方法，实现3B参数模型性能媲美32B基线。
analysis.experiments: 在自建评估集及现有文本、音频基准上评估，3B模型达到或超过32B基线性能。
limitations: 可能未探索更大规模模型或更多模态组合。
人工标注数据集规模可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一多模态不确定推理任务及CLUE方法，3B模型性能媲美32B基线。

papers.title: Unsupervised Local Plasticity in a Multi-Frequency VisNet Hierarchy
papers.abstract: We introduce an unsupervised visual representation learning system based entirely on local plasticity rules, without labels, backpropagation, or global error signals. The model is a VisNet-inspired hierarchical architecture combining opponent color inputs, multi-frequency Gabor and wavelet feature streams, competitive normalization with lateral inhibition, saliency modulation, associative memory, and a feedback loop. All representation learning occurs through continuous local plasticity applied to unlabeled image streams over 300 epochs. Performance is evaluated using a fixed linear probe trained only at readout time. The system achieves 80.1 percent accuracy on CIFAR-10 and 47.6 percent on CIFAR-100, improving over a Hebbian-only baseline. Ablation studies show that anti-Hebbian decorrelation, free-energy inspired plasticity, and associative memory are the main contributors, with strong synergistic effects. Even without learning, the fixed architecture alone reaches 61.4 percent on CIFAR-10, indicating that plasticity, not only inductive bias, drives most of the performance. Control analyses show that independently trained probes match co-trained ones within 0.3 percentage points, and a nearest-class-mean classifier achieves 78.3 percent without gradient-based training, confirming the intrinsic structure of the learned features. Overall, the system narrows but does not eliminate the performance gap to backpropagation-trained CNNs (5.7 percentage points on CIFAR-10, 7.5 percentage points on CIFAR-100), demonstrating that structured local plasticity alone can learn strong visual representations from raw unlabeled data.

analysis.tldr: 基于局部可塑性规则的无监督视觉表征学习系统，在CIFAR-10/100上接近反向传播CNN性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物启发的无监督学习通常依赖全局误差信号或反向传播，而大脑皮层可能使用局部可塑性规则；探索纯局部可塑性能否学习强视觉表征，有助于理解生物学习机制并开发更高效的类脑算法。
analysis.problem: 设计一个完全基于局部可塑性规则（无标签、无反向传播、无全局误差信号）的无监督视觉表征学习系统，并评估其性能上限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出固定架构本身（无学习）在CIFAR-10上达到61.4%准确率，说明归纳偏置贡献显著，但可塑性驱动了大部分性能提升。
analysis.method: 基于VisNet层次架构，结合对手颜色输入、多频Gabor与小波特征流、竞争性归一化与侧抑制、显著性调制、联想记忆和反馈回路；所有表征学习通过连续局部可塑性规则（Hebbian/anti-Hebbian、自由能启发可塑性）在无标签图像流上训练300个epoch。
contributions: 提出首个完全基于局部可塑性规则的无监督视觉表征学习系统，无需反向传播或全局信号。
在CIFAR-10/100上达到80.1%/47.6%准确率，仅比反向传播CNN低5.7/7.5个百分点，缩小了性能差距。
通过消融实验识别出anti-Hebbian去相关、自由能启发可塑性和联想记忆为主要贡献模块，并发现强协同效应。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上评估，使用固定线性探针在读出时训练；消融研究分析各组件贡献；控制实验显示独立训练探针与联合训练探针差异在0.3个百分点内；最近类均值分类器达到78.3%准确率。
limitations: 性能仍低于反向传播CNN（CIFAR-10差5.7个百分点，CIFAR-100差7.5个百分点）。
仅在小型数据集（CIFAR）上验证，未在更大规模或更复杂数据集上测试。
架构设计复杂，可能难以扩展到更深或更宽的层次。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于局部可塑性规则的无监督视觉表征学习系统，在CIFAR-10/100上接近反向传播CNN性能。

papers.title: EfficientSign: An Attention-Enhanced Lightweight Architecture for Indian Sign Language Recognition
papers.abstract: How do you build a sign language recognizer that works on a phone? That question drove this work. We built EfficientSign, a lightweight model which takes EfficientNet-B0 and focuses on two attention modules (Squeeze-and-Excitation for channel focus, and a spatial attention layer that focuses on the hand gestures). We tested it against five other approaches on 12,637 images of Indian Sign Language alphabets, all 26 classes, using 5-fold cross-validation. EfficientSign achieves the accuracy of 99.94% (+/-0.05%), which matches the performance of ResNet18's 99.97% accuracy, but with 62% fewer parameters (4.2M vs 11.2M). We also experimented with feeding deep features (1,280-dimensional vectors pulled from EfficientNet-B0's pooling layer) into classical classifiers. SVM achieved the accuracy of 99.63%, Logistic Regression achieved the accuracy of 99.03% and KNN achieved accuracy of 96.33%. All of these blow past the 92% that SURF-based methods managed on a similar dataset back in 2015.
