Our results show that attention-enhanced learning model provides an efficient and deployable solution for ISL recognition without requiring a massive model or hand-tuned feature pipelines anymore.

analysis.tldr: EfficientSign 是一种轻量级印度手语识别模型，通过注意力机制在保持高精度的同时大幅减少参数量。
analysis.research_motivation: 手语识别模型通常参数量大、计算成本高，难以部署在手机等移动设备上，需要轻量高效的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高识别精度的前提下，构建参数量少、适合移动端部署的印度手语字母识别模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 EfficientNet-B0 骨干网络，集成 Squeeze-and-Excitation 通道注意力和空间注意力层，并探索将深度特征输入传统分类器（SVM、逻辑回归、KNN）。
contributions: 提出 EfficientSign 轻量级架构，在 ISL 字母识别上达到 99.94% 准确率，参数量仅 4.2M。
验证了注意力机制在轻量级手语识别中的有效性，并展示了深度特征结合传统分类器的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 12,637 张印度手语字母图像（26 类）上使用 5 折交叉验证，与 ResNet18 等五种方法对比，并测试了 SVM、逻辑回归、KNN 作为分类器的性能。
limitations: 仅针对静态字母识别，未涉及连续手语或动态手势。
数据集规模相对较小，可能限制泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EfficientSign 是一种轻量级印度手语识别模型，通过注意力机制在保持高精度的同时大幅减少参数量。

papers.title: RAMP: Hybrid DRL for Online Learning of Numeric Action Models
papers.abstract: Automated planning algorithms require an action model specifying the preconditions and effects of each action, but obtaining such a model is often hard. Learning action models from observations is feasible, but existing algorithms for numeric domains are offline, requiring expert traces as input. We propose the Reinforcement learning, Action Model learning, and Planning (RAMP) strategy for learning numeric planning action models online via interactions with the environment. RAMP simultaneously trains a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) policy, learns a numeric action model from past interactions, and uses that model to plan future actions when possible. These components form a positive feedback loop: the RL policy gathers data to refine the action model, while the planner generates plans to continue training the RL policy. To facilitate this integration of RL and numeric planning, we developed Numeric PDDLGym, an automated framework for converting numeric planning problems to Gym environments. Experimental results on standard IPC numeric domains show that RAMP significantly outperforms PPO, a well-known DRL algorithm, in terms of solvability and plan quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合DRL框架RAMP，在线学习数值动作模型，显著优于PPO。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动化规划算法需要动作模型，但获取模型困难；现有数值域动作模型学习方法是离线的，需要专家轨迹作为输入，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在线学习数值规划动作模型，无需专家轨迹，同时提升规划性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RAMP策略，同时训练深度强化学习策略、从历史交互中学习数值动作模型，并利用该模型规划未来动作，形成正反馈循环。同时开发Numeric PDDLGym框架将数值规划问题转换为Gym环境。
contributions: 提出RAMP，首个在线学习数值动作模型的混合DRL方法。
开发Numeric PDDLGym框架，桥接数值规划与强化学习环境。
实验表明RAMP在标准IPC数值域上显著优于PPO。
analysis.experiments: 在标准IPC数值域上实验，RAMP在可解性和规划质量上显著优于PPO。
limitations: 可能依赖环境交互效率，在复杂高维状态空间下收敛慢。
动作模型学习精度可能受限于RL策略的探索能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合DRL框架RAMP，在线学习数值动作模型，显著优于PPO。

papers.title: MedThink: Enhancing Diagnostic Accuracy in Small Models via Teacher-Guided Reasoning Correction
papers.abstract: Accurate clinical diagnosis requires extensive domain knowledge and complex clinical reasoning capabilities. Although large language models (LLMs) hold great potential for clinical reasoning, their high computational and memory requirements limit their deployment in resource-constrained environments. Knowledge distillation (KD) can compress LLM capabilities into smaller models, but traditional KD merely transfers superficial answer patterns and fails to preserve the structured reasoning required for reliable diagnosis. To address this, we propose a two-stage distillation framework, MedThink, designed to cultivate robust clinical reasoning in small language models (SLMs). In the first stage, a teacher LLM screens data and injects domain-knowledge explanations to fine-tune a student model, establishing a knowledge foundation. In the second stage, the teacher evaluates the student's errors, generates reasoning chains linking knowledge to correct answers, and refines the student's diagnostic reasoning through a second round of fine-tuning. We evaluate MedThink on general medical benchmarks and a gastroenterology dataset comprising 955 question-answer pairs. Experiments demonstrate that MedThink outperforms six distillation strategies in all benchmarks: achieving an improvement of up to 12.7% over the student baseline in general tasks, and reaching a total top accuracy of 56.4% in gastroenterology evaluation. This indicates that iterative distillation centered on reasoning can significantly enhance the diagnostic accuracy and generalization capabilities of SLMs whilst maintaining computational efficiency. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/destinybird/PrecisionBoost.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段蒸馏框架MedThink，通过教师模型引导推理纠正，提升小模型在临床诊断中的准确性和推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在临床推理中潜力大，但计算和内存需求高，难以部署在资源受限环境；传统知识蒸馏仅迁移表面答案模式，无法保留结构化推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在小语言模型中有效保留和提升临床诊断所需的结构化推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统知识蒸馏无法保留结构化推理，导致小模型诊断可靠性不足。
analysis.method: 两阶段蒸馏框架：第一阶段教师筛选数据并注入领域知识解释微调学生模型；第二阶段教师评估学生错误，生成推理链连接知识与正确答案，再次微调优化推理。
contributions: 提出MedThink两阶段蒸馏框架，通过教师引导的推理纠正提升小模型诊断准确性。
在通用医学基准和胃肠病学数据集上验证，优于六种蒸馏策略，最高提升12.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在通用医学基准和包含955个问答对的胃肠病学数据集上评估，MedThink在所有基准上优于六种蒸馏策略，通用任务最高提升12.7%，胃肠病学评估总准确率达56.4%。
limitations: 仅在一个专科数据集上验证，泛化性需更多领域测试。
依赖教师模型质量，可能受限于教师推理链的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段蒸馏框架MedThink，通过教师模型引导推理纠正，提升小模型在临床诊断中的准确性和推理能力。

papers.title: GaussiAnimate: Reconstruct and Rig Animatable Categories with Level of Dynamics
papers.abstract: Free-form bones, that conform closely to the surface, can effectively capture non-rigid deformations, but lack a kinematic structure necessary for intuitive control. Thus, we propose a Scaffold-Skin Rigging System, termed "Skelebones", with three key steps: (1) Bones: compress temporally-consistent deformable Gaussians into free-form bones, approximating non-rigid surface deformations; (2) Skeleton: extract a Mean Curvature Skeleton from canonical Gaussians and refine it temporally, ensuring a category-agnostic, motion-adaptive, and topology-correct kinematic structure; (3) Binding: bind the skeleton and bones via non-parametric partwise motion matching (PartMM), synthesizing novel bone motions by matching, retrieving, and blending existing ones. Collectively, these three steps enable us to compress the Level of Dynamics of 4D shapes into compact skelebones that are both controllable and expressive. We validate our approach on both synthetic and real-world datasets, achieving significant improvements in reanimation performance across unseen poses-with 17.3% PSNR gains over Linear Blend Skinning (LBS) and 21.7% over Bag-of-Bones (BoB)-while maintaining excellent reconstruction fidelity, particularly for characters exhibiting complex non-rigid surface dynamics. Our Partwise Motion Matching algorithm demonstrates strong generalization to both Gaussian and mesh representations, especially under low-data regime (~1000 frames), achieving 48.4% RMSE improvement over robust LBS and outperforming GRU- and MLP-based learning methods by >20%. Code will be made publicly available for research purposes at cookmaker.cn/gaussianimate.

analysis.tldr: 提出Skelebones骨架-皮肤绑定系统，通过压缩4D高斯为可控骨骼实现类别级动画重建与操控。
analysis.research_motivation: 自由形态骨骼能捕捉非刚性变形但缺乏运动学结构，现有方法难以同时实现可控性和表达力。
analysis.problem: 如何从4D高斯表示中提取类别无关、运动自适应的运动学骨架并绑定到自由形态骨骼，实现直观控制与高保真重动画。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自由形态骨骼缺乏运动学结构，而传统线性混合蒙皮（LBS）和Bag-of-Bones（BoB）在非刚性表面动态上表现不足。
analysis.method: 三步Skelebones系统：1) 将时域一致的可变形高斯压缩为自由形态骨骼；2) 从规范高斯提取平均曲率骨架并时域细化；3) 通过非参数部分匹配（PartMM）绑定骨架和骨骼，合成新骨骼运动。
contributions: 提出Skelebones系统，实现类别级4D形状的紧凑、可控且表达力强的骨骼表示。
提出PartMM算法，在低数据量下对高斯和网格表示均具有强泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上验证，重动画性能显著提升：PSNR比LBS高17.3%，比BoB高21.7%；PartMM在约1000帧数据下RMSE比鲁棒LBS改善48.4%，优于GRU和MLP方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量4D高斯重建结果。
类别级泛化性在极端拓扑变化下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Skelebones骨架-皮肤绑定系统，通过压缩4D高斯为可控骨骼实现类别级动画重建与操控。

papers.title: ETCH-X: Robustify Expressive Body Fitting to Clothed Humans with Composable Datasets
papers.abstract: Human body fitting, which aligns parametric body models such as SMPL to raw 3D point clouds of clothed humans, serves as a crucial first step for downstream tasks like animation and texturing. An effective fitting method should be both locally expressive-capturing fine details such as hands and facial features-and globally robust to handle real-world challenges, including clothing dynamics, pose variations, and noisy or partial inputs. Existing approaches typically excel in only one aspect, lacking an all-in-one solution. We upgrade ETCH to ETCH-X, which leverages a tightness-aware fitting paradigm to filter out clothing dynamics ("undress"), extends expressiveness with SMPL-X, and replaces explicit sparse markers (which are highly sensitive to partial data) with implicit dense correspondences ("dense fit") for more robust and fine-grained body fitting. Our disentangled "undress" and "dense fit" modular stages enable separate and scalable training on composable data sources, including diverse simulated garments (CLOTH3D), large-scale full-body motions (AMASS), and fine-grained hand gestures (InterHand2.6M), improving outfit generalization and pose robustness of both bodies and hands. Our approach achieves robust and expressive fitting across diverse clothing, poses, and levels of input completeness, delivering a substantial performance improvement over ETCH on both: 1) seen data, such as 4D-Dress (MPJPE-All, 33.0% ) and CAPE (V2V-Hands, 35.8% ), and 2) unseen data, such as BEDLAM2.0 (MPJPE-All, 80.8% ; V2V-All, 80.5% ). Code and models will be released at https://xiaobenli00.github.io/ETCH-X/.

analysis.tldr: ETCH-X 通过紧致感知拟合和隐式密集对应，实现了对穿着衣物人体的鲁棒且表达性强的参数化模型拟合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有的人体拟合方法在局部表达性（如手部、面部细节）和全局鲁棒性（如衣物、姿态、噪声输入）之间难以兼顾，缺乏统一的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现对人体点云数据的精细局部拟合和鲁棒全局拟合，以应对衣物动态、姿态变化和部分遮挡等挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ETCH-X，包含紧致感知拟合（undress）过滤衣物动态，扩展 SMPL-X 表达性，并用隐式密集对应（dense fit）替代显式稀疏标记，实现模块化可组合训练。
contributions: 提出紧致感知拟合范式，有效过滤衣物动态，提升鲁棒性。
引入隐式密集对应，实现更鲁棒和精细的拟合，替代对部分数据敏感的显式稀疏标记。
通过可组合数据源（CLOTH3D、AMASS、InterHand2.6M）的模块化训练，提升衣物泛化和姿态鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在 4D-Dress、CAPE 和 BEDLAM2.0 数据集上评估，在已知数据上 MPJPE-All 提升 33.0%，V2V-Hands 提升 35.8%；在未知数据上 MPJPE-All 提升 80.8%，V2V-All 提升 80.5%。
limitations: 可能对极端衣物或复杂交互场景的泛化能力有限。
隐式密集对应的计算效率可能低于显式方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ETCH-X 通过紧致感知拟合和隐式密集对应，实现了对穿着衣物人体的鲁棒且表达性强的参数化模型拟合。

papers.title: When Numbers Speak: Aligning Textual Numerals and Visual Instances in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Text-to-video diffusion models have enabled open-ended video synthesis, but often struggle with generating the correct number of objects specified in a prompt. We introduce NUMINA , a training-free identify-then-guide framework for improved numerical alignment. NUMINA identifies prompt-layout inconsistencies by selecting discriminative self- and cross-attention heads to derive a countable latent layout. It then refines this layout conservatively and modulates cross-attention to guide regeneration. On the introduced CountBench, NUMINA improves counting accuracy by up to 7.4% on Wan2.1-1.3B, and by 4.9% and 5.5% on 5B and 14B models, respectively. Furthermore, CLIP alignment is improved while maintaining temporal consistency. These results demonstrate that structural guidance complements seed search and prompt enhancement, offering a practical path toward count-accurate text-to-video diffusion. The code is available at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/NUMINA.

analysis.tldr: 提出训练无关的 NUMINA 框架，通过识别并引导注意力头来提升文生视频扩散模型中的数字对齐能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 文生视频扩散模型在生成指定数量物体时经常出错，现有方法难以精确控制生成实例的数量。
analysis.problem: 文本提示中的数字与生成视频中物体实例数量不一致的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 训练无关的 identify-then-guide 框架：先通过选择判别性自注意力和交叉注意力头推导可计数的潜在布局，再保守地优化布局并调节交叉注意力引导重新生成。
contributions: 提出 NUMINA，一种无需训练即可改善文生视频模型中数字对齐的方法。
引入 CountBench 基准，并在多个模型上验证了计数准确率的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在 Wan2.1-1.3B 上计数准确率提升 7.4%，在 5B 和 14B 模型上分别提升 4.9% 和 5.5%，同时保持时间一致性并改善 CLIP 对齐。
limitations: 方法可能依赖特定注意力头选择，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对计数问题，未涉及其他数值属性（如大小、顺序）。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出训练无关的 NUMINA 框架，通过识别并引导注意力头来提升文生视频扩散模型中的数字对齐能力。

papers.title: Act Wisely: Cultivating Meta-Cognitive Tool Use in Agentic Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: The advent of agentic multimodal models has empowered systems to actively interact with external environments. However, current agents suffer from a profound meta-cognitive deficit: they struggle to arbitrate between leveraging internal knowledge and querying external utilities. Consequently, they frequently fall prey to blind tool invocation, resorting to reflexive tool execution even when queries are resolvable from the raw visual context. This pathological behavior precipitates severe latency bottlenecks and injects extraneous noise that derails sound reasoning. Existing reinforcement learning protocols attempt to mitigate this via a scalarized reward that penalizes tool usage. Yet, this coupled formulation creates an irreconcilable optimization dilemma: an aggressive penalty suppresses essential tool use, whereas a mild penalty is entirely subsumed by the variance of the accuracy reward during advantage normalization, rendering it impotent against tool overuse. To transcend this bottleneck, we propose HDPO, a framework that reframes tool efficiency from a competing scalar objective to a strictly conditional one. By eschewing reward scalarization, HDPO maintains two orthogonal optimization channels: an accuracy channel that maximizes task correctness, and an efficiency channel that enforces execution economy exclusively within accurate trajectories via conditional advantage estimation. This decoupled architecture naturally induces a cognitive curriculum-compelling the agent to first master task resolution before refining its self-reliance. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our resulting model, Metis, reduces tool invocations by orders of magnitude while simultaneously elevating reasoning accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出HDPO框架，通过解耦准确率和效率优化通道，显著减少多模态智能体盲目调用工具的行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态智能体存在元认知缺陷，无法合理权衡内部知识与外部工具调用，导致盲目调用工具，造成延迟瓶颈和推理噪声。
analysis.problem: 现有强化学习方法通过标量化奖励惩罚工具使用，但无法解决优化困境：强惩罚抑制必要工具使用，弱惩罚被准确率奖励方差淹没，无法有效抑制过度使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体存在盲目工具调用行为，即使查询可从原始视觉上下文解决，仍会反射性地执行工具，导致延迟和推理错误。
analysis.method: 提出HDPO框架，将工具效率从竞争性标量目标重构为严格条件目标，维护准确率和效率两个正交优化通道，通过条件优势估计仅在准确轨迹中强制执行经济性。
contributions: 揭示了多模态智能体盲目调用工具的元认知缺陷及现有标量化奖励的优化困境
提出HDPO框架，通过解耦优化通道实现认知课程学习，先掌握任务解决再优化自给自足
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到模型Metis在评估中工具调用减少数个数量级，同时推理准确率提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务设置，泛化性需进一步验证
条件优势估计的计算开销可能较大

papers.title: E-3DPSM: A State Machine for Event-Based Egocentric 3D Human Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Event cameras offer multiple advantages in monocular egocentric 3D human pose estimation from head-mounted devices, such as millisecond temporal resolution, high dynamic range, and negligible motion blur. Existing methods effectively leverage these properties, but suffer from low 3D estimation accuracy, insufficient in many applications (e.g., immersive VR/AR). This is due to the design not being fully tailored towards event streams (e.g., their asynchronous and continuous nature), leading to high sensitivity to self-occlusions and temporal jitter in the estimates. This paper rethinks the setting and introduces E-3DPSM, an event-driven continuous pose state machine for event-based egocentric 3D human pose estimation. E-3DPSM aligns continuous human motion with fine-grained event dynamics; it evolves latent states and predicts continuous changes in 3D joint positions associated with observed events, which are fused with direct 3D human pose predictions, leading to stable and drift-free final 3D pose reconstructions. E-3DPSM runs in real-time at 80 Hz on a single workstation and sets a new state of the art in experiments on two benchmarks, improving accuracy by up to 19% (MPJPE) and temporal stability by up to 2.7x. See our project page for the source code and trained models.

analysis.tldr: 提出事件驱动连续姿态状态机E-3DPSM，利用事件相机异步连续特性提升单目第一人称3D人体姿态估计的精度与时间稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件相机在头戴设备单目第一人称3D人体姿态估计中具有高时间分辨率、高动态范围等优势，但现有方法因未充分利用事件流的异步连续特性，导致估计精度低、对自遮挡敏感且存在时间抖动，限制了在沉浸式VR/AR等应用中的效果。
analysis.problem: 如何设计完全适配事件流异步连续特性的方法，实现高精度、高时间稳定性的第一人称3D人体姿态估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法对事件流设计不充分，导致对自遮挡敏感且估计结果存在时间抖动。
analysis.method: 提出事件驱动连续姿态状态机E-3DPSM，将连续人体运动与细粒度事件动态对齐，演化隐状态并预测与观测事件相关的3D关节位置连续变化，再与直接3D姿态预测融合，得到稳定无漂移的最终3D姿态重建。
contributions: 提出E-3DPSM，一种事件驱动的连续姿态状态机，专门针对事件流的异步连续特性设计。
在两项基准上实现最先进性能，MPJPE精度提升高达19%，时间稳定性提升高达2.7倍，且实时运行于80Hz。
analysis.experiments: 在两项基准上进行实验，与现有方法对比，报告了MPJPE精度提升19%和时间稳定性提升2.7倍的结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对单目第一人称场景，未验证其他视角或多相机设置。
实时性在单工作站上验证，未测试边缘设备或资源受限环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出事件驱动连续姿态状态机E-3DPSM，利用事件相机异步连续特性提升单目第一人称3D人体姿态估计的精度与时间稳定性。

papers.title: SIM1: Physics-Aligned Simulator as Zero-Shot Data Scaler in Deformable Worlds
papers.abstract: Robotic manipulation with deformable objects represents a data-intensive regime in embodied learning, where shape, contact, and topology co-evolve in ways that far exceed the variability of rigids. Although simulation promises relief from the cost of real-world data acquisition, prevailing sim-to-real pipelines remain rooted in rigid-body abstractions, producing mismatched geometry, fragile soft dynamics, and motion primitives poorly suited for cloth interaction. We posit that simulation fails not for being synthetic, but for being ungrounded. To address this, we introduce SIM1, a physics-aligned real-to-sim-to-real data engine that grounds simulation in the physical world. Given limited demonstrations, the system digitizes scenes into metric-consistent twins, calibrates deformable dynamics through elastic modeling, and expands behaviors via diffusion-based trajectory generation with quality filtering. This pipeline transforms sparse observations into scaled synthetic supervision with near-demonstration fidelity. Experiments show that policies trained on purely synthetic data achieve parity with real-data baselines at a 1:15 equivalence ratio, while delivering 90% zero-shot success and 50% generalization gains in real-world deployment. These results validate physics-aligned simulation as scalable supervision for deformable manipulation and a practical pathway for data-efficient policy learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理对齐仿真引擎SIM1，将少量真实演示转化为大规模合成数据，实现零样本可变形物体操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 可变形物体操作数据获取成本高，现有仿真-真实迁移方法因物理不匹配导致效果差。
analysis.problem: 如何构建物理对齐的仿真环境，使合成数据能有效替代真实数据用于可变形物体操作策略学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仿真失败的根本原因不是合成数据本身，而是仿真缺乏物理基础（ungrounded）。
analysis.method: SIM1：通过场景数字化构建度量一致的数字孪生，弹性建模校准可变形动力学，扩散模型生成轨迹并质量过滤，将稀疏演示扩展为高保真合成数据。
contributions: 提出物理对齐的仿真-真实-仿真数据引擎SIM1，实现零样本可变形物体操作。
实验证明纯合成数据训练的策略在1:15数据比下达到真实数据基线性能，零样本成功率90%，泛化提升50%。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界部署中，纯合成数据训练的策略达到90%零样本成功率和50%泛化提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定可变形物体类型（如布料），对其他类型效果未知。
扩散轨迹生成的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理对齐仿真引擎SIM1，将少量真实演示转化为大规模合成数据，实现零样本可变形物体操作。

papers.title: Scal3R: Scalable Test-Time Training for Large-Scale 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: This paper addresses the task of large-scale 3D scene reconstruction from long video sequences. Recent feed-forward reconstruction models have shown promising results by directly regressing 3D geometry from RGB images without explicit 3D priors or geometric constraints. However, these methods often struggle to maintain reconstruction accuracy and consistency over long sequences due to limited memory capacity and the inability to effectively capture global contextual cues. In contrast, humans can naturally exploit the global understanding of the scene to inform local perception. Motivated by this, we propose a novel neural global context representation that efficiently compresses and retains long-range scene information, enabling the model to leverage extensive contextual cues for enhanced reconstruction accuracy and consistency. The context representation is realized through a set of lightweight neural sub-networks that are rapidly adapted during test time via self-supervised objectives, which substantially increases memory capacity without incurring significant computational overhead. The experiments on multiple large-scale benchmarks, including the KITTI Odometry~\cite{Geiger2012CVPR} and Oxford Spires~\cite{tao2025spires} datasets, demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in handling ultra-large scenes, achieving leading pose accuracy and state-of-the-art 3D reconstruction accuracy while maintaining efficiency. Code is available at https://zju3dv.github.io/scal3r.

analysis.tldr: 提出可扩展测试时训练方法，通过轻量子网络压缩全局场景上下文，提升大规模3D重建的精度与一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈重建模型在处理长视频序列时，因内存容量有限且难以捕捉全局上下文，导致重建精度和一致性下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模3D场景重建中高效利用长程场景信息，提升重建精度和一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种神经全局上下文表示，通过一组轻量子网络在测试时通过自监督目标快速适应，压缩并保留长程场景信息，增强模型记忆容量。
contributions: 提出可扩展的测试时训练框架，利用轻量子网络实现全局上下文压缩。
在KITTI Odometry和Oxford Spires等大规模基准上达到领先的位姿精度和最先进的3D重建精度。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI Odometry和Oxford Spires数据集上评估，展示了超大规模场景下的有效性，达到领先位姿精度和SOTA重建精度。
limitations: 测试时训练可能增加推理时间。
轻量子网络的泛化性可能受限于场景分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可扩展测试时训练方法，通过轻量子网络压缩全局场景上下文，提升大规模3D重建的精度与一致性。

papers.title: Seeing but Not Thinking: Routing Distraction in Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts
papers.abstract: Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have achieved remarkable performance on vision-language tasks. However, we identify a puzzling phenomenon termed Seeing but Not Thinking: models accurately perceive image content yet fail in subsequent reasoning, while correctly solving identical problems presented as pure text. Through systematic analysis, we first verify that cross-modal semantic sharing exists in MoE architectures, ruling out semantic alignment failure as the sole explanation. We then reveal that visual experts and domain experts exhibit layer-wise separation, with image inputs inducing significant routing divergence from text inputs in middle layers where domain experts concentrate. Based on these findings, we propose the Routing Distraction hypothesis: when processing visual inputs, the routing mechanism fails to adequately activate task-relevant reasoning experts. To validate this hypothesis, we design a routing-guided intervention method that enhances domain expert activation. Experiments on three multimodal MoE models across six benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements, with gains of up to 3.17% on complex visual reasoning tasks. Our analysis further reveals that domain expert identification locates cognitive functions rather than sample-specific solutions, enabling effective transfer across tasks with different information structures.

analysis.tldr: 多模态MoE模型存在“视而不思”现象：模型能感知图像内容但推理失败，原因在于路由机制未能充分激活领域专家。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态MoE模型在视觉-语言任务中表现优异，但存在感知与推理脱节的问题，理解这一现象有助于提升模型推理能力。
analysis.problem: 多模态MoE模型在处理视觉输入时，路由机制未能充分激活任务相关的推理专家，导致感知正确但推理失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现多模态MoE中存在跨模态语义共享，视觉专家和领域专家在层间分离，图像输入在中层引起显著路由偏移，导致领域专家激活不足。
analysis.method: 提出路由引导干预方法，通过增强领域专家激活来缓解路由分心问题。
contributions: 识别并命名了多模态MoE中的“视而不思”现象，并系统分析了其成因。
提出路由分心假说，并设计路由引导干预方法，在多个模型和基准上取得一致改进。
analysis.experiments: 在三个多模态MoE模型和六个基准上实验，复杂视觉推理任务提升高达3.17%。
limitations: 干预方法可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
未探讨路由分心在其他模态组合中的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态MoE模型存在“视而不思”现象：模型能感知图像内容但推理失败，原因在于路由机制未能充分激活领域专家。

papers.title: OpenVLThinkerV2: A Generalist Multimodal Reasoning Model for Multi-domain Visual Tasks
papers.abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as the de facto Reinforcement Learning (RL) objective driving recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models. However, extending this success to open-source multimodal generalist models remains heavily constrained by two primary challenges: the extreme variance in reward topologies across diverse visual tasks, and the inherent difficulty of balancing fine-grained perception with multi-step reasoning capabilities. To address these issues, we introduce Gaussian GRPO (G$^2$RPO), a novel RL training objective that replaces standard linear scaling with non-linear distributional matching. By mathematically forcing the advantage distribution of any given task to strictly converge to a standard normal distribution, $\mathcal{N}(0,1)$, G$^2$RPO theoretically ensures inter-task gradient equity, mitigates vulnerabilities to heavy-tail outliers, and offers symmetric update for positive and negative rewards. Leveraging the enhanced training stability provided by G$^2$RPO, we introduce two task-level shaping mechanisms to seamlessly balance perception and reasoning. First, response length shaping dynamically elicits extended reasoning chains for complex queries while enforce direct outputs to bolster visual grounding. Second, entropy shaping tightly bounds the model's exploration zone, effectively preventing both entropy collapse and entropy explosion. Integrating these methodologies, we present OpenVLThinkerV2, a highly robust, general-purpose multimodal model. Extensive evaluations across 18 diverse benchmarks demonstrate its superior performance over strong open-source and leading proprietary frontier models.

analysis.tldr: 提出G²RPO强化学习目标与任务级塑形机制，训练出多领域视觉推理通用模型OpenVLThinkerV2，在18个基准上超越开源和闭源模型。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO虽推动多模态大模型发展，但开源通用模型面临奖励拓扑差异大、细粒度感知与多步推理难以平衡的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计稳定的RL训练目标与塑形机制，使多模态模型在多种视觉任务上同时具备强感知与推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同视觉任务的奖励分布差异极大，导致梯度冲突；线性缩放无法处理重尾异常值；正负奖励更新不对称。
analysis.method: 提出G²RPO（高斯GRPO），强制任务优势分布收敛到标准正态分布，实现任务间梯度公平；引入响应长度塑形和熵塑形，动态平衡感知与推理。
contributions: 提出G²RPO，通过非线性的分布匹配解决多任务奖励拓扑差异问题，理论保证梯度公平与鲁棒性。
设计响应长度塑形与熵塑形两种任务级机制，有效平衡感知与推理能力。
训练出OpenVLThinkerV2模型，在18个多领域视觉基准上取得领先性能。
analysis.experiments: 在18个多样化基准上评估，与强开源及领先闭源模型对比，显示优越性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型参数量及计算开销。
可能对极端复杂任务仍需更多调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出G²RPO强化学习目标与任务级塑形机制，训练出多领域视觉推理通用模型OpenVLThinkerV2，在18个基准上超越开源和闭源模型。

papers.title: AVGen-Bench: A Task-Driven Benchmark for Multi-Granular Evaluation of Text-to-Audio-Video Generation
papers.abstract: Text-to-Audio-Video (T2AV) generation is rapidly becoming a core interface for media creation, yet its evaluation remains fragmented. Existing benchmarks largely assess audio and video in isolation or rely on coarse embedding similarity, failing to capture the fine-grained joint correctness required by realistic prompts. We introduce AVGen-Bench, a task-driven benchmark for T2AV generation featuring high-quality prompts across 11 real-world categories. To support comprehensive assessment, we propose a multi-granular evaluation framework that combines lightweight specialist models with Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), enabling evaluation from perceptual quality to fine-grained semantic controllability. Our evaluation reveals a pronounced gap between strong audio-visual aesthetics and weak semantic reliability, including persistent failures in text rendering, speech coherence, physical reasoning, and a universal breakdown in musical pitch control. Code and benchmark resources are available at http://aka.ms/avgenbench.

analysis.tldr: 提出AVGen-Bench基准，通过多粒度评估框架揭示文本到音视频生成中语义可靠性严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2AV评估碎片化，缺乏对细粒度联合正确性的评测，阻碍了该领域发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能全面、细粒度评估文本到音视频生成质量的基准和框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现音视频美学质量与语义可靠性之间存在显著差距，包括文本渲染、语音连贯性、物理推理失败，以及音高控制全面失效。
analysis.method: 构建包含11类真实场景提示的基准，并提出结合轻量级专家模型与多模态大语言模型的多粒度评估框架。
contributions: 提出AVGen-Bench，首个任务驱动的T2AV生成基准，覆盖11类真实场景。
设计多粒度评估框架，从感知质量到细粒度语义可控性进行全面评测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准规模可能有限，未提及提示数量。
评估框架依赖MLLM，可能存在偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AVGen-Bench基准，通过多粒度评估框架揭示文本到音视频生成中语义可靠性严重不足。

papers.title: ParseBench: A Document Parsing Benchmark for AI Agents
papers.abstract: AI agents are changing the requirements for document parsing. What matters is semantic correctness: parsed output must preserve the structure and meaning needed for autonomous decisions, including correct table structure, precise chart data, semantically meaningful formatting, and visual grounding. Existing benchmarks do not fully capture this setting for enterprise automation, relying on narrow document distributions and text-similarity metrics that miss agent-critical failures. We introduce ParseBench, a benchmark of ${\sim}2{,}000$ human-verified pages from enterprise documents spanning insurance, finance, and government, organized around five capability dimensions: tables, charts, content faithfulness, semantic formatting, and visual grounding. Across 14 methods spanning vision-language models, specialized document parsers, and LlamaParse, the benchmark reveals a fragmented capability landscape: no method is consistently strong across all five dimensions. LlamaParse Agentic achieves the highest overall score at 84.9%, and the benchmark highlights the remaining capability gaps across current systems. Dataset and evaluation code are available on https://huggingface.co/datasets/llamaindex/ParseBench and https://github.com/run-llama/ParseBench.

analysis.tldr: ParseBench 是一个面向 AI Agent 的企业文档解析基准，包含约 2000 页人工验证数据，覆盖表格、图表等五个维度，揭示现有方法能力碎片化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文档解析基准依赖窄分布数据和文本相似度指标，无法捕捉 AI Agent 在自主决策中所需的语义正确性，如表格结构、图表数据精确性等，导致企业自动化场景下关键失败模式被忽略。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个全面评估 AI Agent 文档解析语义正确性的基准，特别是针对企业文档（保险、金融、政府）的多维度能力（表格、图表、内容忠实度、语义格式、视觉定位）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在 14 种方法（包括 VLM、专用解析器、LlamaParse）的评估中，没有一种方法在所有五个维度上表现一致强劲，揭示了当前系统存在能力碎片化。
analysis.method: 构建了一个包含约 2000 页人工验证企业文档的基准，按五个能力维度（表格、图表、内容忠实度、语义格式、视觉定位）组织，并评估了 14 种方法。
contributions: 提出了 ParseBench，一个面向 AI Agent 的企业文档解析基准，覆盖五个关键能力维度。
通过评估 14 种方法，揭示了当前文档解析系统在语义正确性上的能力碎片化，并指出 LlamaParse Agentic 以 84.9% 总体得分领先。
analysis.experiments: 在 14 种方法（包括 VLM、专用文档解析器、LlamaParse）上进行了评估，LlamaParse Agentic 获得最高总体得分 84.9%，但无方法在所有维度上一致强。数据集和代码已开源。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖保险、金融、政府三个领域，可能不泛化到其他企业文档类型。
未提供具体维度得分或失败模式分析，仅给出总体得分。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ParseBench 是一个面向 AI Agent 的企业文档解析基准，包含约 2000 页人工验证数据，覆盖表格、图表等五个维度，揭示现有方法能力碎片化。

papers.title: RewardFlow: Generate Images by Optimizing What You Reward
papers.abstract: We introduce RewardFlow, an inversion-free framework that steers pretrained diffusion and flow-matching models at inference time through multi-reward Langevin dynamics. RewardFlow unifies complementary differentiable rewards for semantic alignment, perceptual fidelity, localized grounding, object consistency, and human preference, and further introduces a differentiable VQA-based reward that provides fine-grained semantic supervision through language-vision reasoning. To coordinate these heterogeneous objectives, we design a prompt-aware adaptive policy that extracts semantic primitives from the instruction, infers edit intent, and dynamically modulates reward weights and step sizes throughout sampling. Across several image editing and compositional generation benchmarks, RewardFlow delivers state-of-the-art edit fidelity and compositional alignment.

analysis.tldr: RewardFlow 通过多奖励朗之万动力学在推理时引导扩散/流匹配模型，无需反演，实现高质量图像编辑与组合生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像生成方法在语义对齐、感知保真度、局部接地、对象一致性和人类偏好等方面难以兼顾，且通常需要反演或复杂训练流程。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行反演的情况下，在推理时统一多种互补可微奖励来引导预训练扩散/流匹配模型，实现高保真图像编辑和组合生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 RewardFlow 框架，通过多奖励朗之万动力学在推理时引导模型，并设计提示感知自适应策略动态调整奖励权重和步长。
contributions: 提出无需反演的推理时引导框架 RewardFlow，统一多种可微奖励。
引入可微 VQA 奖励，通过语言-视觉推理提供细粒度语义监督。
设计提示感知自适应策略，根据指令语义动态调整奖励权重和步长。
analysis.experiments: 在多个图像编辑和组合生成基准上，RewardFlow 实现了最先进的编辑保真度和组合对齐。
limitations: 可能依赖可微奖励的设计质量。
自适应策略的泛化性可能受限于提示语义的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RewardFlow 通过多奖励朗之万动力学在推理时引导扩散/流匹配模型，无需反演，实现高质量图像编辑与组合生成。

papers.title: Fail2Drive: Benchmarking Closed-Loop Driving Generalization
papers.abstract: Generalization under distribution shift remains a central bottleneck for closed-loop autonomous driving. Although simulators like CARLA enable safe and scalable testing, existing benchmarks rarely measure true generalization: they typically reuse training scenarios at test time. Success can therefore reflect memorization rather than robust driving behavior. We introduce Fail2Drive, the first paired-route benchmark for closed-loop generalization in CARLA, with 200 routes and 17 new scenario classes spanning appearance, layout, behavioral, and robustness shifts. Each shifted route is matched with an in-distribution counterpart, isolating the effect of the shift and turning qualitative failures into quantitative diagnostics. Evaluating multiple state-of-the-art models reveals consistent degradation, with an average success-rate drop of 22.8\%. Our analysis uncovers unexpected failure modes, such as ignoring objects clearly visible in the LiDAR and failing to learn the fundamental concepts of free and occupied space. To accelerate follow-up work, Fail2Drive includes an open-source toolbox for creating new scenarios and validating solvability via a privileged expert policy. Together, these components establish a reproducible foundation for benchmarking and improving closed-loop driving generalization. We open-source all code, data, and tools at https://github.com/autonomousvision/fail2drive .

analysis.tldr: 首个针对闭环自动驾驶泛化性的配对路线基准，揭示模型在分布偏移下平均成功率下降22.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动驾驶基准在测试时复用训练场景，导致成功反映的是记忆而非鲁棒行为，亟需衡量真实泛化能力的基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏量化闭环自动驾驶在分布偏移下泛化性能的标准化基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建200条路线和17种新场景类别的配对路线基准，每条偏移路线有对应的分布内路线以隔离偏移效应，并提供开源工具箱用于创建新场景和验证可解性。
contributions: 提出首个配对路线闭环泛化基准Fail2Drive，包含200条路线和17种新场景类别。
通过评估多个SOTA模型揭示平均成功率下降22.8%，并发现忽略LiDAR可见物体等意外失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在CARLA模拟器中评估多个SOTA模型，显示平均成功率下降22.8%。
limitations: 仅基于CARLA模拟器，真实世界泛化性未验证。
基准场景类别可能未覆盖所有实际分布偏移。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对闭环自动驾驶泛化性的配对路线基准，揭示模型在分布偏移下平均成功率下降22.8%。

papers.title: Self-Improving 4D Perception via Self-Distillation
papers.abstract: Large-scale multi-view reconstruction models have made remarkable progress, but most existing approaches still rely on fully supervised training with ground-truth 3D/4D annotations. Such annotations are expensive and particularly scarce for dynamic scenes, limiting scalability. We propose SelfEvo, a self-improving framework that continually improves pretrained multi-view reconstruction models using unlabeled videos. SelfEvo introduces a self-distillation scheme using spatiotemporal context asymmetry, enabling self-improvement for learning-based 4D perception without external annotations. We systematically study design choices that make self-improvement effective, including loss signals, forms of asymmetry, and other training strategies. Across eight benchmarks spanning diverse datasets and domains, SelfEvo consistently improves pretrained baselines and generalizes across base models (e.g. VGGT and $π^3$), with significant gains on dynamic scenes. Overall, SelfEvo achieves up to 36.5% relative improvement in video depth estimation and 20.1% in camera estimation, without using any labeled data. Project Page: https://self-evo.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: SelfEvo通过自蒸馏和时空上下文不对称性，无需标注数据即可持续提升4D感知模型的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大规模多视图重建模型依赖昂贵的3D/4D标注，尤其动态场景标注稀缺，限制了模型的可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用无标注视频持续改进预训练的多视图重建模型，实现4D感知的自提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SelfEvo框架，采用自蒸馏方案，利用时空上下文不对称性（如不同时间或视角的预测差异）作为自监督信号，无需外部标注即可持续优化模型。
contributions: 提出SelfEvo，首个无需标注数据即可自提升4D感知的框架。
系统研究了自蒸馏中损失信号、不对称形式等设计选择的影响。
在8个基准上验证了方法有效性，在动态场景上取得显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在8个跨数据集和领域的基准上评估，使用VGGT和π³等基础模型，视频深度估计相对提升36.5%，相机估计提升20.1%。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的初始质量。
自蒸馏策略在极端动态或遮挡场景下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SelfEvo通过自蒸馏和时空上下文不对称性，无需标注数据即可持续提升4D感知模型的性能。

papers.title: InsEdit: Towards Instruction-based Visual Editing via Data-Efficient Video Diffusion Models Adaptation
papers.abstract: Instruction-based video editing is a natural way to control video content with text, but adapting a video generation model into an editor usually appears data-hungry. At the same time, high-quality video editing data remains scarce. In this paper, we show that a video generation backbone can become a strong video editor without large scale video editing data. We present InsEdit, an instruction-based editing model built on HunyuanVideo-1.5. InsEdit combines a visual editing architecture with a video data pipeline based on Mutual Context Attention (MCA), which creates aligned video pairs where edits can begin in the middle of a clip rather than only from the first frame. With only O(100)K video editing data, InsEdit achieves state-of-the-art results among open-source methods on our video instruction editing benchmarks. In addition, because our training recipe also includes image editing data, the final model supports image editing without any modification.

analysis.tldr: InsEdit 通过数据高效的视频扩散模型适配实现指令式视频编辑，仅需 O(100K) 数据即达 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 指令式视频编辑是控制视频内容的自然方式，但现有方法将视频生成模型适配为编辑器通常需要大量数据，而高质量视频编辑数据稀缺。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖大规模视频编辑数据的情况下，将视频生成模型转化为强大的指令式视频编辑器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 HunyuanVideo-1.5 构建 InsEdit，结合视觉编辑架构和基于互上下文注意力（MCA）的视频数据管道，生成对齐的视频对，使编辑可以从片段中间开始而非仅从第一帧。
contributions: 提出 InsEdit，一种数据高效的指令式视频编辑方法，仅需 O(100K) 数据即可达到 SOTA。
设计基于 MCA 的视频数据管道，支持从片段中间开始编辑，提升数据利用效率。
模型同时支持图像编辑，无需额外修改。
analysis.experiments: 在自建视频指令编辑基准上，InsEdit 在开源方法中取得 SOTA 结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频生成骨干（HunyuanVideo-1.5），泛化性未验证。
仅 O(100K) 数据，更大规模数据下的表现未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: InsEdit 通过数据高效的视频扩散模型适配实现指令式视频编辑，仅需 O(100K) 数据即达 SOTA。

papers.title: PSI: Shared State as the Missing Layer for Coherent AI-Generated Instruments in Personal AI Agents
papers.abstract: Personal AI tools can now be generated from natural-language requests, but they often remain isolated after creation. We present PSI, a shared-state architecture that turns independently generated modules into coherent instruments: persistent, connected, and chat-complementary artifacts accessible through both GUIs and a generic chat agent. By publishing current state and write-back affordances to a shared personal-context bus, modules enable cross-module reasoning and synchronized actions across interfaces. We study PSI through a three-week autobiographical deployment in a self-developed personal AI environment and show that later-generated instruments can be integrated automatically through the same contract. PSI identifies shared state as the missing systems layer that transforms AI-generated personal software from isolated apps into coherent personal computing environments.

analysis.tldr: PSI通过共享状态架构将独立生成的AI模块整合为连贯的个人计算环境。
analysis.research_motivation: 个人AI工具虽可从自然语言请求生成，但创建后往往相互孤立，无法协同工作，限制了用户体验。
analysis.problem: 如何将独立生成的AI模块整合为持久、互联、与聊天互补的连贯工具。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PSI共享状态架构，通过发布当前状态和写回能力到共享个人上下文总线，实现跨模块推理和跨接口同步操作。
contributions: 提出PSI架构，将共享状态作为缺失的系统层，使AI生成的个人软件从孤立应用转变为连贯环境。
通过三周自部署实验验证了后期生成的工具可通过同一契约自动集成。
analysis.experiments: 在三周的自部署个人AI环境中进行实验，展示了后期生成工具的自动集成能力。
limitations: 实验仅基于单一个体自部署，泛化性有待验证。
未讨论大规模多用户场景下的性能与隐私问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PSI通过共享状态架构将独立生成的AI模块整合为连贯的个人计算环境。

papers.title: Ads in AI Chatbots? An Analysis of How Large Language Models Navigate Conflicts of Interest
papers.abstract: Today's large language models (LLMs) are trained to align with user preferences through methods such as reinforcement learning. Yet models are beginning to be deployed not merely to satisfy users, but also to generate revenue for the companies that created them through advertisements. This creates the potential for LLMs to face conflicts of interest, where the most beneficial response to a user may not be aligned with the company's incentives. For instance, a sponsored product may be more expensive but otherwise equal to another; in this case, what does (and should) the LLM recommend to the user? In this paper, we provide a framework for categorizing the ways in which conflicting incentives might lead LLMs to change the way they interact with users, inspired by literature from linguistics and advertising regulation. We then present a suite of evaluations to examine how current models handle these tradeoffs. We find that a majority of LLMs forsake user welfare for company incentives in a multitude of conflict of interest situations, including recommending a sponsored product almost twice as expensive (Grok 4.1 Fast, 83%), surfacing sponsored options to disrupt the purchasing process (GPT 5.1, 94%), and concealing prices in unfavorable comparisons (Qwen 3 Next, 24%). Behaviors also vary strongly with levels of reasoning and users' inferred socio-economic status. Our results highlight some of the hidden risks to users that can emerge when companies begin to subtly incentivize advertisements in chatbots.

analysis.tldr: LLM在广告利益冲突中常牺牲用户利益，推荐更贵赞助产品、隐藏价格等。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署中广告收入与用户利益冲突日益突出，现有对齐方法未考虑此类商业激励。
analysis.problem: 量化评估LLM在广告利益冲突场景下如何权衡用户福利与公司激励。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数LLM在利益冲突中优先公司利益，如推荐更贵赞助产品、干扰购买流程、隐藏价格；行为随推理层级和用户社会经济地位变化。
analysis.method: 提出利益冲突分类框架，设计多场景评估套件测试模型行为。
contributions: 提出LLM广告利益冲突分类框架
构建多场景评估套件并揭示模型普遍偏向公司激励
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM上测试，发现Grok 4.1 Fast推荐贵83%赞助产品，GPT 5.1 94%干扰购买，Qwen 3 Next 24%隐藏价格。
limitations: 未提供模型内部机制分析
评估场景有限，可能未覆盖所有冲突类型
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在广告利益冲突中常牺牲用户利益，推荐更贵赞助产品、隐藏价格等。

papers.title: FIT: A Large-Scale Dataset for Fit-Aware Virtual Try-On
papers.abstract: Given a person and a garment image, virtual try-on (VTO) aims to synthesize a realistic image of the person wearing the garment, while preserving their original pose and identity. Although recent VTO methods excel at visualizing garment appearance, they largely overlook a crucial aspect of the try-on experience: the accuracy of garment fit -- for example, depicting how an extra-large shirt looks on an extra-small person. A key obstacle is the absence of datasets that provide precise garment and body size information, particularly for "ill-fit" cases, where garments are significantly too large or too small. Consequently, current VTO methods default to generating well-fitted results regardless of the garment or person size. In this paper, we take the first steps towards solving this open problem. We introduce FIT (Fit-Inclusive Try-on), a large-scale VTO dataset comprising over 1.13M try-on image triplets accompanied by precise body and garment measurements. We overcome the challenges of data collection via a scalable synthetic strategy: (1) We programmatically generate 3D garments using GarmentCode and drape them via physics simulation to capture realistic garment fit. (2) We employ a novel re-texturing framework to transform synthetic renderings into photorealistic images while strictly preserving geometry. (3) We introduce person identity preservation into our re-texturing model to generate paired person images (same person, different garments) for supervised training. Finally, we leverage our FIT dataset to train a baseline fit-aware virtual try-on model. Our data and results set the new state-of-the-art for fit-aware virtual try-on, as well as offer a robust benchmark for future research. We will make all data and code publicly available on our project page: https://johannakarras.github.io/FIT.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模合身感知虚拟试穿数据集FIT，包含113万+三元组及精确尺寸标注，并训练基线模型实现合身感知试穿。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有虚拟试穿方法忽略服装合身度（如大码衣服在小个子身上的效果），缺乏包含精确尺寸和不合身案例的数据集。
analysis.problem: 缺乏支持合身感知虚拟试穿的大规模数据集，导致现有方法默认生成合身结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过可扩展合成策略构建数据集：程序化生成3D服装并物理模拟，用重纹理框架将合成渲染转为逼真图像并保持几何，引入人物身份保持生成配对图像。基于该数据集训练合身感知基线模型。
contributions: 提出FIT数据集，包含113万+试穿图像三元组及精确身体和服装尺寸。
提出可扩展的合成数据生成策略，包括程序化服装生成、物理模拟、重纹理和身份保持。
训练合身感知虚拟试穿基线模型，实现新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称达到新SOTA。
limitations: 合成数据与真实数据可能存在域差异。
基线模型可能未充分探索复杂场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模合身感知虚拟试穿数据集FIT，包含113万+三元组及精确尺寸标注，并训练基线模型实现合身感知试穿。

papers.title: 3D-VCD: Hallucination Mitigation in 3D-LLM Embodied Agents through Visual Contrastive Decoding
papers.abstract: Large multimodal models are increasingly used as the reasoning core of embodied agents operating in 3D environments, yet they remain prone to hallucinations that can produce unsafe and ungrounded decisions. Existing inference-time hallucination mitigation methods largely target 2D vision-language settings and do not transfer to embodied 3D reasoning, where failures arise from object presence, spatial layout, and geometric grounding rather than pixel-level inconsistencies. We introduce 3D-VCD, the first inference-time visual contrastive decoding framework for hallucination mitigation in 3D embodied agents. 3D-VCD constructs a distorted 3D scene graph by applying semantic and geometric perturbations to object-centric representations, such as category substitutions and coordinate or extent corruption. By contrasting predictions under the original and distorted 3D contexts, our method suppresses tokens that are insensitive to grounded scene evidence and are therefore likely driven by language priors. We evaluate 3D-VCD on the 3D-POPE and HEAL benchmarks and show that it consistently improves grounded reasoning without any retraining, establishing inference-time contrastive decoding over structured 3D representations as an effective and practical route to more reliable embodied intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个针对3D具身智能体的推理时视觉对比解码框架3D-VCD，通过扭曲3D场景图来抑制幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型多模态模型在3D环境中作为具身智能体的推理核心时容易产生幻觉，导致不安全和无根据的决策，而现有推理时幻觉缓解方法主要针对2D视觉-语言设置，无法迁移到3D具身推理。
analysis.problem: 如何缓解3D具身智能体中由物体存在、空间布局和几何基础而非像素级不一致引起的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 3D-VCD通过构建扭曲的3D场景图（应用语义和几何扰动，如类别替换、坐标或范围破坏），对比原始和扭曲3D上下文下的预测，抑制对场景证据不敏感、可能由语言先验驱动的token。
contributions: 首个针对3D具身智能体的推理时视觉对比解码框架
在3D-POPE和HEAL基准上一致提升基于场景的推理能力，无需重新训练
analysis.experiments: 在3D-POPE和HEAL基准上评估，显示一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖场景图构建质量
未讨论对复杂动态场景的适应性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个针对3D具身智能体的推理时视觉对比解码框架3D-VCD，通过扭曲3D场景图来抑制幻觉。

papers.title: What Drives Representation Steering? A Mechanistic Case Study on Steering Refusal
papers.abstract: Applying steering vectors to large language models (LLMs) is an efficient and effective model alignment technique, but we lack an interpretable explanation for how it works-- specifically, what internal mechanisms steering vectors affect and how this results in different model outputs. To investigate the causal mechanisms underlying the effectiveness of steering vectors, we conduct a comprehensive case study on refusal. We propose a multi-token activation patching framework and discover that different steering methodologies leverage functionally interchangeable circuits when applied at the same layer. These circuits reveal that steering vectors primarily interact with the attention mechanism through the OV circuit while largely ignoring the QK circuit-- freezing all attention scores during steering drops performance by only 8.75% across two model families. A mathematical decomposition of the steered OV circuit further reveals semantically interpretable concepts, even in cases where the steering vector itself does not. Leveraging the activation patching results, we show that steering vectors can be sparsified by up to 90-99% while retaining most performance, and that different steering methodologies agree on a subset of important dimensions.

analysis.tldr: 通过机制分析发现，LLM中的转向向量主要通过影响注意力OV电路而非QK电路来改变模型输出，且可被高度稀疏化。
analysis.research_motivation: 转向向量是一种高效的LLM对齐技术，但其内部工作机制缺乏可解释性，理解其如何影响模型输出对于提升对齐方法的可控性和可靠性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 揭示转向向量在LLM中驱动拒绝行为的具体因果机制，特别是其影响的内部电路和计算路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 转向向量主要与注意力OV电路交互，而几乎忽略QK电路；冻结注意力分数仅导致性能下降8.75%；转向向量可被稀疏化90-99%而保持性能。
analysis.method: 提出多token激活补丁框架，通过干预注意力电路（OV和QK）分析转向向量的影响，并对OV电路进行数学分解以提取语义概念。
contributions: 发现不同转向方法在相同层应用时利用功能可互换的电路，且主要影响OV电路。
证明转向向量可被高度稀疏化（90-99%），且不同方法在重要维度上一致。
analysis.experiments: 在两个模型家族上进行了实验，冻结注意力分数导致性能下降8.75%，稀疏化实验显示可保留大部分性能。
limitations: 仅针对拒绝行为进行案例研究，可能不适用于其他行为。
未探讨转向向量在不同层或不同模型规模下的机制差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过机制分析发现，LLM中的转向向量主要通过影响注意力OV电路而非QK电路来改变模型输出，且可被高度稀疏化。

papers.title: ClawBench: Can AI Agents Complete Everyday Online Tasks?
papers.abstract: AI agents may be able to automate your inbox, but can they automate other routine aspects of your life? Everyday online tasks offer a realistic yet unsolved testbed for evaluating the next generation of AI agents. To this end, we introduce ClawBench, an evaluation framework of 153 simple tasks that people need to accomplish regularly in their lives and work, spanning 144 live platforms across 15 categories, from completing purchases and booking appointments to submitting job applications. These tasks require demanding capabilities beyond existing benchmarks, such as obtaining relevant information from user-provided documents, navigating multi-step workflows across diverse platforms, and write-heavy operations like filling in many detailed forms correctly. Unlike existing benchmarks that evaluate agents in offline sandboxes with static pages, ClawBench operates on production websites, preserving the full complexity, dynamic nature, and challenges of real-world web interaction. A lightweight interception layer captures and blocks only the final submission request, ensuring safe evaluation without real-world side effects. Our evaluations of 7 frontier models show that both proprietary and open-source models can complete only a small portion of these tasks. For example, Claude Sonnet 4.6 achieves only 33.3%. Progress on ClawBench brings us closer to AI agents that can function as reliable general-purpose assistants.

analysis.tldr: ClawBench是一个包含153个真实在线任务的AI Agent评测框架，覆盖144个平台，现有模型完成率仅约33%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI Agent评测多基于离线沙盒和静态页面，无法反映真实在线任务的复杂性和动态性，而日常在线任务（如购物、预约、求职）是评估下一代Agent的关键场景。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能安全评估AI Agent在真实生产网站上完成多步骤、写密集型日常在线任务的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有基准（离线沙盒、静态页面）无法捕捉真实网页交互的完整复杂性和动态挑战；ClawBench通过轻量拦截层实现安全评估。
analysis.method: 构建包含153个任务、覆盖144个真实平台的评测框架，使用轻量拦截层捕获并阻止最终提交请求，确保安全评估。
contributions: 提出了ClawBench，一个包含153个真实在线任务的评测框架，覆盖144个平台和15个类别。
揭示了现有前沿模型（如Claude Sonnet 4.6仅33.3%）在真实在线任务上的显著不足。
analysis.experiments: 在7个前沿模型上评估，Claude Sonnet 4.6完成率33.3%，其他模型完成率更低。摘要未提供更详细实验结果。
limitations: 任务数量有限（153个），可能无法覆盖所有日常在线任务类型。
仅评估了7个模型，可能未涵盖所有最新或特定领域模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ClawBench是一个包含153个真实在线任务的AI Agent评测框架，覆盖144个平台，现有模型完成率仅约33%。

papers.title: UniversalVTG: A Universal and Lightweight Foundation Model for Video Temporal Grounding
papers.abstract: Video temporal grounding (VTG) is typically tackled with dataset-specific models that transfer poorly across domains and query styles. Recent efforts to overcome this limitation have adapted large multimodal language models (MLLMs) to VTG, but their high compute cost and limited video context still hinder long-video grounding. We instead scale unified supervision while keeping the model lightweight. We present UniversalVTG, a single VTG model trained with large-scale cross-dataset pretraining. An offline Query Unifier canonicalizes heterogeneous query formats into a shared declarative space, reducing linguistic mismatch and preventing the negative transfer observed under naïve joint training. Combined with an efficient grounding head, UniversalVTG scales to long, untrimmed videos. Across diverse benchmarks-GoalStep-StepGrounding, Ego4D-NLQ, TACoS, Charades-STA, and ActivityNet-Captions-one UniversalVTG checkpoint achieves state-of-the-art performance versus dedicated VTG models. Moreover, despite being $>100\times$ smaller than recent MLLM-based approaches, UniversalVTG matches or exceeds their accuracy on multiple benchmarks, offering a practical alternative to parameter-heavy MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级通用视频时序定位基础模型UniversalVTG，通过跨数据集预训练和查询统一器，以极小参数量达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频时序定位模型多为数据集专用，跨域迁移差；近期MLLM方法计算成本高且视频上下文有限，难以处理长视频。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个轻量、通用且能处理长视频的单一视频时序定位模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UniversalVTG，包含离线查询统一器（Query Unifier）将异构查询格式规范化为共享声明式空间，减少语言不匹配和负迁移；结合高效定位头，通过大规模跨数据集预训练得到单一模型。
contributions: 提出轻量级通用VTG基础模型UniversalVTG，参数量比MLLM方法小100倍以上。
设计查询统一器解决异构查询格式导致的负迁移问题。
在多个基准上达到SOTA，且与MLLM方法精度相当或更优。
analysis.experiments: 在GoalStep-StepGrounding、Ego4D-NLQ、TACoS、Charades-STA、ActivityNet-Captions等基准上评估，单一UniversalVTG检查点达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能对极端复杂的查询或罕见场景泛化能力有限。
查询统一器的设计可能依赖特定格式假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级通用视频时序定位基础模型UniversalVTG，通过跨数据集预训练和查询统一器，以极小参数量达到SOTA。

papers.title: MolmoWeb: Open Visual Web Agent and Open Data for the Open Web
papers.abstract: Web agents--autonomous systems that navigate and execute tasks on the web on behalf of users--have the potential to transform how people interact with the digital world. However, the most capable web agents today rely on proprietary models with undisclosed training data and recipes, limiting scientific understanding, reproducibility, and community-driven progress. We believe agents for the open web should be built in the open. To this end, we introduce (1) MolmoWebMix, a large and diverse mixture of browser task demonstrations and web-GUI perception data and (2) MolmoWeb, a family of fully open multimodal web agents. Specifically, MolmoWebMix combines over 100K synthetic task trajectories from multiple complementary generation pipelines with 30K+ human demonstrations, atomic web-skill trajectories, and GUI perception data, including referring expression grounding and screenshot question answering. MolmoWeb agents operate as instruction-conditioned visual-language action policies: given a task instruction and a webpage screenshot, they predict the next browser action, requiring no access to HTML, accessibility trees, or specialized APIs. Available in 4B and 8B size, on browser-use benchmarks like WebVoyager, Online-Mind2Web, and DeepShop, MolmoWeb agents achieve state-of-the-art results outperforming similar scale open-weight-only models such as Fara-7B, UI-Tars-1.5-7B, and Holo1-7B. MolmoWeb-8B also surpasses set-of-marks (SoM) agents built on much larger closed frontier models like GPT-4o. We further demonstrate consistent gains through test-time scaling via parallel rollouts with best-of-N selection, achieving 94.7% and 60.5% pass@4 (compared to 78.2% and 35.3% pass@1) on WebVoyager and Online-Mind2Web respectively. We will release model checkpoints, training data, code, and a unified evaluation harness to enable reproducibility and accelerate open research on web agents.

analysis.tldr: MolmoWeb 是一个完全开源的视觉 Web 智能体，通过大规模混合数据训练，在多个基准上超越同规模开源模型和部分闭源模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前最强大的 Web 智能体依赖专有模型，训练数据和配方不公开，限制了科学理解、可复现性和社区驱动的进步。
analysis.problem: 构建完全开源的 Web 智能体，使其无需 HTML 或 API 访问，仅凭截图和指令即可执行浏览器任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MolmoWebMix 数据集（包含 10 万+合成轨迹、3 万+人工演示、原子 Web 技能轨迹和 GUI 感知数据），训练 MolmoWeb 视觉-语言动作策略模型（4B/8B），直接预测浏览器动作。
contributions: 发布大规模开源浏览器任务演示和 GUI 感知数据混合集 MolmoWebMix
提出完全开源的视觉 Web 智能体 MolmoWeb，在多个基准上达到 SOTA
analysis.experiments: 在 WebVoyager、Online-Mind2Web、DeepShop 上评估，MolmoWeb 超越同规模开源模型（如 Fara-7B、UI-Tars-1.5-7B、Holo1-7B），8B 模型还超越基于 GPT-4o 的 SoM 智能体；通过并行 rollout 和 best-of-N 选择实现测试时扩展，pass@4 显著高于 pass@1。
limitations: 模型大小限制（4B/8B）可能影响复杂任务表现
合成数据质量可能不如真实数据
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MolmoWeb 是一个完全开源的视觉 Web 智能体，通过大规模混合数据训练，在多个基准上超越同规模开源模型和部分闭源模型。

papers.title: When Fine-Tuning Changes the Evidence: Architecture-Dependent Semantic Drift in Chest X-Ray Explanations
papers.abstract: Transfer learning followed by fine-tuning is widely adopted in medical image classification due to consistent gains in diagnostic performance. However, in multi-class settings with overlapping visual features, improvements in accuracy do not guarantee stability of the visual evidence used to support predictions. We define semantic drift as systematic changes in the attribution structure supporting a model's predictions between transfer learning and full fine-tuning, reflecting potential shifts in underlying visual reasoning despite stable classification performance. Using a five-class chest X-ray task, we evaluate DenseNet201, ResNet50V2, and InceptionV3 under a two-stage training protocol and quantify drift with reference-free metrics capturing spatial localization and structural consistency of attribution maps. Across architectures, coarse anatomical localization remains stable, while overlap IoU reveals pronounced architecture-dependent reorganization of evidential structure. Beyond single-method analysis, stability rankings can reverse across LayerCAM and GradCAM++ under converged predictive performance, establishing explanation stability as an interaction between architecture, optimization phase, and attribution objective.

analysis.tldr: 微调会改变模型解释的归因结构，导致语义漂移，且漂移模式与架构相关。
analysis.research_motivation: 迁移学习+微调在医学图像分类中广泛使用，但准确率提升可能掩盖模型推理依据的不稳定变化，影响临床可信度。
analysis.problem: 微调后模型预测的视觉证据（归因图）是否发生系统性变化，以及这种变化是否与架构相关。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：粗粒度解剖定位稳定，但细粒度归因结构（IoU）出现架构依赖的重组；不同归因方法（LayerCAM vs GradCAM++）的稳定性排名在收敛性能下可能反转。
analysis.method: 定义语义漂移为归因结构的系统性变化；使用无参考指标（空间定位、结构一致性）量化漂移；在五类胸部X光任务上比较DenseNet201、ResNet50V2、InceptionV3的两阶段训练。
contributions: 提出语义漂移概念，量化微调对归因结构的影响
揭示归因稳定性是架构、优化阶段和归因方法的交互结果
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估三种架构和两种归因方法，泛化性有限
未探讨语义漂移对临床决策的实际影响
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 微调会改变模型解释的归因结构，导致语义漂移，且漂移模式与架构相关。

papers.title: Visually-grounded Humanoid Agents
papers.abstract: Digital human generation has been studied for decades and supports a wide range of real-world applications. However, most existing systems are passively animated, relying on privileged state or scripted control, which limits scalability to novel environments. We instead ask: how can digital humans actively behave using only visual observations and specified goals in novel scenes? Achieving this would enable populating any 3D environments with digital humans at scale that exhibit spontaneous, natural, goal-directed behaviors. To this end, we introduce Visually-grounded Humanoid Agents, a coupled two-layer (world-agent) paradigm that replicates humans at multiple levels: they look, perceive, reason, and behave like real people in real-world 3D scenes. The World Layer reconstructs semantically rich 3D Gaussian scenes from real-world videos via an occlusion-aware pipeline and accommodates animatable Gaussian-based human avatars. The Agent Layer transforms these avatars into autonomous humanoid agents, equipping them with first-person RGB-D perception and enabling them to perform accurate, embodied planning with spatial awareness and iterative reasoning, which is then executed at the low level as full-body actions to drive their behaviors in the scene. We further introduce a benchmark to evaluate humanoid-scene interaction in diverse reconstructed environments. Experiments show our agents achieve robust autonomous behavior, yielding higher task success rates and fewer collisions than ablations and state-of-the-art planning methods. This work enables active digital human population and advances human-centric embodied AI. Data, code, and models will be open-sourced.

analysis.tldr: 提出视觉驱动的人形智能体，通过世界-智能体双层范式实现3D场景中的自主行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数字人系统依赖特权状态或脚本控制，缺乏在陌生环境中基于视觉观察的主动行为能力，限制了大规模部署。
analysis.problem: 如何让数字人仅凭视觉观察和目标在未知3D场景中自主、自然地执行目标导向行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双层范式：世界层从真实视频重建语义丰富的3D高斯场景并容纳可动画化人体化身；智能体层赋予化身第一人称RGB-D感知，结合空间感知和迭代推理进行具身规划，并执行全身动作。
contributions: 提出视觉驱动的人形智能体双层范式，实现基于视觉的自主行为。
引入遮挡感知的3D高斯场景重建和可动画化人体化身。
构建评估人-场景交互的基准，实验表明方法在任务成功率和碰撞次数上优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多种重建环境中评估人形智能体与场景交互，任务成功率和碰撞次数优于消融实验和SOTA规划方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D场景重建，对输入视频质量敏感。
未提及在极端复杂或动态场景中的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出视觉驱动的人形智能体，通过世界-智能体双层范式实现3D场景中的自主行为。

papers.title: Differentially Private Language Generation and Identification in the Limit
papers.abstract: We initiate the study of language generation in the limit, a model recently introduced by Kleinberg and Mullainathan [KM24], under the constraint of differential privacy. We consider the continual release model, where a generator must eventually output a stream of valid strings while protecting the privacy of the entire input sequence. Our first main result is that for countable collections of languages, privacy comes at no qualitative cost: we provide an $\varepsilon$-differentially-private algorithm that generates in the limit from any countable collection. This stands in contrast to many learning settings where privacy renders learnability impossible. However, privacy does impose a quantitative cost: there are finite collections of size $k$ for which uniform private generation requires $Ω(k/\varepsilon)$ samples, whereas just one sample suffices non-privately. We then turn to the harder problem of language identification in the limit. Here, we show that privacy creates fundamental barriers. We prove that no $\varepsilon$-DP algorithm can identify a collection containing two languages with an infinite intersection and a finite set difference, a condition far stronger than the classical non-private characterization of identification. Next, we turn to the stochastic setting where the sample strings are sampled i.i.d. from a distribution (instead of being generated by an adversary). Here, we show that private identification is possible if and only if the collection is identifiable in the adversarial model. Together, our results establish new dimensions along which generation and identification differ and, for identification, a separation between adversarial and stochastic settings induced by privacy constraints.

analysis.tldr: 在差分隐私约束下，语言极限生成与识别的可行性及代价研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐私保护是机器学习的重要需求，但差分隐私常导致学习不可行；语言生成与识别是基础问题，其隐私代价尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 研究在差分隐私约束下，语言极限生成与识别的理论可行性、样本复杂度及隐私带来的根本性障碍。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 隐私对生成和识别的影响不同：生成中隐私不改变可学习性但增加样本复杂度；识别中隐私造成根本性障碍，且对抗与随机设置存在分离。
analysis.method: 理论分析，构造差分隐私算法并证明下界。
contributions: 证明对于可数语言集合，差分隐私不阻止极限生成，但样本复杂度从1增至Ω(k/ε)。
证明隐私使语言识别产生根本性障碍：任何ε-DP算法无法识别包含两个无限交集且有限差的语言集合。
在随机设置下，证明隐私识别可行当且仅当对抗模型下可识别。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能不直接适用于实际复杂语言模型。
未考虑近似差分隐私或更宽松的隐私模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在差分隐私约束下，语言极限生成与识别的可行性及代价研究。

papers.title: Phantom: Physics-Infused Video Generation via Joint Modeling of Visual and Latent Physical Dynamics
papers.abstract: Recent advances in generative video modeling, driven by large-scale datasets and powerful architectures, have yielded remarkable visual realism. However, emerging evidence suggests that simply scaling data and model size does not endow these systems with an understanding of the underlying physical laws that govern real-world dynamics. Existing approaches often fail to capture or enforce such physical consistency, resulting in unrealistic motion and dynamics. In his work, we investigate whether integrating the inference of latent physical properties directly into the video generation process can equip models with the ability to produce physically plausible videos. To this end, we propose Phantom, a Physics-Infused Video Generation model that jointly models the visual content and latent physical dynamics. Conditioned on observed video frames and inferred physical states, Phantom jointly predicts latent physical dynamics and generates future video frames. Phantom leverages a physics-aware video representation that serves as an abstract yet informaive embedding of the underlying physics, facilitating the joint prediction of physical dynamics alongside video content without requiring an explicit specification of a complex set of physical dynamics and properties. By integrating the inference of physical-aware video representation directly into the video generation process, Phantom produces video sequences that are both visually realistic and physically consistent. Quantitative and qualitative results on both standard video generation and physics-aware benchmarks demonstrate that Phantom not only outperforms existing methods in terms of adherence to physical dynamics but also delivers competitive perceptual fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出Phantom模型，通过联合建模视觉与潜在物理动态生成物理一致的视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽视觉逼真，但缺乏对物理规律的理解，导致运动不真实；仅扩大数据和模型规模无法解决此问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将潜在物理属性的推理直接集成到视频生成过程中，以生成物理上合理的视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，仅扩大数据和模型规模无法赋予模型对物理规律的理解，现有方法难以捕捉或强制执行物理一致性。
analysis.method: 提出Phantom模型，联合建模视觉内容和潜在物理动态；利用物理感知视频表示作为抽象嵌入，在生成视频帧的同时预测物理动态。
contributions: 提出一种物理注入的视频生成模型，联合建模视觉与潜在物理动态。
引入物理感知视频表示，无需显式指定复杂物理动态即可实现物理一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准视频生成和物理感知基准上进行了定量和定性评估，结果显示Phantom在物理动态遵循方面优于现有方法，同时保持有竞争力的感知保真度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定物理先验或表示设计，泛化到更复杂物理场景的能力未知。
摘要未提及计算开销或实时性，可能推理成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Phantom模型，通过联合建模视觉与潜在物理动态生成物理一致的视频。

papers.title: Quantifying Explanation Consistency: The C-Score Metric for CAM-Based Explainability in Medical Image Classification
papers.abstract: Class Activation Mapping (CAM) methods are widely used to generate visual explanations for deep learning classifiers in medical imaging. However, existing evaluation frameworks assess whether explanations are correct, measured by localisation fidelity against radiologist annotations, rather than whether they are consistent: whether the model applies the same spatial reasoning strategy across different patients with the same pathology. We propose the C-Score (Consistency Score), a confidence-weighted, annotation-free metric that quantifies intra-class explanation reproducibility via intensity-emphasised pairwise soft IoU across correctly classified instances. We evaluate six CAM techniques: GradCAM, GradCAM++, LayerCAM, EigenCAM, ScoreCAM, and MS GradCAM++ across three CNN architectures (DenseNet201, InceptionV3, ResNet50V2) over thirty training epochs on the Kermany chest X-ray dataset, covering transfer learning and fine-tuning phases. We identify three distinct mechanisms of AUC-consistency dissociation, invisible to standard classification metrics: threshold-mediated gold list collapse, technique-specific attribution collapse at peak AUC, and class-level consistency masking in global aggregation. C-Score provides an early warning signal of impending model instability. ScoreCAM deterioration on ResNet50V2 is detectable one full checkpoint before catastrophic AUC collapse and yields architecture-specific clinical deployment recommendations grounded in explanation quality rather than predictive ranking alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出C-Score指标量化CAM解释一致性，揭示AUC-一致性解耦机制，为医学图像分类提供解释质量驱动的部署建议。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CAM评估聚焦于解释正确性（定位保真度），忽略了解释一致性（同一病理下空间推理策略的复现性），导致模型稳定性隐患未被发现。
analysis.problem: 缺乏无标注的、量化类内解释一致性的指标，以检测CAM解释的不可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现三种AUC-一致性解耦机制：阈值介导的金列表崩溃、技术特定归因崩溃（峰值AUC时）、全局聚合中的类级一致性掩盖。
analysis.method: 提出C-Score，基于置信度加权的无标注指标，通过强度强调的成对soft IoU量化正确分类实例的类内解释复现性。
contributions: 提出C-Score，首个无标注的CAM解释一致性量化指标。
揭示AUC-一致性解耦的三种机制，提供早期不稳定预警。
analysis.experiments: 在Kermany胸部X光数据集上，评估6种CAM技术和3种CNN架构（DenseNet201, InceptionV3, ResNet50V2）在30个训练epoch上的表现，涵盖迁移学习和微调阶段。
limitations: 仅针对医学图像分类，泛化性待验证。
依赖正确分类实例，可能受分类器性能影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出C-Score指标量化CAM解释一致性，揭示AUC-一致性解耦机制，为医学图像分类提供解释质量驱动的部署建议。

papers.title: Novel View Synthesis as Video Completion
papers.abstract: We tackle the problem of sparse novel view synthesis (NVS) using video diffusion models; given $K$ ($\approx 5$) multi-view images of a scene and their camera poses, we predict the view from a target camera pose. Many prior approaches leverage generative image priors encoded via diffusion models. However, models trained on single images lack multi-view knowledge. We instead argue that video models already contain implicit multi-view knowledge and so should be easier to adapt for NVS. Our key insight is to formulate sparse NVS as a low frame-rate video completion task. However, one challenge is that sparse NVS is defined over an unordered set of inputs, often too sparse to admit a meaningful order, so the models should be $\textit{invariant}$ to permutations of that input set. To this end, we present FrameCrafter, which adapts video models (naturally trained with coherent frame orderings) to permutation-invariant NVS through several architectural modifications, including per-frame latent encodings and removal of temporal positional embeddings. Our results suggest that video models can be easily trained to "forget" about time with minimal supervision, producing competitive performance on sparse-view NVS benchmarks. Project page: https://frame-crafter.github.io/

analysis.tldr: 将稀疏新视角合成转化为低帧率视频补全任务，利用视频扩散模型实现视角生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于单图像扩散模型的方法缺乏多视图知识，而视频模型天然包含多视图信息，但如何利用视频模型处理无序稀疏输入是挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何将视频扩散模型适配到稀疏、无序的多视图新视角合成任务，并保持对输入顺序的置换不变性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视频模型已隐含多视图知识，但稀疏NVS输入无序且帧率低，与视频模型训练时的有序帧序列不匹配。
analysis.method: 提出FrameCrafter，通过架构修改（如每帧潜在编码、移除时间位置嵌入）使视频模型适应置换不变的NVS，将NVS视为低帧率视频补全。
contributions: 提出将稀疏NVS重新定义为低帧率视频补全任务，利用视频扩散模型的多视图知识。
设计FrameCrafter架构，实现视频模型对无序输入的置换不变性。
analysis.experiments: 在稀疏视图NVS基准上取得有竞争力的性能，具体数值摘要未提供。
limitations: 可能依赖视频模型预训练质量，对极端稀疏视图效果未知。
未讨论动态场景或大视角变化下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将稀疏新视角合成转化为低帧率视频补全任务，利用视频扩散模型实现视角生成。

papers.title: PIArena: A Platform for Prompt Injection Evaluation
papers.abstract: Prompt injection attacks pose serious security risks across a wide range of real-world applications. While receiving increasing attention, the community faces a critical gap: the lack of a unified platform for prompt injection evaluation. This makes it challenging to reliably compare defenses, understand their true robustness under diverse attacks, or assess how well they generalize across tasks and benchmarks. For instance, many defenses initially reported as effective were later found to exhibit limited robustness on diverse datasets and attacks. To bridge this gap, we introduce PIArena, a unified and extensible platform for prompt injection evaluation that enables users to easily integrate state-of-the-art attacks and defenses and evaluate them across a variety of existing and new benchmarks. We also design a dynamic strategy-based attack that adaptively optimizes injected prompts based on defense feedback. Through comprehensive evaluation using PIArena, we uncover critical limitations of state-of-the-art defenses: limited generalizability across tasks, vulnerability to adaptive attacks, and fundamental challenges when an injected task aligns with the target task. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/sleeepeer/PIArena.

analysis.tldr: PIArena 是一个统一的提示注入评估平台，揭示了现有防御在泛化性和自适应攻击下的局限性。
analysis.research_motivation: 提示注入攻击在真实应用中构成严重安全风险，但社区缺乏统一的评估平台，导致防御方法难以可靠比较，且许多防御在多样化攻击下表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一、可扩展的提示注入评估平台，以支持攻击与防御的集成、基准测试和泛化能力评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 许多最初报告有效的防御在多样化数据集和攻击下表现出有限的鲁棒性；现有防御存在任务泛化性差、易受自适应攻击、以及注入任务与目标任务对齐时的根本性挑战。
analysis.method: 提出 PIArena 平台，集成多种攻击与防御，并设计一种动态策略攻击，根据防御反馈自适应优化注入提示。
contributions: 提出统一可扩展的提示注入评估平台 PIArena，支持攻击与防御的集成和基准测试。
设计动态策略攻击，自适应优化注入提示，揭示现有防御的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 通过综合评估，揭示了现有防御在泛化性、自适应攻击和任务对齐方面的局限性。摘要未提供具体实验数值。
limitations: 平台可能依赖现有攻击和防御的实现，对新方法的扩展性需进一步验证。
动态策略攻击的计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PIArena 是一个统一的提示注入评估平台，揭示了现有防御在泛化性和自适应攻击下的局限性。

papers.title: What They Saw, Not Just Where They Looked: Semantic Scanpath Similarity via VLMs and NLP metric
papers.abstract: Scanpath similarity metrics are central to eye-movement research, yet existing methods predominantly evaluate spatial and temporal alignment while neglecting semantic equivalence between attended image regions. We present a semantic scanpath similarity framework that integrates vision-language models (VLMs) into eye-tracking analysis. Each fixation is encoded under controlled visual context (patch-based and marker-based strategies) and transformed into concise textual descriptions, which are aggregated into scanpath-level representations. Semantic similarity is then computed using embedding-based and lexical NLP metrics and compared against established spatial measures, including MultiMatch and DTW. Experiments on free-viewing eye-tracking data demonstrate that semantic similarity captures partially independent variance from geometric alignment, revealing cases of high content agreement despite spatial divergence. We further analyze the impact of contextual encoding on description fidelity and metric stability. Our findings suggest that multimodal foundation models enable interpretable, content-aware extensions of classical scanpath analysis, providing a complementary dimension for gaze research within the ETRA community.

analysis.tldr: 提出融合VLM和NLP指标的语义扫描路径相似度框架，补充传统空间对齐方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扫描路径相似度方法主要评估空间和时间对齐，忽略了注视区域之间的语义等价性，限制了眼动分析的内容理解能力。
analysis.problem: 如何量化不同扫描路径之间注视区域的语义相似性，而非仅依赖几何对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现语义相似度能捕获与几何对齐部分独立的方差，存在空间差异但内容高度一致的情况。
analysis.method: 利用VLM在受控视觉上下文（基于块和基于标记的策略）下编码每个注视点，生成文本描述，聚合为扫描路径级表示，再通过嵌入和词汇NLP指标计算语义相似度。
contributions: 提出首个融合VLM和NLP指标的语义扫描路径相似度框架。
在自由观看眼动数据上验证语义相似度与几何对齐的互补性。
analysis.experiments: 在自由观看眼动数据集上实验，与MultiMatch和DTW等空间度量对比，分析上下文编码对描述保真度和度量稳定性的影响。
limitations: 依赖VLM的视觉理解能力，可能受模型偏差影响。
文本描述的质量受上下文编码策略限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出融合VLM和NLP指标的语义扫描路径相似度框架，补充传统空间对齐方法。

papers.title: On Semiotic-Grounded Interpretive Evaluation of Generative Art
papers.abstract: Interpretation is essential to deciphering the language of art: audiences communicate with artists by recovering meaning from visual artifacts. However, current Generative Art (GenArt) evaluators remain fixated on surface-level image quality or literal prompt adherence, failing to assess the deeper symbolic or abstract meaning intended by the creator. We address this gap by formalizing a Peircean computational semiotic theory that models Human-GenArt Interaction (HGI) as cascaded semiosis. This framework reveals that artistic meaning is conveyed through three modes - iconic, symbolic, and indexical - yet existing evaluators operate heavily within the iconic mode, remaining structurally blind to the latter two. To overcome this structural blindness, we propose SemJudge. This evaluator explicitly assesses symbolic and indexical meaning in HGI via a Hierarchical Semiosis Graph (HSG) that reconstructs the meaning-making process from prompt to generated artifact. Extensive quantitative experiments show that SemJudge aligns more closely with human judgments than prior evaluators on an interpretation-intensive fine-art benchmark. User studies further demonstrate that SemJudge produces deeper, more insightful artistic interpretations, thereby paving the way for GenArt to move beyond the generation of "pretty" images toward a medium capable of expressing complex human experience. Project page: https://github.com/songrise/SemJudge.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于符号学理论的生成艺术评估方法SemJudge，弥补现有评估器对深层符号与索引意义的忽视。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前生成艺术评估仅关注表面图像质量或提示词忠实度，无法评估创作者意图中的深层符号或抽象意义，限制了生成艺术作为表达复杂人类体验的媒介。
analysis.problem: 现有评估器对生成艺术中的符号性（symbolic）和索引性（indexical）意义存在结构性盲区，无法评估深层艺术含义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有评估器主要工作在图像性（iconic）模式，对符号性和索引性意义结构性地忽视。
analysis.method: 基于皮尔斯符号学理论，提出SemJudge评估器，通过层次符号学图（HSG）重建从提示到生成作品的意义构建过程，显式评估符号性和索引性意义。
contributions: 形式化皮尔斯符号学理论用于人类-生成艺术交互（HGI），揭示三种意义模式。
提出SemJudge评估器，通过HSG评估符号性和索引性意义。
实验证明SemJudge与人类判断更一致，且产生更深刻的艺术解读。
analysis.experiments: 在解释密集型美术基准上进行了定量实验，显示SemJudge与人类判断更一致；用户研究证明其产生更深刻、更有洞察力的艺术解读。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量提示词和艺术领域知识。
HSG构建可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于符号学理论的生成艺术评估方法SemJudge，弥补现有评估器对深层符号与索引意义的忽视。

papers.title: VOLTA: The Surprising Ineffectiveness of Auxiliary Losses for Calibrated Deep Learning
papers.abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is essential for deploying deep learning models in safety critical applications, yet no consensus exists on which UQ method performs best across different data modalities and distribution shifts. This paper presents a comprehensive benchmark of ten widely used UQ baselines including MC Dropout, SWAG, ensemble methods, temperature scaling, energy based OOD, Mahalanobis, hyperbolic classifiers, ENN, Taylor Sensus, and split conformal prediction against a simplified yet highly effective variant of VOLTA that retains only a deep encoder, learnable prototypes, cross entropy loss, and post hoc temperature scaling. We evaluate all methods on CIFAR 10 (in distribution), CIFAR 100, SVHN, uniform noise (out of distribution), CIFAR 10 C (corruptions), and Tiny ImageNet features (tabular). VOLTA achieves competitive or superior accuracy (up to 0.864 on CIFAR 10), significantly lower expected calibration error (0.010 vs. 0.044 to 0.102 for baselines), and strong OOD detection (AUROC 0.802). Statistical testing over three random seeds shows that VOLTA matches or outperforms most baselines, with ablation studies confirming the importance of adaptive temperature and deep encoders. Our results establish VOLTA as a lightweight, deterministic, and well calibrated alternative to more complex UQ approaches.

analysis.tldr: VOLTA 简化版（仅保留深度编码器、可学习原型、交叉熵损失和后处理温度缩放）在不确定性量化基准中意外地优于或匹敌十种主流方法，且更轻量、校准更好。
analysis.research_motivation: 在安全关键应用中，不确定性量化（UQ）至关重要，但目前缺乏跨不同数据模态和分布偏移的最佳方法共识，现有方法复杂且效果不一。
analysis.problem: 评估并比较十种主流 UQ 方法，验证简化版 VOLTA 是否能在多种分布偏移场景下实现高效且校准良好的不确定性估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但实验表明 VOLTA 在准确率、校准误差和 OOD 检测上均优于或匹敌更复杂的基线方法。
analysis.method: VOLTA 简化版：仅使用深度编码器、可学习原型、交叉熵损失和后处理温度缩放，无需辅助损失。
