analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，LLM 在多次 rollout 间的动作一致性可以反映步骤难度：高一致性表示简单决策，低一致性表示不确定性。
analysis.method: TrACE 在每个时间步采样少量候选动作，计算模型提交相同动作的一致性；若一致性高则立即提交，否则增加 rollout 次数直到达到上限，最终选择多数动作。
contributions: 提出 TrACE，首个无需训练、每时间步自适应计算控制的 LLM 代理方法，在单步推理和多步导航任务上验证有效性。
证明 inter-rollout 动作一致性可作为步骤级成功信号，无需外部监督即可利用模型自身输出不确定性。
analysis.experiments: 在 GSM8K（n=50）和 MiniHouse（n=30）上使用 Qwen 2.5 3B Instruct 模型（CPU）评估，TrACE-4 匹配 SC-4 准确率，LLM 调用减少 33%（GSM8K）和 39%（MiniHouse）；TrACE-8 匹配 SC-8 准确率，调用减少 55% 和 65%。
limitations: 实验规模较小（n=50 和 n=30），可能不足以泛化到更复杂任务。
仅使用单一模型（Qwen 2.5 3B）和 CPU 环境，未测试更大模型或 GPU 场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TrACE 通过测量 LLM 在多次 rollout 间的动作一致性，自适应分配推理计算量，无需训练即可在保持准确率的同时大幅减少 LLM 调用次数。

papers.title: SOLAR: Communication-Efficient Model Adaptation via Subspace-Oriented Latent Adapter Reparametrization
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods, such as LoRA, enable scalable adaptation of foundation models by injecting low-rank adapters. However, their communication and storage costs remain a major bottleneck in resource-constrained settings. We propose SOLAR (Subspace-Oriented Latent Adapter Reparameterization), a post-training compression framework that substantially reduces the communication cost (i.e., the number of parameters to transmit or store) of PEFT adapters. SOLAR expresses each PEFT update as a linear combination of basis vectors formed from the foundation model's singular vectors with controlled random perturbations. By exploiting the subspace similarity (the alignment of principal directions) between the foundation model and task-specific fine-tuned updates, SOLAR decouples the adapter size from PEFT structure and ensures compact yet expressive representations. It is model-agnostic and compatible with existing PEFT methods, including LoRA, AdaLoRA, and other adapter modules. We theoretically establish a bound on the reconstruction error. Experiments on language and vision tasks using LLaMA, GPT, and ViT models demonstrate that SOLAR preserves task performance while significantly reducing model representation sizes, offering an effective and communication-efficient solution for deployment in distributed systems and edge devices.

analysis.tldr: SOLAR通过子空间导向的潜在适配器重参数化，大幅压缩PEFT适配器的通信和存储成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 参数高效微调（PEFT）方法如LoRA虽然降低了微调参数量，但在资源受限场景下，适配器的通信和存储开销仍是主要瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲任务性能的前提下，显著减少PEFT适配器的参数传输和存储成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SOLAR框架，将每个PEFT更新表示为基向量的线性组合，基向量来自基础模型的奇异向量并加入受控随机扰动，利用子空间相似性解耦适配器大小与PEFT结构。
contributions: 提出一种与模型无关的后训练压缩框架SOLAR，兼容LoRA、AdaLoRA等多种PEFT方法。
理论上建立了重构误差的界限，并在语言和视觉任务上验证了性能保持与显著压缩效果。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaMA、GPT和ViT模型上进行了语言和视觉任务实验，表明SOLAR在保持任务性能的同时显著减小模型表示大小。
limitations: 可能对高度非线性的任务适配效果有限。
压缩率与性能之间的权衡需要进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SOLAR通过子空间导向的潜在适配器重参数化，大幅压缩PEFT适配器的通信和存储成本。

papers.title: Scaling-Aware Data Selection for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Systems
papers.abstract: Large-scale deep learning models for physical AI applications depend on diverse training data collection efforts. These models and correspondingly, the training data, must address different evaluation criteria necessary for the models to be deployable in real-world environments. Data selection policies can guide the development of the training set, but current frameworks do not account for the ambiguity in how data points affect different metrics. In this work, we propose Mixture Optimization via Scaling-Aware Iterative Collection (MOSAIC), a general data selection framework that operates by: (i) partitioning the dataset into domains; (ii) fitting neural scaling laws from each data domain to the evaluation metrics; and (iii) optimizing a data mixture by iteratively adding data from domains that maximize the change in metrics. We apply MOSAIC to autonomous driving (AD), where an End-to-End (E2E) planner model is evaluated on the Extended Predictive Driver Model Score (EPDMS), an aggregate of driving rule compliance metrics. Here, MOSAIC outperforms a diverse set of baselines on EPDMS with up to 80\% less data.

analysis.tldr: 提出MOSAIC框架，通过神经缩放定律和迭代数据混合优化，在自动驾驶端到端规划中仅用20%数据就超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模物理AI模型依赖多样化训练数据，但现有数据选择策略未考虑不同数据点对多个评估指标影响的模糊性，导致数据效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种通用的数据选择框架，能够根据数据域对多个评估指标的贡献，高效地构建训练集以优化端到端自动驾驶系统的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MOSAIC框架，包括三步：将数据集划分为域；从每个数据域到评估指标拟合神经缩放定律；通过迭代添加最大化指标变化的数据域来优化数据混合。
contributions: 提出一种通用的数据选择框架MOSAIC，利用神经缩放定律和迭代优化实现数据高效选择。
在自动驾驶端到端规划任务中，MOSAIC在EPDMS指标上以最多80%的数据减少超越多种基线。
analysis.experiments: 在自动驾驶端到端规划任务上评估，使用EPDMS指标，MOSAIC以最多80%的数据减少超越多种基线。
limitations: 可能依赖域划分的合理性，不合理的划分可能影响缩放定律拟合。
迭代优化过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MOSAIC框架，通过神经缩放定律和迭代数据混合优化，在自动驾驶端到端规划中仅用20%数据就超越基线。

papers.title: MegaStyle: Constructing Diverse and Scalable Style Dataset via Consistent Text-to-Image Style Mapping
papers.abstract: In this paper, we introduce MegaStyle, a novel and scalable data curation pipeline that constructs an intra-style consistent, inter-style diverse and high-quality style dataset. We achieve this by leveraging the consistent text-to-image style mapping capability of current large generative models, which can generate images in the same style from a given style description. Building on this foundation, we curate a diverse and balanced prompt gallery with 170K style prompts and 400K content prompts, and generate a large-scale style dataset MegaStyle-1.4M via content-style prompt combinations. With MegaStyle-1.4M, we propose style-supervised contrastive learning to fine-tune a style encoder MegaStyle-Encoder for extracting expressive, style-specific representations, and we also train a FLUX-based style transfer model MegaStyle-FLUX. Extensive experiments demonstrate the importance of maintaining intra-style consistency, inter-style diversity and high-quality for style dataset, as well as the effectiveness of the proposed MegaStyle-1.4M. Moreover, when trained on MegaStyle-1.4M, MegaStyle-Encoder and MegaStyle-FLUX provide reliable style similarity measurement and generalizable style transfer, making a significant contribution to the style transfer community. More results are available at our project website https://jeoyal.github.io/MegaStyle/.

analysis.tldr: 提出MegaStyle数据构建流程，生成大规模风格数据集MegaStyle-1.4M，并训练风格编码器和风格迁移模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有风格数据集缺乏类内一致性和类间多样性，且规模有限，限制了风格表示学习和风格迁移的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个类内风格一致、类间风格多样且高质量的大规模风格数据集，并利用该数据集提升风格编码和风格迁移的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前大型生成模型具备从风格描述生成同风格图像的一致映射能力，可用于构建风格数据集。
analysis.method: 利用文本到图像风格映射能力，构建包含170K风格提示和400K内容提示的提示库，通过组合生成1.4M图像数据集；提出风格监督对比学习微调风格编码器，并训练基于FLUX的风格迁移模型。
contributions: 提出MegaStyle数据构建流程，生成大规模、类内一致、类间多样、高质量的风格数据集MegaStyle-1.4M。
提出风格监督对比学习，训练出表达力强的风格编码器MegaStyle-Encoder。
训练出基于FLUX的风格迁移模型MegaStyle-FLUX，实现可靠的风格相似度测量和泛化性风格迁移。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集依赖生成模型质量，可能存在生成伪影。
风格描述可能无法覆盖所有风格细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MegaStyle数据构建流程，生成大规模风格数据集MegaStyle-1.4M，并训练风格编码器和风格迁移模型。

papers.title: Towards Real-world Human Behavior Simulation: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Long-horizon, Cross-scenario, Heterogeneous Behavior Traces
papers.abstract: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has illuminated the potential for a general-purpose user simulator. However, existing benchmarks remain constrained to isolated scenarios, narrow action spaces, or synthetic data, failing to capture the holistic nature of authentic human behavior. To bridge this gap, we introduce OmniBehavior, the first user simulation benchmark constructed entirely from real-world data, integrating long-horizon, cross-scenario, and heterogeneous behavioral patterns into a unified framework. Based on this benchmark, we first provide empirical evidence that previous datasets with isolated scenarios suffer from tunnel vision, whereas real-world decision-making relies on long-term, cross-scenario causal chains. Extensive evaluations of state-of-the-art LLMs reveal that current models struggle to accurately simulate these complex behaviors, with performance plateauing even as context windows expand. Crucially, a systematic comparison between simulated and authentic behaviors uncovers a fundamental structural bias: LLMs tend to converge toward a positive average person, exhibiting hyper-activity, persona homogenization, and a Utopian bias. This results in the loss of individual differences and long-tail behaviors, highlighting critical directions for future high-fidelity simulation research.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于真实数据的用户模拟基准OmniBehavior揭示LLM在长程、跨场景、异构行为模拟中存在结构性偏差，如超活跃、人格同质化和乌托邦偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有用户模拟基准局限于孤立场景、狭窄动作空间或合成数据，无法捕捉真实人类行为的整体性，阻碍了通用用户模拟器的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个基于真实数据、整合长程、跨场景和异构行为模式的统一基准来评估LLM模拟复杂人类行为的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在模拟复杂行为时性能随上下文窗口扩展而停滞；系统比较发现LLM存在结构性偏差：倾向于收敛到积极平均人，表现出超活跃、人格同质化和乌托邦偏见，导致个体差异和长尾行为丢失。
analysis.method: 构建OmniBehavior基准，完全基于真实数据，集成长期、跨场景和异构行为模式；评估多种SOTA LLM并系统比较模拟行为与真实行为。
contributions: 提出OmniBehavior，首个完全基于真实数据的用户模拟基准，覆盖长程、跨场景和异构行为。
实证表明孤立场景数据集存在隧道视野，真实决策依赖长期跨场景因果链。
揭示LLM模拟行为中的结构性偏差（超活跃、人格同质化、乌托邦偏见），为高保真模拟指明方向。
analysis.experiments: 在OmniBehavior基准上评估了多种SOTA LLM，并进行了模拟行为与真实行为的系统比较。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有真实行为场景。
未提供具体模型性能数值或改进方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于真实数据的用户模拟基准OmniBehavior揭示LLM在长程、跨场景、异构行为模拟中存在结构性偏差，如超活跃、人格同质化和乌托邦偏见。

papers.title: Scalable Neural Decoders for Practical Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computation
papers.abstract: Quantum error correction (QEC) is essential for scalable quantum computing. However, it requires classical decoders that are fast and accurate enough to keep pace with quantum hardware. While quantum low-density parity-check codes have recently emerged as a promising route to efficient fault tolerance, current decoding algorithms do not allow one to realize the full potential of these codes in practical settings. Here, we introduce a convolutional neural network decoder that exploits the geometric structure of QEC codes, and use it to probe a novel "waterfall" regime of error suppression, demonstrating that the logical error rates required for large-scale fault-tolerant algorithms are attainable with modest code sizes at current physical error rates, and with latencies within the real-time budgets of several leading hardware platforms. For example, for the $[144, 12, 12]$ Gross code, the decoder achieves logical error rates up to $\sim 17$x below existing decoders - reaching logical error rates $\sim 10^{-10}$ at physical error $p=0.1\%$ - with 3-5 orders of magnitude higher throughput. This decoder also produces well-calibrated confidence estimates that can significantly reduce the time overhead of repeat-until-success protocols. Taken together, these results suggest that the space-time costs associated with fault-tolerant quantum computation may be significantly lower than previously anticipated.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的CNN解码器，在量子LDPC码上实现逻辑错误率比现有解码器低17倍，延迟满足实时要求。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子纠错需要快速准确的经典解码器，现有算法无法充分发挥量子LDPC码的潜力，限制了大规模容错量子计算的实现。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既快速又准确的解码器，以在实用量子硬件上实现低逻辑错误率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用QEC码的几何结构设计卷积神经网络解码器，并探索一种新的“瀑布”错误抑制机制。
contributions: 提出一种可扩展的CNN解码器，在[144,12,12] Gross码上逻辑错误率比现有解码器低约17倍。
解码器吞吐量提高3-5个数量级，延迟满足多个领先硬件平台的实时预算。
解码器提供校准良好的置信度估计，可显著降低重复直到成功协议的时间开销。
analysis.experiments: 在[144,12,12] Gross码上测试，物理错误率p=0.1%时逻辑错误率达~10^{-10}，性能优于现有解码器。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的量子LDPC码。
CNN解码器的训练和泛化能力可能受限于码结构变化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可扩展的CNN解码器，在量子LDPC码上实现逻辑错误率比现有解码器低17倍，延迟满足实时要求。

papers.title: ASPECT:Analogical Semantic Policy Execution via Language Conditioned Transfer
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents often struggle to generalize knowledge to new tasks, even those structurally similar to ones they have mastered. Although recent approaches have attempted to mitigate this issue via zero-shot transfer, they are often constrained by predefined, discrete class systems, limiting their adaptability to novel or compositional task variations. We propose a significantly more generalized approach, replacing discrete latent variables with natural language conditioning via a text-conditioned Variational Autoencoder (VAE). Our core innovation utilizes a Large Language Model (LLM) as a dynamic \textit{semantic operator} at test time. Rather than relying on rigid rules, our agent queries the LLM to semantically remap the description of the current observation to align with the source task. This source-aligned caption conditions the VAE to generate an imagined state compatible with the agent's original training, enabling direct policy reuse. By harnessing the flexible reasoning capabilities of LLMs, our approach achieves zero-shot transfer across a broad spectrum of complex and truly novel analogous tasks, moving beyond the limitations of fixed category mappings. Code and videos are available \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ASPECT-85C3/}{here}.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM作为语义算子，通过文本条件VAE实现强化学习智能体在全新类比任务上的零样本迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习智能体难以将知识泛化到新任务，现有零样本迁移方法受限于预定义离散类别系统，无法适应新颖或组合任务变化。
analysis.problem: 如何让RL智能体在无需额外训练的情况下，将已学策略迁移到结构相似但语义不同的全新类比任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ASPECT框架，使用文本条件VAE替代离散潜变量，并在测试时利用LLM作为动态语义算子，将当前观测描述语义重映射到源任务对齐，生成想象状态以复用源策略。
contributions: 提出一种基于LLM语义重映射的零样本迁移方法，突破固定类别映射限制。
将文本条件VAE与LLM结合，实现跨广泛复杂类比任务的策略复用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖LLM的推理质量和实时性，可能引入延迟或语义偏差。
仅适用于结构相似的任务，对完全异构任务可能无效。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM作为语义算子，通过文本条件VAE实现强化学习智能体在全新类比任务上的零样本迁移。

papers.title: Human-AI Collaboration Reconfigures Group Regulation from Socially Shared to Hybrid Co-Regulation
papers.abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) is increasingly used in collaborative learning, yet its effects on how groups regulate collaboration remain unclear. Effective collaboration depends not only on what groups discuss, but on how they jointly manage goals, participation, strategy use, monitoring, and repair through co-regulation and socially shared regulation. We compared collaborative regulation between Human-AI and Human-Human groups in a parallel-group randomised experiment with 71 university students completing the same collaborative tasks with GenAI either available or unavailable. Focusing on human discourse, we used statistical analyses to examine differences in the distribution of collaborative regulation across regulatory modes, regulatory processes, and participatory focuses. Results showed that GenAI availability shifted regulation away from predominantly socially shared forms towards more hybrid co-regulatory forms, with selective increases in directive, obstacle-oriented, and affective regulatory processes. Participatory-focus distributions, however, were broadly similar across conditions. These findings suggest that GenAI reshapes the distribution of regulatory responsibility in collaboration and offer implications for the human-centred design of AI-supported collaborative learning.

analysis.tldr: 生成式AI将协作学习中的群体调节从社会共享调节转向混合共同调节。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI在协作学习中日益普及，但其对群体调节过程的影响尚不明确，而有效协作依赖于群体如何共同管理目标、参与、策略等调节过程。
analysis.problem: 探究生成式AI的可用性如何改变协作学习中的群体调节模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成式AI的可用性使调节从以社会共享形式为主转向更多混合共同调节形式，并选择性增加了指令性、障碍导向和情感性调节过程，但参与焦点分布相似。
analysis.method: 平行组随机实验，比较人类-AI组与人类-人类组在协作调节上的差异，通过统计分析考察调节模式、调节过程和参与焦点的分布。
contributions: 首次实证揭示生成式AI将协作调节从社会共享调节转向混合共同调节。
为AI支持的协作学习的人本设计提供启示。
analysis.experiments: 71名大学生参与平行组随机实验，完成相同协作任务，一组可使用GenAI，另一组不可用。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 样本量较小（71人），可能限制泛化性。
仅关注人类话语，未分析AI话语的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 生成式AI将协作学习中的群体调节从社会共享调节转向混合共同调节。

papers.title: PokeGym: A Visually-Driven Long-Horizon Benchmark for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in static visual understanding, their deployment in complex 3D embodied environments remains severely limited. Existing benchmarks suffer from four critical deficiencies: (1) passive perception tasks circumvent interactive dynamics; (2) simplified 2D environments fail to assess depth perception; (3) privileged state leakage bypasses genuine visual processing; and (4) human evaluation is prohibitively expensive and unscalable. We introduce PokeGym, a visually-driven long-horizon benchmark instantiated within Pokemon Legends: Z-A, a visually complex 3D open-world Role-Playing Game. PokeGym enforces strict code-level isolation: agents operate solely on raw RGB observations while an independent evaluator verifies success via memory scanning, ensuring pure vision-based decision-making and automated, scalable assessment. The benchmark comprises 30 tasks (30-220 steps) spanning navigation, interaction, and mixed scenarios, with three instruction granularities (Visual-Guided, Step-Guided, Goal-Only) to systematically deconstruct visual grounding, semantic reasoning, and autonomous exploration capabilities. Our evaluation reveals a key limitation of current VLMs: physical deadlock recovery, rather than high-level planning, constitutes the primary bottleneck, with deadlocks showing a strong negative correlation with task success. Furthermore, we uncover a metacognitive divergence: weaker models predominantly suffer from Unaware Deadlocks (oblivious to entrapment), whereas advanced models exhibit Aware Deadlocks (recognizing entrapment yet failing to recover). These findings highlight the need to integrate explicit spatial intuition into VLM architectures. The code and benchmark will be available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: PokeGym 是一个基于 3D 开放世界游戏的视觉驱动长程基准，揭示 VLM 在物理死锁恢复上的瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLM 基准在复杂 3D 具身环境中存在被动感知、简化 2D 环境、特权状态泄露和人工评估成本高等缺陷，亟需一个能评估纯视觉决策和长程交互能力的基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个视觉驱动、自动化、可扩展的长程基准，以系统评估 VLM 在复杂 3D 环境中的导航、交互和自主探索能力，并揭示其关键瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 物理死锁恢复（而非高层规划）是当前 VLM 的主要瓶颈，死锁与任务成功呈强负相关；弱模型多遭受无意识死锁（未察觉被困），而强模型则表现出有意识死锁（察觉但无法恢复），存在元认知分歧。
analysis.method: 在 3D 开放世界游戏《宝可梦传说 Z-A》中实例化 PokeGym 基准，包含 30 个任务（30-220 步），覆盖导航、交互和混合场景，提供三种指令粒度（视觉引导、步骤引导、仅目标），并通过代码级隔离确保纯 RGB 输入和自动评估。
contributions: 提出了 PokeGym，一个视觉驱动、长程、自动化的 VLM 基准，解决了现有基准的四个关键缺陷。
通过系统评估揭示了物理死锁恢复是 VLM 在 3D 具身环境中的主要瓶颈，并发现了元认知分歧现象。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到评估揭示了关键瓶颈和元认知分歧。
limitations: 基准基于单一游戏环境，可能限制泛化性。
任务数量有限（30 个），可能不足以覆盖所有具身场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PokeGym 是一个基于 3D 开放世界游戏的视觉驱动长程基准，揭示 VLM 在物理死锁恢复上的瓶颈。

papers.title: InstAP: Instance-Aware Vision-Language Pre-Train for Spatial-Temporal Understanding
papers.abstract: Current vision-language pre-training (VLP) paradigms excel at global scene understanding but struggle with instance-level reasoning due to global-only supervision. We introduce InstAP, an Instance-Aware Pre-training framework that jointly optimizes global vision-text alignment and fine-grained, instance-level contrastive alignment by grounding textual mentions to specific spatial-temporal regions. To support this, we present InstVL, a large-scale dataset (2 million images, 50,000 videos) with dual-granularity annotations: holistic scene captions and dense, grounded instance descriptions. On the InstVL benchmark, InstAP substantially outperforms existing VLP models on instance-level retrieval, and also surpasses a strong VLP baseline trained on the exact same data corpus, isolating the benefit of our instance-aware objective. Moreover, instance-centric pre-training improves global understanding: InstAP achieves competitive zero-shot performance on multiple video benchmarks, including MSR-VTT and DiDeMo. Qualitative visualizations further show that InstAP localizes textual mentions to the correct instances, while global-only models exhibit more diffuse, scene-level attention.

analysis.tldr: 提出实例感知预训练框架InstAP，通过细粒度对比学习提升时空理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLP方法仅依赖全局监督，难以进行实例级推理，限制了细粒度时空理解能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计预训练框架同时学习全局场景理解和实例级细粒度对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局监督模型在实例级任务上表现不足，注意力分布分散；实例感知预训练可提升全局理解。
analysis.method: 构建包含全局描述和密集实例标注的大规模数据集InstVL，提出联合优化全局对齐和实例级对比对齐的预训练框架InstAP。
contributions: 提出实例感知预训练框架InstAP，结合全局和细粒度对齐。
构建大规模多粒度数据集InstVL（2M图像、50K视频）。
在实例级检索和视频基准上取得显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在InstVL基准上，InstAP在实例级检索任务上大幅超越现有VLP模型；在MSR-VTT和DiDeMo等视频基准上取得有竞争力的零样本性能。
limitations: 数据集规模可能限制泛化能力。
实例级标注成本高，扩展性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出实例感知预训练框架InstAP，通过细粒度对比学习提升时空理解能力。

papers.title: Practical Bayesian Inference for Speech SNNs: Uncertainty and Loss-Landscape Smoothing
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are naturally suited for speech processing tasks due to their specific dynamics, which allows them to handle temporal data. However, the threshold-based generation of spikes in SNNs intuitively causes an angular or irregular predictive landscape. We explore the effect of using the Bayesian learning approach for the weights on the irregular predictive landscape. For the surrogate-gradient SNNs, we also explore the application of the Improved Variational Online Newton (IVON) approach, which is an efficient variational approach. The performance of the proposed approach is evaluated on the Heidelberg Digits and Speech Commands datasets. The hypothesis is that the Bayesian approach will result in a smoother and more regular predictive landscape, given the angular nature of the deterministic predictive landscape. The experimental evaluation of the proposed approach shows improved performance on the negative log-likelihood and Brier score. Furthermore, the proposed approach has resulted in a smoother and more regular predictive landscape compared to the deterministic approach, based on the one-dimensional slices of the weight space

analysis.tldr: 将贝叶斯推断应用于脉冲神经网络（SNN）进行语音处理，可平滑预测景观并提升不确定性量化。
analysis.research_motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）因其动态特性适合语音处理，但阈值触发机制导致预测景观不规则（angular/irregular），影响泛化和不确定性估计。现有确定性方法难以解决此问题。
analysis.problem: SNN中因脉冲生成机制导致的预测景观不规则性，以及如何通过贝叶斯方法改善平滑性和不确定性量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到确定性SNN的预测景观具有角度/不规则特性，而贝叶斯方法能产生更平滑、更规则的预测景观（基于权重空间一维切片分析）。
analysis.method: 采用改进变分在线牛顿（IVON）方法对替代梯度SNN进行贝叶斯学习，实现高效的变分推断。
contributions: 首次将IVON贝叶斯方法应用于替代梯度SNN的语音处理任务。
实验证明贝叶斯方法能平滑预测景观，并在负对数似然和Brier分数上优于确定性方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Heidelberg Digits和Speech Commands数据集上评估，对比确定性方法，报告了负对数似然和Brier分数改进，并通过权重空间一维切片验证了景观平滑性。
limitations: 仅验证了语音数据集，未涉及其他模态或更复杂任务。
IVON方法的计算开销可能高于简单确定性训练。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将贝叶斯推断应用于脉冲神经网络（SNN）进行语音处理，可平滑预测景观并提升不确定性量化。

papers.title: Dead Weights, Live Signals: Feedforward Graphs of Frozen Language Models
papers.abstract: We present a feedforward graph architecture in which heterogeneous frozen large language models serve as computational nodes, communicating through a shared continuous latent space via learned linear projections. Building on recent work demonstrating geometric compatibility between independently trained LLM latent spaces~\cite{armstrong2026thinking}, we extend this finding from static two-model steering to end-to-end trainable multi-node graphs, where projection matrices are optimized jointly via backpropagation through residual stream injection hooks. Three small frozen models (Llama-3.2-1B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, Gemma-2-2B) encode the input into a shared latent space whose aggregate signal is injected into two larger frozen models (Phi-3-mini, Mistral-7B), whose representations feed a lightweight cross-attention output node. With only 17.6M trainable parameters against approximately 12B frozen, the architecture achieves 87.3\% on ARC-Challenge, 82.8\% on OpenBookQA, and 67.2\% on MMLU, outperforming the best single constituent model by 11.4, 6.2, and 1.2 percentage points respectively, and outperforming parameter-matched learned classifiers on frozen single models by 9.1, 5.2, and 6.7 points. Gradient flow through multiple frozen model boundaries is empirically verified to be tractable, and the output node develops selective routing behavior across layer-2 nodes without explicit supervision.

analysis.tldr: 利用多个冻结大语言模型构建可端到端训练的图架构，通过共享潜空间通信，以少量可训练参数显著提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通常微调或组合大模型，但计算成本高；而独立训练的LLM潜空间具有几何兼容性，可被利用来构建高效的多模型协作系统。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多个冻结的异构大语言模型作为计算节点，通过可学习的线性投影在共享连续潜空间中通信，实现端到端可训练的多节点图架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出前馈图架构，将三个小冻结模型（Llama-3.2-1B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, Gemma-2-2B）编码输入到共享潜空间，聚合信号注入两个大冻结模型（Phi-3-mini, Mistral-7B），其表示馈入轻量交叉注意力输出节点；投影矩阵通过残差流注入钩子反向传播联合优化。
contributions: 提出一种利用多个冻结LLM作为计算节点的前馈图架构，通过共享潜空间通信。
验证了梯度可通过多个冻结模型边界传播，且输出节点发展出选择性路由行为。
在ARC-Challenge、OpenBookQA和MMLU上以少量可训练参数（17.6M）超越最佳单一模型和参数匹配的分类器。
analysis.experiments: 在ARC-Challenge（87.3%）、OpenBookQA（82.8%）和MMLU（67.2%）上评估，与最佳单一模型相比分别提升11.4、6.2和1.2个百分点，与参数匹配的冻结单模型分类器相比分别提升9.1、5.2和6.7个百分点。
limitations: 仅使用特定小模型和大模型组合，泛化性未知。
训练参数仅17.6M，但冻结参数约12B，实际推理成本仍较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用多个冻结大语言模型构建可端到端训练的图架构，通过共享潜空间通信，以少量可训练参数显著提升推理性能。

papers.title: Lost in the Hype: Revealing and Dissecting the Performance Degradation of Medical Multimodal Large Language Models in Image Classification
papers.abstract: The rise of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has sparked an unprecedented wave of applications in the field of medical imaging analysis. However, as one of the earliest and most fundamental tasks integrated into this paradigm, medical image classification reveals a sobering reality: state-of-the-art medical MLLMs consistently underperform compared to traditional deep learning models, despite their overwhelming advantages in pre-training data and model parameters. This paradox prompts a critical rethinking: where exactly does the performance degradation originate? In this paper, we conduct extensive experiments on 14 open-source medical MLLMs across three representative image classification datasets. Moving beyond superficial performance benchmarking, we employ feature probing to track the information flow of visual features module-by-module and layer-by-layer throughout the entire MLLM pipeline, enabling explicit visualization of where and how classification signals are distorted, diluted, or overridden. As the first attempt to dissect classification performance degradation in medical MLLMs, our findings reveal four failure modes: 1) quality limitation in visual representation, 2) fidelity loss in connector projection, 3) comprehension deficit in LLM reasoning, and 4) misalignment of semantic mapping. Meanwhile, we introduce quantitative scores that characterize the healthiness of feature evolution, enabling principled comparisons across diverse MLLMs and datasets. Furthermore, we provide insightful discussions centered on the critical barriers that prevent current medical MLLMs from fulfilling their promised clinical potential. We hope that our work provokes rethinking within the community-highlighting that the road from high expectations to clinically deployable MLLMs remains long and winding.

analysis.tldr: 医学多模态大模型在图像分类任务上性能不如传统深度学习模型，本文通过特征探针揭示了四种失效模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管医学MLLMs在预训练数据和参数规模上具有优势，但在基础图像分类任务上却表现不佳，这一悖论亟需系统分析其性能退化的根源。
analysis.problem: 揭示并剖析医学MLLMs在图像分类任务中性能退化的具体原因和机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出存在四种失效模式：视觉表示质量限制、连接器投影保真度损失、LLM推理理解缺陷、语义映射错位。
analysis.method: 对14个开源医学MLLMs在三个数据集上进行实验，采用特征探针逐模块、逐层追踪视觉特征信息流，并引入量化评分表征特征演化的健康度。
contributions: 首次系统剖析医学MLLMs在图像分类中的性能退化，识别出四种失效模式。
提出量化评分以比较不同MLLMs和数据集的特征演化健康度。
analysis.experiments: 在14个开源医学MLLMs和三个代表性图像分类数据集上进行实验，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对图像分类任务，未涉及其他医学影像分析任务。
可能未涵盖所有医学MLLMs，开源模型代表性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 医学多模态大模型在图像分类任务上性能不如传统深度学习模型，本文通过特征探针揭示了四种失效模式。

papers.title: ProMedical: Hierarchical Fine-Grained Criteria Modeling for Medical LLM Alignment via Explicit Injection
papers.abstract: Aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with high-stakes medical standards remains a significant challenge, primarily due to the dissonance between coarse-grained preference signals and the complex, multi-dimensional nature of clinical protocols. To bridge this gap, we introduce ProMedical, a unified alignment framework grounded in fine-grained clinical criteria. We first construct ProMedical-Preference-50k, a dataset generated via a human-in-the-loop pipeline that augments medical instructions with rigorous, physician-derived rubrics. Leveraging this corpus, we propose the Explicit Criteria Injection paradigm to train a multi-dimensional reward model. Unlike traditional scalar reward models, our approach explicitly disentangles safety constraints from general proficiency, enabling precise guidance during reinforcement learning. To rigorously validate this framework, we establish ProMedical-Bench, a held-out evaluation suite anchored by double-blind expert adjudication. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that optimizing the Qwen3-8B base model via ProMedical-RM-guided GRPO yields substantial gains, improving overall accuracy by 22.3% and safety compliance by 21.7%, effectively rivaling proprietary frontier models. Furthermore, the aligned policy generalizes robustly to external benchmarks, demonstrating performance comparable to state-of-the-art models on UltraMedical. We publicly release our datasets, reward models, and benchmarks to facilitate reproducible research in safety-aware medical alignment.

analysis.tldr: ProMedical 通过显式注入细粒度临床标准，构建多维奖励模型，显著提升医疗 LLM 对齐的安全性与准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗领域对 LLM 对齐要求极高，但传统粗粒度偏好信号难以匹配临床协议的多维复杂性，导致模型在安全性和专业性上表现不足。
analysis.problem: 如何将细粒度临床标准显式注入 LLM 对齐流程，以同时提升安全合规性和通用能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 粗粒度偏好信号与临床多维标准之间存在不匹配，导致对齐效果不佳。
analysis.method: 构建包含医生制定评分标准的 ProMedical-Preference-50k 数据集，提出显式标准注入范式训练多维奖励模型，解耦安全约束与通用能力，并用于引导 GRPO 强化学习。
contributions: 提出 ProMedical 统一对齐框架，基于细粒度临床标准进行多维奖励建模。
构建 ProMedical-Preference-50k 数据集和 ProMedical-Bench 评测基准，并公开所有资源。
在 Qwen3-8B 上实现 22.3% 准确率和 21.7% 安全合规性提升，性能媲美专有前沿模型。
analysis.experiments: 在 ProMedical-Bench 和 UltraMedical 等外部基准上评估，Qwen3-8B 经 ProMedical-RM 引导的 GRPO 优化后，准确率提升 22.3%，安全合规性提升 21.7%，且泛化性良好。
limitations: 依赖医生标注的细粒度标准，构建成本较高。
仅在单一基础模型上验证，泛化性需更多测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProMedical 通过显式注入细粒度临床标准，构建多维奖励模型，显著提升医疗 LLM 对齐的安全性与准确性。

papers.title: Multi-Modal Learning meets Genetic Programming: Analyzing Alignment in Latent Space Optimization
papers.abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) aims to discover mathematical expressions from data, a task traditionally tackled using Genetic Programming (GP) through combinatorial search over symbolic structures. Latent Space Optimization (LSO) methods use neural encoders to map symbolic expressions into continuous spaces, transforming the combinatorial search into continuous optimization. SNIP (Meidani et al., 2024), a contrastive pre-training model inspired by CLIP, advances LSO by introducing a multi-modal approach: aligning symbolic and numeric encoders in a shared latent space to learn the phenotype-genotype mapping, enabling optimization in the numeric space to implicitly guide symbolic search. However, this relies on fine-grained cross-modal alignment, whereas literature on similar models like CLIP reveals that such an alignment is typically coarse-grained. In this paper, we investigate whether SNIP delivers on its promise of effective bi-modal optimization for SR. Our experiments show that: (1) cross-modal alignment does not improve during optimization, even as fitness increases, and (2) the alignment learned by SNIP is too coarse to efficiently conduct principled search in the symbolic space. These findings reveal that while multi-modal LSO holds significant potential for SR, effective alignment-guided optimization remains unrealized in practice, highlighting fine-grained alignment as a critical direction for future work.

analysis.tldr: 多模态学习与遗传编程结合分析潜在空间优化中的对齐问题，发现SNIP的跨模态对齐粗糙且优化中未改善。
analysis.research_motivation: 符号回归（SR）传统上依赖遗传编程（GP）进行组合搜索，效率低；潜在空间优化（LSO）通过神经编码器将符号表达式映射到连续空间，将组合搜索转为连续优化，但跨模态对齐的细粒度是关键挑战。
analysis.problem: SNIP方法声称通过多模态对齐实现有效的双模态优化，但实际对齐是否足够细粒度以支持符号空间中的原则性搜索？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现：(1) 优化过程中跨模态对齐并未随适应度提高而改善；(2) SNIP学习的对齐过于粗糙，无法有效指导符号空间搜索。
analysis.method: 分析SNIP（基于CLIP的对比预训练模型）在符号回归中的跨模态对齐质量，通过实验评估对齐在优化过程中的变化及其对搜索效率的影响。
contributions: 揭示SNIP在符号回归中跨模态对齐的局限性：对齐粗糙且优化中不改善。
指出细粒度对齐是多模态LSO用于符号回归的关键未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及实验发现。
limitations: 仅分析SNIP一种方法，可能不适用于其他多模态LSO方法。
未提出改进对齐的具体方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态学习与遗传编程结合分析潜在空间优化中的对齐问题，发现SNIP的跨模态对齐粗糙且优化中未改善。

papers.title: Fundus-R1: Training a Fundus-Reading MLLM with Knowledge-Aware Reasoning on Public Data
papers.abstract: Fundus imaging such as CFP, OCT and UWF is crucial for the early detection of retinal anomalies and diseases. Fundus image understanding, due to its knowledge-intensive nature, poses a challenging vision-language task. An emerging approach to addressing the task is to post-train a generic multimodal large language model (MLLM), either by supervised finetuning (SFT) or by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), on a considerable amount of in-house samples paired with high-quality clinical reports. However, these valuable samples are not publicly accessible, which not only hinders reproducibility but also practically limits research to few players. To overcome the barrier, we make a novel attempt to train a reasoning-enhanced fundus-reading MLLM, which we term Fundus-R1, using exclusively public datasets, wherein over 94\% of the data are annotated with only image-level labels. Our technical contributions are two-fold. First, we propose a RAG-based method for composing image-specific, knowledge-aware reasoning traces. Such auto-generated traces link visual findings identified by a generic MLLM to the image labels in terms of ophthalmic knowledge. Second, we enhance RLVR with a process reward that encourages self-consistency of the generated reasoning trace in each rollout. Extensive experiments on three fundus-reading benchmarks, i.e., FunBench, Omni-Fundus and GMAI-Fundus, show that Fundus-R1 clearly outperforms multiple baselines, including its generic counterpart (Qwen2.5-VL) and a stronger edition post-trained without using the generated traces. This work paves the way for training powerful fundus-reading MLLMs with publicly available data.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Fundus-R1，仅用公开数据集训练眼底图像推理增强多模态大模型，通过 RAG 生成知识感知推理轨迹和过程奖励 RLVR 提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 眼底图像理解是知识密集型任务，现有方法依赖大量私有高质量临床报告进行后训练，阻碍可复现性和研究普及。
analysis.problem: 如何仅利用公开数据集（94%以上只有图像级标签）训练出推理增强的眼底图像多模态大模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 公开数据中大部分只有图像级标签，缺乏详细临床报告，直接训练效果有限。
analysis.method: 提出 RAG 方法自动生成图像特定、知识感知的推理轨迹，将通用 MLLM 的视觉发现与图像标签通过眼科知识关联；并增强 RLVR 引入过程奖励以鼓励推理轨迹的自一致性。
contributions: 提出基于 RAG 的自动推理轨迹生成方法，利用公开数据构建知识感知推理路径。
在 RLVR 中引入过程奖励，提升推理轨迹的自一致性。
在三个眼底图像基准上超越多个基线，验证了仅用公开数据训练推理增强 MLLM 的可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在 FunBench、Omni-Fundus 和 GMAI-Fundus 三个基准上实验，Fundus-R1 明显优于多个基线，包括通用模型 Qwen2.5-VL 和未使用生成轨迹的更强版本。
limitations: 依赖通用 MLLM 的视觉发现质量，可能引入噪声。
RAG 生成轨迹的覆盖范围受限于公开知识库。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Fundus-R1，仅用公开数据集训练眼底图像推理增强多模态大模型，通过 RAG 生成知识感知推理轨迹和过程奖励 RLVR 提升性能。

papers.title: Weakly-Supervised Lung Nodule Segmentation via Training-Free Guidance of 3D Rectified Flow
papers.abstract: Dense annotations, such as segmentation masks, are expensive and time-consuming to obtain, especially for 3D medical images where expert voxel-wise labeling is required. Weakly supervised approaches aim to address this limitation, but often rely on attribution-based methods that struggle to accurately capture small structures such as lung nodules. In this paper, we propose a weakly-supervised segmentation method for lung nodules by combining pretrained state-of-the-art rectified flow and predictor models in a plug-and-play manner. Our approach uses training-free guidance of a 3D rectified flow model, requiring only fine-tuning of the predictor using image-level labels and no retraining of the generative model. The proposed method produces improved-quality segmentations for two separate predictors, consistently detecting lung nodules of varying size and shapes. Experiments on LUNA16 demonstrate improvements over baseline methods, highlighting the potential of generative foundation models as tools for weakly supervised 3D medical image segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 利用3D修正流模型的免训练引导实现弱监督肺结节分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D医学图像中密集标注（如分割掩码）成本高昂且耗时，弱监督方法虽能缓解但现有基于归因的方法难以准确捕捉肺结节等小结构。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖密集分割标注的情况下，利用预训练生成模型实现高质量的3D肺结节弱监督分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合预训练的3D修正流模型和预测器，通过图像级标签微调预测器，并利用修正流模型的免训练引导生成分割结果，无需重新训练生成模型。
contributions: 提出一种即插即用的弱监督分割方法，利用预训练3D修正流模型和预测器，无需额外训练生成模型。
在LUNA16数据集上验证了方法对多种大小和形状肺结节的检测能力，优于基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在LUNA16数据集上进行实验，结果显示所提方法优于基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的质量和领域适配性。
未在多种数据集或结节类型上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用3D修正流模型的免训练引导实现弱监督肺结节分割。

papers.title: HistDiT: A Structure-Aware Latent Conditional Diffusion Model for High-Fidelity Virtual Staining in Histopathology
papers.abstract: Immunohistochemistry (IHC) is essential for assessing specific immune biomarkers like Human Epidermal growth-factor Receptor 2 (HER2) in breast cancer. However, the traditional protocols of obtaining IHC stains are resource-intensive, time-consuming, and prone to structural damages. Virtual staining has emerged as a scalable alternative, but it faces significant challenges in preserving fine-grained cellular structures while accurately translating biochemical expressions. Current state-of-the-art methods still rely on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or standard convolutional U-Net diffusion models that often struggle with "structure and staining trade-offs". The generated samples are either structurally relevant but blurry, or texturally realistic but have artifacts that compromise their diagnostic use. In this paper, we introduce HistDiT, a novel latent conditional Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture that establishes a new benchmark for visual fidelity in virtual histological staining. The novelty introduced in this work is, a) the Dual-Stream Conditioning strategy that explicitly maintains a balance between spatial constraints via VAE-encoded latents and semantic phenotype guidance via UNI embeddings; b) the multi-objective loss function that contributes to sharper images with clear morphological structure; and c) the use of the Structural Correlation Metric (SCM) to focus on the core morphological structure for precise assessment of sample quality. Consequently, our model outperforms existing baselines, as demonstrated through rigorous quantitative and qualitative evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构感知的潜条件扩散Transformer（HistDiT），通过双流条件策略和多目标损失实现高保真虚拟组织染色。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统免疫组化（IHC）染色流程资源密集、耗时且易损伤组织，虚拟染色作为替代方案在保持精细细胞结构的同时准确翻译生化表达面临挑战，现有GAN或卷积U-Net扩散模型存在结构与染色权衡问题。
analysis.problem: 解决虚拟组织染色中生成样本结构相关但模糊或纹理真实但存在伪影的权衡问题，实现高保真染色。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在结构保留和染色真实性之间存在权衡：GAN或标准扩散模型生成的样本要么结构相关但模糊，要么纹理真实但存在伪影影响诊断。
analysis.method: 提出HistDiT，一种潜条件扩散Transformer架构，包含双流条件策略（VAE编码潜变量保持空间约束，UNI嵌入引导语义表型）和多目标损失函数，并使用结构相关性度量（SCM）评估样本质量。
contributions: 提出双流条件策略，平衡空间约束和语义表型引导
设计多目标损失函数，生成更清晰且形态结构明确的图像
引入结构相关性度量（SCM）聚焦核心形态结构评估样本质量
analysis.experiments: 通过严格的定量和定性评估，模型在视觉保真度上超越现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定组织类型和标记物（如HER2），泛化性需验证
计算资源需求可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构感知的潜条件扩散Transformer（HistDiT），通过双流条件策略和多目标损失实现高保真虚拟组织染色。

papers.title: Securing Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Taxonomy of Attacks, Defenses, and Future Directions
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) significantly enhances large language models (LLMs) but introduces novel security risks through external knowledge access. While existing studies cover various RAG vulnerabilities, they often conflate inherent LLM risks with those specifically introduced by RAG. In this paper, we propose that secure RAG is fundamentally about the security of the external knowledge-access pipeline. We establish an operational boundary to separate inherent LLM flaws from RAG-introduced or RAG-amplified threats. Guided by this perspective, we abstract the RAG workflow into six stages and organize the literature around three trust boundaries and four primary security surfaces, including pre-retrieval knowledge corruption, retrieval-time access manipulation, downstream context exploitation, and knowledge exfiltration. By systematically reviewing the corresponding attacks, defenses, remediation mechanisms, and evaluation benchmarks, we reveal that current defenses remain largely reactive and fragmented. Finally, we discuss these gaps and highlight future directions toward layered, boundary-aware protection across the entire knowledge-access lifecycle.

analysis.tldr: 系统梳理RAG安全威胁，提出基于知识访问管线的安全分类法，揭示当前防御的碎片化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG增强了LLM但引入新的安全风险，现有研究常混淆LLM固有风险与RAG特有风险，缺乏系统性安全视角。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类和防御RAG引入或放大的安全威胁，并建立清晰的边界区分LLM固有风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前防御方法多为被动且碎片化，缺乏分层、边界感知的全局保护。
analysis.method: 提出RAG安全分类法：定义操作边界，将RAG流程抽象为六个阶段，围绕三个信任边界和四个安全表面（检索前知识污染、检索时访问操纵、下游上下文利用、知识窃取）组织文献。
contributions: 提出区分LLM固有风险与RAG引入/放大威胁的操作边界
系统分类RAG攻击、防御、修复机制和评估基准，揭示防御碎片化现状
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 分类法可能无法覆盖所有新兴攻击
缺乏实证验证分类法的有效性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统梳理RAG安全威胁，提出基于知识访问管线的安全分类法，揭示当前防御的碎片化问题。

papers.title: DMax: Aggressive Parallel Decoding for dLLMs
papers.abstract: We present DMax, a new paradigm for efficient diffusion language models (dLLMs). It mitigates error accumulation in parallel decoding, enabling aggressive decoding parallelism while preserving generation quality. Unlike conventional masked dLLMs that decode through a binary mask-to-token transition, DMax reformulates decoding as a progressive self-refinement from mask embeddings to token embeddings. At the core of our approach is On-Policy Uniform Training, a novel training strategy that efficiently unifies masked and uniform dLLMs, equipping the model to recover clean tokens from both masked inputs and its own erroneous predictions. Building on this foundation, we further propose Soft Parallel Decoding. We represent each intermediate decoding state as an interpolation between the predicted token embedding and the mask embedding, enabling iterative self-revising in embedding space. Extensive experiments across a variety of benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of DMax. Compared with the original LLaDA-2.0-mini, our method improves TPF on GSM8K from 2.04 to 5.47 while preserving accuracy. On MBPP, it increases TPF from 2.71 to 5.86 while maintaining comparable performance. On two H200 GPUs, our model achieves an average of 1,338 TPS at batch size 1. Code is available at: https://github.com/czg1225/DMax

analysis.tldr: DMax通过渐进式自精炼和策略训练实现扩散语言模型的激进并行解码，显著提升吞吐量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散语言模型（dLLMs）在并行解码时存在误差累积问题，限制了解码并行度和生成效率，亟需新范式来平衡速度与质量。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种扩散语言模型解码方法，既能实现高度并行解码以提升吞吐量，又能避免误差累积导致生成质量下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统掩码dLLMs通过二进制掩码到token的转换解码，误差累积限制了并行度；DMax通过将解码重新表述为从掩码嵌入到token嵌入的渐进式自精炼来缓解该问题。
analysis.method: 提出On-Policy Uniform Training训练策略统一掩码和均匀dLLMs，使模型能从掩码输入和自身错误预测中恢复干净token；在此基础上提出Soft Parallel Decoding，将中间解码状态表示为预测token嵌入和掩码嵌入的插值，实现嵌入空间的迭代自修正。
contributions: 提出DMax范式，将扩散语言模型解码从二进制掩码转换重新定义为渐进式自精炼过程。
提出On-Policy Uniform Training训练策略，有效统一掩码和均匀dLLMs。
提出Soft Parallel Decoding，通过嵌入空间插值实现迭代自修正，支持激进并行解码。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K和MBPP等基准上，与LLaDA-2.0-mini相比，DMax将GSM8K的TPF从2.04提升至5.47，MBPP的TPF从2.71提升至5.86，同时保持准确率；在2块H200 GPU上，batch size=1时平均达到1338 TPS。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的扩散语言模型，泛化性待验证。
摘要未提及在更大规模模型或更复杂任务上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DMax通过渐进式自精炼和策略训练实现扩散语言模型的激进并行解码，显著提升吞吐量。

papers.title: GroundingAnomaly: Spatially-Grounded Diffusion for Few-Shot Anomaly Synthesis
papers.abstract: The performance of visual anomaly inspection in industrial quality control is often constrained by the scarcity of real anomalous samples. Consequently, anomaly synthesis techniques have been developed to enlarge training sets and enhance downstream inspection. However, existing methods either suffer from poor integration caused by inpainting or fail to provide accurate masks. To address these limitations, we propose GroundingAnomaly, a novel few-shot anomaly image generation framework. Our framework introduces a Spatial Conditioning Module that leverages per-pixel semantic maps to enable precise spatial control over the synthesized anomalies. Furthermore, a Gated Self-Attention Module is designed to inject conditioning tokens into a frozen U-Net via gated attention layers. This carefully preserves pretrained priors while ensuring stable few-shot adaptation. Extensive evaluations on the MVTec AD and VisA datasets demonstrate that GroundingAnomaly generates high-quality anomalies and achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple downstream tasks, including anomaly detection, segmentation, and instance-level detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出GroundingAnomaly，利用空间条件模块和门控自注意力实现少样本异常合成，在MVTec AD和VisA上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业视觉异常检测中真实异常样本稀缺，现有合成方法要么合成质量差（如修补导致的不自然），要么无法提供精确掩码，限制了下游检测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高质量、空间可控的异常图像，并同时提供精确的异常掩码，以增强少样本场景下的异常检测、分割和实例级检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GroundingAnomaly框架，包含空间条件模块（利用逐像素语义图实现精确空间控制）和门控自注意力模块（通过门控注意力层向冻结的U-Net注入条件token，保留预训练先验并稳定少样本适应）。
contributions: 提出GroundingAnomaly，一种少样本异常图像生成框架，能生成高质量异常并提供精确掩码。
设计空间条件模块和门控自注意力模块，实现空间可控合成并保持预训练先验。
在MVTec AD和VisA数据集上，在异常检测、分割和实例级检测等下游任务中达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在MVTec AD和VisA数据集上评估，下游任务包括异常检测、分割和实例级检测，取得SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练U-Net的泛化能力，在极端域外数据上效果未知。
少样本场景下对语义图标注质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GroundingAnomaly，利用空间条件模块和门控自注意力实现少样本异常合成，在MVTec AD和VisA上达到SOTA。

papers.title: SeLaR: Selective Latent Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has become a cornerstone of reasoning in large language models, yet its effectiveness is constrained by the limited expressiveness of discrete token sampling. Recent latent reasoning approaches attempt to alleviate this limitation by replacing discrete tokens with soft embeddings (probability-weighted mixtures of token embeddings) or hidden states, but they commonly suffer from two issues: (1) global activation injects perturbations into high-confidence steps, impairing reasoning stability; and (2) soft embeddings quickly collapse toward the highest-probability token, limiting exploration of alternative trajectories. To address these challenges, we propose SeLaR (Selective Latent Reasoning), a lightweight and training-free framework. SeLaR introduces an entropy-gated mechanism that activates soft embeddings only at low-confidence steps, while preserving discrete decoding at high-confidence steps. Additionally, we propose an entropy-aware contrastive regularization that pushes soft embeddings away from the dominant (highest-probability) token's direction, encouraging sustained exploration of multiple latent reasoning paths. Experiments on five reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SeLaR consistently outperforms standard CoT and state-of-the-art training-free methods.

analysis.tldr: SeLaR通过熵门控和对比正则化，在低置信步骤激活软嵌入、高置信步骤保留离散解码，提升LLM推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 链式思维推理受限于离散token采样的表达能力，而现有潜在推理方法存在全局扰动和软嵌入坍缩问题，影响推理稳定性和探索多样性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练开销的前提下，利用软嵌入增强推理，同时避免全局扰动和嵌入坍缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出全局激活会扰动高置信步骤，软嵌入会快速坍缩到最高概率token，限制探索。
analysis.method: SeLaR框架包含熵门控机制（仅在低置信步骤激活软嵌入）和熵感知对比正则化（推动软嵌入远离主导token方向）。
contributions: 提出熵门控机制，在低置信步骤激活软嵌入、高置信步骤保留离散解码，提升稳定性。
提出熵感知对比正则化，鼓励软嵌入探索多条潜在推理路径，避免坍缩。
analysis.experiments: 在五个推理基准上，SeLaR一致优于标准CoT和当前最优的无训练方法。
limitations: 可能对熵阈值敏感，需要调参。
仅适用于无训练场景，未探索与微调的结合。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SeLaR通过熵门控和对比正则化，在低置信步骤激活软嵌入、高置信步骤保留离散解码，提升LLM推理性能。

papers.title: U-CECE: A Universal Multi-Resolution Framework for Conceptual Counterfactual Explanations
papers.abstract: As AI models grow more complex, explainability is essential for building trust, yet concept-based counterfactual methods still face a trade-off between expressivity and efficiency. Representing underlying concepts as atomic sets is fast but misses relational context, whereas full graph representations are more faithful but require solving the NP-hard Graph Edit Distance (GED) problem. We propose U-CECE, a unified, model-agnostic multi-resolution framework for conceptual counterfactual explanations that adapts to data regime and compute budget. U-CECE spans three levels of expressivity: atomic concepts for broad explanations, relational sets-of-sets for simple interactions, and structural graphs for full semantic structure. At the structural level, both a precision-oriented transductive mode based on supervised Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and a scalable inductive mode based on unsupervised graph autoencoders (GAEs) are supported. Experiments on the structurally divergent CUB and Visual Genome datasets characterize the efficiency-expressivity trade-off across levels, while human surveys and LVLM-based evaluation show that the retrieved structural counterfactuals are semantically equivalent to, and often preferred over, exact GED-based ground-truth explanations.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一多分辨率概念反事实解释框架U-CECE，平衡表达力与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: AI模型日益复杂，可解释性对建立信任至关重要，但现有概念反事实方法在表达力与效率之间存在权衡：原子集表示快速但缺乏关系上下文，全图表示忠实但需解决NP难的图编辑距离问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一、模型无关的多分辨率框架，在概念反事实解释中自适应地平衡表达力与计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出U-CECE框架，包含三个表达力层次：原子概念（宽泛解释）、关系集之集（简单交互）、结构图（完整语义结构）。在结构层次支持基于监督GNN的精确直推模式和基于无监督图自编码器的可扩展归纳模式。
contributions: 提出统一多分辨率概念反事实解释框架U-CECE，覆盖原子、关系集之集、结构图三个层次。
在结构层次引入监督GNN直推模式和无监督GAE归纳模式，兼顾精确性与可扩展性。
通过人类调查和LVLM评估验证结构反事实在语义上等价于甚至优于基于精确GED的基准解释。
analysis.experiments: 在CUB和Visual Genome数据集上评估效率-表达力权衡，并通过人类调查和LVLM评估验证结构反事实的语义质量。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量概念图谱的构建。
归纳模式在极端复杂图结构上的表现未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一多分辨率概念反事实解释框架U-CECE，平衡表达力与效率。

papers.title: Can Vision Language Models Judge Action Quality? An Empirical Evaluation
papers.abstract: Action Quality Assessment (AQA) has broad applications in physical therapy, sports coaching, and competitive judging. Although Vision Language Models (VLMs) hold considerable promise for AQA, their actual performance in this domain remains largely uncharacterised. We present a comprehensive evaluation of state-of-the-art VLMs across activity domains (e.g. fitness, figure skating, diving), tasks, representations, and prompting strategies. Baseline results reveal that Gemini 3.1 Pro, Qwen3-VL and InternVL3.5 models perform only marginally above random chance, and although strategies such as incorporation of skeleton information, grounding instructions, reasoning structures and in-context learning lead to isolated gains, none is consistently effective. Analysis of prediction distributions uncovers two systematic biases: a tendency to predict correct execution regardless of visual evidence, and a sensitivity to superficial linguistic framing. Reformulating tasks contrastively to mitigate these biases yields minimal improvement, suggesting that the models' limitations go beyond these biases, pointing to a fundamental difficulty with fine-grained movement quality assessment. Our findings establish a rigorous baseline for future VLM-based AQA research and provide an actionable outline for failure modes requiring mitigation prior to reliable real-world deployment.

analysis.tldr: VLM在细粒度动作质量评估上表现接近随机，存在系统性偏见且难以通过现有策略缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 动作质量评估在物理治疗、体育教练和竞技裁判中具有广泛应用，但VLM在此领域的实际能力尚未被系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估当前最先进VLM在动作质量评估任务上的真实性能，并分析其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM性能接近随机，存在两种系统性偏差：倾向于预测正确执行（忽略视觉证据）和对表面语言框架敏感。对比学习等策略改进有限，表明模型存在根本性困难。
analysis.method: 跨活动领域（健身、花样滑冰、跳水）、任务、表示和提示策略的综合评估，包括骨架信息、接地指令、推理结构和上下文学习。
contributions: 建立了VLM在AQA任务上的严格基线
揭示了系统性偏差和根本性困难，为未来研究提供故障模式清单
analysis.experiments: 在多个活动领域和任务上评估了Gemini 3.1 Pro、Qwen3-VL和InternVL3.5等模型，并测试了多种提示策略。
limitations: 仅评估了有限数量的VLM和任务
未提出有效的解决方案来克服根本性困难
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLM在细粒度动作质量评估上表现接近随机，存在系统性偏见且难以通过现有策略缓解。

papers.title: CIAO - Code In Architecture Out - Automated Software Architecture Documentation with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Software architecture documentation is essential for system comprehension, yet it is often unavailable or incomplete. While recent LLM-based techniques can generate documentation from code, they typically address local artifacts rather than producing coherent, system-level architectural descriptions. This paper presents a structured process for automatically generating system-level architectural documentation directly from GitHub repositories using Large Language Models. The process, called CIAO (Code In Architecture Out), defines an LLM-based workflow that takes a repository as input and produces system-level architectural documentation following a template derived from ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010, SEI Views \& Beyond, and the C4 model. The resulting documentation can be directly added to the target repository. We evaluated the process through a study with 22 developers, each reviewing the documentation generated for a repository they had contributed to. The evaluation shows that developers generally perceive the produced documentation as valuable, comprehensible, and broadly accurate with respect to the source code, while also highlighting limitations in diagram quality, high-level context modeling, and deployment views. We also assessed the operational cost of the process, finding that generating a complete architectural document requires only a few minutes and is inexpensive to run. Overall, the results indicate that a structured, standards-oriented approach can effectively guide LLMs in producing system-level architectural documentation that is both usable and cost-effective.

analysis.tldr: 提出CIAO流程，利用LLM从GitHub仓库自动生成符合标准的系统级架构文档，经22名开发者评估认为有价值且成本低。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件架构文档对系统理解至关重要，但常缺失或不完整；现有LLM方法只能生成局部文档，缺乏系统级连贯描述。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM从代码仓库自动生成系统级、符合标准的架构文档。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CIAO流程：定义基于LLM的工作流，输入仓库，输出遵循ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010、SEI Views & Beyond和C4模型模板的系统级架构文档。
contributions: 提出CIAO流程，实现从GitHub仓库自动生成系统级架构文档。
通过22名开发者评估验证文档的价值、可理解性和准确性，并分析成本。
analysis.experiments: 22名开发者评估生成的文档，认为有价值、可理解且基本准确；生成完整文档仅需几分钟且成本低。
limitations: 图表质量、高层上下文建模和部署视图方面存在局限。
评估仅针对开发者自身仓库，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CIAO流程，利用LLM从GitHub仓库自动生成符合标准的系统级架构文档，经22名开发者评估认为有价值且成本低。

papers.title: CAMotion: A High-Quality Benchmark for Camouflaged Moving Object Detection in the Wild
papers.abstract: Discovering camouflaged objects is a challenging task in computer vision due to the high similarity between camouflaged objects and their surroundings. While the problem of camouflaged object detection over sequential video frames has received increasing attention, the scale and diversity of existing video camouflaged object detection (VCOD) datasets are greatly limited, which hinders the deeper analysis and broader evaluation of recent deep learning-based algorithms with data-hungry training strategy. To break this bottleneck, in this paper, we construct CAMotion, a high-quality benchmark covers a wide range of species for camouflaged moving object detection in the wild. CAMotion comprises various sequences with multiple challenging attributes such as uncertain edge, occlusion, motion blur, and shape complexity, etc. The sequence annotation details and statistical distribution are presented from various perspectives, allowing CAMotion to provide in-depth analyses on the camouflaged object's motion characteristics in different challenging scenarios. Additionally, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of existing SOTA models on CAMotion, and discuss the major challenges in VCOD task. The benchmark is available at https://www.camotion.focuslab.net.cn, we hope that our CAMotion can lead to further advancements in the research community.

analysis.tldr: CAMotion 是一个高质量、大规模、多样化的野外伪装运动目标检测基准数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频伪装目标检测数据集规模小、多样性不足，限制了深度学习算法的训练和评估。
analysis.problem: 构建一个大规模、高质量、多样化的视频伪装运动目标检测基准数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了包含多种物种、多种挑战属性（如不确定边缘、遮挡、运动模糊、形状复杂等）的视频伪装运动目标检测基准数据集 CAMotion，并提供了详细的序列标注和统计分析。
contributions: 构建了 CAMotion，一个大规模、高质量、多样化的野外伪装运动目标检测基准数据集。
对现有 SOTA 模型进行了全面评估，并讨论了 VCOD 任务的主要挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在 CAMotion 上对现有 SOTA 模型进行了全面评估，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在某些场景覆盖不足。
标注质量可能受主观因素影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CAMotion 是一个高质量、大规模、多样化的野外伪装运动目标检测基准数据集。

papers.title: Distributed Multi-Layer Editing for Rule-Level Knowledge in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models store not only isolated facts but also rules that support reasoning across symbolic expressions, natural language explanations, and concrete instances. Yet most model editing methods are built for fact-level knowledge, assuming that a target edit can be achieved through a localized intervention. This assumption does not hold for rule-level knowledge, where a single rule must remain consistent across multiple interdependent forms. We investigate this problem through a mechanistic study of rule-level knowledge editing. To support this study, we extend the RuleEdit benchmark from 80 to 200 manually verified rules spanning mathematics and physics. Fine-grained causal tracing reveals a form-specific organization of rule knowledge in transformer layers: formulas and descriptions are concentrated in earlier layers, while instances are more associated with middle layers. These results suggest that rule knowledge is not uniformly localized, and therefore cannot be reliably edited by a single-layer or contiguous-block intervention. Based on this insight, we propose Distributed Multi-Layer Editing (DMLE), which applies a shared early-layer update to formulas and descriptions and a separate middle-layer update to instances. While remaining competitive on standard editing metrics, DMLE achieves substantially stronger rule-level editing performance. On average, it improves instance portability and rule understanding by 13.91 and 50.19 percentage points, respectively, over the strongest baseline across GPT-J-6B, Qwen2.5-7B, Qwen2-7B, and LLaMA-3-8B. The code is available at https://github.com/Pepper66/DMLE.

analysis.tldr: 提出分布式多层编辑方法，通过分层干预实现大语言模型中规则级知识的有效编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型编辑方法主要针对事实级知识，假设可通过局部干预完成编辑，但规则级知识需要跨多种形式保持一致性，这种假设不成立。
analysis.problem: 如何有效编辑大语言模型中跨符号表达式、自然语言解释和具体实例的规则级知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 因果追踪发现规则知识在Transformer层中具有形式特定的组织：公式和描述集中在早期层，实例与中间层更相关，表明规则知识并非均匀局部化。
analysis.method: 分布式多层编辑（DMLE）：对公式和描述应用共享的早期层更新，对实例应用单独的中间层更新。
contributions: 通过因果追踪揭示规则级知识在Transformer层中的形式特定组织模式。
将RuleEdit基准从80条扩展到200条人工验证的数学和物理规则。
提出分布式多层编辑方法，在保持标准编辑指标竞争力的同时显著提升规则级编辑性能。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-J-6B、Qwen2.5-7B、Qwen2-7B和LLaMA-3-8B上评估，DMLE在实例可移植性和规则理解上分别平均提升13.91和50.19个百分点。
limitations: 仅针对规则级知识，未验证对其他类型知识的适用性。
依赖因果追踪结果，可能受模型架构差异影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分布式多层编辑方法，通过分层干预实现大语言模型中规则级知识的有效编辑。

papers.title: Revisiting Radar Perception With Spectral Point Clouds
papers.abstract: Radar perception models are trained with different inputs, from range-Doppler spectra to sparse point clouds. Dense spectra are assumed to outperform sparse point clouds, yet they can vary considerably across sensors and configurations, which hinders transfer. In this paper, we provide alternatives for incorporating spectral information into radar point clouds and show that, point clouds need not underperform compared to spectra. We introduce the spectral point cloud paradigm, where point clouds are treated as sparse, compressed representations of the radar spectra, and argue that, when enriched with spectral information, they serve as strong candidates for a unified input representation that is more robust against sensor-specific differences. We develop an experimental framework that compares spectral point cloud (PC) models at varying densities against a dense range-Doppler (RD) benchmark, and report the density levels where the PC configurations meet the performance of the RD benchmark. Furthermore, we experiment with two basic spectral enrichment approaches, that inject additional target-relevant information into the point clouds. Contrary to the common belief that the dense RD approach is superior, we show that point clouds can do just as well, and can surpass the RD benchmark when enrichment is applied. Spectral point clouds can therefore serve as strong candidates for unified radar perception, paving the way for future radar foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 提出光谱点云范式，证明雷达点云在融入光谱信息后性能不逊于甚至超越密集距离-多普勒谱。
analysis.research_motivation: 雷达感知模型输入形式多样，从密集距离-多普勒谱到稀疏点云，但密集谱因传感器差异难以迁移，而点云被认为性能不足。
analysis.problem: 如何将光谱信息有效融入雷达点云，使其成为统一且鲁棒的输入表示，克服传感器差异并达到或超越密集谱的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出光谱点云范式，将点云视为雷达谱的稀疏压缩表示，并通过两种基本光谱增强方法注入目标相关信息。
contributions: 提出光谱点云范式，论证点云可作为统一雷达感知输入表示。
实验证明光谱增强点云在特定密度下可达到甚至超越密集距离-多普勒谱基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 光谱增强方法可能依赖特定传感器配置。
未讨论点云密度与性能的权衡细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
