papers.title: QARIMA: A Quantum Approach To Classical Time Series Analysis
papers.abstract: We present a quantum-inspired ARIMA methodology that integrates quantum-assisted lag discovery with fixed-configuration variational quantum circuits (VQCs) for parameter estimation and weak-lag refinement. Differencing and candidate lags are identified via swap-test-driven quantum autocorrelation (QACF) and quantum partial autocorrelation (QPACF), with a delayed-matrix construction that aligns quantum projections to time-domain regressors, followed by standard information-criterion parsimony. Given the screened orders (p,d,q), we retain a fixed VQC ansatz, optimizer, and training budget, preventing hyperparameter leakage, and deploy the circuit in two estimation roles: VQC-AR for autoregressive coefficients and VQC-MA for moving-average coefficients. Between screening and estimation, a lightweight VQC weak-lag refinement re-weights or prunes screened AR lags without altering (p,d,q). Across environmental and industrial datasets, we perform rolling-origin evaluations against automated classical ARIMA, reporting out-of-sample mean squared error (MSE), mean absolute percentage error (MAPE), and Diebold-Mariano tests on MSE and MAE. Empirically, the seven quantum contributions (1) differencing selection, (2) QACF, (3) QPACF, (4) swap-test primitives with delayed-matrix construction, (5) VQC-AR, (6) VQC weak-lag refinement, and (7) VQC-MA collectively reduce meta-optimization overhead and make explicit where quantum effects enter order discovery, lag refinement, and AR/MA parameter estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出量子启发的ARIMA方法QARIMA，用量子电路辅助时间序列分析中的阶数发现和参数估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典ARIMA模型在阶数选择和参数估计上依赖大量元优化，计算开销大，且难以处理弱滞后效应。
analysis.problem: 如何利用量子计算的优势减少ARIMA模型在阶数发现、滞后筛选和参数估计中的元优化开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成量子辅助的滞后发现（QACF/QPACF）与固定配置变分量子电路（VQC）进行参数估计和弱滞后精炼，包括差分选择、量子自相关/偏自相关、延迟矩阵构造、VQC-AR/VQC-MA估计和VQC弱滞后精炼。
contributions: 提出QARIMA框架，将量子计算引入经典时间序列分析，减少元优化开销。
明确七项量子贡献组件及其在阶数发现、滞后精炼和参数估计中的作用。
analysis.experiments: 在环境和工业数据集上，使用滚动原点评估与自动经典ARIMA对比，报告了样本外MSE、MAPE以及Diebold-Mariano检验结果。
limitations: 量子电路模拟可能受限于当前量子硬件噪声和规模。
方法在更广泛时间序列数据集上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出量子启发的ARIMA方法QARIMA，用量子电路辅助时间序列分析中的阶数发现和参数估计。

papers.title: ACF: A Collaborative Framework for Agent Covert Communication under Cognitive Asymmetry
papers.abstract: As generative artificial intelligence evolves, autonomous agent networks present a powerful paradigm for interactive covert communication. However, because agents dynamically update internal memories via environmental interactions, existing methods face a critical structural vulnerability: cognitive asymmetry. Conventional approaches demand strict cognitive symmetry, requiring identical sequence prefixes between the encoder and decoder. In dynamic deployments, inevitable prefix discrepancies destroy synchronization, inducing severe channel degradation. To address this core challenge of cognitive asymmetry, we propose the Asymmetric Collaborative Framework (ACF), which structurally decouples covert communication from semantic reasoning via orthogonal statistical and cognitive layers. By deploying a prefix-independent decoding paradigm governed by a shared steganographic configuration, ACF eliminates the reliance on cognitive symmetry. Evaluations on realistic memory-augmented workflows demonstrate that under severe cognitive asymmetry, symmetric baselines suffer severe channel degradation, whereas ACF uniquely excels across both semantic fidelity and covert communication. It maintains computational indistinguishability, enabling reliable secret extraction with provable error bounds, and providing robust Effective Information Capacity guarantees for modern agent networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出非对称协作框架ACF，通过正交统计与认知层解耦，解决智能体网络隐蔽通信中的认知不对称问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有隐蔽通信方法要求编码器和解码器保持严格认知对称（相同序列前缀），但在动态部署中前缀差异不可避免，导致同步失效和信道严重退化。
analysis.problem: 智能体网络隐蔽通信中因认知不对称（编码器与解码器记忆/前缀不一致）导致的同步失效和信道退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在动态环境中，智能体通过交互更新内部记忆，导致编码器和解码器前缀不一致，对称基线方法在严重认知不对称下信道严重退化。
analysis.method: 提出非对称协作框架ACF，通过正交统计层和认知层解耦隐蔽通信与语义推理，采用共享隐写配置的前缀无关解码范式，消除对认知对称的依赖。
contributions: 提出ACF框架，从结构上解耦隐蔽通信与语义推理，消除对认知对称的依赖
在严重认知不对称下，ACF在语义保真度和隐蔽通信上均优于对称基线，保持计算不可区分性并提供可证明误差界和有效信息容量保证
analysis.experiments: 在真实记忆增强工作流上评估，对称基线在严重认知不对称下信道严重退化，ACF在语义保真度和隐蔽通信上表现优异。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的记忆增强工作流
未讨论与现有对称方法的兼容性或迁移成本
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非对称协作框架ACF，通过正交统计与认知层解耦，解决智能体网络隐蔽通信中的认知不对称问题。

papers.title: GRACE: A Dynamic Coreset Selection Framework for Large Language Model Optimization
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in natural language understanding and generation. However, their immense number of parameters and complex transformer-based architectures result in significant resource demands and computational complexity during training, making it challenging to optimize them efficiently on large datasets. To reduce training costs while preserving performance, researchers have investigated coreset selection techniques, which aim to identify small, representative subsets of the entire training dataset to accelerate LLM training. However, existing coreset selection methods fail to adapt to the dynamic nature of LLM training and often struggle with scalability for models of this size. To address these limitations, we propose a graph-guided adaptive and dynamic coreset selection framework for LLMs, namely GRACE. GRACE dynamically constructs and updates coresets by combining representation diversity with gradient-based importance metrics, ensuring both informativeness and efficiency. To mitigate the computational cost of frequent updates, GRACE leverages a $k$-NN graph-based propagation mechanism and selectively updates scores and embeddings, adapting to evolving training dynamics. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate that GRACE significantly improves training efficiency and downstream performance across diverse LLMs and tasks.

analysis.tldr: GRACE 提出一种基于图引导的动态核心集选择框架，通过结合表征多样性与梯度重要性指标，在 LLM 训练中高效选择代表性子集，提升训练效率与下游性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 参数量大、架构复杂，导致训练资源需求高、计算成本大，现有核心集选择方法无法适应 LLM 训练的动态性且可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何为 LLM 训练动态选择小而具代表性的核心子集，以降低训练成本同时保持模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 GRACE 框架，结合表征多样性与基于梯度的重要性指标动态构建和更新核心集，利用 k-NN 图传播机制减少频繁更新的计算开销。
contributions: 提出一种图引导的自适应动态核心集选择框架 GRACE，适用于 LLM 训练。
结合多样性度量与梯度重要性指标，确保核心集的信息性与效率。
引入 k-NN 图传播机制，降低动态更新计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准上进行了广泛实验，结果表明 GRACE 显著提升了训练效率和下游性能，覆盖多种 LLM 和任务。
limitations: 可能依赖 k-NN 图的质量，对超参数敏感。
动态更新机制可能仍存在一定计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GRACE 提出一种基于图引导的动态核心集选择框架，通过结合表征多样性与梯度重要性指标，在 LLM 训练中高效选择代表性子集，提升训练效率与下游性能。

papers.title: Preventing Overfitting in Deep Image Prior for Hyperspectral Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Deep image prior (DIP) is an unsupervised deep learning framework that has been successfully applied to a variety of inverse imaging problems. However, DIP-based methods are inherently prone to overfitting, which leads to performance degradation and necessitates early stopping. In this paper, we propose a method to mitigate overfitting in DIP-based hyperspectral image (HSI) denoising by jointly combining robust data fidelity and explicit sensitivity regularization. The proposed approach employs a Smooth $\ell_1$ data term together with a divergence-based regularization and input optimization during training. Experimental results on real HSIs corrupted by Gaussian, sparse, and stripe noise demonstrate that the proposed method effectively prevents overfitting and achieves superior denoising performance compared to state-of-the-art DIP-based HSI denoising methods.

analysis.tldr: 通过鲁棒数据保真度和显式敏感性正则化抑制深度图像先验在高光谱图像去噪中的过拟合。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度图像先验（DIP）在无监督逆成像中有效，但易过拟合导致性能下降，需要早停，缺乏鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: DIP在高光谱图像去噪中的过拟合问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DIP方法固有地倾向于过拟合，导致性能退化并需要早停。
analysis.method: 联合使用Smooth ℓ1数据项和基于散度的正则化，并在训练中进行输入优化。
contributions: 提出一种结合鲁棒数据保真度和显式敏感性正则化的方法，有效抑制DIP过拟合。
在多种噪声（高斯、稀疏、条纹）的真实高光谱图像上取得优于现有DIP方法的去噪性能。
analysis.experiments: 在真实高光谱图像上测试了高斯、稀疏和条纹噪声，结果表明方法有效防止过拟合并取得优越性能。
limitations: 可能仅针对高光谱图像去噪任务，泛化性未验证。
计算复杂度可能较高，未提及效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过鲁棒数据保真度和显式敏感性正则化抑制深度图像先验在高光谱图像去噪中的过拟合。

papers.title: Orion-Lite: Distilling LLM Reasoning into Efficient Vision-Only Driving Models
papers.abstract: Leveraging the general world knowledge of Large Language Models (LLMs) holds significant promise for improving the ability of autonomous driving systems to handle rare and complex scenarios. While integrating LLMs into Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models has yielded state-of-the-art performance, their massive parameter counts pose severe challenges for latency-sensitive and energy-efficient deployment. Distilling LLM knowledge into a compact driving model offers a compelling solution to retain these reasoning capabilities while maintaining a manageable computational footprint. Although previous works have demonstrated the efficacy of distillation, these efforts have primarily focused on relatively simple scenarios and open-loop evaluations. Therefore, in this work, we investigate LLM distillation in more complex, interactive scenarios under closed-loop evaluation. We demonstrate that through a combination of latent feature distillation and ground-truth trajectory supervision, an efficient vision-only student model \textbf{Orion-Lite} can even surpass the performance of its massive VLA teacher, ORION. Setting a new state-of-the-art on the rigorous Bench2Drive benchmark, with a Driving Score of 80.6. Ultimately, this reveals that vision-only architectures still possess significant, untapped potential for high-performance reactive planning.

analysis.tldr: 通过潜在特征蒸馏和轨迹监督，轻量视觉模型Orion-Lite在闭环驾驶任务中超越大模型教师，刷新Bench2Drive基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）虽能提升自动驾驶处理复杂场景的能力，但集成到视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中参数过多，难以满足延迟和能耗要求；蒸馏虽有效，但以往工作局限于简单场景和开环评估。
analysis.problem: 如何在复杂交互场景下，通过知识蒸馏将LLM推理能力高效迁移至紧凑的纯视觉驾驶模型，并实现闭环评估中的高性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合潜在特征蒸馏（latent feature distillation）和真值轨迹监督（ground-truth trajectory supervision），训练纯视觉学生模型Orion-Lite，从VLA教师模型ORION中蒸馏知识。
contributions: 首次在复杂交互场景下进行闭环评估的LLM蒸馏研究。
提出Orion-Lite模型，在Bench2Drive基准上以80.6的驾驶分数超越教师模型，刷新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在Bench2Drive基准上进行闭环评估，Orion-Lite取得80.6的驾驶分数，超越教师模型ORION。摘要未提供其他实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅在特定基准上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论蒸馏对极端场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过潜在特征蒸馏和轨迹监督，轻量视觉模型Orion-Lite在闭环驾驶任务中超越大模型教师，刷新Bench2Drive基准。

papers.title: Neural-Symbolic Knowledge Tracing: Injecting Educational Knowledge into Deep Learning for Responsible Learner Modelling
papers.abstract: The growing use of artificial intelligence (AI) in education, particularly large language models (LLMs), has increased interest in intelligent tutoring systems. However, LLMs often show limited adaptivity and struggle to model learners' evolving knowledge over time, highlighting the need for dedicated learner modelling approaches. Although deep knowledge tracing methods achieve strong predictive performance, their opacity and susceptibility to bias can limit alignment with pedagogical principles. To address this, we propose Responsible-DKT, a neural-symbolic deep knowledge tracing approach that integrates symbolic educational knowledge (e.g., mastery and non-mastery rules) into sequential neural models for responsible learner modelling. Experiments on a real-world dataset of students' math interactions show that Responsible-DKT outperforms both a neural-symbolic baseline and a fully data-driven PyTorch DKT model across training settings. The model achieves over 0.80 AUC with only 10% of training data and up to 0.90 AUC, improving performance by up to 13%. It also demonstrates improved temporal reliability, producing lower early- and mid-sequence prediction errors and the lowest prediction inconsistency rates across sequence lengths, indicating that prediction updates remain directionally aligned with observed student responses over time. Furthermore, the neural-symbolic approach offers intrinsic interpretability via a grounded computation graph that exposes the logic behind each prediction, enabling both local and global explanations. It also allows empirical evaluation of pedagogical assumptions, revealing that repeated incorrect responses (non-mastery) strongly influence prediction updates. These results indicate that neural-symbolic approaches enhance both performance and interpretability, mitigate data limitations, and support more responsible, human-centered AI in education.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号知识追踪方法，通过注入教育知识提升深度学习模型的性能、可解释性和可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在教育中适应性有限，难以建模学习者随时间变化的知识；深度知识追踪方法虽预测性能强，但缺乏可解释性且易有偏见，难以与教学原则对齐。
analysis.problem: 如何将符号化的教育知识（如掌握/未掌握规则）融入深度知识追踪模型，实现负责任的学习者建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Responsible-DKT，一种神经符号深度知识追踪方法，将符号教育知识（如掌握/未掌握规则）集成到序列神经网络中。
contributions: 提出神经符号知识追踪方法，融合教育知识提升模型性能与可解释性。
在真实数学交互数据集上验证，仅用10%训练数据即可达到0.80 AUC，最高0.90 AUC，性能提升达13%。
展示更好的时间可靠性，预测更新方向与观察到的学生反应一致，并提供内在可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实学生数学交互数据集上实验，与神经符号基线和纯数据驱动PyTorch DKT模型对比，报告了AUC、预测误差、不一致率等指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定教育规则，泛化到其他学科或场景需验证。
未讨论计算开销或大规模部署可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号知识追踪方法，通过注入教育知识提升深度学习模型的性能、可解释性和可靠性。

papers.title: DBMF: A Dual-Branch Multimodal Framework for Out-of-Distribution Detection
papers.abstract: The complex and dynamic real-world clinical environment demands reliable deep learning (DL) systems. Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection plays a critical role in enhancing the reliability and generalizability of DL models when encountering data that deviate from the training distribution, such as unseen disease cases. However, existing OOD detection methods typically rely either on a single visual modality or solely on image-text matching, failing to fully leverage multimodal information. To overcome the challenge, we propose a novel dual-branch multimodal framework by introducing a text-image branch and a vision branch. Our framework fully exploits multimodal representations to identify OOD samples through these two complementary branches. After training, we compute scores from the text-image branch ($S_t$) and vision branch ($S_v$), and integrate them to obtain the final OOD score $S$ that is compared with a threshold for OOD detection. Comprehensive experiments on publicly available endoscopic image datasets demonstrate that our proposed framework is robust across diverse backbones and improves state-of-the-art performance in OOD detection by up to 24.84%

analysis.tldr: 提出双分支多模态框架DBMF，结合文本-图像分支和视觉分支提升OOD检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床环境复杂动态，现有OOD检测方法仅依赖单一视觉模态或图像-文本匹配，未能充分利用多模态信息，导致可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合多模态信息以提升深度学习模型在临床图像上的OOD检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双分支多模态框架（DBMF），包含文本-图像分支和视觉分支，分别计算OOD分数S_t和S_v，融合后与阈值比较进行检测。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的双分支多模态框架，充分利用多模态表征进行OOD检测。
在内窥镜图像数据集上，该方法在不同骨干网络下表现鲁棒，OOD检测性能提升高达24.84%。
analysis.experiments: 在内窥镜图像数据集上进行综合实验，展示了方法的鲁棒性和SOTA性能提升。
limitations: 可能仅针对内窥镜图像领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双分支多模态框架DBMF，结合文本-图像分支和视觉分支提升OOD检测性能。

papers.title: Behavior-Aware Item Modeling via Dynamic Procedural Solution Representations for Knowledge Tracing
papers.abstract: Knowledge Tracing (KT) aims to predict learners' future performance from past interactions. While recent KT approaches have improved via learning item representations aligned with Knowledge Components, they overlook the procedural dynamics of problem solving. We propose Behavior-Aware Item Modeling (BAIM), a framework that enriches item representations by integrating dynamic procedural solution information. BAIM leverages a reasoning language model to decompose each item's solution into four problem-solving stages (i.e., understand, plan, carry out, and look back), pedagogically grounded in Polya's framework. Specifically, it derives stage-level representations from per-stage embedding trajectories, capturing latent signals beyond surface features. To reflect learner heterogeneity, BAIM adaptively routes these stage-wise representations, introducing a context-conditioned mechanism within a KT backbone, allowing different procedural stages to be emphasized for different learners. Experiments on XES3G5M and NIPS34 show that BAIM consistently outperforms strong pretraining-based baselines, achieving particularly large gains under repeated learner interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出行为感知项目建模（BAIM），通过动态过程解题表示增强知识追踪中的项目嵌入。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识追踪方法虽通过学习与知识组件对齐的项目表示提升了性能，但忽略了问题解决的过程动态性，导致项目表示缺乏对解题过程的细粒度建模。
analysis.problem: 如何将解题过程动态信息融入项目表示，以更准确地预测学习者未来表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: BAIM框架利用推理语言模型将每个项目的解题过程分解为理解、计划、执行、回顾四个阶段（基于Polya框架），从每阶段的嵌入轨迹中提取阶段级表示，并通过上下文条件机制自适应路由这些表示，以反映学习者异质性。
contributions: 提出行为感知项目建模（BAIM），首次将解题过程动态信息融入知识追踪的项目表示。
设计基于Polya框架的四阶段分解方法和自适应路由机制，提升模型对学习者异质性的适应能力。
analysis.experiments: 在XES3G5M和NIPS34数据集上，BAIM持续优于强预训练基线，尤其在重复学习者交互场景下增益显著。
limitations: 依赖推理语言模型进行阶段分解，可能引入额外计算开销。
阶段分解的准确性可能影响模型性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出行为感知项目建模（BAIM），通过动态过程解题表示增强知识追踪中的项目嵌入。

papers.title: HyperMem: Hypergraph Memory for Long-Term Conversations
papers.abstract: Long-term memory is essential for conversational agents to maintain coherence, track persistent tasks, and provide personalized interactions across extended dialogues. However, existing approaches as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and graph-based memory mostly rely on pairwise relations, which can hardly capture high-order associations, i.e., joint dependencies among multiple elements, causing fragmented retrieval. To this end, we propose HyperMem, a hypergraph-based hierarchical memory architecture that explicitly models such associations using hyperedges. Particularly, HyperMem structures memory into three levels: topics, episodes, and facts, and groups related episodes and their facts via hyperedges, unifying scattered content into coherent units. Leveraging this structure, we design a hybrid lexical-semantic index and a coarse-to-fine retrieval strategy, supporting accurate and efficient retrieval of high-order associations. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that HyperMem achieves state-of-the-art performance with 92.73% LLM-as-a-judge accuracy, demonstrating the effectiveness of HyperMem for long-term conversations.

analysis.tldr: HyperMem 提出超图层次记忆架构，通过超边建模高阶关联，在长对话中实现 SOTA 检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长对话记忆方法（如 RAG 和图记忆）依赖成对关系，难以捕获多元素间的高阶联合依赖，导致检索碎片化，影响对话连贯性和个性化。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模长对话中多元素的高阶关联，实现准确高效的记忆检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出超图层次记忆架构 HyperMem，将记忆组织为主题、片段和事实三层，用超边将相关片段及其事实分组为连贯单元，并设计混合词汇-语义索引和由粗到细的检索策略。
contributions: 提出超图层次记忆架构，显式建模高阶关联。
设计混合索引和粗到细检索策略，实现高效准确检索。
在 LoCoMo 基准上取得 92.73% LLM-as-a-judge 准确率的 SOTA 性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 LoCoMo 基准上评估，使用 LLM-as-a-judge 准确率指标，HyperMem 达到 92.73%，为 SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 评判的可靠性。
超图构建和检索的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyperMem 提出超图层次记忆架构，通过超边建模高阶关联，在长对话中实现 SOTA 检索性能。

papers.title: On Tackling Complex Tasks with Reward Machines and Signal Temporal Logics
papers.abstract: We propose a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based control design framework for handling complex tasks. The approach extends the concept of Reward Machines (RM) with Signal Temporal Logic (STL) formulas that can be used for event generation. The use of STL allows not only a more efficient representation of rewards for complex tasks but also guiding the training process to converge towards behaviors satisfying specified requirements. We also propose an implementation of the framework that leverages the STL online monitoring algorithms. We illustrate the framework with three case studies (minigrid, cart-pole and high-way environments) with non-trivial tasks.

analysis.tldr: 将信号时序逻辑与奖励机结合，提升强化学习处理复杂任务的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂任务在强化学习中难以高效表示和训练，现有奖励机方法在事件生成和引导收敛方面存在局限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个强化学习框架，使其能够高效表示复杂任务奖励并引导策略满足时序逻辑约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展奖励机，使用信号时序逻辑公式进行事件生成，并利用STL在线监控算法实现训练引导。
contributions: 提出将信号时序逻辑与奖励机结合的强化学习框架
实现基于STL在线监控的训练引导机制
analysis.experiments: 在minigrid、cart-pole和high-way三个环境中进行了案例研究，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可形式化时序逻辑的任务
STL监控的计算开销可能影响大规模应用

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将信号时序逻辑与奖励机结合，提升强化学习处理复杂任务的能力。

papers.title: From Phenomenological Fitting to Endogenous Deduction: A Paradigm Leap via Meta-Principle Physics Architecture
papers.abstract: The essence of current neural network architectures is phenomenological fitting: they learn input-output statistical correlations via massive parameters and data, yet lack intrinsic understanding of the fundamental principles governing physical reality. This paper proposes a paradigm leap from pure phenomenological fitting to the fusion of phenomenological fitting and endogenous deduction. By embedding physical meta-principles into neural network architecture, we construct the Meta-Principle Physics Architecture (MPPA). Specifically, MPPA embeds three core meta-principles - Connectivity, Conservation, Periodicity - into its architecture, implemented via three core components: the Gravitator realizes Connectivity via standard causal attention; the Energy Encoder implements Conservation via log-domain energy tracking and delayed compensation; the Periodicity Encoder fulfills Periodicity via FFT-based spectral analysis and delayed modulation. These components collaborate via a learnable independent gating fusion mechanism, forming a complete physical cognition framework of 'local relational connectivity - global conservation constraint - evolutionary periodic law'. Experiments show MPPA achieves significant improvements: physical reasoning (from near zero to 0.436, 0.436 vs 0.000), 2.18x mathematical task improvement (0.330 vs 0.151), 52% logical task gain (0.456 vs 0.300), and 3.69% lower validation perplexity (259.45 vs 269.40), with only 11.8% more parameters (242.40M vs 216.91M). Notably, MPPA shows strong generalization on out-of-distribution physical scenarios, proving the robustness and interpretability of this principle-embedded design. This work establishes a new theoretical foundation and technical path for next-generation AI with physical common sense, causal reasoning, and mathematical rigor.

analysis.tldr: 提出元原理物理架构(MPPA)，将物理元原理嵌入神经网络，实现从现象拟合到内源演绎的范式跃迁。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前神经网络本质是现象拟合，缺乏对物理现实基本原理的内在理解，导致在物理推理、因果推理等任务上表现不足。
analysis.problem: 如何将物理元原理嵌入神经网络架构，使其具备内源演绎能力而非仅依赖统计相关性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出元原理物理架构(MPPA)，嵌入连接性、守恒性、周期性三个元原理，分别通过引力子(标准因果注意力)、能量编码器(对数域能量跟踪与延迟补偿)、周期性编码器(FFT频谱分析与延迟调制)实现，并由可学习的独立门控融合机制协作。
contributions: 提出从现象拟合到内源演绎的范式跃迁，并构建元原理物理架构(MPPA)。
在物理推理、数学、逻辑任务上取得显著提升，并展示出对分布外物理场景的强泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在物理推理(从接近0提升至0.436)、数学任务(0.330 vs 0.151，提升2.18倍)、逻辑任务(0.456 vs 0.300，提升52%)和验证困惑度(259.45 vs 269.40，降低3.69%)上进行了实验，参数仅增加11.8%。
limitations: 仅嵌入三个元原理，可能不足以覆盖所有物理场景。
门控融合机制的可学习性可能引入额外训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元原理物理架构(MPPA)，将物理元原理嵌入神经网络，实现从现象拟合到内源演绎的范式跃迁。

papers.title: $\oslash$ Source Models Leak What They Shouldn't $\nrightarrow$: Unlearning Zero-Shot Transfer in Domain Adaptation Through Adversarial Optimization
papers.abstract: The increasing adaptation of vision models across domains, such as satellite imagery and medical scans, has raised an emerging privacy risk: models may inadvertently retain and leak sensitive source-domain specific information in the target domain. This creates a compelling use case for machine unlearning to protect the privacy of sensitive source-domain data. Among adaptation techniques, source-free domain adaptation (SFDA) calls for an urgent need for machine unlearning (MU), where the source data itself is protected, yet the source model exposed during adaptation encodes its influence. Our experiments reveal that existing SFDA methods exhibit strong zero-shot performance on source-exclusive classes in the target domain, indicating they inadvertently leak knowledge of these classes into the target domain, even when they are not represented in the target data. We identify and address this risk by proposing an MU setting called SCADA-UL: Unlearning Source-exclusive ClAsses in Domain Adaptation. Existing MU methods do not address this setting as they are not designed to handle data distribution shifts. We propose a new unlearning method, where an adversarially generated forget class sample is unlearned by the model during the domain adaptation process using a novel rescaled labeling strategy and adversarial optimization. We also extend our study to two variants: a continual version of this problem setting and to one where the specific source classes to be forgotten may be unknown. Alongside theoretical interpretations, our comprehensive empirical results show that our method consistently outperforms baselines in the proposed setting while achieving retraining-level unlearning performance on benchmark datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/D-Arnav/SCADA

analysis.tldr: 提出SCADA-UL方法，通过对抗优化在域适应中遗忘源模型泄露的源专有类别知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉模型跨域适应（如卫星图像、医学扫描）时，源模型可能无意中泄露源域敏感信息，现有源无关域适应（SFDA）方法在目标域对源专有类别表现出强零样本性能，构成隐私风险，亟需机器遗忘（MU）技术。
analysis.problem: 在域适应过程中，如何有效遗忘源模型中源专有类别的知识，同时处理数据分布偏移，且不依赖源数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现现有SFDA方法在目标域对源专有类别具有强零样本性能，表明其无意中泄露了这些类别的知识。
analysis.method: 提出SCADA-UL方法，在域适应过程中，通过对抗生成遗忘类样本，并采用新颖的重缩放标签策略和对抗优化来遗忘这些样本。
contributions: 识别并形式化了域适应中遗忘源专有类别的隐私风险，提出SCADA-UL设置。
提出一种新的遗忘方法，结合对抗样本生成、重缩放标签策略和对抗优化，实现域适应中的有效遗忘。
扩展到持续遗忘和未知源类别遗忘两种变体，并提供理论解释和全面实验验证。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上，所提方法一致优于基线，达到重训练级别的遗忘性能。
limitations: 可能依赖对抗样本的质量和生成效率。
未讨论对模型在目标域上其他性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SCADA-UL方法，通过对抗优化在域适应中遗忘源模型泄露的源专有类别知识。

papers.title: HiRO-Nav: Hybrid ReasOning Enables Efficient Embodied Navigation
papers.abstract: Embodied navigation agents built upon large reasoning models (LRMs) can handle complex, multimodal environmental input and perform grounded reasoning per step to improve sequential decision-making for long-horizon tasks. However, a critical question remains: \textit{how can the reasoning capabilities of LRMs be harnessed intelligently and efficiently for long-horizon navigation tasks?} In simple scenes, agents are expected to act reflexively, while in complex ones they should engage in deliberate reasoning before acting.To achieve this, we introduce \textbf{H}ybr\textbf{i}d \textbf{R}eas\textbf{O}ning \textbf{Nav}igation (\textbf{HiRO-Nav}) agent, the first kind of agent capable of adaptively determining whether to perform thinking at every step based on its own action entropy. Specifically, by examining how the agent's action entropy evolves over the navigation trajectories, we observed that only a small fraction of actions exhibit high entropy, and these actions often steer the agent toward novel scenes or critical objects. Furthermore, studying the relationship between action entropy and task completion (i.e., Q-value) reveals that improving high-entropy actions contributes more positively to task success.Hence, we propose a tailored training pipeline comprising hybrid supervised fine-tuning as a cold start, followed by online reinforcement learning with the proposed hybrid reasoning strategy to explicitly activate reasoning only for high-entropy actions, significantly reducing computational overhead while improving decision quality. Extensive experiments on the \textsc{CHORES}-$\mathbb{S}$ ObjectNav benchmark showcases that HiRO-Nav achieves a better trade-off between success rates and token efficiency than both dense-thinking and no-thinking baselines.

analysis.tldr: HiRO-Nav通过自适应混合推理策略，仅在动作熵高时激活推理，在物体导航任务中实现成功率与token效率的更好平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于大型推理模型的具身导航智能体在长时域任务中每步都进行深度推理，导致计算开销大，而简单场景下无需复杂推理，因此需要一种能根据场景复杂度自适应调整推理策略的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何智能且高效地利用大型推理模型的推理能力，在长时域导航任务中根据场景复杂度动态决定是否进行推理，以降低计算开销并提升决策质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到导航轨迹中仅少数动作具有高熵，这些动作常引导智能体进入新场景或接近关键物体；且改善高熵动作对任务成功贡献更大。
analysis.method: 提出HiRO-Nav智能体，通过动作熵自适应决定每步是否推理；训练流程包括混合监督微调冷启动和在线强化学习，仅对高熵动作激活推理。
contributions: 首次提出能根据动作熵自适应决定是否推理的具身导航智能体HiRO-Nav。
提出混合监督微调+在线强化学习的训练流程，仅对高熵动作激活推理，显著降低计算开销并提升决策质量。
在CHORES-S ObjectNav基准上实现成功率和token效率的更好权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在CHORES-S ObjectNav基准上进行实验，与密集推理和无推理基线对比，HiRO-Nav在成功率和token效率之间取得更好权衡。
limitations: 可能仅在特定导航任务（ObjectNav）上验证，泛化性未知。
动作熵阈值设定可能依赖经验，缺乏自适应调整机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HiRO-Nav通过自适应混合推理策略，仅在动作熵高时激活推理，在物体导航任务中实现成功率与token效率的更好平衡。

papers.title: Generalization Under Scrutiny: Cross-Domain Detection Progresses, Pitfalls, and Persistent Challenges
papers.abstract: Object detection models trained on a source domain often exhibit significant performance degradation when deployed in unseen target domains, due to various kinds of variations, such as sensing conditions, environments and data distributions. Hence, regardless the recent breakthrough advances in deep learning-based detection technology, cross-domain object detection (CDOD) remains a critical research area. Moreover, the existing literature remains fragmented, lacking a unified perspective on the structural challenges underlying domain shift and the effectiveness of adaptation strategies. This survey provides a comprehensive and systematic analysis of CDOD. We start upon a problem formulation that highlights the multi-stage nature of object detection under domain shift. Then, we organize the existing methods through a conceptual taxonomy that categorizes approaches based on adaptation paradigms, modeling assumptions, and pipeline components. Furthermore, we analyze how domain shift propagates across detection stages and discuss why adaptation in object detection is inherently more complex than in classification. In addition, we review commonly used datasets, evaluation protocols, and benchmarking practices. Finally, we identify the key challenges and outline promising future research directions. Cohesively, this survey aims to provide a unified framework for understanding CDOD and to guide the development of more robust detection systems.

analysis.tldr: 跨域目标检测（CDOD）综述：系统分析领域偏移的结构性挑战与适应策略的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 目标检测模型在跨域部署时性能显著下降，而现有文献碎片化，缺乏统一视角来理解领域偏移的结构性挑战和适应策略的有效性。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地分析和组织跨域目标检测中的领域偏移问题、现有方法、评估基准及未来方向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 领域偏移在检测的不同阶段（如特征提取、区域提议、分类）传播，且检测的适应比分类更复杂。
analysis.method: 提出概念分类法，按适应范式、建模假设和流水线组件对现有方法分类，并分析领域偏移在检测阶段的传播。
contributions: 提供了跨域目标检测的全面系统分析，包括问题公式化、方法分类和领域偏移传播分析。
总结了常用数据集、评估协议和基准实践，并指出了关键挑战和未来研究方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或实验验证。
可能未覆盖所有最新方法或特定领域细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 跨域目标检测（CDOD）综述：系统分析领域偏移的结构性挑战与适应策略的有效性。

papers.title: Grounding Clinical AI Competency in Human Cognition Through the Clinical World Model and Skill-Mix Framework
papers.abstract: The competency of any intelligent agent is bounded by its formal account of the world in which it operates. Clinical AI lacks such an account. Existing frameworks address evaluation, regulation, or system design in isolation, without a shared model of the clinical world to connect them. We introduce the Clinical World Model, a framework that formalizes care as a tripartite interaction among Patient, Provider, and Ecosystem. To formalize how any agent, whether human or artificial, transforms information into clinical action, we develop parallel decision-making architectures for providers, patients, and AI agents, grounded in validated principles of clinical cognition. The Clinical AI Skill-Mix operationalizes competency through eight dimensions. Five define the clinical competency space (condition, phase, care setting, provider role, and task) and three specify how AI engages human reasoning (assigned authority, agent facing, and anchoring layer). The combinatorial product of these dimensions yields a space of billions of distinct competency coordinates. A central structural implication is that validation within one coordinate provides minimal evidence for performance in another, rendering the competency space irreducible. The framework supplies a common grammar through which clinical AI can be specified, evaluated, and bounded across stakeholders. By making this structure explicit, the Clinical World Model reframes the field's central question from whether AI works to in which competency coordinates reliability has been demonstrated, and for whom.

analysis.tldr: 提出临床世界模型和技能混合框架，将临床AI能力评估锚定于人类认知，并定义数十亿个能力坐标空间。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有临床AI框架孤立地处理评估、监管或系统设计，缺乏统一的临床世界模型来连接它们，导致AI能力边界不明确。
analysis.problem: 临床AI缺乏一个形式化的世界模型来定义和评估其能力，使得不同利益相关者之间无法共享对AI能力的理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在一个能力坐标上的验证对另一个坐标的性能几乎没有证据支持，因此能力空间不可约简。
analysis.method: 提出临床世界模型（将护理形式化为患者、提供者、生态系统三方交互）和临床AI技能混合框架（通过八个维度定义能力，包括条件、阶段、护理环境、提供者角色、任务、分配权威、代理面向、锚定层），其组合产生数十亿个能力坐标。
contributions: 提出了临床世界模型，形式化了临床护理的三方交互结构。
开发了临床AI技能混合框架，定义了八维能力空间，为临床AI的指定、评估和边界划定提供了通用语法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架的实用性需要在实际临床AI系统中验证。
数十亿个能力坐标可能带来评估的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出临床世界模型和技能混合框架，将临床AI能力评估锚定于人类认知，并定义数十亿个能力坐标空间。

papers.title: SMART: When is it Actually Worth Expanding a Speculative Tree?
papers.abstract: Tree-based speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by verifying a branching tree of draft tokens in a single target-model forward pass. However, existing methods prioritize maximizing token-level likelihood or the number of accepted tokens while ignoring a critical ``efficiency paradox'': the computational overhead of drafting and verifying big trees can grow super-linearly, particularly at scale. This often leads to negative wall-clock speedup when batch sizes increase or hardware saturation limits are reached. To address this, we propose SMART, a system-aware marginal analysis framework for runtime tree construction. SMART reformulates tree expansion as a hardware-aware optimization problem that directly maximizes end-to-end speedup. By applying a principled marginal benefit--cost rule at inference time, SMART expands a node only when its marginal benefit--cost ratio exceeds the tree-level speedup. SMART is training-free and serves as a plug-and-play controller for existing frameworks like MSD and EAGLE. Extensive evaluations across three MLLMs (e.g., LLaVA, Qwen2-VL) and four LLMs (e.g., Llama-3.1, DeepSeek-R1) demonstrate that SMART consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. It delivers an average additional speedup of 20.0\% for MLLMs and 15.4\% for LLMs across compute-bound batching regimes and diverse GPU architectures without performance loss.

analysis.tldr: SMART提出系统感知的边际分析框架，通过硬件感知的树扩展优化，在无训练条件下提升投机解码的端到端加速比。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于树的投机解码方法忽略计算开销超线性增长导致的效率悖论，在大批量或硬件饱和时反而降低加速比。
analysis.problem: 如何构建运行时树结构以最大化端到端加速比，避免树扩展的边际收益低于成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出树扩展的计算开销随规模超线性增长，导致负加速比。
analysis.method: SMART：系统感知的边际分析框架，将树扩展建模为硬件感知优化问题，在推理时应用边际效益-成本规则，仅当节点边际效益-成本比超过树级加速比时才扩展。
contributions: 揭示投机解码中的效率悖论并提出系统感知的边际分析框架
提出训练无关的即插即用控制器，兼容现有框架如MSD和EAGLE
在多个MLLM和LLM上验证，平均额外加速20.0%和15.4%
analysis.experiments: 在3个MLLM（LLaVA、Qwen2-VL等）和4个LLM（Llama-3.1、DeepSeek-R1等）上评估，覆盖计算受限批处理场景和多种GPU架构，与SOTA基线对比。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的硬件性能模型，迁移到新硬件需重新校准
边际分析假设独立节点，实际依赖关系可能影响最优性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SMART提出系统感知的边际分析框架，通过硬件感知的树扩展优化，在无训练条件下提升投机解码的端到端加速比。

papers.title: EditCaption: Human-Aligned Instruction Synthesis for Image Editing via Supervised Fine-Tuning and Direct Preference Optimization
papers.abstract: High-quality training triplets (source-target image pairs with precise editing instructions) are a critical bottleneck for scaling instruction-guided image editing models. Vision-language models (VLMs) are widely used for automated instruction synthesis, but we identify three systematic failure modes in image-pair settings: orientation inconsistency (e.g., left/right confusion), viewpoint ambiguity, and insufficient fine-grained attribute description. Human evaluation shows that over 47% of instructions from strong baseline VLMs contain critical errors unusable for downstream training. We propose EditCaption, a scalable two-stage post-training pipeline for VLM-based instruction synthesis. Stage 1 builds a 100K supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset by combining GLM automatic annotation, EditScore-based filtering, and human refinement for spatial, directional, and attribute-level accuracy. Stage 2 collects 10K human preference pairs targeting the three failure modes and applies direct preference optimization (DPO) for alignment beyond SFT alone. On Eval-400, ByteMorph-Bench, and HQ-Edit, fine-tuned Qwen3-VL models outperform open-source baselines; the 235B model reaches 4.712 on Eval-400 (vs. Gemini-3-Pro 4.706, GPT-4.1 4.220, Kimi-K2.5 4.111) and 4.588 on ByteMorph-Bench (vs. Gemini-3-Pro 4.522, GPT-4.1 3.412). Human evaluation shows critical errors falling from 47.75% to 23% and correctness rising from 41.75% to 66%. The work offers a practical path to scalable, human-aligned instruction synthesis for image editing data.

analysis.tldr: 提出EditCaption两阶段后训练流程，通过SFT和DPO对齐VLM指令生成，显著降低图像编辑指令中的关键错误率。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量训练三元组（源-目标图像对+精确编辑指令）是扩展指令引导图像编辑模型的关键瓶颈，现有VLM自动合成指令存在方向不一致、视角模糊和属性描述不足等系统性问题。
analysis.problem: 解决VLM在图像对设置中自动合成编辑指令时的高错误率问题，特别是方向、视角和细粒度属性描述方面的失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出强基线VLM生成的指令中超过47%包含关键错误，无法用于下游训练，具体表现为方向不一致、视角模糊和属性描述不足。
analysis.method: 两阶段后训练流程：阶段1构建100K SFT数据集，结合GLM自动标注、EditScore过滤和人工精炼；阶段2收集10K针对三种失败模式的人类偏好对，应用DPO进行对齐。
contributions: 系统识别并分类了VLM在图像编辑指令合成中的三种失败模式
提出EditCaption两阶段后训练流程，结合SFT和DPO显著提升指令质量
在多个基准上达到SOTA，关键错误率从47.75%降至23%，正确率从41.75%提升至66%
analysis.experiments: 在Eval-400、ByteMorph-Bench和HQ-Edit上评估，微调后的Qwen3-VL模型超越开源基线；235B模型在Eval-400上达到4.712，在ByteMorph-Bench上达到4.588。
limitations: 依赖GLM自动标注和人工精炼，可能仍存在标注偏差
仅针对三种失败模式，可能未覆盖所有指令质量问题
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EditCaption两阶段后训练流程，通过SFT和DPO对齐VLM指令生成，显著降低图像编辑指令中的关键错误率。

papers.title: Vision-Language Foundation Models for Comprehensive Automated Pavement Condition Assessment
papers.abstract: General-purpose vision-language models demonstrate strong performance in everyday domains but struggle with specialized technical fields requiring precise terminology, structured reasoning, and adherence to engineering standards. This work addresses whether domain-specific instruction tuning can enable comprehensive pavement condition assessment through vision-language models. PaveInstruct, a dataset containing 278,889 image-instruction-response pairs spanning 32 task types, was created by unifying annotations from nine heterogeneous pavement datasets. PaveGPT, a pavement foundation model trained on this dataset, was evaluated against state-of-the-art vision-language models across perception, understanding, and reasoning tasks. Instruction tuning transformed model capabilities, achieving improvements exceeding 20% in spatial grounding, reasoning, and generation tasks while producing ASTM D6433-compliant outputs. These results enable transportation agencies to deploy unified conversational assessment tools that replace multiple specialized systems, simplifying workflows and reducing technical expertise requirements. The approach establishes a pathway for developing instruction-driven AI systems across infrastructure domains including bridge inspection, railway maintenance, and building condition assessment.

analysis.tldr: 通过领域特定指令微调，构建了路面评估基础模型PaveGPT，在感知、理解和推理任务上提升超20%。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用视觉-语言模型在专业工程领域表现不佳，难以处理精确术语、结构化推理和工程标准，亟需领域专用模型。
analysis.problem: 如何通过指令微调使视觉-语言模型实现全面的自动化路面状况评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用VLM在专业领域表现差，指令微调可显著提升空间定位、推理和生成能力，并输出符合ASTM标准的结果。
analysis.method: 构建包含278,889个图像-指令-响应对的PaveInstruct数据集，覆盖32种任务类型，并基于此训练PaveGPT模型。
contributions: 构建了大规模、多任务的路面评估指令数据集PaveInstruct
训练了路面评估基础模型PaveGPT，在多项任务上超越通用VLM
analysis.experiments: 在感知、理解和推理任务上评估，指令微调带来超过20%的提升，并生成符合ASTM D6433标准的输出。
limitations: 可能仅针对路面评估，泛化到其他基础设施领域需进一步验证
数据集和模型未公开，可复现性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过领域特定指令微调，构建了路面评估基础模型PaveGPT，在感知、理解和推理任务上提升超20%。

papers.title: SciFigDetect: A Benchmark for AI-Generated Scientific Figure Detection
papers.abstract: Modern multimodal generators can now produce scientific figures at near-publishable quality, creating a new challenge for visual forensics and research integrity. Unlike conventional AI-generated natural images, scientific figures are structured, text-dense, and tightly aligned with scholarly semantics, making them a distinct and difficult detection target. However, existing AI-generated image detection benchmarks and methods are almost entirely developed for open-domain imagery, leaving this setting largely unexplored. We present the first benchmark for AI-generated scientific figure detection. To construct it, we develop an agent-based data pipeline that retrieves licensed source papers, performs multimodal understanding of paper text and figures, builds structured prompts, synthesizes candidate figures, and filters them through a review-driven refinement loop. The resulting benchmark covers multiple figure categories, multiple generation sources and aligned real--synthetic pairs. We benchmark representative detectors under zero-shot, cross-generator, and degraded-image settings. Results show that current methods fail dramatically in zero-shot transfer, exhibit strong generator-specific overfitting, and remain fragile under common post-processing corruptions. These findings reveal a substantial gap between existing AIGI detection capabilities and the emerging distribution of high-quality scientific figures. We hope this benchmark can serve as a foundation for future research on robust and generalizable scientific-figure forensics. The dataset is available at https://github.com/Joyce-yoyo/SciFigDetect.

analysis.tldr: 首个AI生成科学图表检测基准，揭示现有方法在零样本和跨生成器场景下性能严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测基准和方法几乎全部针对开放域自然图像，忽略了科学图表这一结构化、文本密集且与学术语义紧密对齐的特殊领域，而多模态生成器已能生成接近可发表质量的科学图表，对视觉取证和研究诚信构成新挑战。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对AI生成科学图表的检测基准，现有方法在该领域表现未知且可能失效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有检测器在零样本迁移时性能急剧下降，表现出强烈的生成器特异性过拟合，且对常见后处理退化（如压缩、滤波）脆弱。
analysis.method: 构建基于智能体的数据流水线：检索授权源论文，进行多模态理解（文本+图表），构建结构化提示，合成候选图表，并通过评审驱动的精炼循环过滤。最终覆盖多种图表类别、多个生成源和对齐的真实-合成配对。
contributions: 首个AI生成科学图表检测基准，填补该领域空白。
提出基于智能体的数据构建流水线，实现高质量、多样化的真实-合成配对数据集。
系统评估现有检测器在零样本、跨生成器和退化图像设置下的表现，揭示显著性能差距。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本、跨生成器和退化图像设置下对代表性检测器进行基准测试。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准覆盖的生成源和图表类别可能有限，未来需扩展。
数据流水线依赖智能体，可能存在偏差或遗漏。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个AI生成科学图表检测基准，揭示现有方法在零样本和跨生成器场景下性能严重不足。

papers.title: OmniJigsaw: Enhancing Omni-Modal Reasoning via Modality-Orchestrated Reordering
papers.abstract: To extend the reinforcement learning post-training paradigm to omni-modal models for concurrently bolstering video-audio understanding and collaborative reasoning, we propose OmniJigsaw, a generic self-supervised framework built upon a temporal reordering proxy task. Centered on the chronological reconstruction of shuffled audio-visual clips, this paradigm strategically orchestrates visual and auditory signals to compel cross-modal integration through three distinct strategies: Joint Modality Integration, Sample-level Modality Selection, and Clip-level Modality Masking. Recognizing that the efficacy of such proxy tasks is fundamentally tied to puzzle quality, we design a two-stage coarse-to-fine data filtering pipeline, which facilitates the efficient adaptation of OmniJigsaw to massive unannotated omni-modal data. Our analysis reveals a ``bi-modal shortcut phenomenon'' in joint modality integration and demonstrates that fine-grained clip-level modality masking mitigates this issue while outperforming sample-level modality selection. Extensive evaluations on 15 benchmarks show substantial gains in video, audio, and collaborative reasoning, validating OmniJigsaw as a scalable paradigm for self-supervised omni-modal learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniJigsaw框架，通过时间重排序代理任务增强全模态模型的视频-音频理解与协同推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全模态模型在视频-音频理解和协同推理上仍有不足，且缺乏有效的自监督训练范式来利用海量未标注数据。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自监督代理任务以同时提升视频、音频及跨模态协同推理能力，并解决联合模态集成中的捷径现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现联合模态集成中存在“双模态捷径现象”，即模型可能依赖简单关联而非真正跨模态理解；细粒度片段级模态掩码可缓解此问题。
analysis.method: 基于时间重排序代理任务，提出三种策略（联合模态集成、样本级模态选择、片段级模态掩码），并设计两阶段粗到细数据过滤流程以适应大规模未标注数据。
contributions: 提出OmniJigsaw，一种可扩展的自监督全模态学习框架，通过时间重排序提升视频、音频及协同推理。
揭示双模态捷径现象，并证明片段级模态掩码优于样本级选择。
在15个基准上取得显著提升，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在15个基准上评估，涵盖视频、音频和协同推理任务，显示显著性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据过滤流程，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论计算开销或训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniJigsaw框架，通过时间重排序代理任务增强全模态模型的视频-音频理解与协同推理能力。

papers.title: MedVR: Annotation-Free Medical Visual Reasoning via Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Medical Vision-Language Models (VLMs) hold immense promise for complex clinical tasks, but their reasoning capabilities are often constrained by text-only paradigms that fail to ground inferences in visual evidence. This limitation not only curtails performance on tasks requiring fine-grained visual analysis but also introduces risks of visual hallucination in safety-critical applications. Thus, we introduce MedVR, a novel reinforcement learning framework that enables annotation-free visual reasoning for medical VLMs. Its core innovation lies in two synergistic mechanisms: Entropy-guided Visual Regrounding (EVR) uses model uncertainty to direct exploration, while Consensus-based Credit Assignment (CCA) distills pseudo-supervision from rollout agreement. Without any human annotations for intermediate steps, MedVR achieves state-of-the-art performance on diverse public medical VQA benchmarks, significantly outperforming existing models. By learning to reason directly with visual evidence, MedVR promotes the robustness and transparency essential for accelerating the clinical deployment of medical AI.

analysis.tldr: MedVR通过强化学习实现无需标注的医学视觉推理，显著提升VLM在临床任务中的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学视觉语言模型在复杂临床任务中潜力巨大，但现有方法依赖纯文本范式，无法将推理锚定在视觉证据上，导致细粒度视觉分析性能受限，并在安全关键应用中存在视觉幻觉风险。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用人工标注中间步骤的情况下，让医学VLM学会基于视觉证据进行推理，提升其准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MedVR框架，包含两个协同机制：熵引导视觉重定位（EVR）利用模型不确定性指导探索，以及基于共识的信用分配（CCA）从轨迹一致性中提炼伪监督信号。
contributions: 提出首个无需标注的医学视觉推理强化学习框架MedVR。
设计EVR和CCA两种机制，有效利用模型不确定性及轨迹一致性进行视觉重定位和信用分配。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开医学VQA基准上达到最先进性能，显著优于现有模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
强化学习训练稳定性及收敛性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MedVR通过强化学习实现无需标注的医学视觉推理，显著提升VLM在临床任务中的表现。

papers.title: Mitigating the reconstruction-detection trade-off in VAE-based unsupervised anomaly detection
papers.abstract: Variational autoencoders are widely used for unsupervised anomaly detection. Model selection however remains an open-question: to remain fully unsupervised, hyperparameters are often chosen to minimize the reconstruction error on normal samples. In this paper, we reveal a trade-off between reconstruction quality and anomaly detection among $β$-VAE models. Models with constrained latent space reach higher detection metrics but lower reconstruction quality. We also assess the performance variability across random seeds and show it is linked to the distance between normal and abnormal latent distributions. From this analysis, we justify and investigate two methods to mitigate the reconstructiondetection tradeoff: beta-scheduling and the Sparse VAE. The latter especially shows an improvement in detection while maintaining high reconstruction quality.

analysis.tldr: 揭示β-VAE中重建质量与异常检测之间的权衡，并通过beta调度和稀疏VAE缓解该权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 变分自编码器在无监督异常检测中广泛应用，但模型选择仍是一个开放问题：超参数通常通过最小化正常样本的重建误差来选择，这可能导致检测性能不佳。
analysis.problem: β-VAE模型中重建质量与异常检测性能之间存在权衡，需要在不牺牲重建质量的前提下提高检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了β-VAE中重建质量与异常检测之间的权衡：约束潜在空间的模型检测指标更高但重建质量更低；还发现随机种子导致的性能变异性与正常和异常潜在分布之间的距离有关。
analysis.method: 提出两种缓解重建-检测权衡的方法：beta调度（beta-scheduling）和稀疏VAE（Sparse VAE）。
contributions: 揭示了β-VAE中重建质量与异常检测之间的权衡关系
分析了随机种子导致的性能变异性与潜在分布距离的关联
提出并验证了beta调度和稀疏VAE两种缓解权衡的方法
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能仅在特定数据集或异常类型上有效
稀疏VAE的稀疏性控制可能引入额外超参数
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示β-VAE中重建质量与异常检测之间的权衡，并通过beta调度和稀疏VAE缓解该权衡。

papers.title: Inside-Out: Measuring Generalization in Vision Transformers Through Inner Workings
papers.abstract: Reliable generalization metrics are fundamental to the evaluation of machine learning models. Especially in high-stakes applications where labeled target data are scarce, evaluation of models' generalization performance under distribution shift is a pressing need. We focus on two practical scenarios: (1) Before deployment, how to select the best model for unlabeled target data? (2) After deployment, how to monitor model performance under distribution shift? The central need in both cases is a reliable and label-free proxy metric. Yet existing proxy metrics, such as model confidence or accuracy-on-the-line, are often unreliable as they only assess model output while ignoring the internal mechanisms that produce them. We address this limitation by introducing a new perspective: using the inner workings of a model, i.e., circuits, as a predictive metric of generalization performance. Leveraging circuit discovery, we extract the causal interactions between internal representations as a circuit, from which we derive two metrics tailored to the two practical scenarios. (1) Before deployment, we introduce Dependency Depth Bias, which measures different models' generalization capability on target data. (2) After deployment, we propose Circuit Shift Score, which predicts a model's generalization under different distribution shifts. Across various tasks, both metrics demonstrate significantly improved correlation with generalization performance, outperforming existing proxies by an average of 13.4\% and 34.1\%, respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/deep-real/GenCircuit.

analysis.tldr: 利用模型内部电路（circuit）作为代理指标，在无标签数据上预测视觉Transformer的泛化性能，显著优于传统基于输出的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有泛化代理指标（如模型置信度、accuracy-on-the-line）仅依赖模型输出，忽略了内部机制，在分布偏移下不可靠；而高安全场景中目标数据缺乏标签，亟需更可靠的标签无关代理指标。
analysis.problem: 如何利用模型内部工作机制（电路）设计无标签代理指标，以在部署前选择最佳模型和部署后监控模型在分布偏移下的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过电路发现提取内部表征间的因果交互作为电路，并基于此设计两个指标：部署前的Dependency Depth Bias（衡量不同模型在目标数据上的泛化能力）和部署后的Circuit Shift Score（预测模型在不同分布偏移下的泛化表现）。
contributions: 提出利用模型内部电路作为泛化性能预测的新视角。
设计两个标签无关的代理指标（Dependency Depth Bias和Circuit Shift Score），分别适用于部署前模型选择和部署后性能监控。
在多种任务上，两个指标与泛化性能的相关性平均比现有代理指标提升13.4%和34.1%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验设置，但提到在多种任务上两个指标平均提升13.4%和34.1%。
limitations: 电路发现的计算成本可能较高，影响实际部署效率。
方法可能依赖于特定模型架构（如视觉Transformer），泛化到其他架构需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用模型内部电路（circuit）作为代理指标，在无标签数据上预测视觉Transformer的泛化性能，显著优于传统基于输出的方法。

papers.title: AT-ADD: All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection Challenge Evaluation Plan
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of Audio Large Language Models (ALLMs) has enabled cost-effective, high-fidelity generation and manipulation of both speech and non-speech audio, including sound effects, singing voices, and music. While these capabilities foster creativity and content production, they also introduce significant security and trust challenges, as realistic audio deepfakes can now be generated and disseminated at scale. Existing audio deepfake detection (ADD) countermeasures (CMs) and benchmarks, however, remain largely speech-centric, often relying on speech-specific artifacts and exhibiting limited robustness to real-world distortions, as well as restricted generalization to heterogeneous audio types and emerging spoofing techniques. To address these gaps, we propose the All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection (AT-ADD) Grand Challenge for ACM Multimedia 2026, designed to bridge controlled academic evaluation with practical multimedia forensics. AT-ADD comprises two tracks: (1) Robust Speech Deepfake Detection, which evaluates detectors under real-world scenarios and against unseen, state-of-the-art speech generation methods; and (2) All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection, which extends detection beyond speech to diverse, unknown audio types and promotes type-agnostic generalization across speech, sound, singing, and music. By providing standardized datasets, rigorous evaluation protocols, and reproducible baselines, AT-ADD aims to accelerate the development of robust and generalizable audio forensic technologies, supporting secure communication, reliable media verification, and responsible governance in an era of pervasive synthetic audio.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向全类型音频深度伪造检测的挑战赛评估方案，涵盖鲁棒语音检测和跨类型音频泛化检测两个赛道。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频深度伪造检测方法主要针对语音，依赖语音特定伪影，对真实世界失真鲁棒性差，且难以泛化到非语音音频类型（如音效、歌声、音乐）和新兴伪造技术，亟需统一评估框架推动技术发展。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个涵盖多种音频类型、考虑真实世界失真、并支持可重复基准的标准化评估方案，以促进鲁棒且泛化的音频深度伪造检测技术。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AT-ADD挑战赛，包含两个赛道：鲁棒语音深度伪造检测（评估真实场景和未知语音生成方法）和全类型音频深度伪造检测（扩展至语音、声音、歌声、音乐等未知音频类型），并提供标准化数据集、严格评估协议和可重复基线。
contributions: 提出首个涵盖语音和非语音音频的全类型音频深度伪造检测挑战赛评估方案。
设计两个互补赛道，分别针对鲁棒语音检测和跨类型音频泛化检测。
提供标准化数据集、评估协议和可重复基线，推动音频取证技术发展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 挑战赛方案本身不提供检测算法，仅提供评估框架。
实际效果依赖于参与者的方法，可能受限于数据集规模和多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向全类型音频深度伪造检测的挑战赛评估方案，涵盖鲁棒语音检测和跨类型音频泛化检测两个赛道。

papers.title: Aligning Agents via Planning: A Benchmark for Trajectory-Level Reward Modeling
papers.abstract: In classical Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), Reward Models (RMs) serve as the fundamental signal provider for model alignment. As Large Language Models evolve into agentic systems capable of autonomous tool invocation and complex reasoning, the paradigm of reward modeling faces unprecedented challenges -- most notably, the lack of benchmarks specifically designed to assess RM capabilities within tool-integrated environments. To address this gap, we present Plan-RewardBench, a trajectory-level preference benchmark designed to evaluate how well judges distinguish preferred versus distractor agent trajectories in complex tool-using scenarios. Plan-RewardBench covers four representative task families -- (i) Safety Refusal, (ii) Tool-Irrelevance / Unavailability, (iii) Complex Planning, and (iv) Robust Error Recovery -- comprising validated positive trajectories and confusable hard negatives constructed via multi-model natural rollouts, rule-based perturbations, and minimal-edit LLM perturbations. We benchmark representative RMs (generative, discriminative, and LLM-as-Judge) under a unified pairwise protocol, reporting accuracy trends across varying trajectory lengths and task categories. Furthermore, we provide diagnostic analyses of prevalent failure modes. Our results reveal that all three evaluator families face substantial challenges, with performance degrading sharply on long-horizon trajectories, underscoring the necessity for specialized training in agentic, trajectory-level reward modeling. Ultimately, Plan-RewardBench aims to serve as both a practical evaluation suite and a reusable blueprint for constructing agentic planning preference data.

analysis.tldr: 提出Plan-RewardBench，首个评估工具集成环境中轨迹级奖励模型的基准，揭示现有RM在长程轨迹上的显著性能下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM演变为能自主调用工具和复杂推理的智能体系统，传统RLHF中的奖励模型面临缺乏专门评估工具集成环境中RM能力的基准的挑战。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门设计用于评估奖励模型在工具集成环境中轨迹级偏好判断能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有三类评估器（生成式、判别式、LLM-as-Judge）在长程轨迹上性能急剧下降，表明需要专门训练。
analysis.method: 构建Plan-RewardBench基准，包含四个代表性任务族（安全拒绝、工具无关/不可用、复杂规划、鲁棒错误恢复），通过多模型自然展开、规则扰动和最小编辑LLM扰动构建正例和混淆负例。
contributions: 提出首个针对工具集成环境中轨迹级奖励模型评估的基准Plan-RewardBench。
系统评估了生成式、判别式和LLM-as-Judge三类奖励模型，揭示了长程轨迹上的性能瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在统一成对协议下对代表性RM进行基准测试，报告不同轨迹长度和任务类别下的准确率趋势，并提供失败模式诊断分析。
limitations: 基准覆盖的任务族可能未涵盖所有工具使用场景。
构建负例的方法可能引入特定偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Plan-RewardBench，首个评估工具集成环境中轨迹级奖励模型的基准，揭示现有RM在长程轨迹上的显著性能下降。

papers.title: On the Global Photometric Alignment for Low-Level Vision
papers.abstract: Supervised low-level vision models rely on pixel-wise losses against paired references, yet paired training sets exhibit per-pair photometric inconsistency, say, different image pairs demand different global brightness, color, or white-balance mappings. This inconsistency enters through task-intrinsic photometric transfer (e.g., low-light enhancement) or unintended acquisition shifts (e.g., de-raining), and in either case causes an optimization pathology. Standard reconstruction losses allocate disproportionate gradient budget to conflicting per-pair photometric targets, crowding out content restoration. In this paper, we investigate this issue and prove that, under least-squares decomposition, the photometric and structural components of the prediction-target residual are orthogonal, and that the spatially dense photometric component dominates the gradient energy. Motivated by this analysis, we propose Photometric Alignment Loss (PAL). This flexible supervision objective discounts nuisance photometric discrepancy via closed-form affine color alignment while preserving restoration-relevant supervision, requiring only covariance statistics and tiny matrix inversion with negligible overhead. Across 6 tasks, 16 datasets, and 16 architectures, PAL consistently improves metrics and generalization. The implementation is in the appendix.

analysis.tldr: 提出光度对齐损失（PAL），通过闭式仿射颜色对齐消除训练对间的光度不一致，提升低层视觉任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 有监督低层视觉模型依赖逐像素损失，但训练对间存在光度不一致（如亮度、颜色、白平衡差异），导致优化冲突，标准重建损失将过多梯度分配给光度成分，挤占内容恢复。
analysis.problem: 训练对间的光度不一致导致标准逐像素损失优化效率低，模型难以聚焦于结构内容恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过最小二乘分解证明，预测-目标残差的光度与结构分量正交，且空间密集的光度分量主导梯度能量，造成优化病态。
analysis.method: 提出光度对齐损失（PAL），通过闭式仿射颜色对齐（仅需协方差统计和小矩阵求逆）消除光度差异，同时保留与恢复相关的监督信号。
contributions: 理论证明残差的光度与结构分量正交且光度分量主导梯度能量，揭示标准损失优化病态的原因。
提出PAL损失，以极小计算开销消除光度不一致，提升多种低层视觉任务的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在6个任务、16个数据集、16种架构上验证，PAL一致提升指标和泛化能力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可建模为仿射变换的光度不一致，对更复杂的光度变化效果未知。
闭式对齐假设光度变换为全局仿射，局部或非线性光度变化可能无法完全处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出光度对齐损失（PAL），通过闭式仿射颜色对齐消除训练对间的光度不一致，提升低层视觉任务性能。

papers.title: OceanMAE: A Foundation Model for Ocean Remote Sensing
papers.abstract: Accurate ocean mapping is essential for applications such as bathymetry estimation, seabed characterization, marine litter detection, and ecosystem monitoring. However, ocean remote sensing (RS) remains constrained by limited labeled data and by the reduced transferability of models pre-trained mainly on land-dominated Earth observation imagery. In this paper, we propose OceanMAE, an ocean-specific masked autoencoder that extends standard MAE pre-training by integrating multispectral Sentinel-2 observations with physically meaningful ocean descriptors during self-supervised learning. By incorporating these auxiliary ocean features, OceanMAE is designed to learn more informative and ocean-aware latent representations from large- scale unlabeled data. To transfer these representations to downstream applications, we further employ a modified UNet-based framework for marine segmentation and bathymetry estimation. Pre-trained on the Hydro dataset, OceanMAE is evaluated on MADOS and MARIDA for marine pollutant and debris segmentation, and on MagicBathyNet for bathymetry regression. The experiments show that OceanMAE yields the strongest gains on marine segmentation, while bathymetry benefits are competitive and task-dependent. In addition, an ablation against a standard MAE on MARIDA indicates that incorporating auxiliary ocean descriptors during pre-training improves downstream segmentation quality. These findings highlight the value of physically informed and domain-aligned self-supervised pre- training for ocean RS. Code and weights are publicly available at https://git.tu-berlin.de/joanna.stamer/SSLORS2.

analysis.tldr: 提出海洋专用掩码自编码器OceanMAE，通过融合多光谱与物理海洋描述符进行自监督预训练，提升海洋遥感下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 海洋遥感受限于标注数据稀缺和陆地预训练模型迁移性差，亟需领域专用的自监督预训练方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计海洋遥感专用的自监督预训练框架，以学习具有物理意义的海洋表征并提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于掩码自编码器（MAE），在自监督预训练中融合多光谱Sentinel-2观测与物理海洋描述符，并采用改进的UNet框架进行下游海洋分割和测深估计。
contributions: 提出OceanMAE，首个海洋专用MAE预训练模型，集成物理海洋描述符。
在多个海洋遥感基准上验证了预训练策略的有效性，尤其在海洋分割任务上提升显著。
analysis.experiments: 在MADOS、MARIDA和MagicBathyNet数据集上评估，实验表明海洋分割任务增益最大，测深任务效果有竞争力且依赖任务；消融实验显示引入海洋描述符提升分割质量。
limitations: 测深任务提升有限且任务依赖，可能需进一步优化。
仅基于Sentinel-2数据，泛化到其他传感器需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出海洋专用掩码自编码器OceanMAE，通过融合多光谱与物理海洋描述符进行自监督预训练，提升海洋遥感下游任务性能。

papers.title: Activation Steering for Aligned Open-ended Generation without Sacrificing Coherence
papers.abstract: Alignment in LLMs is more brittle than commonly assumed: misalignment can be triggered by adversarial prompts, benign fine-tuning, emergent misalignment, and goal misgeneralization. Recent evidence suggests that some misalignment behaviors are encoded as linear structure in activation space, making it tractable via steering, while safety alignment has been shown to govern the first few output tokens primarily, leaving subsequent generation unguarded. These findings motivate activation steering as a lightweight runtime defense that continuously corrects misaligned activations throughout generation. We evaluate three methods: Steer-With-Fixed-Coeff (SwFC), which applies uniform additive steering, and two novel projection-aware methods, Steer-to-Target-Projection (StTP) and Steer-to-Mirror-Projection (StMP), that use a logistic regression decision boundary to selectively intervene only on tokens whose activations fall below distributional thresholds. Using malicious system prompts as a controlled proxy for misalignment, we evaluate under two threat models (dishonesty and dismissiveness) and two architectures (Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, Qwen3-32B). All methods substantially recover target traits (honesty and compassion) while preserving coherence. StTP and StMP better maintain general capabilities (MMLU, MT-Bench, AlpacaEval) and produce less repetition in multi-turn conversations.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种投影感知的激活引导方法，在不牺牲连贯性的前提下恢复LLM的对齐行为。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的对齐比通常认为的更脆弱，对抗性提示、良性微调等都可能触发不对齐行为，而安全对齐主要控制前几个输出token，后续生成缺乏防护。
analysis.problem: 如何在运行时轻量级地持续纠正生成过程中的不对齐激活，同时保持生成文本的连贯性和通用能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不对齐行为在激活空间中呈现线性结构，安全对齐主要影响前几个输出token，后续生成不受保护。
analysis.method: 提出两种投影感知方法StTP和StMP，利用逻辑回归决策边界，仅对激活值低于分布阈值的token进行选择性干预，与均匀加性引导方法SwFC对比。
contributions: 提出两种投影感知的激活引导方法StTP和StMP，选择性干预不对齐token。
在两种威胁模型和两种架构上验证方法能恢复目标特质并保持连贯性和通用能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct和Qwen3-32B上，使用恶意系统提示作为不对齐代理，评估不诚实和不回应两种威胁模型，测量目标特质恢复、连贯性、MMLU、MT-Bench、AlpacaEval及多轮对话重复率。
limitations: 仅以恶意系统提示作为不对齐代理，可能无法覆盖所有不对齐场景。
方法依赖于逻辑回归决策边界，可能对分布外情况泛化不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种投影感知的激活引导方法，在不牺牲连贯性的前提下恢复LLM的对齐行为。

papers.title: ViVa: A Video-Generative Value Model for Robot Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have advanced robot manipulation through large-scale pretraining, but real-world deployment remains challenging due to partial observability and delayed feedback. Reinforcement learning addresses this via value functions, which assess task progress and guide policy improvement. However, existing value models built on vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to capture temporal dynamics, undermining reliable value estimation in long-horizon tasks. In this paper, we propose ViVa, a video-generative value model that repurposes a pretrained video generator for value estimation. Taking the current observation and robot proprioception as input, ViVa jointly predicts future proprioception and a scalar value for the current state. By leveraging the spatiotemporal priors of a pretrained video generator, our approach grounds value estimation in anticipated embodiment dynamics, moving beyond static snapshots to intrinsically couple value with foresight. Integrated into RECAP, ViVa delivers substantial improvements on real-world box assembly. Qualitative analysis across all three tasks confirms that ViVa produces more reliable value signals, accurately reflecting task progress. By leveraging spatiotemporal priors from video corpora, ViVa also generalizes to novel objects, highlighting the promise of video-generative models for value estimation.

analysis.tldr: ViVa 将预训练视频生成器改造为价值模型，通过预测未来本体感知来提升机器人强化学习中的价值估计可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 VLM 的价值模型难以捕捉时间动态，导致长程任务中价值估计不可靠，而视频生成模型蕴含丰富的时空先验，有望解决这一问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视频生成模型的时空先验，为机器人强化学习提供更可靠的价值估计，尤其是在部分可观测和延迟反馈的真实场景中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有基于 VLM 的价值模型在长程任务中价值估计不可靠，原因是它们基于静态快照，缺乏对时间动态的建模。
analysis.method: ViVa 将预训练视频生成器改造为价值模型，输入当前观测和机器人本体感知，联合预测未来本体感知和当前状态的标量价值，从而将价值估计与预期的具身动态耦合。
contributions: 提出 ViVa，一种视频生成价值模型，利用视频生成器的时空先验进行价值估计。
在真实机器人箱体装配任务中，集成 ViVa 的 RECAP 方法取得了显著改进。
定性分析表明 ViVa 能产生更可靠的价值信号，并泛化到新物体。
analysis.experiments: 在真实机器人箱体装配任务上进行了实验，集成 ViVa 的 RECAP 方法取得显著改进；并在三个任务上进行了定性分析。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视频生成器的质量，若生成器泛化不足则价值估计受限。
仅验证了箱体装配任务，其他复杂任务的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViVa 将预训练视频生成器改造为价值模型，通过预测未来本体感知来提升机器人强化学习中的价值估计可靠性。

papers.title: T-Gated Adapter: A Lightweight Temporal Adapter for Vision-Language Medical Segmentation
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation traditionally relies on fully supervised 3D architectures that demand a large amount of dense, voxel-level annotations from clinical experts which is a prohibitively expensive process. Vision Language Models (VLMs) offer a powerful alternative by leveraging broad visual semantic representations learned from billions of images. However, when applied independently to 2D slices of a 3D scan, these models often produce noisy and anatomically implausible segmentations that violate the inherent continuity of anatomical structures. We propose a temporal adapter that addresses this by injecting adjacent-slice context directly into the model's visual token representations. The adapter comprises a temporal transformer attending across a fixed context window at the token level, a spatial context block refining within-slice representations, and an adaptive gate balancing temporal and single-slice features. Training on 30 labeled volumes from the FLARE22 dataset, our method achieves a mean Dice of 0.704 across 13 abdominal organs with a gain of +0.206 over the baseline VLM trained with no temporal context. Zero-shot evaluation on BTCV and AMOS22 datasets yields consistent improvements of +0.210 and +0.230, with the average cross-domain performance drop reducing from 38.0% to 24.9%. Furthermore, in a cross-modality evaluation on AMOS22 MRI with neither model receiving any MRI supervision, our method achieves a mean Dice of 0.366, outperforming a fully supervised 3D baseline (DynUNet, 0.224) trained exclusively on CT, suggesting that CLIP's visual semantic representations generalize more gracefully across imaging modalities than convolutional features.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级时间适配器T-Gated Adapter，为VLM注入相邻切片上下文，显著提升医学图像分割的时序一致性和跨域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割依赖大量密集体素级标注，成本高昂；VLM虽能利用广泛视觉语义，但独立处理2D切片时忽略解剖结构连续性，产生噪声分割。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加大量参数和标注需求的前提下，为VLM引入时序上下文以提升3D医学图像分割的解剖连续性和跨域/跨模态泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM独立处理2D切片时分割结果噪声大、解剖不连续；跨域性能下降显著（38.0%）；CLIP视觉语义在跨模态（CT→MRI）上比卷积特征泛化更优。
analysis.method: 提出T-Gated Adapter，包含时序Transformer（跨固定窗口的token级注意力）、空间上下文块（细化切片内表示）和自适应门控（平衡时序与单切片特征），将相邻切片上下文注入VLM视觉token表示。
contributions: 提出轻量级时间适配器，有效解决VLM在3D医学分割中缺乏时序上下文的问题。
在FLARE22上仅用30个标注体积训练，平均Dice达0.704，比无时序基线提升+0.206。
零样本跨域（BTCV、AMOS22）和跨模态（CT→MRI）实验显示显著泛化优势，跨域性能下降从38.0%降至24.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在FLARE22（30个标注体积）上训练，测试13个腹部器官；零样本评估在BTCV和AMOS22（CT）上分别提升+0.210和+0.230；跨模态实验在AMOS22 MRI上（无MRI监督）达到0.366 Dice，超过全监督3D基线DynUNet（0.224）。
limitations: 仅在腹部器官上验证，其他解剖区域或任务（如脑、心脏）未测试。
时序窗口大小固定，可能不适用于运动伪影或非刚性形变较大的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级时间适配器T-Gated Adapter，为VLM注入相邻切片上下文，显著提升医学图像分割的时序一致性和跨域泛化能力。

papers.title: Face-D(^2)CL: Multi-Domain Synergistic Representation with Dual Continual Learning for Facial DeepFake Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of facial forgery techniques poses severe threats to public trust and information security, making facial DeepFake detection a critical research priority. Continual learning provides an effective approach to adapt facial DeepFake detection models to evolving forgery patterns. However, existing methods face two key bottlenecks in real-world continual learning scenarios: insufficient feature representation and catastrophic forgetting. To address these issues, we propose Face-D(^2)CL, a framework for facial DeepFake detection. It leverages multi-domain synergistic representation to fuse spatial and frequency-domain features for the comprehensive capture of diverse forgery traces, and employs a dual continual learning mechanism that combines Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC), which distinguishes parameter importance for real versus fake samples, and Orthogonal Gradient Constraint (OGC), which ensures updates to task-specific adapters do not interfere with previously learned knowledge. This synergy enables the model to achieve a dynamic balance between robust anti-forgetting capabilities and agile adaptability to emerging facial forgery paradigms, all without relying on historical data replay. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method surpasses current SOTA approaches in both stability and plasticity, achieving 60.7% relative reduction in average detection error rate, respectively. On unseen forgery domains, it further improves the average detection AUC by 7.9% compared to the current SOTA method.

analysis.tldr: 提出Face-D²CL框架，通过多域协同表示和双持续学习机制提升人脸DeepFake检测的稳定性和可塑性。
analysis.research_motivation: 人脸伪造技术快速演进，现有持续学习方法在特征表示不足和灾难性遗忘方面存在瓶颈，亟需更鲁棒的检测框架。
analysis.problem: 解决人脸DeepFake检测中持续学习场景下的特征表示不充分和灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在持续学习时面临特征表示不足和灾难性遗忘两大瓶颈。
analysis.method: 融合空间与频域特征的多域协同表示，结合弹性权重巩固（EWC）和正交梯度约束（OGC）的双持续学习机制。
contributions: 提出多域协同表示方法，融合空间和频域特征以全面捕获伪造痕迹。
设计双持续学习机制，结合EWC和OGC实现抗遗忘与适应新伪造模式的动态平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，平均检测错误率相对降低60.7%，在未见伪造域上平均检测AUC提升7.9%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定频域变换方法，泛化性需进一步验证。
双机制可能增加计算开销，实时性待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Face-D²CL框架，通过多域协同表示和双持续学习机制提升人脸DeepFake检测的稳定性和可塑性。

papers.title: Semantic Noise Reduction via Teacher-Guided Dual-Path Audio-Visual Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Recent advances in audio-visual representation learning have shown the value of combining contrastive alignment with masked reconstruction. However, jointly optimizing these objectives in a single forward pass forces the contrastive branch to rely on randomly visible patches designed for reconstruction rather than cross-modal alignment, introducing semantic noise and optimization interference. We propose TG-DP, a Teacher-Guided Dual-Path framework that decouples reconstruction and alignment into separate optimization paths. By disentangling the masking regimes of the two branches, TG-DP enables the contrastive pathway to use a visibility pattern better suited to cross-modal alignment. A teacher model further provides auxiliary guidance for organizing visible tokens in this branch, helping reduce interference and stabilize cross-modal representation learning. TG-DP achieves state-of-the-art performance in zero-shot retrieval. On AudioSet, it improves R@1 from 35.2\% to 37.4\% for video-to-audio retrieval and from 27.9\% to 37.1\% for audio-to-video retrieval. The learned representations also remain semantically robust, achieving state-of-the-art linear-probe performance on AS20K and VGGSound. Taken together, our results suggest that decoupling multimodal objectives and introducing teacher-guided structure into the contrastive pathway provide an effective framework for improving large-scale audio-visual pretraining. Code is available at https://github.com/wanglg20/TG-DP.

analysis.tldr: 提出教师引导双路径框架TG-DP，解耦重建与对齐目标，减少语义噪声，提升音视频表征学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音视频表征学习联合优化对比对齐与掩码重建时，单次前向传播迫使对比分支依赖为重建设计的随机可见块，引入语义噪声和优化干扰，限制了跨模态对齐效果。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦重建与对齐目标，减少优化干扰，提升对比分支的跨模态对齐能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出联合优化对比对齐与掩码重建时，对比分支被迫使用为重建设计的随机可见块，导致语义噪声和优化干扰。
analysis.method: 提出教师引导双路径框架TG-DP，将重建与对齐解耦为独立优化路径，通过分离掩码策略使对比分支使用更适合对齐的可见模式，并引入教师模型辅助组织可见token，减少干扰。
contributions: 提出TG-DP框架，解耦重建与对齐目标，减少语义噪声和优化干扰。
引入教师模型引导对比分支的可见token组织，稳定跨模态表征学习。
在零样本检索和线性探测任务上达到SOTA，代码开源。
analysis.experiments: 在AudioSet上，视频到音频检索R@1从35.2%提升至37.4%，音频到视频检索从27.9%提升至37.1%；在AS20K和VGGSound上线性探测达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型质量，教师模型训练成本未讨论。
仅验证了音视频模态，未扩展到其他多模态场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出教师引导双路径框架TG-DP，解耦重建与对齐目标，减少语义噪声，提升音视频表征学习。

papers.title: LOLGORITHM: Funny Comment Generation Agent For Short Videos
papers.abstract: Short-form video platforms have become central to multimedia information dissemination, where comments play a critical role in driving engagement, propagation, and algorithmic feedback. However, existing approaches -- including video summarization and live-streaming danmaku generation -- fail to produce authentic comments that conform to platform-specific cultural and linguistic norms. In this paper, we present LOLGORITHM, a novel modular multi-agent framework for stylized short-form video comment generation. LOLGORITHM supports six controllable comment styles and comprises three core modules: video content summarization, video classification, and comment generation with semantic retrieval and hot meme augmentation. We further construct a bilingual dataset of 3,267 videos and 16,335 comments spanning five high-engagement categories across YouTube and Douyin. Evaluation combining automatic scoring and large-scale human preference analysis demonstrates that LOLGORITHM consistently outperforms baseline methods, achieving human preference selection rates of 80.46\% on YouTube and 84.29\% on Douyin across 107 respondents. Ablation studies confirm that these gains are attributable to the framework architecture rather than the choice of backbone LLM, underscoring the robustness and generalizability of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化多智能体框架LOLGORITHM，用于生成符合平台文化的短视频搞笑评论。
analysis.research_motivation: 短视频平台评论对用户参与和算法反馈至关重要，但现有方法（如视频摘要、弹幕生成）无法生成符合平台特定文化和语言规范的真实评论。
analysis.problem: 如何生成风格可控、符合平台文化且自然的短视频评论。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LOLGORITHM是一个模块化多智能体框架，包含视频内容摘要、视频分类、评论生成（带语义检索和热门模因增强）三个核心模块，支持六种可控评论风格。
contributions: 提出LOLGORITHM，首个针对短视频风格化评论生成的模块化多智能体框架。
构建包含3267个视频和16335条评论的双语数据集，覆盖YouTube和抖音五个高互动类别。
通过自动评分和大规模人类偏好评估，证明LOLGORITHM在YouTube和抖音上分别达到80.46%和84.29%的人类偏好选择率。
analysis.experiments: 在YouTube和抖音数据集上，结合自动评分和107名受访者的人类偏好评估，LOLGORITHM优于基线方法；消融实验表明性能提升来自框架架构而非骨干LLM。
limitations: 可能仅适用于短视频评论生成，未验证其他文本生成任务。
数据集规模有限，可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化多智能体框架LOLGORITHM，用于生成符合平台文化的短视频搞笑评论。

papers.title: Multimodal Reasoning with LLM for Encrypted Traffic Interpretation: A Benchmark
papers.abstract: Network traffic, as a key media format, is crucial for ensuring security and communications in modern internet infrastructure. While existing methods offer excellent performance, they face two key bottlenecks: (1) They fail to capture multidimensional semantics beyond unimodal sequence patterns. (2) Their black box property, i.e., providing only category labels, lacks an auditable reasoning process. We identify a key factor that existing network traffic datasets are primarily designed for classification and inherently lack rich semantic annotations, failing to generate human-readable evidence report. To address data scarcity, this paper proposes a Byte-Grounded Traffic Description (BGTD) benchmark for the first time, combining raw bytes with structured expert annotations. BGTD provides necessary behavioral features and verifiable chains of evidence for multimodal reasoning towards explainable encrypted traffic interpretation. Built upon BGTD, this paper proposes an end-to-end traffic-language representation framework (mmTraffic), a multimodal reasoning architecture bridging physical traffic encoding and semantic interpretation. In order to alleviate modality interference and generative hallucinations, mmTraffic adopts a jointly-optimized perception-cognition architecture. By incorporating a perception-centered traffic encoder and a cognition-centered LLM generator, mmTraffic achieves refined traffic interpretation with guaranteed category prediction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that mmTraffic autonomously generates high-fidelity, human-readable, and evidence-grounded traffic interpretation reports, while maintaining highly competitive classification accuracy comparing to specialized unimodal model (e.g., NetMamba). The source code is available at https://github.com/lgzhangzlg/Multimodal-Reasoning-with-LLM-for-Encrypted-Traffic-Interpretation-A-Benchmark

analysis.tldr: 提出首个加密流量多模态推理基准BGTD和端到端框架mmTraffic，实现可解释的流量分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有加密流量分析方法仅依赖单模态序列模式，缺乏多维语义捕获和可审计推理过程，且数据集缺乏丰富语义标注。
analysis.problem: 如何构建多模态推理框架，实现加密流量的可解释、证据驱动的语义解读。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法黑箱性质仅输出类别标签，无法生成人类可读的证据报告；数据集设计仅面向分类，缺乏语义标注。
analysis.method: 提出BGTD基准（结合原始字节和结构化专家标注）和mmTraffic框架（感知-认知联合优化架构，包含流量编码器和LLM生成器）。
contributions: 首次提出字节级加密流量描述基准BGTD，提供行为特征和可验证证据链。
提出端到端多模态推理框架mmTraffic，缓解模态干扰和生成幻觉。
实验证明mmTraffic能生成高保真、可读、证据支持的流量解读报告，同时保持高分类精度。
