analysis.experiments: 在BGTD基准上进行实验，mmTraffic生成高质量解读报告，分类精度与专用单模态模型（如NetMamba）相当。
limitations: 可能依赖特定专家标注质量。
泛化到其他加密协议或未知攻击类型的能力未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个加密流量多模态推理基准BGTD和端到端框架mmTraffic，实现可解释的流量分析。

papers.title: Bag of Bags: Adaptive Visual Vocabularies for Genizah Join Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: A join is a set of manuscript fragments identified as originally emanating from the same manuscript. We study manuscript join retrieval: Given a query image of a fragment, retrieve other fragments originating from the same physical manuscript. We propose Bag of Bags (BoB), an image-level representation that replaces the global-level visual codebook of classical Bag of Words (BoW) with a fragment-specific vocabulary of local visual words. Our pipeline trains a sparse convolutional autoencoder on binarized fragment patches, encodes connected components from each page, clusters the resulting embeddings with per-image k-means, and compares images using set-to-set distances between their local vocabularies. Evaluated on fragments from the Cairo Genizah, the best BoB variant (viz. Chamfer) achieves Hit@1 of 0.78 and MRR of 0.84, compared to 0.74 and 0.80, respectively, for the strongest BoW baseline (BoW-RawPatches-$χ^2$), a 6.1% relative improvement in top-1 accuracy. We furthermore study a mass-weighted BoB-OT variant that incorporates cluster population into prototype matching and present a formal approximation guarantee bounding its deviation from full component-level optimal transport. A two-stage pipeline using a BoW shortlist followed by BoB-OT reranking provides a practical compromise between retrieval strength and computational cost, supporting applicability to larger manuscript collections. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/TAU-CH/midrash_bob.

analysis.tldr: 提出Bag of Bags (BoB)方法，用片段级视觉词汇替代全局码本，提升手稿碎片检索准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 手稿碎片检索中，传统Bag of Words方法使用全局视觉码本，难以捕捉不同碎片间的局部特征差异，导致检索精度不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种图像级表示，能够更准确地匹配来自同一原始手稿的不同碎片图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Bag of Bags (BoB)表示：对二值化碎片块训练稀疏卷积自编码器，编码每页的连通组件，通过每图像k-means聚类得到局部视觉词汇，然后使用集合间距离（如Chamfer距离）比较图像。
contributions: 提出BoB图像级表示，用片段级词汇替代全局码本，提升检索性能。
引入质量加权BoB-OT变体，结合簇人口进行原型匹配，并提供近似保证。
设计两阶段流水线（BoW初筛+BoB-OT重排），平衡检索强度与计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在Cairo Genizah碎片数据集上评估，最佳BoB变体（Chamfer）Hit@1为0.78，MRR为0.84，优于最强BoW基线（0.74和0.80），top-1准确率相对提升6.1%。
limitations: 方法依赖二值化预处理，可能丢失颜色或纹理信息。
每图像k-means聚类计算开销较大，大规模应用需两阶段流水线。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Bag of Bags (BoB)方法，用片段级视觉词汇替代全局码本，提升手稿碎片检索准确率。

papers.title: Alloc-MoE: Budget-Aware Expert Activation Allocation for Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Inference
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) has become a dominant architecture for scaling large language models due to their sparse activation mechanism. However, the substantial number of expert activations creates a critical latency bottleneck during inference, especially in resource-constrained deployment scenarios. Existing approaches that reduce expert activations potentially lead to severe model performance degradation. In this work, we introduce the concept of \emph{activation budget} as a constraint on the number of expert activations and propose Alloc-MoE, a unified framework that optimizes budget allocation coordinately at both the layer and token levels to minimize performance degradation. At the layer level, we introduce Alloc-L, which leverages sensitivity profiling and dynamic programming to determine the optimal allocation of expert activations across layers. At the token level, we propose Alloc-T, which dynamically redistributes activations based on routing scores, optimizing budget allocation without increasing latency. Extensive experiments across multiple MoE models demonstrate that Alloc-MoE maintains model performance under a constrained activation budget. Especially, Alloc-MoE achieves $1.15\times$ prefill and $1.34\times$ decode speedups on DeepSeek-V2-Lite at half of the original budget.

analysis.tldr: Alloc-MoE通过层和令牌两级的预算感知专家激活分配，在减少激活预算的同时保持模型性能，实现高效MoE推理。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE模型虽通过稀疏激活扩展规模，但大量专家激活在推理时造成延迟瓶颈，尤其在资源受限场景下，现有减少激活的方法会导致性能严重下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在约束专家激活预算的条件下，最小化模型性能退化，实现高效的MoE推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Alloc-MoE框架，包含层级的Alloc-L（利用敏感性分析和动态规划优化各层专家激活分配）和令牌级的Alloc-T（基于路由分数动态重新分配激活，不增加延迟）。
contributions: 提出激活预算概念，并设计统一框架Alloc-MoE协调优化层和令牌两级的预算分配。
在多个MoE模型上验证，在约束预算下保持性能，并在DeepSeek-V2-Lite上实现1.15倍预填充和1.34倍解码加速。
analysis.experiments: 在多个MoE模型上进行实验，包括DeepSeek-V2-Lite，在原始预算一半的情况下取得加速。
limitations: 可能依赖敏感性分析的准确性，对动态场景适应性需进一步验证。
未讨论在极端低预算下的性能边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Alloc-MoE通过层和令牌两级的预算感知专家激活分配，在减少激活预算的同时保持模型性能，实现高效MoE推理。

papers.title: PolySLGen: Online Multimodal Speaking-Listening Reaction Generation in Polyadic Interaction
papers.abstract: Human-like multimodal reaction generation is essential for natural group interactions between humans and embodied AI. However, existing approaches are limited to single-modality or speaking-only responses in dyadic interactions, making them unsuitable for realistic social scenarios. Many also overlook nonverbal cues and complex dynamics of polyadic interactions, both critical for engagement and conversational coherence. In this work, we present PolySLGen, an online framework for Polyadic multimodal Speaking and Listening reaction Generation. Given past conversation and motion from all participants, PolySLGen generates a future speaking or listening reaction for a target participant, including speech, body motion, and speaking state score. To model group interactions effectively, we propose a pose fusion module and a social cue encoder that jointly aggregate motion and social signals from the group. Extensive experiments, along with quantitative and qualitative evaluations, show that PolySLGen produces contextually appropriate and temporally coherent multi-modal reactions, outperforming several adapted and state-of-the-art baselines in motion quality, motion-speech alignment, speaking state prediction, and human-perceived realism.

analysis.tldr: 提出PolySLGen框架，在线生成多模态说/听反应，优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法局限于双人交互中的单模态或仅说话反应，忽略非语言线索和多人动态，不适合真实社交场景。
analysis.problem: 在多人交互中在线生成目标参与者的多模态说话或倾听反应（包括语音、身体动作和说话状态分数）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PolySLGen框架，包含姿态融合模块和社交线索编码器，联合聚合群体动作和社交信号，生成多模态反应。
contributions: 提出首个在线多人多模态说/听反应生成框架PolySLGen。
设计姿态融合模块和社交线索编码器以建模群体交互。
analysis.experiments: 在多人交互数据集上进行定量和定性评估，在运动质量、运动-语音对齐、说话状态预测和人类感知真实感方面优于多个基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定传感器设置。
未提及对长时交互的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PolySLGen框架，在线生成多模态说/听反应，优于基线。

papers.title: Beyond Stochastic Exploration: What Makes Training Data Valuable for Agentic Search
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become an effective approach for advancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) through the strategic integration of external search engines. However, current RL-based search agents often rely on a process of stochastic exploration guided by carefully crafted outcome rewards, leading to inefficient reasoning trajectories and unstable training. To address these issues, we propose a novel framework, Hierarchical Experience (HiExp), to enhance the performance and training stability of search agents. Specifically, we extract empirical knowledge through contrastive analysis and a multi-level clustering mechanism, transforming raw reasoning trajectories into hierarchical experience knowledge. By leveraging experience-aligned training, we effectively regularize stochastic exploration, evolving it into a strategic and experience-driven search process. Extensive evaluations on multiple complex agentic search and mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that our approach not only achieves substantial performance gains but also exhibits strong cross-task and cross-algorithm generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层经验框架HiExp，通过对比分析和多级聚类将推理轨迹转化为经验知识，引导智能体搜索过程，提升训练稳定性和性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前基于强化学习的搜索智能体依赖随机探索和精心设计的结果奖励，导致推理轨迹低效、训练不稳定，亟需更有效的训练数据利用方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从原始推理轨迹中提取有价值的经验知识，以正则化随机探索，实现稳定高效的智能体搜索训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分层经验框架HiExp，通过对比分析和多级聚类机制从推理轨迹中提取分层经验知识，并利用经验对齐训练来正则化随机探索，将其转变为策略性、经验驱动的搜索过程。
contributions: 提出HiExp框架，通过对比分析和多级聚类提取分层经验知识，有效提升搜索智能体的训练稳定性。
在多个复杂智能体搜索和数学推理基准上取得显著性能提升，并展现出跨任务和跨算法的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个复杂智能体搜索和数学推理基准上进行评估，结果表明方法不仅取得显著性能提升，还具备跨任务和跨算法的泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务的经验聚类质量，对噪声轨迹敏感。
跨算法泛化性可能受限于经验知识的表示方式。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层经验框架HiExp，通过对比分析和多级聚类将推理轨迹转化为经验知识，引导智能体搜索过程，提升训练稳定性和性能。

papers.title: LegoDiffusion: Micro-Serving Text-to-Image Diffusion Workflows
papers.abstract: Text-to-image generation executes a diffusion workflow comprising multiple models centered on a base diffusion model. Existing serving systems treat each workflow as an opaque monolith, provisioning, placing, and scaling all constituent models together, which obscures internal dataflow, prevents model sharing, and enforces coarse-grained resource management. In this paper, we make a case for micro-serving diffusion workflows with LegoDiffusion, a system that decomposes a workflow into loosely coupled model-execution nodes that can be independently managed and scheduled. By explicitly managing individual model inference, LegoDiffusion unlocks cluster-scale optimizations, including per-model scaling, model sharing, and adaptive model parallelism. Collectively, LegoDiffusion outperforms existing diffusion workflow serving systems, sustaining up to 3x higher request rates and tolerating up to 8x higher burst traffic.

analysis.tldr: LegoDiffusion 将文本到图像扩散工作流拆分为独立管理的微服务节点，实现更高吞吐和突发流量容忍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散工作流服务系统将整个流程视为不透明整体，导致资源管理粗粒度、模型无法共享、内部数据流不透明，限制了集群级优化。
analysis.problem: 如何将扩散工作流分解为可独立管理和调度的微服务节点，以提升服务系统的吞吐和弹性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LegoDiffusion 将扩散工作流拆分为松散耦合的模型执行节点，每个节点可独立管理、调度，并支持按模型缩放、模型共享和自适应模型并行。
contributions: 提出微服务化扩散工作流架构，将整体流程分解为独立节点。
实现集群级优化，包括按模型缩放、模型共享和自适应模型并行。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到相比现有系统，LegoDiffusion 可维持高达 3 倍的请求速率并容忍高达 8 倍的突发流量，但未提供具体实验设置。
limitations: 可能增加系统复杂度和节点间通信开销。
未讨论对生成质量的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LegoDiffusion 将文本到图像扩散工作流拆分为独立管理的微服务节点，实现更高吞吐和突发流量容忍。

papers.title: Uni-ViGU: Towards Unified Video Generation and Understanding via A Diffusion-Based Video Generator
papers.abstract: Unified multimodal models integrating visual understanding and generation face a fundamental challenge: visual generation incurs substantially higher computational costs than understanding, particularly for video. This imbalance motivates us to invert the conventional paradigm: rather than extending understanding-centric MLLMs to support generation, we propose Uni-ViGU, a framework that unifies video generation and understanding by extending a video generator as the foundation. We introduce a unified flow method that performs continuous flow matching for video and discrete flow matching for text within a single process, enabling coherent multimodal generation. We further propose a modality-driven MoE-based framework that augments Transformer blocks with lightweight layers for text generation while preserving generative priors. To repurpose generation knowledge for understanding, we design a bidirectional training mechanism with two stages: Knowledge Recall reconstructs input prompts to leverage learned text-video correspondences, while Capability Refinement fine-tunes on detailed captions to establish discriminative shared representations. Experiments demonstrate that Uni-ViGU achieves competitive performance on both video generation and understanding, validating generation-centric architectures as a scalable path toward unified multimodal intelligence. Project Page and Code: https://fr0zencrane.github.io/uni-vigu-page/.

analysis.tldr: 提出以视频生成器为核心统一视频生成与理解的框架Uni-ViGU，通过统一流方法、MoE架构和双向训练机制实现竞争性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型以理解为中心扩展生成，但视频生成计算成本远高于理解，导致效率瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何以视频生成器为基础，高效统一视频生成与理解任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Uni-ViGU框架：1）统一流方法，在单一过程中对视频进行连续流匹配、对文本进行离散流匹配；2）基于模态驱动的MoE架构，在Transformer块中增加轻量文本生成层并保留生成先验；3）双向训练机制，包括知识召回（重构输入提示以利用文本-视频对应）和能力精炼（在详细描述上微调以建立判别性共享表征）。
contributions: 提出以视频生成器为核心统一视频生成与理解的新范式，逆转传统理解中心架构。
设计统一流方法和模态驱动MoE框架，实现高效多模态生成。
提出双向训练机制，将生成知识迁移到理解任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模视频生成预训练，计算资源需求高。
统一流方法在复杂多模态场景下的扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出以视频生成器为核心统一视频生成与理解的框架Uni-ViGU，通过统一流方法、MoE架构和双向训练机制实现竞争性能。

papers.title: Small Vision-Language Models are Smart Compressors for Long Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Adapting Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for hour-long videos is bottlenecked by context limits. Dense visual streams saturate token budgets and exacerbate the lost-in-the-middle phenomenon. Existing heuristics, like sparse sampling or uniform pooling, blindly sacrifice fidelity by discarding decisive moments and wasting bandwidth on irrelevant backgrounds. We propose Tempo, an efficient query-aware framework compressing long videos for downstream understanding. Tempo leverages a Small Vision-Language Model (SVLM) as a local temporal compressor, casting token reduction as an early cross-modal distillation process to generate compact, intent-aligned representations in a single forward pass. To enforce strict budgets without breaking causality, we introduce Adaptive Token Allocation (ATA). Exploiting the SVLM's zero-shot relevance prior and semantic front-loading, ATA acts as a training-free $O(1)$ dynamic router. It allocates dense bandwidth to query-critical segments while compressing redundancies into minimal temporal anchors to maintain the global storyline. Extensive experiments show our 6B architecture achieves state-of-the-art performance with aggressive dynamic compression (0.5-16 tokens/frame). On the extreme-long LVBench (4101s), Tempo scores 52.3 under a strict 8K visual budget, outperforming GPT-4o and Gemini 1.5 Pro. Scaling to 2048 frames reaches 53.7. Crucially, Tempo compresses hour-long videos substantially below theoretical limits, proving true long-form video understanding relies on intent-driven efficiency rather than greedily padded context windows.

analysis.tldr: 提出Tempo框架，用小视觉语言模型作为智能压缩器，实现高效长视频理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM处理长视频受限于上下文窗口，密集视觉流导致token饱和和中间丢失现象，启发式采样或均匀池化盲目牺牲保真度。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加上下文窗口的情况下，高效压缩长视频并保留关键信息以支持下游理解任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Tempo框架：使用小视觉语言模型作为局部时间压缩器，通过早期跨模态蒸馏生成紧凑、意图对齐的表示；引入自适应token分配（ATA），利用SVLM的零样本相关性先验和语义前置，实现无训练动态路由。
contributions: 提出Tempo框架，用小视觉语言模型实现查询感知的长视频压缩。
引入自适应token分配（ATA），在保持因果性的同时实现动态预算分配。
在LVBench等基准上达到SOTA，压缩率远超理论极限。
analysis.experiments: 在LVBench（4101秒）上，8K视觉预算下得分52.3，超越GPT-4o和Gemini 1.5 Pro；扩展到2048帧得分53.7。
limitations: 可能依赖SVLM的零样本能力，对特定领域适应性未知。
压缩策略可能对高度动态场景仍有挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Tempo框架，用小视觉语言模型作为智能压缩器，实现高效长视频理解。

papers.title: Revise: A Framework for Revising OCRed text in Practical Information Systems with Data Contamination Strategy
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have significantly improved the field of Document AI, demonstrating remarkable performance on document understanding tasks such as question answering. However, existing approaches primarily focus on solving specific tasks, lacking the capability to structurally organize and manage document information. To address this limitation, we propose Revise, a framework that systematically corrects errors introduced by OCR at the character, word, and structural levels. Specifically, Revise employs a comprehensive hierarchical taxonomy of common OCR errors and a synthetic data generation strategy that realistically simulates such errors to train an effective correction model. Experimental results demonstrate that Revise effectively corrects OCR outputs, enabling more structured representation and systematic management of document contents. Consequently, our method significantly enhances downstream performance in document retrieval and question answering tasks, highlighting the potential to overcome the structural management limitations of existing Document AI frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 提出Revise框架，通过分层错误分类和合成数据生成策略系统性地修正OCR错误，提升文档检索和问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文档AI方法主要针对特定任务，缺乏对文档信息的结构化组织和管理能力，OCR错误进一步加剧了这一问题。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地修正OCR在字符、单词和结构层面的错误，以实现文档内容的结构化表示和管理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Revise框架，包含一个分层OCR错误分类法和合成数据生成策略，模拟真实OCR错误以训练修正模型。
contributions: 提出Revise框架，系统性地修正OCR错误。
设计分层OCR错误分类法和合成数据生成策略。
实验证明Revise能提升文档检索和问答任务的下游性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据与真实OCR错误的匹配度。
未提及对多语言或复杂布局文档的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Revise框架，通过分层错误分类和合成数据生成策略系统性地修正OCR错误，提升文档检索和问答性能。

papers.title: TADP-RME: A Trust-Adaptive Differential Privacy Framework for Enhancing Reliability of Data-Driven Systems
papers.abstract: Ensuring reliability in adversarial settings necessitates treating privacy as a foundational component of data-driven systems. While differential privacy and cryptographic protocols offer strong guarantees, existing schemes rely on a fixed privacy budget, leading to a rigid utility-privacy trade-off that fails under heterogeneous user trust. Moreover, noise-only differential privacy preserves geometric structure, which inference attacks exploit, causing privacy leakage. We propose TADP-RME (Trust-Adaptive Differential Privacy with Reverse Manifold Embedding), a framework that enhances reliability under varying levels of user trust. It introduces an inverse trust score in the range [0,1] to adaptively modulate the privacy budget, enabling smooth transitions between utility and privacy. Additionally, Reverse Manifold Embedding applies a nonlinear transformation to disrupt local geometric relationships while preserving formal differential privacy guarantees through post-processing. Theoretical and empirical results demonstrate improved privacy-utility trade-offs, reducing attack success rates by up to 3.1 percent without significant utility degradation. The framework consistently outperforms existing methods against inference attacks, providing a unified approach for reliable learning in adversarial environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出信任自适应差分隐私框架TADP-RME，通过逆信任分数动态调整隐私预算并引入反向流形嵌入破坏局部几何结构，在保持效用下降低推理攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有差分隐私方案使用固定隐私预算，导致在异构用户信任场景下效用-隐私权衡僵化，且纯噪声机制保留几何结构易被推理攻击利用。
analysis.problem: 如何在异构用户信任条件下实现自适应的隐私-效用权衡，并防御基于几何结构的推理攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定隐私预算无法适应不同信任水平的用户；噪声机制保留的几何结构可被推理攻击利用导致隐私泄露。
analysis.method: 提出TADP-RME框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 逆信任分数（[0,1]范围）自适应调节隐私预算；2) 反向流形嵌入通过非线性变换破坏局部几何关系，同时通过后处理保持差分隐私保证。
contributions: 提出信任自适应的隐私预算调节机制，实现平滑的效用-隐私权衡
设计反向流形嵌入方法，在不牺牲形式化隐私保证的前提下破坏局部几何结构
理论分析和实验验证表明攻击成功率降低高达3.1%且无明显效用损失
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 逆信任分数的具体定义和获取方式未在摘要中明确
非线性变换的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出信任自适应差分隐私框架TADP-RME，通过逆信任分数动态调整隐私预算并引入反向流形嵌入破坏局部几何结构，在保持效用下降低推理攻击成功率。

papers.title: Bias Redistribution in Visual Machine Unlearning: Does Forgetting One Group Harm Another?
papers.abstract: Machine unlearning enables models to selectively forget training data, driven by privacy regulations such as GDPR and CCPA. However, its fairness implications remain underexplored: when a model forgets a demographic group, does it neutralize that concept or redistribute it to correlated groups, potentially amplifying bias? We investigate this bias redistribution phenomenon on CelebA using CLIP models (ViT/B-32, ViT-L/14, ViT-B/16) under a zero-shot classification setting across intersectional groups defined by age and gender. We evaluate three unlearning methods, Prompt Erasure, Prompt Reweighting, and Refusal Vector using per-group accuracy shifts, demographic parity gaps, and a redistribution score. Our results show that unlearning does not eliminate bias but redistributes it primarily along gender rather than age boundaries. In particular, removing the dominant Young Female group consistently transfers performance to Old Female across all model scales, revealing a gender-dominant structure in CLIP's embedding space. While the Refusal Vector method reduces redistribution, it fails to achieve complete forgetting and significantly degrades retained performance. These findings highlight a fundamental limitation of current unlearning methods: without accounting for embedding geometry, they risk amplifying bias in retained groups.

analysis.tldr: 机器遗忘并未消除偏见，而是将其重新分配到相关群体，尤其在性别维度上。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐私法规推动机器遗忘研究，但其公平性影响尚不明确：遗忘一个群体是否会将偏见转移到其他群体，从而加剧不公平。
analysis.problem: 研究机器遗忘中的偏见再分配现象，即遗忘一个群体后，模型是否将偏见转移到相关群体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遗忘并未消除偏见，而是主要沿性别边界重新分配；移除年轻女性群体后，性能转移至老年女性，揭示了CLIP嵌入空间中的性别主导结构。
analysis.method: 在CelebA数据集上使用CLIP模型，通过三种遗忘方法（Prompt Erasure、Prompt Reweighting、Refusal Vector）进行零样本分类，并计算每群体准确率变化、人口统计平等差距和再分配分数。
contributions: 首次系统研究视觉机器遗忘中的偏见再分配现象。
发现遗忘主要沿性别边界重新分配偏见，而非年龄。
揭示Refusal Vector方法虽减少再分配但无法完全遗忘且损害保留性能。
analysis.experiments: 在CelebA上使用CLIP模型（ViT-B/32, ViT-L/14, ViT-B/16）进行零样本分类，评估三种遗忘方法，并报告了群体准确率变化、人口统计平等差距和再分配分数。
limitations: 仅使用CelebA数据集，可能不适用于其他领域。
仅评估三种遗忘方法，未涵盖所有方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 机器遗忘并未消除偏见，而是将其重新分配到相关群体，尤其在性别维度上。

papers.title: OV-Stitcher: A Global Context-Aware Framework for Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation(TF-OVSS) has recently attracted attention for its ability to perform dense prediction by leveraging the pretrained knowledge of large vision and vision-language models, without requiring additional training. However, due to the limited input resolution of these pretrained encoders, existing TF-OVSS methods commonly adopt a sliding-window strategy that processes cropped sub-images independently. While effective for managing high-resolution inputs, this approach prevents global attention over the full image, leading to fragmented feature representations and limited contextual reasoning. We propose OV-Stitcher, a training-free framework that addresses this limitation by stitching fragmented sub-image features directly within the final encoder block. By reconstructing attention representations from fragmented sub-image features, OV-Stitcher enables global attention within the final encoder block, producing coherent context aggregation and spatially consistent, semantically aligned segmentation maps. Extensive evaluations across eight benchmarks demonstrate that OV-Stitcher establishes a scalable and effective solution for open-vocabulary segmentation, achieving a notable improvement in mean Intersection over Union(mIoU) from 48.7 to 50.7 compared with prior training-free baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出OV-Stitcher，通过拼接子图像特征实现全局注意力，无需训练即可提升开放词汇语义分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无训练开放词汇语义分割方法因编码器输入分辨率限制，采用滑动窗口策略导致特征碎片化和上下文推理受限，亟需一种无需额外训练即可实现全局上下文感知的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练的前提下，解决滑动窗口策略导致的特征碎片化和全局注意力缺失问题，提升开放词汇语义分割的上下文一致性和语义对齐性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 滑动窗口策略独立处理裁剪子图像，阻止了全图全局注意力，导致特征表示碎片化、上下文推理有限。
analysis.method: OV-Stitcher在最终编码器块内直接拼接碎片化的子图像特征，通过重建注意力表示实现全局注意力，从而产生连贯的上下文聚合和空间一致、语义对齐的分割图。
contributions: 提出OV-Stitcher，一种无需训练即可实现全局上下文感知的开放词汇语义分割框架。
通过拼接子图像特征并在最终编码器块中重建注意力表示，有效解决了滑动窗口策略的特征碎片化问题。
在八个基准上取得显著提升，mIoU从48.7提高到50.7。
analysis.experiments: 在八个基准上评估，与先前无训练基线相比，mIoU从48.7提升至50.7。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练编码器的质量，对极端高分辨率或复杂场景的泛化能力有待验证。
仅针对最终编码器块进行拼接，未探索其他层或更细粒度的特征融合策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OV-Stitcher，通过拼接子图像特征实现全局注意力，无需训练即可提升开放词汇语义分割性能。

papers.title: Data-Driven Automated Identification of Optimal Feature-Representative Images in Infrared Thermography Using Statistical and Morphological Metrics
papers.abstract: Infrared thermography (IRT) is a widely used non-destructive testing technique for detecting structural features such as subsurface defects. However, most IRT post-processing methods generate image sequences in which defect visibility varies strongly across time, frequency, or coefficient/index domains, making the identification of defect-representative images a critical challenge. Conventional evaluation metrics, such as the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) or the Tanimoto criterion, often require prior knowledge of defect locations or defect-free reference regions, limiting their suitability for automated and unsupervised analysis. In this work, a data-driven methodology is proposed to identify images within IRT datasets that are most likely to contain and represent structural features, particularly anomalies and defects, without requiring prior spatial information. The approach is based on three complementary metrics: the Homogeneity Index of Mixture (HI), which quantifies statistical heterogeneity via deviations of local intensity distributions from a global reference distribution; a Representative Elementary Area (REA), derived from a Minkowski-functional adaptation of the Representative Elementary Volume concept to two-dimensional images; and a geometrical-topological Total Variation Energy (TVE) index, also based on two-dimensional Minkowski functionals, designed to improve sensitivity to localized anomalies. The framework is validated experimentally using pulse-heated IRT data from a carbon fiber-reinforced polymer (CFRP) plate containing six artificial defects at depths between 0.135 mm and 0.810 mm, and is further supported by one-dimensional N-layer thermal model simulations. The results demonstrate robust and unbiased ranking of image sequences and provide a reliable basis for automated defect-oriented image selection in IRT.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动的红外热成像缺陷代表图像自动识别方法，无需先验空间信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外热成像中缺陷可见性随时间/频率变化，传统指标需缺陷位置或参考区域先验知识，不适合自动化分析。
analysis.problem: 如何自动识别红外热成像数据集中最能代表结构缺陷的图像，而不依赖先验空间信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于三个互补指标：混合均匀性指数(HI)、代表性基本面积(REA)和总变分能量(TVE)指数，均无需先验缺陷位置。
contributions: 提出无需先验空间信息的自动缺陷代表图像识别框架
引入基于Minkowski泛函的REA和TVE指标用于二维图像分析
analysis.experiments: 使用脉冲加热红外热成像数据对含6个人工缺陷的CFRP板进行实验验证，并辅以一维N层热模型仿真。
limitations: 仅验证了CFRP材料，泛化性未知
未与其他自动化方法对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种数据驱动的红外热成像缺陷代表图像自动识别方法，无需先验空间信息。

papers.title: EPIR: An Efficient Patch Tokenization, Integration and Representation Framework for Micro-expression Recognition
papers.abstract: Micro-expression recognition can obtain the real emotion of the individual at the current moment. Although deep learning-based methods, especially Transformer-based methods, have achieved impressive results, these methods have high computational complexity due to the large number of tokens in the multi-head self-attention. In addition, the existing micro-expression datasets are small-scale, which makes it difficult for Transformer-based models to learn effective micro-expression representations. Therefore, we propose a novel Efficient Patch tokenization, Integration and Representation framework (EPIR), which can balance high recognition performance and low computational complexity. Specifically, we first propose a dual norm shifted tokenization (DNSPT) module to learn the spatial relationship between neighboring pixels in the face region, which is implemented by a refined spatial transformation and dual norm projection. Then, we propose a token integration module to integrate partial tokens among multiple cascaded Transformer blocks, thereby reducing the number of tokens without information loss. Furthermore, we design a discriminative token extractor, which first improves the attention in the Transformer block to reduce the unnecessary focus of the attention calculation on self-tokens, and uses the dynamic token selection module (DTSM) to select key tokens, thereby capturing more discriminative micro-expression representations. We conduct extensive experiments on four popular public datasets (i.e., CASME II, SAMM, SMIC, and CAS(ME)3. The experimental results show that our method achieves significant performance gains over the state-of-the-art methods, such as 9.6% improvement on the CAS(ME)$^3$ dataset in terms of UF1 and 4.58% improvement on the SMIC dataset in terms of UAR metric.

analysis.tldr: 提出EPIR框架，通过高效补丁分词、集成和表示，在微表情识别中平衡高性能与低计算复杂度。
analysis.research_motivation: 微表情识别能获取真实情绪，但现有基于Transformer的方法因大量token导致高计算复杂度，且小规模数据集难以学习有效表示。
analysis.problem: 如何降低Transformer在微表情识别中的计算复杂度，同时在小数据集上学习判别性表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EPIR框架，包含双范数移位分词模块学习空间关系、token集成模块减少token数量、判别性token提取器（改进注意力机制和动态token选择模块）捕获关键token。
contributions: 提出DNSPT模块学习面部区域相邻像素的空间关系
设计token集成模块在级联Transformer块中无损减少token数量
提出判别性token提取器，通过改进注意力和动态选择模块捕获关键微表情表示
analysis.experiments: 在CASME II、SAMM、SMIC和CAS(ME)3四个数据集上实验，相比SOTA在CAS(ME)3上UF1提升9.6%，在SMIC上UAR提升4.58%。
limitations: 可能仅在微表情小数据集上验证，泛化性未知
动态token选择模块的额外开销未详细分析
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EPIR框架，通过高效补丁分词、集成和表示，在微表情识别中平衡高性能与低计算复杂度。

papers.title: Coordinate-Based Dual-Constrained Autoregressive Motion Generation
papers.abstract: Text-to-motion generation has attracted increasing attention in the research community recently, with potential applications in animation, virtual reality, robotics, and human-computer interaction. Diffusion and autoregressive models are two popular and parallel research directions for text-to-motion generation. However, diffusion models often suffer from error amplification during noise prediction, while autoregressive models exhibit mode collapse due to motion discretization. To address these limitations, we propose a flexible, high-fidelity, and semantically faithful text-to-motion framework, named Coordinate-based Dual-constrained Autoregressive Motion Generation (CDAMD). With motion coordinates as input, CDAMD follows the autoregressive paradigm and leverages diffusion-inspired multi-layer perceptrons to enhance the fidelity of predicted motions. Furthermore, a Dual-Constrained Causal Mask is introduced to guide autoregressive generation, where motion tokens act as priors and are concatenated with textual encodings. Since there is limited work on coordinate-based motion synthesis, we establish new benchmarks for both text-to-motion generation and motion editing. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of both fidelity and semantic consistency on these benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出坐标自回归+扩散MLP+双约束因果掩码的文本到动作生成框架，在保真度和语义一致性上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到动作生成在动画、VR、机器人等领域有重要应用，但扩散模型存在噪声预测误差放大，自回归模型因动作离散化导致模式崩溃，现有方法难以兼顾保真度和语义一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何结合自回归和扩散模型的优势，实现高保真、语义一致的文本到动作生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型在噪声预测中误差累积，自回归模型因离散化导致模式崩溃。
analysis.method: 以动作坐标作为输入，采用自回归范式，结合扩散启发的多层感知机（MLP）增强预测动作保真度；引入双约束因果掩码，将动作token作为先验与文本编码拼接，引导自回归生成。
contributions: 提出CDAMD框架，融合自回归与扩散思想，实现高保真、语义一致的文本到动作生成。
引入双约束因果掩码，利用动作token先验与文本编码联合引导生成。
为基于坐标的动作合成建立新基准，涵盖文本到动作生成和动作编辑任务。
analysis.experiments: 在新建立的基准上，CDAMD在保真度和语义一致性方面达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖坐标表示的精度，对噪声敏感。
双约束因果掩码增加了模型复杂度，训练和推理效率可能受影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出坐标自回归+扩散MLP+双约束因果掩码的文本到动作生成框架，在保真度和语义一致性上达到SOTA。

papers.title: DiffVC: A Non-autoregressive Framework Based on Diffusion Model for Video Captioning
papers.abstract: Current video captioning methods usually use an encoder-decoder structure to generate text autoregressively. However, autoregressive methods have inherent limitations such as slow generation speed and large cumulative error. Furthermore, the few non-autoregressive counterparts suffer from deficiencies in generation quality due to the lack of sufficient multimodal interaction modeling. Therefore, we propose a non-autoregressive framework based on Diffusion model for Video Captioning (DiffVC) to address these issues. Its parallel decoding can effectively solve the problems of generation speed and cumulative error. At the same time, our proposed discriminative conditional Diffusion Model can generate higher-quality textual descriptions. Specifically, we first encode the video into a visual representation. During training, Gaussian noise is added to the textual representation of the ground-truth caption. Then, a new textual representation is generated via the discriminative denoiser with the visual representation as a conditional constraint. Finally, we input the new textual representation into a non-autoregressive language model to generate captions. During inference, we directly sample noise from the Gaussian distribution for generation. Experiments on MSVD, MSR-VTT, and VATEX show that our method can outperform previous non-autoregressive methods and achieve comparable performance to autoregressive methods, e.g., it achieved a maximum improvement of 9.9 on the CIDEr and improvement of 2.6 on the B@4, while having faster generation speed. The source code will be available soon.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于扩散模型的非自回归视频描述框架DiffVC，实现并行解码并提升生成质量与速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频描述方法多采用自回归编码器-解码器结构，存在生成速度慢和累积误差大的问题；而少数非自回归方法因缺乏多模态交互建模，生成质量不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计非自回归视频描述方法，在保证生成质量的同时提升生成速度并减少累积误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自回归方法生成速度慢且累积误差大；非自回归方法因多模态交互不足导致生成质量缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出DiffVC框架：先编码视频为视觉表示，训练时对真实描述文本表示加噪，然后以视觉表示为条件通过判别式去噪器生成新文本表示，最后输入非自回归语言模型生成描述；推理时直接从高斯分布采样噪声生成。
contributions: 提出基于扩散模型的非自回归视频描述框架，实现并行解码，解决生成速度和累积误差问题。
设计判别式条件扩散模型，以视觉表示为条件约束，提升生成文本质量。
analysis.experiments: 在MSVD、MSR-VTT和VATEX数据集上，方法优于以往非自回归方法，与自回归方法性能相当，例如CIDEr最高提升9.9，B@4提升2.6，且生成速度更快。
limitations: 可能对长视频或复杂场景的描述能力有限。
扩散模型推理速度可能受采样步数影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于扩散模型的非自回归视频描述框架DiffVC，实现并行解码并提升生成质量与速度。

papers.title: AdaSpark: Adaptive Sparsity for Efficient Long-Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Processing long-form videos with Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) is computationally prohibitive. Current efficiency methods often compromise fine-grained perception through irreversible information disposal or inhibit long-range temporal modeling via rigid, predefined sparse patterns. This paper introduces AdaSpark, an adaptive sparsity framework designed to address these limitations. AdaSpark first partitions video inputs into 3D spatio-temporal cubes. It then employs two co-designed, context-aware components: (1) Adaptive Cube-Selective Attention (AdaS-Attn), which adaptively selects a subset of relevant video cubes to attend for each query token, and (2) Adaptive Token-Selective FFN (AdaS-FFN), which selectively processes only the most salient tokens within each cube. An entropy-based (Top-p) selection mechanism adaptively allocates computational resources based on input complexity. Experiments demonstrate that AdaSpark significantly reduces computational load by up to 57% FLOPs while maintaining comparable performance to dense models and preserving fine-grained, long-range dependencies, as validated on challenging hour-scale video benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: AdaSpark通过自适应稀疏框架，在长视频理解中大幅降低计算量并保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频处理计算成本极高，现有效率方法要么通过不可逆信息丢弃损害细粒度感知，要么通过固定稀疏模式限制长程时序建模。
analysis.problem: 如何在长视频理解中同时实现高效计算、细粒度感知和长程时序建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将视频划分为3D时空立方体，使用自适应立方体选择注意力（AdaS-Attn）和自适应令牌选择FFN（AdaS-FFN），基于熵的Top-p机制动态分配计算资源。
contributions: 提出自适应稀疏框架AdaSpark，实现高效长视频理解。
设计AdaS-Attn和AdaS-FFN两个上下文感知组件，分别用于选择性注意力和令牌处理。
analysis.experiments: 在小时级视频基准上验证，AdaSpark减少高达57% FLOPs，同时保持与密集模型相当的性能。
limitations: 可能对极长视频或高动态场景的适应性需进一步验证。
熵选择机制可能引入额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdaSpark通过自适应稀疏框架，在长视频理解中大幅降低计算量并保持性能。

papers.title: DinoRADE: Full Spectral Radar-Camera Fusion with Vision Foundation Model Features for Multi-class Object Detection in Adverse Weather
papers.abstract: Reliable and weather-robust perception systems are essential for safe autonomous driving and typically employ multi-modal sensor configurations to achieve comprehensive environmental awareness. While recent automotive FMCW Radar-based approaches achieved remarkable performance on detection tasks in adverse weather conditions, they exhibited limitations in resolving fine-grained spatial details particularly critical for detecting smaller and vulnerable road users (VRUs). Furthermore, existing research has not adequately addressed VRU detection in adverse weather datasets such as K-Radar. We present DinoRADE, a Radar-centered detection pipeline that processes dense Radar tensors and aggregates vision features around transformed reference points in the camera perspective via deformable cross-attention. Vision features are provided by a DINOv3 Vision Foundation Model. We present a comprehensive performance evaluation on the K-Radar dataset in all weather conditions and are among the first to report detection performance individually for five object classes. Additionally, we compare our method with existing single-class detection approaches and outperform recent Radar-camera approaches by 12.1%. The code is available under https://github.com/chr-is-tof/RADE-Net.

analysis.tldr: 提出DinoRADE雷达-视觉融合检测框架，利用DINOv3视觉基础模型特征提升恶劣天气下多类目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶需要可靠的感知系统，现有FMCW雷达在恶劣天气下检测性能好但缺乏细粒度空间细节，难以检测小目标（如VRU），且现有研究未充分解决VRU检测问题。
analysis.problem: 恶劣天气下多类目标（尤其是小目标和VRU）的雷达-视觉融合检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 以雷达为中心的检测流水线，处理密集雷达张量，通过可变形交叉注意力在相机视角下聚合DINOv3视觉基础模型特征。
contributions: 提出DinoRADE雷达-视觉融合检测框架，利用DINOv3视觉基础模型特征。
在K-Radar数据集上对所有天气条件进行综合评估，首次报告五个目标类别的单独检测性能。
与现有单类检测方法相比，超越最新雷达-相机方法12.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在K-Radar数据集上评估所有天气条件，报告五个目标类别的单独检测性能，与现有单类检测方法比较并超越12.1%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定雷达和相机配置，泛化性需验证。
未提及计算开销和实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DinoRADE雷达-视觉融合检测框架，利用DINOv3视觉基础模型特征提升恶劣天气下多类目标检测性能。

papers.title: PRISM-CTG: A Foundation Model for Cardiotocography Analysis with Multi-View SSL
papers.abstract: Supervised deep learning models for automated CTG analysis are typically constrained by narrowly curated labelled datasets and limited patient cohorts, leaving substantial volumes of physiologically informative clinical recordings untapped. To address this limitation, we propose Physiology-aware Representation Learning via Integrated Self-supervision and Metadata for CTG (PRISM-CTG), a clinically grounded self-supervised foundation model (FM) for CTG that leverages large-scale unlabelled recordings to learn transferable domain-level representations. PRISM-CTG is pretrained using a multi-view self-supervised framework that jointly optimises 3 complementary pretext objectives: random-projected guided masked signal reconstruction, clinical variable prediction, and feature classification. Each objective is associated with a dedicated task-specific token, enabling specialised representation learning, while controlled cross-attention facilitates information exchange across clinical context. By reframing patient metadata and domain knowledge, which are often underutilised in conventional training as prediction targets, Prism-CTG transforms readily available clinical information into additional supervisory targets that guide clinically meaningful representation learning. Extensive experiments across 7 downstream CTG tasks in both antepartum and intrapartum domains demonstrated that PRISM-CTG consistently outperforms in-domain and SSL baselines. Notably, PRISM-CTG demonstrated strong generalisation under external validation on 2 datasets, while achieving comparable performance to studies trained on substantially larger, privately labelled datasets. To our knowledge, this is the first study to introduce large-scale FM for CTG that learns domain-level representations.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个用于CTG分析的大规模自监督基础模型PRISM-CTG，通过多视图自监督学习利用未标注数据学习域级表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有监督深度学习模型受限于小规模标注数据集和有限患者队列，大量有生理信息的临床记录未被利用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大规模未标注CTG数据学习可迁移的域级表示，提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多视图自监督框架，联合优化三个互补预文本目标：随机投影引导的掩码信号重建、临床变量预测和特征分类，每个目标有专用token，通过交叉注意力交换信息。
contributions: 首个用于CTG的大规模自监督基础模型，学习域级表示。
提出多视图自监督框架，利用未标注数据和元数据作为监督信号。
analysis.experiments: 在7个CTG下游任务（产前和产时）上评估，外部验证2个数据集，性能优于域内和自监督基线，与使用更大私有标注数据集的方法相当。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床元数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论模型计算开销和部署可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个用于CTG分析的大规模自监督基础模型PRISM-CTG，通过多视图自监督学习利用未标注数据学习域级表示。

papers.title: Tensor-Augmented Convolutional Neural Networks: Enhancing Expressivity with Generic Tensor Kernels
papers.abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) excel at extracting local features hierarchically, but their performance in capturing complex correlations hinges heavily on deep architectures, which are usually computationally demanding and difficult to interpret. To address these issues, we propose a physically-guided shallow model: tensor-augmented CNN (TACNN), which replaces conventional convolution kernels with generic tensors to enhance representational capacity. This choice is motivated by the fact that an order-$N$ tensor naturally encodes an arbitrary quantum superposition state in the Hilbert space of dimension $d^N$, where $d$ is the local physical dimension, thus offering substantially richer expressivity. Furthermore, in our design the convolution output of each layer becomes a multilinear form capable of capturing high-order feature correlations, thereby equipping a shallow multilayer architecture with an expressive power competitive to that of deep CNNs. On the Fashion-MNIST benchmark, TACNN demonstrates clear advantages over conventional CNNs, achieving remarkable accuracies with only a few layers. In particular, a TACNN with only two convolution layers attains a test accuracy of 93.7$\%$, surpassing or matching considerably deeper models such as VGG-16 (93.5$\%$) and GoogLeNet (93.7$\%$). These findings highlight TACNN as a promising framework that strengthens model expressivity while preserving architectural simplicity, paving the way towards more interpretable and efficient deep learning models.

analysis.tldr: 用张量核替换卷积核，浅层CNN即可达到深层CNN的精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 深层CNN计算成本高且难以解释，而浅层CNN表达能力不足，需要一种既能保持结构简单又能增强表达力的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加网络深度的情况下提升CNN的表达能力，使其能捕获高阶特征相关性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高阶张量天然编码量子叠加态，具有更丰富的表达能力；传统卷积核是低阶张量，限制了浅层网络的特征捕获能力。
analysis.method: 提出张量增强CNN（TACNN），将传统卷积核替换为通用张量，使每层卷积输出成为多线性形式，从而捕获高阶特征相关性。
contributions: 提出TACNN框架，用张量核增强浅层CNN的表达能力。
在Fashion-MNIST上验证了TACNN仅用两层即可超越或媲美VGG-16和GoogLeNet等深层模型。
analysis.experiments: 在Fashion-MNIST数据集上，TACNN（两层卷积）达到93.7%测试准确率，高于VGG-16（93.5%）且持平GoogLeNet（93.7%）。
limitations: 仅在Fashion-MNIST上验证，缺乏更大规模或更复杂数据集的结果。
张量核的计算效率与可扩展性未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用张量核替换卷积核，浅层CNN即可达到深层CNN的精度。

papers.title: AtlasOCR: Building the First Open-Source Darija OCR Model with Vision Language Models
papers.abstract: Darija, the Moroccan Arabic dialect, is rich in visual content yet lacks specialized Optical Character Recognition (OCR) tools. This paper introduces AtlasOCR, the first open-source Darija OCR model built by fine-tuning a 3B parameter Vision Language Model (VLM). We detail our comprehensive approach, from curating a unique Darija-specific dataset leveraging both synthetic generation with our OCRSmith library and carefully sourced real-world data, to implementing efficient fine-tuning strategies. We utilize QLoRA and Unsloth for parameter-efficient training of Qwen2.5-VL 3B and present comprehensive ablation studies optimizing key hyperparameters. Our evaluation on the newly curated AtlasOCRBench and the established KITAB-Bench demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, challenging larger models and highlighting AtlasOCR's robustness and generalization capabilities for both Darija and standard Arabic OCR tasks.

analysis.tldr: AtlasOCR 是首个开源达里贾方言 OCR 模型，通过微调 3B 参数视觉语言模型实现。
analysis.research_motivation: 达里贾方言（摩洛哥阿拉伯语）视觉内容丰富，但缺乏专门的 OCR 工具，现有方法无法有效处理该方言。
analysis.problem: 构建首个开源达里贾方言 OCR 模型，解决该方言文本识别工具缺失的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过微调 3B 参数视觉语言模型（Qwen2.5-VL 3B），使用 QLoRA 和 Unsloth 进行参数高效训练，并利用合成生成（OCRSmith 库）和真实数据构建达里贾专用数据集。
contributions: 首个开源达里贾方言 OCR 模型 AtlasOCR
构建了达里贾专用数据集和基准 AtlasOCRBench
analysis.experiments: 在 AtlasOCRBench 和 KITAB-Bench 上评估，达到最先进性能，挑战更大模型，并展示了鲁棒性和泛化能力。
limitations: 可能仅针对达里贾方言，对其他阿拉伯方言泛化性未知
模型规模较小（3B），可能在大规模场景下性能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AtlasOCR 是首个开源达里贾方言 OCR 模型，通过微调 3B 参数视觉语言模型实现。

papers.title: Brain3D: EEG-to-3D Decoding of Visual Representations via Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Decoding visual information from electroencephalography (EEG) has recently achieved promising results, primarily focusing on reconstructing two-dimensional (2D) images from brain activity. However, the reconstruction of three-dimensional (3D) representations remains largely unexplored. This limits the geometric understanding and reduces the applicability of neural decoding in different contexts. To address this gap, we propose Brain3D, a multimodal architecture for EEG-to-3D reconstruction based on EEG-to-image decoding. It progressively transforms neural representations into the 3D domain using geometry-aware generative reasoning. Our pipeline first produces visually grounded images from EEG signals, then employs a multimodal large language model to extract structured 3D-aware descriptions, which guide a diffusion-based generation stage whose outputs are finally converted into coherent 3D meshes via a single-image-to-3D model. By decomposing the problem into structured stages, the proposed approach avoids direct EEG-to-3D mappings and enables scalable brain-driven 3D generation. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation comparing the reconstructed 3D outputs against the original visual stimuli, assessing both semantic alignment and geometric fidelity. Experimental results demonstrate strong performance of the proposed architecture, achieving up to 85.4% 10-way Top-1 EEG decoding accuracy and 0.648 CLIPScore, supporting the feasibility of multimodal EEG-driven 3D reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出Brain3D，通过多阶段推理从EEG信号解码3D视觉表征。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EEG解码主要聚焦2D图像重建，3D重建尚未探索，限制了神经解码的几何理解与应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从EEG信号重建3D视觉表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多阶段架构：先EEG到图像解码，再用多模态大语言模型提取结构化3D描述，引导扩散模型生成，最后通过单图转3D模型得到3D网格。
contributions: 首次提出EEG到3D重建任务。
设计多阶段推理架构，避免直接EEG到3D映射。
analysis.experiments: 在EEG解码任务上评估，10-way Top-1准确率85.4%，CLIPScore 0.648。
limitations: 依赖中间图像生成质量。
可能受限于单图转3D模型的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Brain3D，通过多阶段推理从EEG信号解码3D视觉表征。

papers.title: ImplicitMemBench: Measuring Unconscious Behavioral Adaptation in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Existing memory benchmarks for LLM agents evaluate explicit recall of facts, yet overlook implicit memory where experience becomes automated behavior without conscious retrieval. This gap is critical: effective assistants must automatically apply learned procedures or avoid failed actions without explicit reminders. We introduce ImplicitMemBench, the first systematic benchmark evaluating implicit memory through three cognitively grounded constructs drawn from standard cognitive-science accounts of non-declarative memory: Procedural Memory (one-shot skill acquisition after interference), Priming (theme-driven bias via paired experimental/control instances), and Classical Conditioning (Conditioned Stimulus--Unconditioned Stimulus (CS--US) associations shaping first decisions). Our 300-item suite employs a unified Learning/Priming-Interfere-Test protocol with first-attempt scoring. Evaluation of 17 models reveals severe limitations: no model exceeds 66% overall, with top performers DeepSeek-R1 (65.3%), Qwen3-32B (64.1%), and GPT-5 (63.0%) far below human baselines. Analysis uncovers dramatic asymmetries (inhibition 17.6% vs. preference 75.0%) and universal bottlenecks requiring architectural innovations beyond parameter scaling. ImplicitMemBench reframes evaluation from "what agents recall" to "what they automatically enact".

analysis.tldr: 首个系统性评估大语言模型内隐记忆的基准，揭示模型在程序性记忆、启动效应和经典条件反射上的严重缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM记忆基准仅评估显式事实回忆，忽略了经验自动转化为行为的内隐记忆，这对构建真正自主的助手至关重要。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估LLM内隐记忆（无意识行为适应）的系统性基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 17个模型整体准确率均低于66%，存在显著不对称性（抑制17.6% vs.偏好75.0%），且参数扩展无法解决瓶颈。
analysis.method: 基于认知科学中非陈述性记忆的三个维度（程序性记忆、启动效应、经典条件反射），设计统一的学习/启动-干扰-测试协议和300项测试集。
contributions: 首次提出系统性评估LLM内隐记忆的基准ImplicitMemBench
揭示当前模型在内隐记忆上的严重缺陷和不对称性
analysis.experiments: 评估了17个模型，包括DeepSeek-R1、Qwen3-32B、GPT-5等，并与人类基线对比。
limitations: 基准规模有限（300项），可能无法覆盖所有内隐记忆现象
仅基于认知科学中的三个维度，可能遗漏其他重要形式
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个系统性评估大语言模型内隐记忆的基准，揭示模型在程序性记忆、启动效应和经典条件反射上的严重缺陷。

papers.title: EEG2Vision: A Multimodal EEG-Based Framework for 2D Visual Reconstruction in Cognitive Neuroscience
papers.abstract: Reconstructing visual stimuli from non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) remains challenging due to its low spatial resolution and high noise, particularly under realistic low-density electrode configurations. To address this, we present EEG2Vision, a modular, end-to-end EEG-to-image framework that systematically evaluates reconstruction performance across different EEG resolutions (128, 64, 32, and 24 channels) and enhances visual quality through a prompt-guided post-reconstruction boosting mechanism. Starting from EEG-conditioned diffusion reconstruction, the boosting stage uses a multimodal large language model to extract semantic descriptions and leverages image-to-image diffusion to refine geometry and perceptual coherence while preserving EEG-grounded structure. Our experiments show that semantic decoding accuracy degrades significantly with channel reduction (e.g., 50-way Top-1 Acc from 89% to 38%), while reconstruction quality slight decreases (e.g., FID from 76.77 to 80.51). The proposed boosting consistently improves perceptual metrics across all configurations, achieving up to 9.71% IS gains in low-channel settings. A user study confirms the clear perceptual preference for boosted reconstructions. The proposed approach significantly boosts the feasibility of real-time brain-2-image applications using low-resolution EEG devices, potentially unlocking this type of applications outside laboratory settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出EEG2Vision框架，通过多模态大模型引导的扩散增强，实现低分辨率EEG到图像的视觉重建，显著提升感知质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 非侵入式EEG空间分辨率低、噪声高，尤其在低密度电极配置下视觉重建困难，限制了脑-机接口在实验室外的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从低分辨率、高噪声的EEG信号中重建高质量视觉图像，并提升语义解码和感知一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通道减少导致语义解码精度显著下降（50-way Top-1 Acc从89%降至38%），但重建质量下降较小（FID从76.77升至80.51），提示语义信息对通道数更敏感。
analysis.method: 模块化端到端框架，包含EEG条件扩散重建阶段和提示引导的后重建增强阶段，后者利用多模态大模型提取语义描述并通过图像到图像扩散优化几何和感知一致性。
contributions: 提出EEG2Vision框架，系统评估不同EEG分辨率下的重建性能。
设计提示引导的后重建增强机制，利用多模态大模型和图像扩散提升感知质量。
在低通道设置下实现高达9.71%的IS增益，并通过用户研究验证感知偏好。
analysis.experiments: 在128、64、32、24通道EEG上评估，报告了语义解码准确率、FID、IS等指标，并进行了用户研究。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨被试泛化能力。
可能依赖预训练多模态模型，计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EEG2Vision框架，通过多模态大模型引导的扩散增强，实现低分辨率EEG到图像的视觉重建，显著提升感知质量。

papers.title: From Gaze to Guidance: Interpreting and Adapting to Users' Cognitive Needs with Multimodal Gaze-Aware AI Assistants
papers.abstract: Current LLM assistants are powerful at answering questions, but they have limited access to the behavioral context that reveals when and where a user is struggling. We present a gaze-grounded multimodal LLM assistant that uses egocentric video with gaze overlays to identify likely points of difficulty and target follow-up retrospective assistance. We instantiate this vision in a controlled study (n=36) comparing the gaze-aware AI assistant to a text-only LLM assistant. Compared to a conventional LLM assistant, the gaze-aware assistant was rated as significantly more accurate and personalized in its assessments of users' reading behavior and significantly improved people's ability to recall information. Users spoke significantly fewer words with the gaze-aware assistant, indicating more efficient interactions. Qualitative results underscored both perceived benefits in comprehension and challenges when interpretations of gaze behaviors were inaccurate. Our findings suggest that gaze-aware LLM assistants can reason about cognitive needs to improve cognitive outcomes of users.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于注视的多模态LLM助手，通过第一人称视频和注视覆盖识别用户困难点，提升个性化评估和记忆效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM助手缺乏对用户行为上下文的感知，无法判断用户何时何地遇到困难，导致交互效率低、个性化不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用注视信息增强LLM助手对用户认知需求的理解，从而提供更精准、个性化的辅助。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建注视感知的多模态LLM助手，使用第一人称视频叠加注视点，识别用户阅读中的困难区域，并生成回顾性辅助。
contributions: 提出注视感知的多模态LLM助手框架，融合注视信号与语言模型。
通过用户实验证明该方法在准确性、个性化和记忆提升方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在36名受试者的控制实验中，与纯文本LLM助手对比，注视感知助手在评估准确性和个性化方面显著更优，并改善了信息回忆效率。
limitations: 注视行为解读不准确时可能产生负面体验。
实验规模较小，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于注视的多模态LLM助手，通过第一人称视频和注视覆盖识别用户困难点，提升个性化评估和记忆效果。

papers.title: Sustained Impact of Agentic Personalisation in Marketing: A Longitudinal Case Study
papers.abstract: In consumer applications, Customer Relationship Management (CRM) has traditionally relied on the manual optimisation of static, rule-based messaging strategies. While adaptive and autonomous learning systems offer the promise of scalable personalisation, it remains unclear to what extent ``human-in-the-loop'' oversight is required to sustain performance uplift over time. This paper presents a longitudinal case study analysing a real-world consumer application that leverages agentic infrastructure to personalise marketing messaging for a large-scale user base over an 11-month period. We compare two distinct periods: an active phase where marketers directly curated content, audiences, and strategies -- followed immediately by a passive phase where agents operated autonomously from a fixed library of components. Our results demonstrate that whilst active human management generates the highest relative lift in engagement metrics, the autonomous agents successfully sustained a positive lift during the passive period. These findings suggest a symbiotic model where human intervention drives strategic initialisation and discovery, yet autonomous agents can ensure the scalable retention and preservation of performance gains.

analysis.tldr: 营销中智能体个性化在主动管理后仍能自主维持正向效果提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统CRM依赖人工优化静态规则策略，而自适应学习系统虽能实现规模化个性化，但长期维持性能提升是否需要人类监督尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估智能体个性化系统在人类主动管理阶段与自主运行阶段对营销效果的持续影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 主动人类管理带来最高参与度提升，但自主智能体在固定组件库下仍能维持正向提升，表明人类干预驱动策略初始化与发现，自主智能体可规模化保留性能增益。
analysis.method: 纵向案例研究，对比11个月中主动阶段（人类策划内容、受众、策略）与被动阶段（智能体自主运行）的营销效果。
contributions: 首次在真实大规模营销应用中纵向分析智能体个性化系统的长期效果。
揭示人类与自主智能体协同的共生模型：人类驱动初始策略，智能体维持性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 单一案例研究，泛化性有限。
未详细说明智能体架构与组件库设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 营销中智能体个性化在主动管理后仍能自主维持正向效果提升。

papers.title: Governed Capability Evolution: Lifecycle-Time Compatibility Checking and Rollback for AI-Component-Based Systems, with Embodied Agents as Case Study
papers.abstract: Software systems built from versioned AI components increasingly need lifecycle-time governance: when a capability module evolves into a new version, the hosting system must decide whetmeher the new version may be activated safely, under what deployment conditions, with what monitoring, and when it should be rolled back. Existing software-deployment patterns (canary, blue-green, feature flags, MLOps pipelines) address parts of this loop but were designed for stateless web services rather than stateful, policy-constrained runtimes that drive AI components in the field. We study this problem in the setting of embodied agents, where capabilities are packaged as installable modules under runtime policy and recovery constraints. We formulate governed capability evolution as a first-class software-lifecycle problem for AI-component-based systems and propose a staged upgrade framework that treats every new capability version as a governed deployment candidate rather than an immediate replacement. The framework introduces four compatibility checks (interface, policy, behavioral, recovery) and organizes them into a staged pipeline of candidate validation, sandbox evaluation, shadow deployment, gated activation, online monitoring, and rollback. A reference prototype on a PyBullet/ROS 2 testbed evaluated over 6 upgrade rounds with 15 random seeds shows naive upgrade reaches 72.9% task success but drives unsafe activation to 60% by the final round, while governed upgrade retains comparable success (67.4%) with zero unsafe activations across all rounds (Wilcoxon p=0.003). Shadow deployment surfaces 40% of regressions invisible to sandbox alone, and rollback succeeds in 79.8% of post-activation drift scenarios. The work extends runtime governance from action execution to capability evolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向AI组件系统的生命周期治理框架，通过分阶段升级和兼容性检查实现安全演化，以具身智能体为案例验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有软件部署模式（如金丝雀、蓝绿部署、MLOps）针对无状态Web服务设计，无法满足有状态、受策略约束的AI组件运行时治理需求，导致版本升级时缺乏安全激活、监控和回滚机制。
analysis.problem: 如何对基于版本化AI组件的软件系统进行生命周期治理，确保新版本在接口、策略、行为和恢复方面兼容，并在部署后实现安全监控与回滚。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但实验表明朴素升级虽保持较高任务成功率（72.9%），但不安全激活率在最终轮次升至60%；而治理升级在保持可比成功率（67.4%）的同时实现零不安全激活。
analysis.method: 提出分阶段升级框架，将每个新版本视为受治理的部署候选，包含四个兼容性检查（接口、策略、行为、恢复）和六个阶段（候选验证、沙箱评估、影子部署、门控激活、在线监控、回滚）。
contributions: 将受治理的能力演化形式化为AI组件系统的一等软件生命周期问题
提出包含四类兼容性检查和六阶段管线的分阶段升级框架
在PyBullet/ROS 2测试台上通过6轮升级和15个随机种子实验验证有效性
analysis.experiments: 在PyBullet/ROS 2测试台上进行6轮升级实验，每轮15个随机种子，比较朴素升级与治理升级的任务成功率和安全性。
limitations: 仅以具身智能体为案例，可能不适用于其他AI组件系统
回滚成功率79.8%，仍有改进空间
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向AI组件系统的生命周期治理框架，通过分阶段升级和兼容性检查实现安全演化，以具身智能体为案例验证。

papers.title: ABMAMBA: Multimodal Large Language Model with Aligned Hierarchical Bidirectional Scan for Efficient Video Captioning
papers.abstract: In this study, we focus on video captioning by fully open multimodal large language models (MLLMs). The comprehension of visual sequences is challenging because of their intricate temporal dependencies and substantial sequence length. The core attention mechanisms of existing Transformer-based approaches scale quadratically with the sequence length, making them computationally prohibitive. To address these limitations, we propose Aligned Hierarchical Bidirectional Scan Mamba (ABMamba), a fully open MLLM with linear computational complexity that enables the scalable processing of video sequences. ABMamba extends Deep State Space Models as its language backbone, replacing the costly quadratic attention mechanisms, and employs a novel Aligned Hierarchical Bidirectional Scan module that processes videos across multiple temporal resolutions. On standard video captioning benchmarks such as VATEX and MSR-VTT, ABMamba demonstrates competitive performance compared to typical MLLMs while achieving approximately three times higher throughput.

analysis.tldr: 提出ABMamba，用线性复杂度状态空间模型替代Transformer注意力，实现高效视频描述生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频描述生成中，Transformer注意力机制随序列长度二次增长，计算成本高，难以处理长视频序列。
analysis.problem: 现有MLLM在视频描述中因二次复杂度注意力机制导致计算效率低，无法高效处理长时序依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ABMamba，使用深度状态空间模型作为语言骨干，并设计对齐层次双向扫描模块，以线性复杂度处理多时间分辨率视频。
contributions: 提出ABMamba，首个完全开源的线性复杂度MLLM用于视频描述。
设计对齐层次双向扫描模块，高效捕获多尺度时序依赖。
analysis.experiments: 在VATEX和MSR-VTT基准上，ABMamba性能与典型MLLM相当，吞吐量提升约3倍。
limitations: 可能仅在视频描述任务上验证，泛化性未知。
与顶尖Transformer模型相比，性能可能仍有差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ABMamba，用线性复杂度状态空间模型替代Transformer注意力，实现高效视频描述生成。

papers.title: Guiding a Diffusion Model by Swapping Its Tokens
papers.abstract: Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) is a widely used inference-time technique to boost the image quality of diffusion models. Yet, its reliance on text conditions prevents its use in unconditional generation. We propose a simple method to enable CFG-like guidance for both conditional and unconditional generation. The key idea is to generate a perturbed prediction via simple token swap operations, and use the direction between it and the clean prediction to steer sampling towards higher-fidelity distributions. In practice, we swap pairs of most semantically dissimilar token latents in either spatial or channel dimensions. Unlike existing methods that apply perturbation in a global or less constrained manner, our approach selectively exchanges and recomposes token latents, allowing finer control over perturbation and its influence on generated samples. Experiments on MS-COCO 2014, MS-COCO 2017, and ImageNet datasets demonstrate that the proposed Self-Swap Guidance (SSG), when applied to popular diffusion models, outperforms previous condition-free methods in image fidelity and prompt alignment under different set-ups. Its fine-grained perturbation granularity also improves robustness, reducing side-effects across a wider range of perturbation strengths. Overall, SSG extends CFG to a broader scope of applications including both conditional and unconditional generation, and can be readily inserted into any diffusion model as a plug-in to gain immediate improvements.

analysis.tldr: 提出Self-Swap Guidance (SSG)，通过交换语义最不相似的token潜变量实现无分类器引导，适用于条件和无条件扩散模型生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 无分类器引导（CFG）依赖文本条件，无法用于无条件生成，且现有扰动方法全局性强、控制粒度粗，限制了扩散模型在更广场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种不依赖文本条件的引导方法，同时支持条件和无条件生成，并实现细粒度扰动控制以提升图像质量和提示对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在扩散模型推理时，通过交换空间或通道维度上语义最不相似的token潜变量，生成扰动预测，利用其与干净预测的方向引导采样向高保真分布移动。
contributions: 提出Self-Swap Guidance (SSG)，一种无需文本条件的CFG替代方法，适用于条件和无条件生成。
通过选择性交换token潜变量实现细粒度扰动，提升图像保真度和提示对齐，并增强对扰动强度的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在MS-COCO 2014、MS-COCO 2017和ImageNet数据集上，将SSG应用于流行扩散模型，在图像保真度和提示对齐方面优于现有无条件方法。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销（需计算token语义相似度并执行交换操作）。
对token语义相似度度量敏感，不同度量方式可能影响效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Self-Swap Guidance (SSG)，通过交换语义最不相似的token潜变量实现无分类器引导，适用于条件和无条件扩散模型生成。

papers.title: Adapting Foundation Models for Annotation-Efficient Adnexal Mass Segmentation in Cine Images
papers.abstract: Adnexal mass evaluation via ultrasound is a challenging clinical task, often hindered by subjective interpretation and significant inter-observer variability. While automated segmentation is a foundational step for quantitative risk assessment, traditional fully supervised convolutional architectures frequently require large amounts of pixel-level annotations and struggle with domain shifts common in medical imaging. In this work, we propose a label-efficient segmentation framework that leverages the robust semantic priors of a pretrained DINOv3 foundational vision transformer backbone. By integrating this backbone with a Dense Prediction Transformer (DPT)-style decoder, our model hierarchically reassembles multi-scale features to combine global semantic representations with fine-grained spatial details. Evaluated on a clinical dataset of 7,777 annotated frames from 112 patients, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to established fully supervised baselines, including U-Net, U-Net++, DeepLabV3, and MAnet. Specifically, we obtain a Dice score of 0.945 and improved boundary adherence, reducing the 95th-percentile Hausdorff Distance by 11.4% relative to the strongest convolutional baseline. Furthermore, we conduct an extensive efficiency analysis demonstrating that our DINOv3-based approach retains significantly higher performance under data starvation regimes, maintaining strong results even when trained on only 25% of the data. These results suggest that leveraging large-scale self-supervised foundations provides a promising and data-efficient solution for medical image segmentation in data-constrained clinical environments. Project Repository: https://github.com/FrancescaFati/MESA

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练DINOv3视觉Transformer骨干和DPT解码器，在少量标注下实现超声图像附件肿块分割，Dice达0.945。
analysis.research_motivation: 超声图像中附件肿块评估依赖主观判读且观察者间差异大，传统全监督分割需要大量像素级标注且对医学图像域迁移敏感，亟需标注高效的方法。
analysis.problem: 在标注数据稀缺的临床环境下，实现超声图像中附件肿块的精确自动分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用预训练DINOv3视觉Transformer作为骨干提取鲁棒语义先验，结合DPT风格解码器分层重组多尺度特征，融合全局语义与细粒度空间细节。
contributions: 提出一种标注高效的分割框架，利用DINOv3基础模型在少量标注下达到SOTA性能。
在112名患者7777帧的临床数据集上验证，Dice达0.945，95% Hausdorff距离降低11.4%。
证明在数据匮乏条件下（仅用25%数据）仍保持高性能，为数据受限的医学图像分割提供有效方案。
analysis.experiments: 在包含112名患者7777帧标注的临床数据集上评估，与U-Net、U-Net++、DeepLabV3、MAnet等全监督基线对比，取得SOTA结果；并进行了数据效率分析。
limitations: 仅在超声图像附件肿块分割任务上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖DINOv3预训练模型，可能受限于其预训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练DINOv3视觉Transformer骨干和DPT解码器，在少量标注下实现超声图像附件肿块分割，Dice达0.945。

papers.title: 3DrawAgent: Teaching LLM to Draw in 3D with Early Contrastive Experience
papers.abstract: Sketching in 3D space enables expressive reasoning about shape, structure, and spatial relationships, yet generating 3D sketches through natural language remains a major challenge. In this work, we introduce 3DrawAgent, a training-free, language-driven framework for 3D sketch generation that leverages large language models (LLMs) to sequentially draw 3D Bezier curves under geometric feedback. Unlike prior 2D sketch agents, our method introduces a relative experience optimization strategy that adapts the recently proposed Group Reward Policy Optimization (GRPO) paradigm. Instead of relying on explicit ground-truth supervision, we construct pairwise comparisons among generated sketches, with each pair consisting of a relatively better and a worse result based on CLIP-based perceptual rewards and LLM-based fine-grained qualitative assessment. These experiences are then used to iteratively refine the prior knowledge of 3D drawing, enabling black-box reinforcement of the model's 3D awareness. This design allows our model to self-improve its spatial understanding and drawing quality without parameter updates. Experiments show that 3DrawAgent can generate complex and coherent 3D Bezier sketches from diverse textual prompts, exhibit emergent geometric reasoning, and generalize to novel shapes, establishing a new paradigm for advancing the field of training-free 3D sketch intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出3DrawAgent，一种无需训练、基于LLM的3D草图生成框架，通过对比经验优化策略提升3D绘制能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D草图在形状、结构和空间关系表达中具有重要作用，但通过自然语言生成3D草图仍面临重大挑战，现有2D草图代理无法直接应用于3D场景。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型（LLM）在无训练条件下，根据自然语言描述生成连贯且复杂的3D贝塞尔曲线草图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出3DrawAgent框架，采用相对经验优化策略，基于CLIP感知奖励和LLM细粒度评估构建草图对的比较，通过迭代优化LLM的3D绘制先验知识，无需参数更新即可提升空间理解与绘制质量。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练、语言驱动的3D草图生成框架3DrawAgent。
引入相对经验优化策略，利用对比经验增强LLM的3D意识，无需显式监督。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明3DrawAgent能从多样文本提示生成复杂连贯的3D贝塞尔草图，展现几何推理能力并泛化到新形状。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP和LLM评估的准确性，存在偏差风险。
仅针对贝塞尔曲线，未扩展到其他3D表示形式。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3DrawAgent，一种无需训练、基于LLM的3D草图生成框架，通过对比经验优化策略提升3D绘制能力。

papers.title: LINE: LLM-based Iterative Neuron Explanations for Vision Models
papers.abstract: Interpreting the concepts encoded by individual neurons in deep neural networks is a crucial step towards understanding their complex decision-making processes and ensuring AI safety. Despite recent progress in neuron labeling, existing methods often limit the search space to predefined concept vocabularies or produce overly specific descriptions that fail to capture higher-order, global concepts. We introduce LINE, a novel, training-free iterative approach tailored for open-vocabulary concept labeling in vision models. Operating in a strictly black-box setting, LINE leverages a large language model and a text-to-image generator to iteratively propose and refine concepts in a closed loop, guided by activation history. We demonstrate that LINE achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple model architectures, yielding AUC improvements of up to 0.18 on ImageNet and 0.05 on Places365, while discovering, on average, 29% of new concepts missed by massive predefined vocabularies. Beyond identifying the top concept, LINE provides a complete generation history, which enables polysemanticity evaluation and produces supporting visual explanations that rival gradient-dependent activation maximization methods.

analysis.tldr: LINE 利用 LLM 和文本到图像生成器迭代地为视觉模型神经元标注开放词汇概念，无需训练且性能 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解深度神经网络中单个神经元编码的概念对模型可解释性和 AI 安全至关重要，但现有方法受限于预定义词汇或产生过于具体的描述，无法捕捉高阶全局概念。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖预定义词汇表的情况下，为视觉模型神经元生成开放、准确且可解释的概念标签。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法要么限制搜索空间到预定义概念词汇，要么产生过于具体的描述，无法捕捉高阶全局概念；LINE 通过迭代闭环生成概念，发现大量被预定义词汇遗漏的新概念。
analysis.method: LINE 是一种无需训练的迭代方法，在严格黑盒设置下，利用大语言模型和文本到图像生成器，根据激活历史迭代地提出和精炼概念，形成闭环。
contributions: 提出 LINE，一种无需训练、黑盒的开放词汇神经元概念标注方法。
在 ImageNet 和 Places365 上实现 AUC 提升分别达 0.18 和 0.05，并发现平均 29% 的新概念。
提供完整的生成历史，支持多语义性评估，并生成与梯度依赖方法相媲美的视觉解释。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型架构上评估，ImageNet 上 AUC 提升 0.18，Places365 上提升 0.05，平均发现 29% 的新概念。
limitations: 依赖 LLM 和文本到图像生成器的质量，可能引入生成偏差。
迭代过程可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LINE 利用 LLM 和文本到图像生成器迭代地为视觉模型神经元标注开放词汇概念，无需训练且性能 SOTA。

papers.title: Beyond Mamba: Enhancing State-space Models with Deformable Dilated Convolutions for Multi-scale Traffic Object Detection
papers.abstract: In a real-world traffic scenario, varying-scale objects are usually distributed in a cluttered background, which poses great challenges to accurate detection. Although current Mamba-based methods can efficiently model long-range dependencies, they still struggle to capture small objects with abundant local details, which hinders joint modeling of local structures and global semantics. Moreover, state-space models exhibit limited hierarchical feature representation and weak cross-scale interaction due to flat sequential modeling and insufficient spatial inductive biases, leading to sub-optimal performance in complex scenes. To address these issues, we propose a Mamba with Deformable Dilated Convolutions Network (MDDCNet) for accurate traffic object detection in this study. In MDDCNet, a well-designed hybrid backbone with successive Multi-Scale Deformable Dilated Convolution (MSDDC) blocks and Mamba blocks enables hierarchical feature representation from local details to global semantics. Meanwhile, a Channel-Enhanced Feed-Forward Network (CE-FFN) is further devised to overcome the limited channel interaction capability of conventional feed-forward networks, whilst a Mamba-based Attention-Aggregating Feature Pyramid Network (A^2FPN) is constructed to achieve enhanced multi-scale feature fusion and interaction. Extensive experimental results on public benchmark and real-world datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over various advanced detectors. The code is available at https://github.com/Bettermea/MDDCNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出MDDCNet，结合可变形膨胀卷积与Mamba，提升多尺度交通目标检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实交通场景中目标尺度多变且背景杂乱，现有Mamba方法虽能建模长程依赖，但难以捕捉小目标的局部细节，且状态空间模型因扁平序列建模和空间归纳偏置不足，导致层次特征表示和跨尺度交互弱。
analysis.problem: 解决Mamba在交通目标检测中无法有效联合建模局部结构与全局语义、层次特征表示不足及跨尺度交互弱的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Mamba方法难以捕捉小目标的丰富局部细节，且因扁平序列建模和空间归纳偏置不足，层次特征表示和跨尺度交互能力有限。
analysis.method: 提出MDDCNet，包含混合骨干网络（MSDDC块与Mamba块交替）、通道增强前馈网络（CE-FFN）和基于Mamba的注意力聚合特征金字塔网络（A²FPN）。
contributions: 提出MDDCNet，结合可变形膨胀卷积与Mamba实现层次化特征表示。
设计CE-FFN增强通道交互，A²FPN实现多尺度特征融合与交互。
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准和真实世界数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明方法优于多种先进检测器。
limitations: 可能增加模型复杂度与计算开销。
在极端小目标或严重遮挡场景下的性能未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MDDCNet，结合可变形膨胀卷积与Mamba，提升多尺度交通目标检测精度。

papers.title: PrivFedTalk: Privacy-Aware Federated Diffusion with Identity-Stable Adapters for Personalized Talking-Head Generation
papers.abstract: Talking-head generation has advanced rapidly with diffusion-based generative models, but training usually depends on centralized face-video and speech datasets, raising major privacy concerns. The problem is more acute for personalized talking-head generation, where identity-specific data are highly sensitive and often cannot be pooled across users or devices. PrivFedTalk is presented as a privacy-aware federated framework for personalized talking-head generation that combines conditional latent diffusion with parameter-efficient identity adaptation. A shared diffusion backbone is trained across clients, while each client learns lightweight LoRA identity adapters from local private audio-visual data, avoiding raw data sharing and reducing communication cost. To address heterogeneous client distributions, Identity-Stable Federated Aggregation (ISFA) weights client updates using privacy-safe scalar reliability signals computed from on-device identity consistency and temporal stability estimates. Temporal-Denoising Consistency (TDC) regularization is introduced to reduce inter-frame drift, flicker, and identity drift during federated denoising. To limit update-side privacy risk, secure aggregation and client-level differential privacy are applied to adapter updates. The implementation supports both low-memory GPU execution and multi-GPU client-parallel training on heterogeneous shared hardware. Comparative experiments on the present setup across multiple training and aggregation conditions with PrivFedTalk, FedAvg, and FedProx show stable federated optimization and successful end-to-end training and evaluation under constrained resources. The results support the feasibility of privacy-aware personalized talking-head training in federated environments, while suggesting that stronger component-wise, privacy-utility, and qualitative claims need further standardized evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出隐私感知联邦扩散框架PrivFedTalk，结合LoRA身份适配器和身份稳定聚合，实现个性化说话头生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 个性化说话头生成依赖集中式人脸视频和语音数据集，存在严重隐私风险，且身份特定数据高度敏感，无法跨用户或设备共享。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护隐私的前提下，利用分布式私有音视频数据训练个性化说话头生成模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 联邦训练中客户端数据分布异构，导致身份漂移、帧间闪烁和时序不一致。
analysis.method: PrivFedTalk框架：条件潜扩散模型联合训练，客户端学习轻量LoRA身份适配器；身份稳定联邦聚合（ISFA）基于设备端身份一致性和时序稳定性加权更新；时序去噪一致性（TDC）正则化减少帧间漂移；安全聚合和客户端级差分隐私保护更新。
contributions: 提出首个隐私感知联邦扩散框架用于个性化说话头生成。
设计身份稳定联邦聚合（ISFA）和时序去噪一致性（TDC）正则化，解决异构客户端分布问题。
集成安全聚合和差分隐私，限制隐私风险。
analysis.experiments: 在多种训练和聚合条件下与FedAvg、FedProx对比，显示稳定联邦优化和资源受限下的成功端到端训练，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 需要更标准化的组件级、隐私-效用和定性评估。
可能对强隐私保护下的效用损失缺乏深入分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出隐私感知联邦扩散框架PrivFedTalk，结合LoRA身份适配器和身份稳定聚合，实现个性化说话头生成。

papers.title: Rotation Equivariant Convolutions in Deformable Registration of Brain MRI
papers.abstract: Image registration is a fundamental task that aligns anatomical structures between images. While CNNs perform well, they lack rotation equivariance - a rotated input does not produce a correspondingly rotated output. This hinders performance by failing to exploit the rotational symmetries inherent in anatomical structures, particularly in brain MRI. In this work, we integrate rotation-equivariant convolutions into deformable brain MRI registration networks. We evaluate this approach by replacing standard encoders with equivariant ones in three baseline architectures, testing on multiple public brain MRI datasets. Our experiments demonstrate that equivariant encoders have three key advantages: 1) They achieve higher registration accuracy while reducing network parameters, confirming the benefit of this anatomical inductive bias. 2) They outperform baselines on rotated input pairs, demonstrating robustness to orientation variations common in clinical practice. 3) They show improved performance with less training data, indicating greater sample efficiency. Our results demonstrate that incorporating geometric priors is a critical step toward building more robust, accurate, and efficient registration models.

analysis.tldr: 将旋转等变卷积融入脑MRI可变形配准网络，提升精度、鲁棒性和样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统CNN缺乏旋转等变性，无法利用脑解剖结构的旋转对称性，导致配准性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何使脑MRI配准网络具备旋转等变性，以提升精度和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在三种基线配准架构中，将标准编码器替换为旋转等变卷积编码器。
contributions: 提出将旋转等变卷积集成到可变形脑MRI配准网络的方法。
实验证明等变编码器在精度、参数效率、旋转鲁棒性和样本效率上均优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开脑MRI数据集上测试三种基线架构，对比标准编码器与等变编码器。
limitations: 可能仅适用于脑MRI等具有旋转对称性的医学图像。
未讨论等变卷积的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将旋转等变卷积融入脑MRI可变形配准网络，提升精度、鲁棒性和样本效率。

papers.title: IoT-Brain: Grounding LLMs for Semantic-Spatial Sensor Scheduling
papers.abstract: Intelligent systems powered by large-scale sensor networks are shifting from predefined monitoring to intent-driven operation, revealing a critical Semantic-to-Physical Mapping Gap. While large language models (LLMs) excel at semantic understanding, existing perception-centric pipelines operate retrospectively, overlooking the fundamental decision of what to sense and when. We formalize this proactive decision as Semantic-Spatial Sensor Scheduling (S3) and demonstrate that direct LLM planning is unreliable due to inherent gaps in representation, reasoning, and optimization. To bridge these gaps, we introduce the Spatial Trajectory Graph (STG), a neuro-symbolic paradigm governed by a verify-before-commit discipline that transforms open-ended planning into a verifiable graph optimization problem. Based on STG, we implement IoT-Brain, a concrete system embodiment, and construct TopoSense-Bench, a campus-scale benchmark with 5,250 natural-language queries across 2,510 cameras. Evaluations show that IoT-Brain boosts task success rate by 37.6% over the strongest search-intensive methods while running nearly 2 times faster and using 6.6 times fewer prompt tokens. In real-world deployment, it approaches the reliability upper bound while reducing 4.1 times network bandwidth, providing a foundational framework for LLMs to interact with the physical world with unprecedented reliability and efficiency.
