After the first successful attack, the victim still clicks the attacker-controlled element in more than 15% of later independent trials, versus below 1% for random injection, showing that the injected element acts as a persistent attractor rather than simple visual clutter.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义级UI元素注入攻击，通过叠加无害UI元素误导GUI智能体，攻击成功率提升高达4.4倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GUI智能体红队研究存在局限：对抗扰动需要白盒访问（不适用于商业系统），而提示注入正被更强的安全对齐缓解。需要更实用的威胁模型来评估鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何在黑盒、有安全对齐的GUI智能体上实现有效且可迁移的对抗攻击？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击后，受害者仍以超过15%的概率点击攻击者控制的元素（随机注入低于1%），表明注入元素作为持久吸引子而非简单视觉杂乱。
analysis.method: 提出语义级UI元素注入，通过Editor-Overlapper-Victim流水线和迭代搜索过程，在截图上叠加安全对齐且无害的UI元素，误导智能体的视觉定位。
contributions: 提出一种新的红队设置——语义级UI元素注入，无需白盒访问。
设计模块化流水线和迭代搜索策略，显著提升攻击成功率（最高4.4倍）。
发现攻击可跨模型迁移，且注入元素具有持久吸引效应。
analysis.experiments: 在五个受害者模型上评估，优化攻击相比随机注入在最强受害者上提升攻击成功率高达4.4倍；元素从一个源模型优化后可有效迁移到其他目标模型。
limitations: 仅针对GUI智能体的视觉模态，未考虑多模态融合防御。
攻击依赖截图覆盖，可能受实际渲染差异影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义级UI元素注入攻击，通过叠加无害UI元素误导GUI智能体，攻击成功率提升高达4.4倍。

papers.title: Filling the Gaps: Selective Knowledge Augmentation for LLM Recommenders
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently emerged as powerful training-free recommenders. However, their knowledge of individual items is inevitably uneven due to imbalanced information exposure during pretraining, a phenomenon we refer to as knowledge gap problem. To address this, most prior methods have employed a naive uniform augmentation that appends external information for every item in the input prompt. However, this approach not only wastes limited context budget on redundant augmentation for well-known items but can also hinder the model's effective reasoning. To this end, we propose KnowSA_CKP (Knowledge-aware Selective Augmentation with Comparative Knowledge Probing) to mitigate the knowledge gap problem. KnowSA_CKP estimates the LLM's internal knowledge by evaluating its capability to capture collaborative relationships and selectively injects additional information only where it is most needed. By avoiding unnecessary augmentation for well-known items, KnowSA_CKP focuses on items that benefit most from knowledge supplementation, thereby making more effective use of the context budget. KnowSA_CKP requires no fine-tuning step, and consistently improves both recommendation accuracy and context efficiency across four real-world datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/nowhyun/KnowSA\_CKP.

analysis.tldr: 提出选择性知识增强方法，仅对LLM知识不足的物品补充外部信息，提升推荐准确性和上下文效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为推荐器时，因预训练信息暴露不均导致物品知识不平衡（知识差距问题），而现有均匀增强方法浪费上下文预算且可能干扰推理。
analysis.problem: 如何高效利用有限上下文预算，仅对LLM知识不足的物品进行选择性知识增强，以缓解知识差距问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到LLM对物品知识存在知识差距问题，且均匀增强对已知物品冗余甚至有害。
analysis.method: 提出KnowSA_CKP，通过比较知识探测评估LLM对物品协作关系的内部知识，仅对知识不足的物品选择性注入外部信息。
contributions: 识别并形式化了LLM推荐器中的知识差距问题
提出无需微调的选择性知识增强方法，提升推荐准确性和上下文效率
analysis.experiments: 在四个真实世界数据集上，KnowSA_CKP一致提升了推荐准确性和上下文效率。
limitations: 可能依赖探测任务的设计质量
未讨论对长尾物品的泛化能力
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出选择性知识增强方法，仅对LLM知识不足的物品补充外部信息，提升推荐准确性和上下文效率。

papers.title: LPM 1.0: Video-based Character Performance Model
papers.abstract: Performance, the externalization of intent, emotion, and personality through visual, vocal, and temporal behavior, is what makes a character alive. Learning such performance from video is a promising alternative to traditional 3D pipelines. However, existing video models struggle to jointly achieve high expressiveness, real-time inference, and long-horizon identity stability, a tension we call the performance trilemma. Conversation is the most comprehensive performance scenario, as characters simultaneously speak, listen, react, and emote while maintaining identity over time. To address this, we present LPM 1.0 (Large Performance Model), focusing on single-person full-duplex audio-visual conversational performance. Concretely, we build a multimodal human-centric dataset through strict filtering, speaking-listening audio-video pairing, performance understanding, and identity-aware multi-reference extraction; train a 17B-parameter Diffusion Transformer (Base LPM) for highly controllable, identity-consistent performance through multimodal conditioning; and distill it into a causal streaming generator (Online LPM) for low-latency, infinite-length interaction. At inference, given a character image with identity-aware references, LPM 1.0 generates listening videos from user audio and speaking videos from synthesized audio, with text prompts for motion control, all at real-time speed with identity-stable, infinite-length generation. LPM 1.0 thus serves as a visual engine for conversational agents, live streaming characters, and game NPCs. To systematically evaluate this setting, we propose LPM-Bench, the first benchmark for interactive character performance. LPM 1.0 achieves state-of-the-art results across all evaluated dimensions while maintaining real-time inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出LPM 1.0，一个基于视频的角色表演模型，通过17B参数扩散Transformer和因果流生成器实现高表现力、实时推理和长时身份稳定。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统3D管线制作角色表演成本高，而现有视频模型难以同时满足高表现力、实时推理和长时身份稳定，存在“表演三难困境”。
analysis.problem: 如何从视频中学习角色表演，实现高表现力、实时推理和长时身份稳定的统一。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建多模态人类中心数据集，训练17B参数扩散Transformer（Base LPM）进行多模态条件控制，并蒸馏为因果流生成器（Online LPM）实现低延迟无限长度交互。
contributions: 提出LPM 1.0，首个专注于单人全双工音视频对话表演的大模型。
构建多模态数据集和LPM-Bench基准，实现SOTA性能并保持实时推理。
analysis.experiments: 在LPM-Bench上评估，LPM 1.0在所有维度达到SOTA，同时保持实时推理。
limitations: 仅支持单人表演，未涉及多人交互。
依赖合成音频生成说话视频，可能引入误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LPM 1.0，一个基于视频的角色表演模型，通过17B参数扩散Transformer和因果流生成器实现高表现力、实时推理和长时身份稳定。

papers.title: Loop, Think, & Generalize: Implicit Reasoning in Recurrent-Depth Transformers
papers.abstract: We study implicit reasoning, i.e. the ability to combine knowledge or rules within a single forward pass. While transformer-based large language models store substantial factual knowledge and rules, they often fail to compose this knowledge for implicit multi-hop reasoning, suggesting a lack of compositional generalization over their parametric knowledge. To address this limitation, we study recurrent-depth transformers, which enables iterative computation over the same transformer layers. We investigate two compositional generalization challenges under the implicit reasoning scenario: systematic generalization, i.e. combining knowledge that is never used for compositions during training, and depth extrapolation, i.e. generalizing from limited reasoning depth (e.g. training on up to 5-hop) to deeper compositions (e.g. 10-hop). Through controlled studies with models trained from scratch, we show that while vanilla transformers struggle with both generalization challenges, recurrent-depth transformers can effectively make such generalization. For systematic generalization, we find that this ability emerges through a three-stage grokking process, transitioning from memorization to in-distribution generalization and finally to systematic generalization, supported by mechanistic analysis. For depth extrapolation, we show that generalization beyond training depth can be unlocked by scaling inference-time recurrence, with more iterations enabling deeper reasoning. We further study how training strategies affect extrapolation, providing guidance on training recurrent-depth transformers, and identify a key limitation, overthinking, where excessive recurrence degrades predictions and limits generalization to very deep compositions.

analysis.tldr: 循环深度Transformer通过隐式推理实现系统泛化和深度外推，但存在过度思考问题。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer大模型虽存储大量事实知识，但常无法在单次前向传播中组合这些知识进行隐式多跳推理，缺乏组合泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让Transformer在隐式推理场景下实现系统泛化（组合训练中未出现的知识）和深度外推（从有限推理深度泛化到更深组合）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 循环深度Transformer的系统泛化能力通过三阶段grokking过程涌现：从记忆到分布内泛化再到系统泛化；深度外推可通过增加推理时循环次数解锁；存在过度思考问题，即过多循环降低预测性能并限制极深组合的泛化。
analysis.method: 使用循环深度Transformer（在相同层上迭代计算），通过控制实验从零训练模型，研究系统泛化和深度外推。
contributions: 发现循环深度Transformer能有效实现系统泛化和深度外推，而普通Transformer难以做到。
揭示了系统泛化能力通过三阶段grokking过程涌现，并提供了机制分析。
证明了增加推理时循环次数可解锁深度外推，并识别了过度思考这一关键局限。
analysis.experiments: 在控制实验中从零训练模型，测试系统泛化和深度外推，并进行了机制分析。摘要未提供具体数据集或数值结果。
limitations: 过度思考问题限制了极深组合的泛化。
实验基于控制环境，可能无法直接迁移到大规模真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 循环深度Transformer通过隐式推理实现系统泛化和深度外推，但存在过度思考问题。

papers.title: More Capable, Less Cooperative? When LLMs Fail At Zero-Cost Collaboration
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly coordinate in multi-agent systems, yet we lack an understanding of where and why cooperation failures may arise. In many real-world coordination problems, from knowledge sharing in organizations to code documentation, helping others carries negligible personal cost while generating substantial collective benefits. However, whether LLM agents cooperate when helping neither benefits nor harms the helper, while being given explicit instructions to do so, remains unknown. We build a multi-agent setup designed to study cooperative behavior in a frictionless environment, removing all strategic complexity from cooperation. We find that capability does not predict cooperation: OpenAI o3 achieves only 17% of optimal collective performance while OpenAI o3-mini reaches 50%, despite identical instructions to maximize group revenue. Through a causal decomposition that automates one side of agent communication, we separate cooperation failures from competence failures, tracing their origins through agent reasoning analysis. Testing targeted interventions, we find that explicit protocols double performance for low-competence models, and tiny sharing incentives improve models with weak cooperation. Our findings suggest that scaling intelligence alone will not solve coordination problems in multi-agent systems and will require deliberate cooperative design, even when helping others costs nothing.

analysis.tldr: LLM智能体在零成本协作中表现不佳，能力提升并不必然带来更好的合作。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统中LLM的协作失败原因尚不明确，而现实中的协调问题（如知识共享）对集体效益至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM智能体在无摩擦、无个人成本的环境中，即使被明确指示最大化集体收益，为何仍无法实现最优协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 能力与协作不相关：o3仅达到17%最优集体性能，而o3-mini达到50%；通过因果分解分离协作失败与能力失败，发现推理分析可追溯失败根源。
analysis.method: 构建多智能体无摩擦协作环境；通过因果分解自动化一方通信以分离协作与能力失败；测试显式协议和小额共享激励等干预措施。
contributions: 发现LLM智能体在零成本协作中能力与协作不相关，o3表现远差于o3-mini。
通过因果分解和推理分析定位协作失败根源，并验证显式协议和共享激励可提升协作性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及使用OpenAI o3和o3-mini模型，并测试了干预措施。
limitations: 仅研究特定模型（OpenAI o3系列），可能不泛化到其他LLM。
无摩擦环境可能过于简化，真实场景更复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM智能体在零成本协作中表现不佳，能力提升并不必然带来更好的合作。

papers.title: Automatic Generation of Executable BPMN Models from Medical Guidelines
papers.abstract: We present an end-to-end pipeline that converts healthcare policy documents into executable, data-aware Business Process Model and Notation (BPMN) models using large language models (LLMs) for simulation-based policy evaluation. We address the main challenges of automated policy digitization with four contributions: data-grounded BPMN generation with syntax auto-correction, executable augmentation, KPI instrumentation, and entropy-based uncertainty detection. We evaluate the pipeline on diabetic nephropathy prevention guidelines from three Japanese municipalities, generating 100 models per backend across three LLMs and executing each against 1,000 synthetic patients. On well-structured policies, the pipeline achieves a 100% ground-truth match with perfect per-patient decision agreement. Across all conditions, raw per-patient decision agreement exceeds 92%, and entropy scores increase monotonically with document complexity, confirming that the detector reliably separates unambiguous policies from those requiring targeted human clarification.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM将医疗政策文档自动转化为可执行的BPMN模型，实现高精度仿真评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗政策文档数字化通常依赖人工，耗时且易错，缺乏自动化工具来生成可执行模型以支持政策仿真评估。
analysis.problem: 如何从非结构化的医疗指南文本自动生成语法正确、可执行且带有KPI的数据感知BPMN模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 端到端流水线，包括数据驱动的BPMN生成与语法自动校正、可执行增强、KPI仪表化以及基于熵的不确定性检测。
contributions: 提出数据驱动的BPMN生成与语法自动校正方法
引入可执行增强和KPI仪表化技术
设计基于熵的不确定性检测机制
analysis.experiments: 在三个日本城市的糖尿病肾病预防指南上评估，每个后端生成100个模型，每个模型对1000个合成患者执行。在结构良好的政策上达到100%的ground-truth匹配和完美的每患者决策一致性；在所有条件下，原始每患者决策一致性超过92%，熵分数随文档复杂性单调增加。
limitations: 仅针对特定医疗领域（糖尿病肾病）和日语政策文档，泛化性未知
未提及对高度模糊或矛盾政策的处理效果
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM将医疗政策文档自动转化为可执行的BPMN模型，实现高精度仿真评估。

papers.title: AgriChain Visually Grounded Expert Verified Reasoning for Interpretable Agricultural Vision Language Models
papers.abstract: Accurate and interpretable plant disease diagnosis remains a major challenge for vision-language models (VLMs) in real-world agriculture. We introduce AgriChain, a dataset of approximately 11,000 expert-curated leaf images spanning diverse crops and pathologies, each paired with (i) a disease label, (ii) a calibrated confidence score (High/Medium/Low), and (iii) an expert-verified chain-of-thought (CoT) rationale. Draft explanations were first generated by GPT-4o and then verified by a professional agricultural engineer using standardized descriptors (e.g., lesion color, margin, and distribution). We fine-tune Qwen2.5-VL-3B on AgriChain, resulting in a specialized model termed AgriChain-VL3B, to jointly predict diseases and generate visually grounded reasoning. On a 1,000-image test set, our CoT-supervised model achieves 73.1% top-1 accuracy (macro F1 = 0.466; weighted F1 = 0.655), outperforming strong baselines including Gemini 1.5 Flash, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and GPT-4o Mini. The generated explanations align closely with expert reasoning, consistently referencing key visual cues. These findings demonstrate that expert-verified reasoning supervision significantly enhances both accuracy and interpretability, bridging the gap between generic multimodal models and human expertise, and advancing trustworthy, globally deployable AI for sustainable agriculture. The dataset and code are publicly available at: https://github.com/hazzanabeel12-netizen/agrichain

analysis.tldr: 通过专家验证的思维链监督微调VLM，提升农业病害诊断的准确性与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 农业病害诊断中，通用VLM缺乏可解释性和领域专业知识，难以实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何构建兼具高准确率和可解释性的农业VLM，使其推理过程与专家逻辑一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含约11,000张专家标注叶片图像的AgriChain数据集，每张图像配有疾病标签、置信度分数和专家验证的思维链解释；基于Qwen2.5-VL-3B微调得到AgriChain-VL3B模型，联合预测疾病并生成视觉接地推理。
contributions: 构建了AgriChain数据集，包含专家验证的思维链标注。
提出AgriChain-VL3B模型，在农业病害诊断上超越多个强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在1,000张测试集上，模型达到73.1% top-1准确率（macro F1=0.466, weighted F1=0.655），优于Gemini 1.5 Flash、Gemini 2.5 Pro和GPT-4o Mini。
limitations: 数据集规模相对较小，可能限制泛化能力。
仅针对植物病害，未覆盖其他农业场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过专家验证的思维链监督微调VLM，提升农业病害诊断的准确性与可解释性。

papers.title: Agentivism: a learning theory for the age of artificial intelligence
papers.abstract: Learning theories have historically changed when the conditions of learning evolved. Generative and agentic AI create a new condition by allowing learners to delegate explanation, writing, problem solving, and other cognitive work to systems that can generate, recommend, and sometimes act on the learner's behalf. This creates a fundamental challenge for learning theory: successful performance can no longer be assumed to indicate learning. Learners may complete tasks effectively with AI support while developing less understanding, weaker judgment, and limited transferable capability. We argue that this problem is not fully captured by existing learning theories. Behaviourism, cognitivism, constructivism, and connectivism remain important, but they do not directly explain when AI-assisted performance becomes durable human capability. We propose Agentivism, a learning theory for human-AI interaction. Agentivism defines learning as durable growth in human capability through selective delegation to AI, epistemic monitoring and verification of AI contributions, reconstructive internalization of AI-assisted outputs, and transfer under reduced support. The importance of Agentivism lies in explaining how learning remains possible when intelligent delegation is easy and human-AI interaction is becoming a persistent and expanding part of human learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agentivism学习理论，解释在AI辅助下人类如何实现持久能力增长。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式和智能体AI允许学习者将认知工作委托给系统，导致成功表现不再等同于学习，现有学习理论无法解释这一现象。
analysis.problem: AI辅助下的成功表现可能不反映真实学习，需要新理论解释何时AI辅助能转化为持久的人类能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI辅助下学习者可能完成任务但缺乏理解、判断和迁移能力，现有理论（行为主义、认知主义、建构主义、联通主义）未直接解释这一现象。
analysis.method: 提出Agentivism理论，核心包括选择性委托、认知监控与验证、重构性内化、在减少支持下迁移。
contributions: 提出Agentivism学习理论，填补AI时代学习理论的空白
定义了AI辅助下学习的四个关键过程：选择性委托、认知监控、重构性内化、迁移
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 理论尚未经过实证验证
可能缺乏对具体AI系统差异的细致考虑
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agentivism学习理论，解释在AI辅助下人类如何实现持久能力增长。

papers.title: HAWK: Head Importance-Aware Visual Token Pruning in Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: In multimodal large language models (MLLMs), the surge of visual tokens significantly increases the inference time and computational overhead, making them impractical for real-time or resource-constrained applications. Visual token pruning is a promising strategy for reducing the cost of MLLM inference by removing redundant visual tokens. Existing research usually assumes that all attention heads contribute equally to the visual interpretation. However, our study reveals that different heads may capture distinct visual semantics and inherently play distinct roles in visual processing. In light of this observation, we propose HAWK, a head importance-aware visual token pruning method that perceives the varying importance of attention heads in visual tasks to maximize the retention of crucial tokens. By leveraging head importance weights and text-guided attention to assess visual token significance, HAWK effectively retains task-relevant visual tokens while removing redundant ones. The proposed HAWK is entirely training-free and can be seamlessly applied to various MLLMs. Extensive experiments on multiple mainstream vision-language benchmarks demonstrate that HAWK achieves state-of-the-art accuracy. When applied to Qwen2.5-VL, HAWK retains 96.0% of the original accuracy after pruning 80.2% of the visual tokens. Additionally, it reduces end-to-end latency to 74.4% of the original and further decreases GPU memory usage across the tested models. The code is available at https://github.com/peppery77/HAWK.git.

analysis.tldr: HAWK通过感知注意力头的重要性来剪枝视觉token，在保持高精度的同时显著降低多模态大模型的计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型中视觉token数量激增导致推理时间和计算开销过大，限制了其在实时或资源受限场景的应用。现有剪枝方法假设所有注意力头对视觉理解贡献相同，忽略了不同头可能捕捉不同视觉语义并扮演不同角色。
analysis.problem: 如何根据注意力头的重要性差异，在剪枝视觉token时保留关键信息，从而在降低计算成本的同时保持模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同注意力头在视觉处理中具有不同的重要性，它们捕捉不同的视觉语义，对视觉任务贡献不均。
analysis.method: 提出HAWK，一种基于头重要性的视觉token剪枝方法。通过头重要性权重和文本引导的注意力来评估视觉token的重要性，保留任务相关的token，移除冗余token。无需训练，可即插即用于多种MLLM。
contributions: 揭示了多模态大模型中不同注意力头对视觉处理贡献不均的现象。
提出HAWK，一种无需训练、即插即用的视觉token剪枝方法，通过头重要性感知实现高效剪枝。
在多个主流视觉-语言基准上取得最先进精度，剪枝80.2%视觉token后仍保留96.0%原始精度，并降低延迟和GPU内存使用。
analysis.experiments: 在多个主流视觉-语言基准上评估，使用Qwen2.5-VL等模型，剪枝80.2%视觉token后保留96.0%原始精度，端到端延迟降至74.4%，GPU内存使用降低。
limitations: 可能对特定任务或模型需要调整头重要性权重计算方式。
训练无关性虽好，但可能无法适应需要动态调整剪枝策略的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HAWK通过感知注意力头的重要性来剪枝视觉token，在保持高精度的同时显著降低多模态大模型的计算开销。

papers.title: PolicyLong: Towards On-Policy Context Extension
papers.abstract: Extending LLM context windows is hindered by scarce high-quality long-context data. Recent methods synthesize data with genuine long-range dependencies via information-theoretic verification, selecting contexts that reduce a base model's predictive entropy. However, their single-pass offline construction with a fixed model creates a fundamental off-policy gap: the static screening landscape misaligns with the model's evolving capabilities, causing the training distribution to drift. We propose PolicyLong, shifting data construction towards a dynamic on-policy paradigm. By iteratively re-executing data screening (entropy computation, retrieval, and verification) using the current model, PolicyLong ensures the training distribution tracks evolving capabilities, yielding an emergent self-curriculum. Crucially, both positive and hard negative contexts derive from the current model's entropy landscape, co-evolving what the model learns to exploit and resist. Experiments on RULER, HELMET, and LongBench-v2 (Qwen2.5-3B) show PolicyLong consistently outperforms EntropyLong and NExtLong, with gains growing at longer contexts (e.g., +2.54 at 128K on RULER), confirming the value of on-policy data evolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态在线策略数据构建方法PolicyLong，通过迭代筛选与模型能力共演的长上下文数据，显著提升LLM长上下文性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长上下文数据合成方法采用固定模型的单次离线筛选，导致训练分布与模型演化能力脱节，产生离策略偏差，限制了上下文扩展效果。
analysis.problem: 解决长上下文数据构建中静态筛选与模型动态能力不匹配导致的分布漂移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离线构建的数据分布随模型训练逐渐偏离最优区域，而在线策略通过迭代筛选使数据与模型能力共演，形成自课程学习，正负样本均来自当前模型熵景观。
analysis.method: PolicyLong采用动态在线策略范式，在训练过程中反复使用当前模型执行数据筛选（熵计算、检索、验证），确保训练分布追踪模型演化能力，同时生成正样本和难负样本。
contributions: 提出在线策略数据构建范式PolicyLong，解决长上下文数据中的离策略偏差问题。
通过迭代自课程机制，使数据分布与模型能力共演，提升长上下文性能。
在RULER、HELMET、LongBench-v2上验证有效性，尤其长上下文场景增益显著。
analysis.experiments: 在RULER、HELMET、LongBench-v2上使用Qwen2.5-3B模型进行实验，PolicyLong一致优于EntropyLong和NExtLong，在128K长度上RULER得分提升2.54。
limitations: 仅基于3B模型验证，更大模型上的效果未知。
迭代筛选可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态在线策略数据构建方法PolicyLong，通过迭代筛选与模型能力共演的长上下文数据，显著提升LLM长上下文性能。

papers.title: The Weaponization of Computer Vision: Tracing Military-Surveillance Ties through Conference Sponsorship
papers.abstract: Computer vision, a core domain of artificial intelligence (AI), is the field that enables the computational analysis, understanding, and generation of visual data. Despite being historically rooted in military funding and increasingly deployed in warfare, the field tends to position itself as a neutral, purely technical endeavor, failing to engage in discussions about its dual-use applications. Yet it has been reported that computer vision systems are being systematically weaponized to assist in technologies that inflict harm, such as surveillance or warfare. Expanding on these concerns, we study the extent to which computer vision research is being used in the military and surveillance domains. We do so by collecting a dataset of tech companies with financial ties to the field's central research exchange platform: conferences. Conference sponsorship, we argue, not only serves as strong evidence of a company's investment in the field but also provides a privileged position for shaping its trajectory. By investigating sponsors' activities, we reveal that 44% of them have a direct connection with military or surveillance applications. We extend our analysis through two case studies in which we discuss the opportunities and limitations of sponsorship as a means for uncovering technological weaponization.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现44%的计算机视觉会议赞助商与军事或监控应用有直接联系，揭示了该领域的技术武器化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机视觉领域常自视为中立技术，但实际被系统性地武器化用于监控和战争，而学界对此缺乏讨论，需要揭示其与军事监控的关联。
analysis.problem: 量化计算机视觉研究被用于军事和监控领域的程度，通过会议赞助商关系追踪技术武器化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析，但指出44%的赞助商与军事/监控应用直接相关。
analysis.method: 收集与计算机视觉会议有财务联系的科技公司数据集，分析其赞助活动，并通过两个案例研究探讨赞助作为揭示技术武器化手段的机遇与局限。
contributions: 构建了计算机视觉会议赞助商数据集，并揭示44%的赞助商与军事或监控应用有直接联系。
通过案例研究分析了赞助作为揭示技术武器化手段的机遇与局限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 赞助商关系可能无法完全反映所有军事监控关联。
案例研究可能受限于数据可得性和代表性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究发现44%的计算机视觉会议赞助商与军事或监控应用有直接联系，揭示了该领域的技术武器化问题。

papers.title: Latent Anomaly Knowledge Excavation: Unveiling Sparse Sensitive Neurons in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large-scale vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit remarkable zero-shot capabilities, yet the internal mechanisms driving their anomaly detection (AD) performance remain poorly understood. Current methods predominantly treat VLMs as black-box feature extractors, assuming that anomaly-specific knowledge must be acquired through external adapters or memory banks. In this paper, we challenge this assumption by arguing that anomaly knowledge is intrinsically embedded within pre-trained models but remains latent and under-activated. We hypothesize that this knowledge is concentrated within a sparse subset of anomaly-sensitive neurons. To validate this, we propose latent anomaly knowledge excavation (LAKE), a training-free framework that identifies and elicits these critical neuronal signals using only a minimal set of normal samples. By isolating these sensitive neurons, LAKE constructs a highly compact normality representation that integrates visual structural deviations with cross-modal semantic activations. Extensive experiments on industrial AD benchmarks demonstrate that LAKE achieves state-of-the-art performance while providing intrinsic, neuron-level interpretability. Ultimately, our work advocates for a paradigm shift: redefining anomaly detection as the targeted activation of latent pre-trained knowledge rather than the acquisition of a downstream task.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAKE框架，通过挖掘VLM中稀疏的异常敏感神经元实现免训练异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM异常检测方法将其视为黑箱特征提取器，依赖外部适配器或记忆库，忽略了预训练模型中已内嵌但未激活的异常知识。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练的情况下，从VLM中提取并激活内嵌的异常知识以实现高效异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异常知识内嵌于预训练模型但处于潜伏状态，仅集中在稀疏的异常敏感神经元中。
analysis.method: 提出LAKE，一种免训练框架，通过少量正常样本识别并激活稀疏的异常敏感神经元，构建紧凑的正常性表征，融合视觉结构偏差与跨模态语义激活。
contributions: 挑战了VLM异常检测需外部适配器的假设，证明异常知识内嵌于预训练模型。
提出LAKE框架，实现免训练、高性能且具有神经元级可解释性的异常检测。
analysis.experiments: 在工业异常检测基准上达到SOTA性能，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅使用少量正常样本，可能对异常类型多样性敏感。
依赖VLM预训练质量，不同模型泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LAKE框架，通过挖掘VLM中稀疏的异常敏感神经元实现免训练异常检测。

papers.title: TEMPER: Testing Emotional Perturbation in Quantitative Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large language models are trained and evaluated on quantitative reasoning tasks written in clean, emotionally neutral language. However, real-world queries are often wrapped in frustration, urgency or enthusiasm. Does emotional framing alone degrade reasoning when all numerical content is preserved? To investigate this, a controlled emotion translation framework is developed that rewrites problems into emotional variants while preserving all quantities and relationships. Using this framework, Temper-5400 (5,400 semantically verified emotion--neutral pairs) is constructed across GSM8K, MultiArith, and ARC-Challenge, and evaluated on eighteen models (1B to frontier scale). Two core results emerge: First, emotional framing reduces accuracy by 2-10 percentage points even though all numerical content is preserved. Second, neutralizing emotional variants recovers most of the lost performance, showing both that the degradation is tied to emotional style rather than content corruption and that neutralization can serve as a lightweight inference-time mitigation. Non-emotional paraphrases cause no such degradation, implicating emotional content rather than surface-level changes. Beyond emotion specifically, the benchmark construction procedure provides a general framework for controlled stylistic translation and robustness evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 情绪化表述会显著降低大模型定量推理准确率，而中性化改写可恢复大部分性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大模型在定量推理任务中仅在干净、中性语言上训练和评估，但真实用户查询常带有情绪色彩，情绪框架是否影响推理能力尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 探究情绪化表述（保留所有数值内容）是否以及如何降低大模型的定量推理准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 情绪化表述使准确率下降2-10个百分点，且中性化改写可恢复大部分损失，表明退化源于情绪风格而非内容损坏；非情绪化改写无此退化，排除表面变化影响。
analysis.method: 开发受控情绪翻译框架，将问题改写为情绪变体（保留所有数值和关系），构建Temper-5400数据集（5400个语义验证的情绪-中性对），在GSM8K、MultiArith、ARC-Challenge上评估18个模型。
contributions: 提出受控情绪翻译框架，用于生成情绪变体并保持数值内容不变。
构建Temper-5400基准数据集，包含5400个语义验证的情绪-中性对。
系统评估18个模型，发现情绪化表述导致2-10%准确率下降，且中性化可缓解。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K、MultiArith、ARC-Challenge上评估18个模型（1B到前沿规模），摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖三种情绪类型，未探索更广泛情绪。
未测试情绪对长链推理或复杂数学问题的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 情绪化表述会显著降低大模型定量推理准确率，而中性化改写可恢复大部分性能。

papers.title: Learning Without Losing Identity: Capability Evolution for Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Embodied agents are expected to operate persistently in dynamic physical environments, continuously acquiring new capabilities over time. Existing approaches to improving agent performance often rely on modifying the agent itself -- through prompt engineering, policy updates, or structural redesign -- leading to instability and loss of identity in long-lived systems. In this work, we propose a capability-centric evolution paradigm for embodied agents. We argue that a robot should maintain a persistent agent as its cognitive identity, while enabling continuous improvement through the evolution of its capabilities. Specifically, we introduce the concept of Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs), which represent modular, versioned units of embodied functionality that can be learned, refined, and composed over time. We present a unified framework in which capability evolution is decoupled from agent identity. Capabilities evolve through a closed-loop process involving task execution, experience collection, model refinement, and module updating, while all executions are governed by a runtime layer that enforces safety and policy constraints. We demonstrate through simulated embodied tasks that capability evolution improves task success rates from 32.4% to 91.3% over 20 iterations, outperforming both agent-modification baselines and established skill-learning methods (SPiRL, SkiMo), while preserving zero policy drift and zero safety violations. Our results suggest that separating agent identity from capability evolution provides a scalable and safe foundation for long-term embodied intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出能力进化范式，通过解耦智能体身份与能力模块实现持续学习，在模拟任务中成功率从32.4%提升至91.3%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通过修改智能体自身（如提示工程、策略更新）来提升性能，导致长期运行中的不稳定和身份丢失，亟需一种保持智能体身份一致性的持续学习范式。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变智能体核心身份的前提下，实现具身智能体在动态环境中的持续能力进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出能力进化范式，引入具身能力模块（ECMs）作为模块化、版本化的功能单元，通过任务执行、经验收集、模型精炼和模块更新的闭环过程实现能力进化，并由运行时层保障安全与策略约束。
contributions: 提出能力进化范式，将能力进化与智能体身份解耦，实现持续学习而不丢失身份。
引入具身能力模块（ECMs）作为模块化、可版本化的功能单元，支持学习、精炼和组合。
在模拟具身任务中验证方法有效性，成功率从32.4%提升至91.3%，且零策略漂移和安全违规。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟具身任务中，经过20次迭代，任务成功率从32.4%提升至91.3%，优于智能体修改基线和技能学习方法（SPiRL, SkiMo），且零策略漂移和安全违规。
limitations: 仅在模拟环境中验证，真实机器人部署效果未知。
能力模块的版本管理和组合策略可能随规模增加而复杂化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出能力进化范式，通过解耦智能体身份与能力模块实现持续学习，在模拟任务中成功率从32.4%提升至91.3%。

papers.title: Lightweight LLM Agent Memory with Small Language Models
papers.abstract: Although LLM agents can leverage tools for complex tasks, they still need memory to maintain cross-turn consistency and accumulate reusable information in long-horizon interactions. However, retrieval-based external memory systems incur low online overhead but suffer from unstable accuracy due to limited query construction and candidate filtering. In contrast, many systems use repeated large-model calls for online memory operations, improving accuracy but accumulating latency over long interactions. We propose LightMem, a lightweight memory system for better agent memory driven by Small Language Models (SLMs). LightMem modularizes memory retrieval, writing, and long-term consolidation, and separates online processing from offline consolidation to enable efficient memory invocation under bounded compute. We organize memory into short-term memory (STM) for immediate conversational context, mid-term memory (MTM) for reusable interaction summaries, and long-term memory (LTM) for consolidated knowledge, and uses user identifiers to support independent retrieval and incremental maintenance in multi-user settings. Online, LightMem operates under a fixed retrieval budget and selects memories via a two-stage procedure: vector-based coarse retrieval followed by semantic consistency re-ranking. Offline, it abstracts reusable interaction evidence and incrementally integrates it into LTM. Experiments show consistent gains across model scales, with an average F1 improvement of about 2.5 over A-MEM on LoCoMo, while achieving higher efficiency and low median latency (83 ms for retrieval and 581 ms end-to-end).

analysis.tldr: 提出LightMem，一种基于小语言模型的轻量级LLM Agent记忆系统，通过模块化记忆操作和离线整合实现高效准确的记忆管理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent记忆系统存在两难：检索式外部记忆在线开销低但精度不稳定，而基于大模型调用的记忆操作精度高但延迟累积严重，需要一种兼顾效率与准确性的轻量级方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量级的Agent记忆系统，在有限计算预算下实现高效、准确的记忆检索、写入和长期整合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LightMem将记忆分为短期（STM）、中期（MTM）和长期（LTM），在线操作采用固定检索预算的两阶段流程（向量粗检索+语义一致性重排序），离线阶段抽象可复用的交互证据并增量整合到LTM，使用用户标识支持多用户独立检索。
contributions: 提出LightMem，一种基于SLM的轻量级记忆系统，模块化记忆操作并分离在线与离线处理。
设计三级记忆结构（STM/MTM/LTM）及两阶段检索流程，在低延迟下提升记忆准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在LoCoMo数据集上，LightMem相比A-MEM平均F1提升约2.5，检索中位延迟83ms，端到端581ms。
limitations: 可能依赖特定SLM能力，泛化性需进一步验证。
离线整合策略可能引入延迟，未讨论极端长交互场景下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LightMem，一种基于小语言模型的轻量级LLM Agent记忆系统，通过模块化记忆操作和离线整合实现高效准确的记忆管理。

papers.title: Image-Guided Geometric Stylization of 3D Meshes
papers.abstract: Recent generative models can create visually plausible 3D representations of objects. However, the generation process often allows for implicit control signals, such as contextual descriptions, and rarely supports bold geometric distortions beyond existing data distributions. We propose a geometric stylization framework that deforms a 3D mesh, allowing it to express the style of an image. While style is inherently ambiguous, we utilize pre-trained diffusion models to extract an abstract representation of the provided image. Our coarse-to-fine stylization pipeline can drastically deform the input 3D model to express a diverse range of geometric variations while retaining the valid topology of the original mesh and part-level semantics. We also propose an approximate VAE encoder that provides efficient and reliable gradients from mesh renderings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can create stylized 3D meshes that reflect unique geometric features of the pictured assets, such as expressive poses and silhouettes, thereby supporting the creation of distinctive artistic 3D creations. Project page: https://changwoonchoi.github.io/GeoStyle

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练扩散模型从图像中提取抽象风格表示，对3D网格进行粗到细的几何风格化变形。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成模型难以支持超出数据分布的几何变形，且缺乏对图像风格的有效控制。
analysis.problem: 如何将2D图像的几何风格迁移到3D网格上，同时保持拓扑有效性和语义一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 粗到细的风格化流水线：使用预训练扩散模型提取图像抽象风格表示，通过近似VAE编码器从网格渲染中提供高效梯度，逐步变形3D网格。
contributions: 提出一种图像引导的3D网格几何风格化框架，支持大幅变形并保持拓扑和语义。
设计近似VAE编码器，从网格渲染中提供高效可靠的梯度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的表示能力，对极端风格可能泛化不足。
近似VAE编码器的精度可能影响变形质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练扩散模型从图像中提取抽象风格表示，对3D网格进行粗到细的几何风格化变形。

papers.title: SEARL: Joint Optimization of Policy and Tool Graph Memory for Self-Evolving Agents
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) have demonstrated significant potential in single-turn reasoning tasks. With the paradigm shift toward self-evolving agentic learning, models are increasingly expected to learn from trajectories by synthesizing tools or accumulating explicit experiences. However, prevailing methods typically rely on large-scale LLMs or multi-agent frameworks, which hinder their deployment in resource-constrained environments. The inherent sparsity of outcome-based rewards also poses a substantial challenge, as agents typically receive feedback only upon completion of tasks. To address these limitations, we introduce a Tool-Memory based self-evolving agentic framework SEARL. Unlike approaches that directly utilize interaction experiences, our method constructs a structured experience memory that integrates planning with execution. This provides a novel state abstraction that facilitates generalization across analogous contexts, such as tool reuse. Consequently, agents extract explicit knowledge from historical data while leveraging inter-trajectory correlations to densify reward signals. We evaluate our framework on knowledge reasoning and mathematics tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness in achieving more practical and efficient learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出SEARL框架，通过联合优化策略和工具图记忆实现智能体自我进化，在知识推理和数学任务上有效提升学习效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自我进化智能体方法依赖大规模LLM或多智能体框架，难以在资源受限环境部署；结果奖励稀疏，智能体仅在任务完成时获得反馈，学习效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖大规模模型的情况下，利用结构化经验记忆和稠密化奖励信号实现智能体的高效自我进化学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SEARL框架，构建工具图记忆（Tool-Memory）作为结构化经验记忆，整合规划与执行；通过状态抽象促进工具复用，并利用轨迹间相关性稠密化奖励信号，联合优化策略和记忆。
contributions: 提出基于工具记忆的自我进化智能体框架SEARL，实现资源受限环境下的高效学习。
通过结构化经验记忆和轨迹间相关性稠密化奖励信号，缓解结果奖励稀疏问题。
analysis.experiments: 在知识推理和数学任务上评估，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖任务领域特定的工具定义，泛化性需进一步验证。
未在更复杂或开放域任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SEARL框架，通过联合优化策略和工具图记忆实现智能体自我进化，在知识推理和数学任务上有效提升学习效率。

papers.title: Cross-Modal Emotion Transfer for Emotion Editing in Talking Face Video
papers.abstract: Talking face generation has gained significant attention as a core application of generative models. To enhance the expressiveness and realism of synthesized videos, emotion editing in talking face video plays a crucial role. However, existing approaches often limit expressive flexibility and struggle to generate extended emotions. Label-based methods represent emotions with discrete categories, which fail to capture a wide range of emotions. Audio-based methods can leverage emotionally rich speech signals - and even benefit from expressive text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis - but they fail to express the target emotions because emotions and linguistic contents are entangled in emotional speeches. Images-based methods, on the other hand, rely on target reference images to guide emotion transfer, yet they require high-quality frontal views and face challenges in acquiring reference data for extended emotions (e.g., sarcasm). To address these limitations, we propose Cross-Modal Emotion Transfer (C-MET), a novel approach that generates facial expressions based on speeches by modeling emotion semantic vectors between speech and visual feature spaces. C-MET leverages a large-scale pretrained audio encoder and a disentangled facial expression encoder to learn emotion semantic vectors that represent the difference between two different emotional embeddings across modalities. Extensive experiments on the MEAD and CREMA-D datasets demonstrate that our method improves emotion accuracy by 14% over state-of-the-art methods, while generating expressive talking face videos - even for unseen extended emotions. Code, checkpoint, and demo are available at https://chanhyeok-choi.github.io/C-MET/

analysis.tldr: 提出跨模态情感迁移方法C-MET，利用语音和视觉特征空间的情感语义向量实现说话人脸视频中的情感编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有说话人脸情感编辑方法在表达灵活性和扩展情感生成上存在局限：标签方法离散且范围有限，音频方法情感与语言内容纠缠，图像方法依赖高质量正面参考且难以获取扩展情感数据。
analysis.problem: 如何利用语音信号生成准确且可扩展的面部表情，同时解耦情感与语言内容。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: C-MET：利用大规模预训练音频编码器和解耦的面部表情编码器，学习跨模态情感语义向量（表示不同情感嵌入之间的差异），从而基于语音生成面部表情。
contributions: 提出跨模态情感语义向量学习框架，实现语音到面部表情的情感迁移。
在MEAD和CREMA-D数据集上情感准确率提升14%，并能生成未见过的扩展情感。
analysis.experiments: 在MEAD和CREMA-D数据集上评估，情感准确率比SOTA方法提升14%，并展示了扩展情感生成能力。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练音频编码器的质量。
扩展情感的定义和评估可能主观。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨模态情感迁移方法C-MET，利用语音和视觉特征空间的情感语义向量实现说话人脸视频中的情感编辑。

papers.title: Automotive Engineering-Centric Agentic AI Workflow Framework
papers.abstract: Engineering workflows such as design optimization, simulation-based diagnosis, control tuning, and model-based systems engineering (MBSE) are iterative, constraint-driven, and shaped by prior decisions. Yet many AI methods still treat these activities as isolated tasks rather than as parts of a broader workflow. This paper presents Agentic Engineering Intelligence (AEI), an industrial vision framework that models engineering workflows as constrained, history-aware sequential decision processes in which AI agents support engineer-supervised interventions over engineering toolchains. AEI links an offline phase for engineering data processing and workflow-memory construction with an online phase for workflow-state estimation, retrieval, and decision support. A control-theoretic interpretation is also possible, in which engineering objectives act as reference signals, agents act as workflow controllers, and toolchains provide feedback for intervention selection. Representative automotive use cases in suspension design, reinforcement learning tuning, multimodal engineering knowledge reuse, aerodynamic exploration, and MBSE show how diverse workflows can be expressed within a common formulation. Overall, the paper positions engineering AI as a problem of process-level intelligence and outlines a practical roadmap for future empirical validation in industrial settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个以汽车工程为中心的智能体AI工作流框架，将工程流程建模为受约束的、具有历史感知的序列决策过程。
analysis.research_motivation: 工程工作流（如设计优化、仿真诊断）是迭代、约束驱动且受历史决策影响的，但现有AI方法常将其视为孤立任务，缺乏对整体流程的建模。
analysis.problem: 如何将工程工作流建模为智能体辅助的序列决策过程，并构建一个统一的框架来支持多种汽车工程用例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic Engineering Intelligence (AEI)框架，包含离线阶段（工程数据处理和工作流记忆构建）和在线阶段（工作流状态估计、检索和决策支持），并给出控制论解释。
contributions: 提出AEI框架，将工程工作流建模为约束驱动的历史感知序列决策过程。
通过多个汽车工程用例展示框架的通用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架目前仅为概念性愿景，缺乏实证验证。
可能依赖高质量的历史数据和工程工具链集成。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个以汽车工程为中心的智能体AI工作流框架，将工程流程建模为受约束的、具有历史感知的序列决策过程。

papers.title: MARINER: A 3E-Driven Benchmark for Fine-Grained Perception and Complex Reasoning in Open-Water Environments
papers.abstract: Fine-grained visual understanding and high-level reasoning in real-world open-water environments remain under-explored due to the lack of dedicated benchmarks. We introduce MARINER, a comprehensive benchmark built under the novel Entity-Environment-Event (3E) paradigm. MARINER contains 16,629 multi-source maritime images with 63 fine-grained vessel categories, diverse adverse environments, and 5 typical dynamic maritime incidents, covering fine-grained classification, object detection, and visual question answering tasks. We conduct extensive evaluations on mainstream Multimodal Large language models (MLLMs) and establish baselines, revealing that even advanced models struggle with fine-grained discrimination and causal reasoning in complex marine scenes. As a dedicated maritime benchmark, MARINER fills the gap of realistic and cognitive-level evaluation for maritime multimodal understanding, and promotes future research on robust vision-language models for open-water applications. Appendix and supplementary materials are available at https://lxixim.github.io/MARINER.

analysis.tldr: MARINER 是一个面向开放水域环境的细粒度感知与复杂推理基准，揭示了现有 MLLM 在海洋场景中的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实开放水域环境中的细粒度视觉理解和高层推理因缺乏专用基准而研究不足，亟需一个系统性的评测平台来推动该领域发展。
analysis.problem: 现有基准无法覆盖海洋场景的细粒度分类、恶劣环境及动态事件，导致多模态大模型在开放水域中的感知与推理能力缺乏有效评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使先进的多模态大模型在细粒度判别和海洋复杂场景的因果推理上仍表现困难。
analysis.method: 提出 MARINER 基准，基于实体-环境-事件（3E）范式构建，包含 16,629 张多源海洋图像、63 个细粒度船舶类别、多种恶劣环境和 5 类典型动态海事事件，覆盖细粒度分类、目标检测和视觉问答任务。
contributions: 构建了首个面向开放水域的细粒度感知与复杂推理基准 MARINER，填补了该领域评测空白。
系统评估了主流多模态大模型在海洋场景中的性能，揭示了其在细粒度判别和因果推理上的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在主流多模态大模型上进行了广泛评估并建立了基线，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖船舶类别和特定海事事件，可能无法完全代表所有开放水域场景。
未提及对模型泛化能力或跨域迁移的评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MARINER 是一个面向开放水域环境的细粒度感知与复杂推理基准，揭示了现有 MLLM 在海洋场景中的不足。

papers.title: Toward Generalizable Graph Learning for 3D Engineering AI: Explainable Workflows for CAE Mode Shape Classification and CFD Field Prediction
papers.abstract: Automotive engineering development increasingly relies on heterogeneous 3D data, including finite element (FE) models, body-in-white (BiW) representations, CAD geometry, and CFD meshes. At the same time, engineering teams face growing pressure to shorten development cycles, improve performance and accelerate innovation. Although artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly explored in this domain, many current methods remain task-specific, difficult to interpret, and hard to reuse across development stages. This paper presents a practical graph learning framework for 3D engineering AI, in which heterogeneous engineering assets are converted into physics-aware graph representations and processed by Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). The framework is designed to support both classification and prediction tasks. The framework is validated on two automotive applications: CAE vibration mode shape classification and CFD aerodynamic field prediction. For CAE vibration mode classification, a region-aware BiW graph supports explainable mode classification across vehicle and FE variants under label scarcity. For CFD aerodynamic field prediction, a physics-informed surrogate predicts pressure and wall shear stress (WSS) across aerodynamic body shape variants, while symmetry preserving down sampling retains accuracy with lower computational cost. The framework also outlines data generation guidance that can help engineers identify which additional simulations or labels are valuable to collect next. These results demonstrate a practical and reusable engineering AI workflow for more trustworthy CAE and CFD decision support.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个面向3D工程AI的通用图学习框架，将异构工程数据转化为物理感知图表示，用GNN处理分类与预测任务，并在CAE模态分类和CFD场预测上验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 汽车工程开发依赖异构3D数据，但现有AI方法任务特定、难以解释且不易复用，无法满足缩短开发周期和加速创新的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个通用、可解释且可复用的图学习框架，以支持3D工程数据上的分类和预测任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将异构工程资产（FE模型、BiW、CAD、CFD网格）转换为物理感知图表示，使用GNN处理；针对CAE模态分类采用区域感知BiW图实现可解释分类，针对CFD预测采用物理信息代理模型并利用对称保持下采样降低计算成本。
contributions: 提出一个通用的图学习框架，将异构3D工程数据统一为物理感知图表示，支持分类和预测任务。
在CAE振动模态分类和CFD气动场预测两个实际应用中验证了框架的有效性和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定汽车工程场景验证，泛化性需更多测试。
框架对图构建的物理先验依赖较强，可能限制自动化程度。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个面向3D工程AI的通用图学习框架，将异构工程数据转化为物理感知图表示，用GNN处理分类与预测任务，并在CAE模态分类和CFD场预测上验证。

papers.title: MonoUNet: A Robust Tiny Neural Network for Automated Knee Cartilage Segmentation on Point-of-Care Ultrasound Devices
papers.abstract: Objective: To develop a robust and compact deep learning model for automated knee cartilage segmentation on point-of-care ultrasound (POCUS) devices. Methods: We propose MonoUNet, a novel, highly compact segmentation model consisting of (i) an aggressively reduced U-Net backbone, (ii) a trainable monogenic block that extracts multi-scale local phase features from the input, and (iii) a gating mechanism that injects these features into the encoder stages to reduce sensitivity to variations in ultrasound image appearance. MonoUNet segmentation performance was evaluated on a multi-site, multi-device knee cartilage ultrasound dataset using Dice score and mean average surface distance (MASD). Agreement between MonoUNet and manual cartilage outcomes (thickness and echo intensity) was assessed using Bland-Altman analysis with 95% limits of agreement, and reliability was assessed using intraclass correlation coefficient (ICC$_{2,k}$). Results: Overall, MonoUNet outperformed existing lightweight segmentation models, with average Dice scores ranging from 92.62% to 94.82% and MASD values between 0.133 mm and 0.254 mm. MonoUNet reduces the number of parameters by 10x--700x and computational cost by 14x--2000x relative to existing lightweight models. MonoUNet cartilage outcomes showed excellent reliability and agreement with the manual outcomes: intraclass correlation coefficients (ICC$_{2,k})$=0.96 and bias=2.00% (0.047 mm) for average thickness, and ICC$_{2,k}$=0.99 and bias=0.80% (0.328 a.u.) for echo intensity. Conclusion: Incorporating trainable local phase features improves the robustness of highly compact neural networks for knee cartilage segmentation across varying acquisition settings and could support scalable ultrasound-based assessment and monitoring of knee osteoarthritis using POCUS devices. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/alvinkimbowa/monounet.

analysis.tldr: 提出MonoUNet，一种极紧凑的神经网络，通过可训练的单基因块提取局部相位特征，实现POCUS设备上的鲁棒膝关节软骨分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 膝关节骨关节炎的超声评估需要自动软骨分割，但现有深度学习模型计算量大、对超声图像变化敏感，难以部署在资源受限的POCUS设备上。
analysis.problem: 在保持高分割精度的同时，大幅降低模型参数量和计算成本，并提高对超声图像外观变化的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MonoUNet包含三个组件：(i) 极度缩减的U-Net骨干网络，(ii) 可训练的单基因块，用于提取多尺度局部相位特征，(iii) 门控机制，将这些特征注入编码器阶段，以减少对超声图像变化的敏感性。
contributions: 提出MonoUNet，一种极紧凑的膝关节软骨分割模型，参数量减少10-700倍，计算成本减少14-2000倍。
引入可训练的单基因块和门控机制，提升模型对超声图像变化的鲁棒性。
在多中心、多设备数据集上验证，Dice达92.62%-94.82%，与手动测量结果高度一致。
analysis.experiments: 在多中心、多设备膝关节软骨超声数据集上评估，使用Dice和MASD指标，并与现有轻量级模型对比。通过Bland-Altman分析和ICC评估与手动测量的一致性。
limitations: 仅在膝关节软骨分割任务上验证，泛化到其他超声分割任务需进一步研究。
单基因块和门控机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MonoUNet，一种极紧凑的神经网络，通过可训练的单基因块提取局部相位特征，实现POCUS设备上的鲁棒膝关节软骨分割。

papers.title: Plug-and-Play Logit Fusion for Heterogeneous Pathology Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Pathology foundation models (FMs) have become central to computational histopathology, offering strong transfer performance across a wide range of diagnostic and prognostic tasks. The rapid proliferation of pathology foundation models creates a model-selection bottleneck: no single model is uniformly best, yet exhaustively adapting and validating many candidates for each downstream endpoint is prohibitively expensive. We address this challenge with a lightweight and novel model fusion strategy, LogitProd, which treats independently trained FM-based predictors as fixed experts and learns sample-adaptive fusion weights over their slide-level outputs. The fusion operates purely on logits, requiring no encoder retraining and no feature-space alignment across heterogeneous backbones. We further provide a theoretical analysis showing that the optimal weighted product fusion is guaranteed to perform at least as well as the best individual expert under the training objective. We systematically evaluate LogitProd on \textbf{22} benchmarks spanning WSI-level classification, tile-level classification, gene mutation prediction, and discrete-time survival modeling. LogitProd ranks first on 20/22 tasks and improves the average performance across all tasks by ~3% over the strongest single expert. LogitProd enables practitioners to upgrade heterogeneous FM-based pipelines in a plug-and-play manner, achieving multi-expert gains with $\sim$12$\times$ lower training cost than feature-fusion alternatives.

analysis.tldr: 提出LogitProd，一种即插即用的logit融合策略，无需重训练即可融合异构病理基础模型，在22个基准上平均提升约3%。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理基础模型众多，但单一模型无法在所有任务上最优，逐个适配和验证成本高昂，存在模型选择瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重训练编码器、不进行特征空间对齐的前提下，高效融合异构病理基础模型的预测结果以提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LogitProd：将独立训练的FM预测器视为固定专家，学习样本自适应的融合权重，对slide级logits进行加权乘积融合，无需编码器重训练和特征对齐。
contributions: 提出LogitProd，一种轻量级即插即用的logit融合策略，无需重训练即可融合异构病理基础模型。
理论证明最优加权乘积融合在训练目标下至少不差于最佳单个专家。
在22个基准上系统评估，LogitProd在20/22任务上排名第一，平均性能提升约3%，训练成本比特征融合方法低约12倍。
analysis.experiments: 在22个基准上评估，涵盖WSI级分类、tile级分类、基因突变预测和离散时间生存建模，LogitProd在20/22任务上排名第一，平均性能提升约3%。
limitations: 可能依赖于多个专家模型的存在，若只有一个专家则无法发挥融合优势。
融合权重学习需要少量下游标注数据，在零样本场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LogitProd，一种即插即用的logit融合策略，无需重训练即可融合异构病理基础模型，在22个基准上平均提升约3%。

papers.title: The Accountability Horizon: An Impossibility Theorem for Governing Human-Agent Collectives
papers.abstract: Existing accountability frameworks for AI systems, legal, ethical, and regulatory, rest on a shared assumption: for any consequential outcome, at least one identifiable person had enough involvement and foresight to bear meaningful responsibility. This paper proves that agentic AI systems violate this assumption not as an engineering limitation but as a mathematical necessity once autonomy exceeds a computable threshold. We introduce Human-Agent Collectives, a formalisation of joint human-AI systems where agents are modelled as state-policy tuples within a shared structural causal model. Autonomy is characterised through a four-dimensional information-theoretic profile (epistemic, executive, evaluative, social); collective behaviour through interaction graphs and joint action spaces. We axiomatise legitimate accountability through four minimal properties: Attributability (responsibility requires causal contribution), Foreseeability Bound (responsibility cannot exceed predictive capacity), Non-Vacuity (at least one agent bears non-trivial responsibility), and Completeness (all responsibility must be fully allocated). Our central result, the Accountability Incompleteness Theorem, proves that for any collective whose compound autonomy exceeds the Accountability Horizon and whose interaction graph contains a human-AI feedback cycle, no framework can satisfy all four properties simultaneously. The impossibility is structural: transparency, audits, and oversight cannot resolve it without reducing autonomy. Below the threshold, legitimate frameworks exist, establishing a sharp phase transition. Experiments on 3,000 synthetic collectives confirm all predictions with zero violations. This is the first impossibility result in AI governance, establishing a formal boundary below which current paradigms remain valid and above which distributed accountability mechanisms become necessary.

analysis.tldr: 证明当AI自主性超过可计算阈值时，现有问责框架必然失效，并定义了一个相变边界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI问责框架假设至少有一个可识别的人对后果负有责任，但自主AI系统可能打破这一假设，需要从数学上界定其边界。
analysis.problem: 证明在人类-AI联合系统中，当自主性超过某个阈值时，无法同时满足所有合理的问责属性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析，但理论表明存在一个尖锐的相变：低于阈值时合法框架存在，高于阈值时必然不完整。
analysis.method: 形式化定义人类-AI联合体、自主性的四维信息论特征、交互图，并公理化四个最小问责属性，证明问责不完备定理。
contributions: 首次在AI治理中提出不可能性定理，形式化界定了现有问责框架的有效范围。
通过3000个合成联合体实验验证了理论预测，零违反。
analysis.experiments: 在3000个合成联合体上进行了实验，所有预测均被证实，零违反。
limitations: 理论结果基于形式化假设，实际应用中的自主性度量可能更复杂。
未讨论低于阈值时具体框架的设计细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证明当AI自主性超过可计算阈值时，现有问责框架必然失效，并定义了一个相变边界。

papers.title: ACIArena: Toward Unified Evaluation for Agent Cascading Injection
papers.abstract: Collaboration and information sharing empower Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) but also introduce a critical security risk known as Agent Cascading Injection (ACI). In such attacks, a compromised agent exploits inter-agent trust to propagate malicious instructions, causing cascading failures across the system. However, existing studies consider only limited attack strategies and simplified MAS settings, limiting their generalizability and comprehensive evaluation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ACIArena, a unified framework for evaluating the robustness of MAS. ACIArena offers systematic evaluation suites spanning multiple attack surfaces (i.e., external inputs, agent profiles, inter-agent messages) and attack objectives (i.e., instruction hijacking, task disruption, information exfiltration). Specifically, ACIArena establishes a unified specification that jointly supports MAS construction and attack-defense modules. It covers six widely used MAS implementations and provides a benchmark of 1,356 test cases for systematically evaluating MAS robustness. Our benchmarking results show that evaluating MAS robustness solely through topology is insufficient; robust MAS require deliberate role design and controlled interaction patterns. Moreover, defenses developed in simplified environments often fail to transfer to real-world settings; narrowly scoped defenses may even introduce new vulnerabilities. ACIArena aims to provide a solid foundation for advancing deeper exploration of MAS design principles.

analysis.tldr: ACIArena 是一个统一框架，用于评估多智能体系统对级联注入攻击的鲁棒性，并揭示了拓扑结构不足以衡量鲁棒性，需要精心设计角色和交互模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）中的协作和信息共享引入了级联注入攻击（ACI）这一关键安全风险，但现有研究仅考虑有限的攻击策略和简化的MAS设置，缺乏通用性和全面评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一的框架来系统评估MAS对ACI攻击的鲁棒性，现有评估方法不全面且不具通用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现仅通过拓扑结构评估MAS鲁棒性不足；在简化环境中开发的防御策略往往无法迁移到真实场景，且范围狭窄的防御可能引入新漏洞。
analysis.method: 提出ACIArena框架，包含统一规范支持MAS构建和攻防模块，覆盖多个攻击面（外部输入、智能体档案、智能体间消息）和攻击目标（指令劫持、任务破坏、信息窃取），并包含1356个测试用例的基准。
contributions: 提出了ACIArena，一个统一的多智能体系统鲁棒性评估框架，支持多种攻击面和目标。
构建了包含1356个测试用例的基准，覆盖六种广泛使用的MAS实现，并揭示了拓扑结构不足以衡量鲁棒性等关键发现。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到基准测试结果显示了上述现象。
limitations: 框架可能未涵盖所有类型的ACI攻击或MAS架构。
基准测试用例可能无法完全代表真实世界的复杂场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ACIArena 是一个统一框架，用于评估多智能体系统对级联注入攻击的鲁棒性，并揭示了拓扑结构不足以衡量鲁棒性，需要精心设计角色和交互模式。

papers.title: RoboAgent: Chaining Basic Capabilities for Embodied Task Planning
papers.abstract: This paper focuses on embodied task planning, where an agent acquires visual observations from the environment and executes atomic actions to accomplish a given task. Although recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive results in multimodal understanding and reasoning, their performance remains limited when applied to embodied planning that involves multi-turn interaction, long-horizon reasoning, and extended context analysis. To bridge this gap, we propose RoboAgent, a capability-driven planning pipeline in which the model actively invokes different sub-capabilities. Each capability maintains its own context, and produces intermediate reasoning results or interacts with the environment according to the query given by a scheduler. This framework decomposes complex planning into a sequence of basic vision-language problems that VLMs can better address, enabling a more transparent and controllable reasoning process. The scheduler and all capabilities are implemented with a single VLM, without relying on external tools. To train this VLM, we adopt a multi-stage paradigm that consists of: (1) behavior cloning with expert plans, (2) DAgger training using trajectories collected by the model, and (3) reinforcement learning guided by an expert policy. Across these stages, we exploit the internal information of the environment simulator to construct high-quality supervision for each capability, and we further introduce augmented and synthetic data to enhance the model's performance in more diverse scenarios. Extensive experiments on widely used embodied task planning benchmarks validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Our codes will be available at https://github.com/woyut/RoboAgent_CVPR26.

analysis.tldr: 提出RoboAgent，通过将复杂任务分解为基本视觉-语言子能力并利用多阶段训练，提升VLM在具身任务规划中的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在多轮交互、长程推理和扩展上下文分析的具身规划中表现有限，需要更透明可控的推理框架。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM有效处理具身任务规划中的多步交互和长程推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM在具身规划中因缺乏分解和上下文管理能力而表现受限。
analysis.method: 提出能力驱动的规划流水线RoboAgent，将复杂规划分解为子能力序列，每个能力维护独立上下文；采用多阶段训练（行为克隆、DAgger、强化学习）并利用环境模拟器内部信息构建监督信号。
contributions: 提出RoboAgent框架，通过子能力分解实现透明可控的具身规划。
设计多阶段训练范式，结合行为克隆、DAgger和强化学习，并利用模拟器内部信息提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在广泛使用的具身任务规划基准上验证了有效性，代码将开源。
limitations: 依赖环境模拟器内部信息，可能限制在真实场景的泛化。
多阶段训练复杂度较高，需要大量计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RoboAgent，通过将复杂任务分解为基本视觉-语言子能力并利用多阶段训练，提升VLM在具身任务规划中的表现。

papers.title: ESOM: Efficiently Understanding Streaming Video Anomalies with Open-world Dynamic Definitions
papers.abstract: Open-world video anomaly detection (OWVAD) aims to detect and explain abnormal events under different anomaly definitions, which is important for applications such as intelligent surveillance and live-streaming content moderation. Recent MLLM-based methods have shown promising open-world generalization, but still suffer from three major limitations: inefficiency for practical deployment, lack of streaming processing adaptation, and limited support for dynamic anomaly definitions in both modeling and evaluation. To address these issues, this paper proposes ESOM, an efficient streaming OWVAD model that operates in a training-free manner. ESOM includes a Definition Normalization module to structure user prompts for reducing hallucination, an Inter-frame-matched Intra-frame Token Merging module to compress redundant visual tokens, a Hybrid Streaming Memory module for efficient causal inference, and a Probabilistic Scoring module that converts interval-level textual outputs into frame-level anomaly scores. In addition, this paper introduces OpenDef-Bench, a new benchmark with clean surveillance videos and diverse natural anomaly definitions for evaluating performance under varying conditions. Extensive experiments show that ESOM achieves real-time efficiency on a single GPU and state-of-the-art performance in anomaly temporal localization, classification, and description generation. The code and benchmark will be released at https://github.com/Kamino666/ESOM_OpenDef-Bench.

analysis.tldr: 提出ESOM模型，实现开放世界流式视频异常检测的高效实时处理，并引入新基准OpenDef-Bench。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放世界视频异常检测在智能监控和直播内容审核中至关重要，但现有MLLM方法存在部署效率低、缺乏流式处理支持、动态异常定义建模与评估不足等问题。
analysis.problem: 解决开放世界视频异常检测中实时流式处理、动态异常定义适应及高效推理的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ESOM包含定义归一化模块、帧间匹配帧内令牌合并模块、混合流式记忆模块和概率评分模块，以无训练方式实现高效流式异常检测。
contributions: 提出ESOM模型，实现实时流式开放世界视频异常检测，无需训练。
引入OpenDef-Bench基准，包含干净监控视频和多样自然异常定义，用于评估动态定义下的性能。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明ESOM在单GPU上达到实时效率，并在异常时间定位、分类和描述生成上取得最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练MLLM的泛化能力，对极端罕见异常可能失效。
基准规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ESOM模型，实现开放世界流式视频异常检测的高效实时处理，并引入新基准OpenDef-Bench。

papers.title: Sensitivity-Positional Co-Localization in GQA Transformers
papers.abstract: We investigate a fundamental structural question in Grouped Query Attention (GQA) transformers: do the layers most sensitive to task correctness coincide with the layers where positional encoding adaptation has the greatest leverage? We term this the co-localization hypothesis and test it on Llama 3.1 8B, a 32-layer GQA model with a 4:1 query-to-key-value head ratio. We introduce \LSLORA, which restricts LoRA adaptation to layers identified via a novel correctness-differential hidden-state metric, and GARFA (GQA-Aware RoPE Frequency Adaptation), which attaches 8 learnable per-KV-head scalar multipliers to each targeted layer. Contrary to the co-localization hypothesis, we discover strong anti-localization: task-sensitive layers concentrate in the late network ($\ell\in\{23\text{-}31\}$) while RoPE-influential layers dominate the early network ($\ell\in\{0\text{-}9\}$), yielding Spearman $r_s = -0.735$ ($p = 1.66\times10^{-6}$). Despite this anti-localization, a 4-way cross-layer ablation shows that applying both interventions to the sensitivity-identified layers outperforms all alternative configurations by 4-16 percentage points across six diverse benchmarks (MMLU, GPQA, HumanEval+, MATH, MGSM, ARC), approaching Claude 3.5 Haiku on HumanEval+ (67.1% vs. 68.3%) at \$100 total compute cost.

analysis.tldr: GQA Transformer中任务敏感层与位置编码影响层呈现强反共定位，但联合干预敏感层仍最优。
analysis.research_motivation: GQA Transformer中不同层对任务正确性和位置编码适应的敏感性是否一致尚不清楚，理解这种关系有助于优化微调策略。
analysis.problem: 探究GQA Transformer中任务敏感层与位置编码影响层的共定位关系，并基于此设计高效微调方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现强反共定位：任务敏感层集中在深层（23-31），RoPE影响层集中在浅层（0-9），Spearman相关系数为-0.735。
analysis.method: 提出LSLORA（基于正确性差异隐藏状态指标定位敏感层并应用LoRA）和GARFA（在目标层为每个KV头附加可学习标量乘子调整RoPE频率）。
contributions: 首次揭示GQA Transformer中任务敏感层与位置编码影响层的强反共定位现象。
提出LSLORA和GARFA两种高效微调方法，在6个基准上联合应用优于其他配置4-16个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama 3.1 8B上评估，使用MMLU、GPQA、HumanEval+、MATH、MGSM、ARC六个基准，4路交叉层消融实验显示联合干预敏感层最优。
limitations: 仅测试了单一模型（Llama 3.1 8B），泛化性未知。
反共定位现象的理论解释尚不充分。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GQA Transformer中任务敏感层与位置编码影响层呈现强反共定位，但联合干预敏感层仍最优。

papers.title: RemoteAgent: Bridging Vague Human Intents and Earth Observation with RL-based Agentic MLLMs
papers.abstract: Earth Observation (EO) systems are essentially designed to support domain experts who often express their requirements through vague natural language rather than precise, machine-friendly instructions. Depending on the specific application scenario, these vague queries can demand vastly different levels of visual precision. Consequently, a practical EO AI system must bridge the gap between ambiguous human queries and the appropriate multi-granularity visual analysis tasks, ranging from holistic image interpretation to fine-grained pixel-wise predictions. While Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong semantic understanding, their text-based output format is inherently ill-suited for dense, precision-critical spatial predictions. Existing agentic frameworks address this limitation by delegating tasks to external tools, but indiscriminate tool invocation is computationally inefficient and underutilizes the MLLM's native capabilities. To this end, we propose RemoteAgent, an agentic framework that strategically respects the intrinsic capability boundaries of MLLMs. To empower this framework to understand real user intents, we construct VagueEO, a human-centric instruction dataset pairing EO tasks with simulated vague natural-language queries. By leveraging VagueEO for reinforcement fine-tuning, we align an MLLM into a robust cognitive core that directly resolves image- and sparse region-level tasks. Consequently, RemoteAgent processes suitable tasks internally while intelligently orchestrating specialized tools via the Model Context Protocol exclusively for dense predictions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RemoteAgent achieves robust intent recognition capabilities while delivering highly competitive performance across diverse EO tasks.

analysis.tldr: RemoteAgent 通过强化微调对齐 MLLM 能力边界，智能区分内部处理与工具调用，实现从模糊自然语言到多粒度遥感视觉任务的桥接。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感领域专家常以模糊自然语言表达需求，现有系统难以自动匹配不同粒度的视觉分析任务；MLLM 虽语义理解强但文本输出不适合密集空间预测，而现有代理框架不加区分地调用工具导致计算浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何让 MLLM 在理解模糊人类意图的同时，智能决定哪些任务由自身处理、哪些需调用外部工具，以兼顾效率与精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建人类中心指令数据集 VagueEO，模拟模糊自然语言查询与遥感任务配对；通过强化微调将 MLLM 对齐为认知核心，使其直接处理图像级和稀疏区域级任务，并通过模型上下文协议（MCP）仅对密集预测任务编排专用工具。
contributions: 提出 RemoteAgent 框架，尊重 MLLM 能力边界，实现内部处理与工具调用的智能分工。
构建 VagueEO 数据集，模拟模糊自然语言查询以训练意图理解。
通过强化微调对齐 MLLM，在多种遥感任务上取得竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 VagueEO 数据集的覆盖范围，对未见过的模糊查询泛化性未知。
工具调用策略可能增加系统复杂度，实际部署开销未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RemoteAgent 通过强化微调对齐 MLLM 能力边界，智能区分内部处理与工具调用，实现从模糊自然语言到多粒度遥感视觉任务的桥接。

papers.title: Beyond Surface Artifacts: Capturing Shared Latent Forgery Knowledge Across Modalities
papers.abstract: As generative artificial intelligence evolves, deepfake attacks have escalated from single-modality manipulations to complex, multimodal threats. Existing forensic techniques face a severe generalization bottleneck: by relying excessively on superficial, modality-specific artifacts, they neglect the shared latent forgery knowledge hidden beneath variable physical appearances. Consequently, these models suffer catastrophic performance degradation when confronted with unseen "dark modalities." To break this limitation, this paper introduces a paradigm shift that redefines multimodal forensics from conventional "feature fusion" to "modality generalization." We propose the first modality-agnostic forgery (MAF) detection framework. By explicitly decoupling modality-specific styles, MAF precisely extracts the essential, cross-modal latent forgery knowledge. Furthermore, we define two progressive dimensions to quantify model generalization: transferability toward semantically correlated modalities (Weak MAF), and robustness against completely isolated signals of "dark modality" (Strong MAF). To rigorously assess these generalization limits, we introduce the DeepModal-Bench benchmark, which integrates diverse multimodal forgery detection algorithms and adapts state-of-the-art generalized learning methods. This study not only empirically proves the existence of universal forgery traces but also achieves significant performance breakthroughs on unknown modalities via the MAF framework, offering a pioneering technical pathway for universal multimodal defense.

analysis.tldr: 提出模态无关伪造检测框架MAF，通过解耦模态特定风格提取跨模态潜在伪造知识，实现未知模态泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有伪造检测技术过度依赖模态特定的表面伪影，面对未知模态时性能严重下降，缺乏跨模态泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从多模态伪造数据中提取共享的潜在伪造知识，实现对未知模态的鲁棒检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法依赖模态特定伪影，在未见过的暗模态上性能灾难性下降。
analysis.method: 提出模态无关伪造检测框架MAF，显式解耦模态特定风格，提取跨模态潜在伪造知识；定义弱MAF和强MAF两个泛化维度；构建DeepModal-Bench基准。
contributions: 首次提出模态无关伪造检测框架MAF，实现从特征融合到模态泛化的范式转变。
定义弱MAF和强MAF两个量化泛化能力的维度，并构建DeepModal-Bench基准。
实验证明通用伪造痕迹的存在，并在未知模态上取得显著性能突破。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对高度异质的模态泛化能力有限。
基准覆盖的模态种类可能不够全面。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模态无关伪造检测框架MAF，通过解耦模态特定风格提取跨模态潜在伪造知识，实现未知模态泛化。

papers.title: WUTDet: A 100K-Scale Ship Detection Dataset and Benchmarks with Dense Small Objects
papers.abstract: Ship detection for navigation is a fundamental perception task in intelligent waterway transportation systems. However, existing public ship detection datasets remain limited in terms of scale, the proportion of small-object instances, and scene diversity, which hinders the systematic evaluation and generalization study of detection algorithms in complex maritime environments. To this end, we construct WUTDet, a large-scale ship detection dataset. WUTDet contains 100,576 images and 381,378 annotated ship instances, covering diverse operational scenarios such as ports, anchorages, navigation, and berthing, as well as various imaging conditions including fog, glare, low-lightness, and rain, thereby exhibiting substantial diversity and challenge. Based on WUTDet, we systematically evaluate 20 baseline models from three mainstream detection architectures, namely CNN, Transformer, and Mamba. Experimental results show that the Transformer architecture achieves superior overall detection accuracy (AP) and small-object detection performance (APs), demonstrating stronger adaptability to complex maritime scenes; the CNN architecture maintains an advantage in inference efficiency, making it more suitable for real-time applications; and the Mamba architecture achieves a favorable balance between detection accuracy and computational efficiency. Furthermore, we construct a unified cross-dataset test set, Ship-GEN, to evaluate model generalization. Results on Ship-GEN show that models trained on WUTDet exhibit stronger generalization under different data distributions. These findings demonstrate that WUTDet provides effective data support for the research, evaluation, and generalization analysis of ship detection algorithms in complex maritime scenarios. The dataset is publicly available at: https://github.com/MAPGroup/WUTDet.

analysis.tldr: 构建了10万张规模、密集小目标的船舶检测数据集WUTDet，系统评估了CNN、Transformer、Mamba三类架构的检测性能与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有船舶检测数据集规模小、小目标实例比例低、场景多样性不足，难以系统评估和泛化研究检测算法在复杂海事环境中的表现。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、高密度小目标、场景多样的船舶检测数据集，以及基于该数据集的系统化基准评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Transformer架构在整体检测精度和小目标检测上最优，CNN推理效率最高，Mamba在精度与效率间取得良好平衡；在WUTDet上训练的模型跨数据集泛化能力更强。
analysis.method: 构建包含100,576张图像、381,378个标注实例的船舶检测数据集WUTDet，覆盖港口、锚地、航行、靠泊等场景及雾、眩光、低照度、雨等成像条件；基于该数据集系统评估20个基线模型（CNN、Transformer、Mamba三类架构）。
contributions: 构建了大规模、高密度小目标、场景多样的船舶检测数据集WUTDet（10万+图像，38万+实例）。
系统评估了CNN、Transformer、Mamba三类主流检测架构的性能和泛化能力，揭示了不同架构的适用场景。
构建了跨数据集测试集Ship-GEN，验证了WUTDet训练模型的强泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 基于WUTDet数据集，系统评估了20个基线模型（CNN、Transformer、Mamba三类架构）的检测精度、小目标性能、推理效率及跨数据集泛化能力。
limitations: 数据集仅针对船舶检测，可能不适用于其他目标检测任务。
未提及数据标注的详细质量控制措施。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建了10万张规模、密集小目标的船舶检测数据集WUTDet，系统评估了CNN、Transformer、Mamba三类架构的检测性能与泛化能力。

papers.title: DailyArt: Discovering Articulation from Single Static Images via Latent Dynamics
papers.abstract: Articulated objects are essential for embodied AI and world models, yet inferring their kinematics from a single closed-state image remains challenging because crucial motion cues are often occluded. Existing methods either require multi-state observations or rely on explicit part priors, retrieval, or other auxiliary inputs that partially expose the structure to be inferred. In this work, we present DailyArt, which formulates articulated joint estimation from a single static image as a synthesis-mediated reasoning problem. Instead of directly regressing joints from a heavily occluded observation, DailyArt first synthesizes a maximally articulated opened state under the same camera view to expose articulation cues, and then estimates the full set of joint parameters from the discrepancy between the observed and synthesized states. Using a set-prediction formulation, DailyArt recovers all joints simultaneously without requiring object-specific templates, multi-view inputs, or explicit part annotations at test time. Taking estimated joints as conditions, the framework further supports part-level novel state synthesis as a downstream capability. Extensive experiments show that DailyArt achieves strong performance in articulated joint estimation and supports part-level novel state synthesis conditioned on joints. Project page is available at https://rangooo123.github.io/DaliyArt.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: 从单张静态图像中推断铰接物体运动学参数，通过先合成最大展开状态再估计关节参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 铰接物体对具身AI和世界模型至关重要，但现有方法依赖多状态观测或显式部件先验，无法从单张闭合状态图像中有效推断运动学参数。
analysis.problem: 从单张静态闭合状态图像中同时估计所有关节参数，且无需物体特定模板、多视角输入或测试时显式部件标注。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出合成介导推理框架：先合成同一视角下最大展开状态以暴露关节线索，再通过观测与合成状态的差异估计所有关节参数，采用集合预测方式同时恢复所有关节。
contributions: 提出从单张静态图像估计铰接物体关节参数的新范式，无需多状态观测或显式先验。
通过合成展开状态暴露运动线索，并利用集合预测同时恢复所有关节参数。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖合成展开状态的质量，对复杂铰接结构或极端遮挡效果有限。
未提及对未见过的物体类别或真实场景的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从单张静态图像中推断铰接物体运动学参数，通过先合成最大展开状态再估计关节参数。

papers.title: Symbiotic-MoE: Unlocking the Synergy between Generation and Understanding
papers.abstract: Empowering Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) with image generation often leads to catastrophic forgetting in understanding tasks due to severe gradient conflicts. While existing paradigms like Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) mitigate this conflict through structural isolation, they fundamentally sever cross-modal synergy and suffer from capacity fragmentation. In this work, we present Symbiotic-MoE, a unified pre-training framework that resolves task interference within a native multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) Transformers architecture with zero-parameter overhead. We first identify that standard MoE tuning leads to routing collapse, where generative gradients dominate expert utilization. To address this, we introduce Modality-Aware Expert Disentanglement, which partitions experts into task-specific groups while utilizing shared experts as a multimodal semantic bridge. Crucially, this design allows shared experts to absorb fine-grained visual semantics from generative tasks to enrich textual representations. To optimize this, we propose a Progressive Training Strategy featuring differential learning rates and early-stage gradient shielding. This mechanism not only shields pre-trained knowledge from early volatility but eventually transforms generative signals into constructive feedback for understanding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Symbiotic-MoE achieves rapid generative convergence while unlocking cross-modal synergy, boosting inherent understanding with remarkable gains on MMLU and OCRBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出Symbiotic-MoE框架，通过模态感知专家解耦和渐进训练策略，在多模态MoE中实现生成与理解任务的协同，缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LMMs在同时支持图像生成和理解时，因梯度冲突导致理解任务灾难性遗忘；MoT等结构隔离方法虽缓解冲突但割裂了跨模态协同，且存在容量碎片化问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加参数开销的前提下，在多模态MoE Transformer中解决生成与理解任务间的干扰，并实现两者协同增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准MoE微调会导致路由崩溃，生成梯度主导专家利用；共享专家可从生成任务中吸收细粒度视觉语义以丰富文本表征。
analysis.method: 提出Symbiotic-MoE，包含模态感知专家解耦（将专家分为任务特定组和共享专家）和渐进训练策略（差异化学习率和早期梯度屏蔽）。
contributions: 提出Symbiotic-MoE框架，在零参数开销下实现生成与理解任务的协同。
发现标准MoE微调中的路由崩溃现象，并设计模态感知专家解耦和渐进训练策略解决。
实验表明Symbiotic-MoE在MMLU和OCRBench上取得显著提升，同时保持生成性能。
analysis.experiments: 在MMLU和OCRBench上评估理解性能，摘要未提供具体数值但报告了显著提升。
limitations: 可能仅在特定多模态架构上验证，泛化性未知。
渐进训练策略的额外超参数调优成本未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Symbiotic-MoE框架，通过模态感知专家解耦和渐进训练策略，在多模态MoE中实现生成与理解任务的协同，缓解灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: MIMIC-Py: An Extensible Tool for Personality-Driven Automated Game Testing with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Modern video games are complex, non-deterministic systems that are difficult to test automatically at scale. Although prior work shows that personality-driven Large Language Model (LLM) agents can improve behavioural diversity and test coverage, existing tools largely remain research prototypes and lack cross-game reusability. This tool paper presents MIMIC-Py, a Python-based automated game-testing tool that transforms personality-driven LLM agents into a reusable and extensible framework. MIMIC-Py exposes personality traits as configurable inputs and adopts a modular architecture that decouples planning, execution, and memory from game-specific logic. It supports multiple interaction mechanisms, enabling agents to interact with games via exposed APIs or synthesized code. We describe the design of MIMIC-Py and show how it enables deployment to new game environments with minimal engineering effort, bridging the gap between research prototypes and practical automated game testing. The source code and a demo video are available on our project webpage: https://mimic-persona.github.io/MIMIC-Py-Home-Page/.

analysis.tldr: MIMIC-Py 是一个基于 LLM 的、可扩展的自动化游戏测试工具，通过人格驱动和模块化架构提升跨游戏复用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代视频游戏复杂且非确定性，难以大规模自动测试；现有基于人格驱动 LLM 的测试工具多为研究原型，缺乏跨游戏复用性。
analysis.problem: 如何将人格驱动的 LLM 智能体转化为可复用、可扩展的自动化游戏测试框架，降低部署到新游戏环境的工程成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MIMIC-Py 工具，采用模块化架构将规划、执行和记忆与游戏特定逻辑解耦，人格特质作为可配置输入，支持通过 API 或合成代码与游戏交互。
