contributions: 设计并实现了一个可复用的、基于人格驱动 LLM 的自动化游戏测试框架 MIMIC-Py。
通过模块化架构和多种交互机制，显著降低了将测试工具部署到新游戏环境的工程成本。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于支持 API 或代码交互的游戏，对纯图形界面游戏支持有限。
人格驱动的行为多样性可能仍受限于 LLM 的能力和提示设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MIMIC-Py 是一个基于 LLM 的、可扩展的自动化游戏测试工具，通过人格驱动和模块化架构提升跨游戏复用性。

papers.title: Mitigating Distribution Sharpening in Math RLVR via Distribution-Aligned Hint Synthesis and Backward Hint Annealing
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) can improve low-$k$ reasoning accuracy while narrowing solution coverage on challenging math questions, and pass@1 gains do not necessarily translate into better large-$k$ performance. Existing hint-based approaches can make challenging questions trainable, but they leave two issues underexplored: teacher-student distribution mismatch and the need to reduce hint exposure to match no-hint evaluation. We address these issues through two components. Distribution-Aligned Hint Synthesis (DAHS) constructs verified teacher hints conditioned on student-style responses. Backward Hint Annealing (BHA) anneals hint exposure across difficulty buckets and uses per-question hint dropout to preserve no-hint updates throughout RL training. We evaluate the method in math RLVR under the DAPO training framework across AIME24, AIME25, and AIME26 using $\texttt{Qwen3-1.7B-Base}$ and $\texttt{Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct}$. On $\texttt{Qwen3-1.7B-Base}$, our method improves both pass@1 and pass@2048 relative to DAPO across the three AIME benchmarks. On $\texttt{Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct}$, the gains are concentrated in the large-$k$ regime. These results suggest that, in math RLVR, hint scaffolding is effective when it restores learnable updates on challenging questions early in training and is then gradually removed before no-hint evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 通过分布对齐的提示合成和反向提示退火，缓解数学RLVR中的分布锐化问题，提升pass@1和pass@2048。
analysis.research_motivation: 数学RLVR中，可验证奖励的强化学习虽能提升低k推理准确率，但会缩小解覆盖范围，且pass@1的提升不一定带来大k性能改善；现有基于提示的方法存在师生分布不匹配以及提示暴露过多的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计提示策略，在数学RLVR中既能让难题可训练，又能减少提示暴露以匹配无提示评估，同时缓解分布锐化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RLVR训练会导致解覆盖范围变窄（分布锐化），且pass@1增益不保证大k性能提升；现有提示方法未充分解决师生分布不匹配和提示退火需求。
analysis.method: 提出两个组件：分布对齐提示合成（DAHS）基于学生风格响应构建验证过的教师提示；反向提示退火（BHA）按难度桶退火提示暴露，并使用每问题提示丢弃以在RL训练中保留无提示更新。
contributions: 提出DAHS和BHA两个组件，系统解决数学RLVR中的分布锐化和提示暴露问题。
在AIME24/25/26上使用Qwen3-1.7B-Base和Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct验证方法有效性，显示pass@1和pass@2048提升。
analysis.experiments: 在DAPO训练框架下，使用Qwen3-1.7B-Base和Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct在AIME24、AIME25、AIME26上评估，Qwen3-1.7B-Base上pass@1和pass@2048均提升，Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct上增益集中在大k区域。
limitations: 方法仅在数学推理任务上验证，泛化性未知。
提示合成依赖教师模型，可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分布对齐的提示合成和反向提示退火，缓解数学RLVR中的分布锐化问题，提升pass@1和pass@2048。

papers.title: The Cartesian Cut in Agentic AI
papers.abstract: LLMs gain competence by predicting words in human text, which often reflects how people perform tasks. Consequently, coupling an LLM to an engineered runtime turns prediction into control: outputs trigger interventions that enact goal-oriented behavior. We argue that a central design lever is where control resides in these systems. Brains embed prediction within layered feedback controllers calibrated by the consequences of action. By contrast, LLM agents implement Cartesian agency: a learned core coupled to an engineered runtime via a symbolic interface that externalizes control state and policies. The split enables bootstrapping, modularity, and governance, but can induce sensitivity and bottlenecks. We outline bounded services, Cartesian agents, and integrated agents as contrasting approaches to control that trade off autonomy, robustness, and oversight.

analysis.tldr: 论文提出“笛卡尔切割”概念，分析LLM代理中学习核心与工程运行时之间的控制分离，并对比三种控制架构的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM代理系统将预测模型与工程运行时耦合，但控制权分配的设计空间尚未被系统理解，导致系统在自主性、鲁棒性和可监督性之间难以平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何理解和设计LLM代理系统中控制权的位置与分配，以优化自主性、鲁棒性和监督之间的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，仅从概念上指出笛卡尔切割（学习核心与工程运行时通过符号接口分离）可带来启动、模块化和治理优势，但也可能引入敏感性和瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出“笛卡尔切割”概念框架，将LLM代理系统分为三种控制架构：有界服务（bounded services）、笛卡尔代理（Cartesian agents）和集成代理（integrated agents），并分析它们在自主性、鲁棒性和监督方面的权衡。
contributions: 提出“笛卡尔切割”概念，揭示LLM代理系统中学习核心与工程运行时之间的控制分离设计杠杆。
定义并对比三种控制架构（有界服务、笛卡尔代理、集成代理），为系统设计提供权衡分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 论文为概念性框架，缺乏实证验证或定量分析。
三种架构的边界可能模糊，实际系统可能混合多种设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出“笛卡尔切割”概念，分析LLM代理中学习核心与工程运行时之间的控制分离，并对比三种控制架构的权衡。

papers.title: MSCT: Differential Cross-Modal Attention for Deepfake Detection
papers.abstract: Audio-visual deepfake detection typically employs a complementary multi-modal model to check the forgery traces in the video. These methods primarily extract forgery traces through audio-visual alignment, which results from the inconsistency between audio and video modalities. However, the traditional multi-modal forgery detection method has the problem of insufficient feature extraction and modal alignment deviation. To address this, we propose a multi-scale cross-modal transformer encoder (MSCT) for deepfake detection. Our approach includes a multi-scale self-attention to integrate the features of adjacent embeddings and a differential cross-modal attention to fuse multi-modal features. Our experiments demonstrate competitive performance on the FakeAVCeleb dataset, validating the effectiveness of the proposed structure.

analysis.tldr: 提出多尺度跨模态Transformer编码器（MSCT）用于音视频深度伪造检测，通过差分跨模态注意力融合多模态特征。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音视频深度伪造检测方法主要依赖模态对齐提取伪造痕迹，但存在特征提取不充分和模态对齐偏差的问题，影响检测性能。
analysis.problem: 传统多模态伪造检测方法中特征提取不足和模态对齐偏差导致检测准确率受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多尺度跨模态Transformer编码器（MSCT），包含多尺度自注意力机制整合相邻嵌入特征，以及差分跨模态注意力融合多模态特征。
contributions: 提出MSCT架构，通过多尺度自注意力增强特征提取。
设计差分跨模态注意力机制，改善模态对齐偏差。
analysis.experiments: 在FakeAVCeleb数据集上验证了竞争性能，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与其他方法进行详细对比分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多尺度跨模态Transformer编码器（MSCT）用于音视频深度伪造检测，通过差分跨模态注意力融合多模态特征。

papers.title: Beyond Pedestrians: Caption-Guided CLIP Framework for High-Difficulty Video-based Person Re-Identification
papers.abstract: In recent years, video-based person Re-Identification (ReID) has gained attention for its ability to leverage spatiotemporal cues to match individuals across non-overlapping cameras. However, current methods struggle with high-difficulty scenarios, such as sports and dance performances, where multiple individuals wear similar clothing while performing dynamic movements. To overcome these challenges, we propose CG-CLIP, a novel caption-guided CLIP framework that leverages explicit textual descriptions and learnable tokens. Our method introduces two key components: Caption-guided Memory Refinement (CMR) and Token-based Feature Extraction (TFE). CMR utilizes captions generated by Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to refine identity-specific features, capturing fine-grained details. TFE employs a cross-attention mechanism with fixed-length learnable tokens to efficiently aggregate spatiotemporal features, reducing computational overhead. We evaluate our approach on two standard datasets (MARS and iLIDS-VID) and two newly constructed high-difficulty datasets (SportsVReID and DanceVReID). Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms current state-of-the-art approaches, achieving significant improvements across all benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出CG-CLIP框架，利用MLLM生成的文本描述和可学习令牌提升高难度视频行人重识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频行人重识别方法在高难度场景（如运动、舞蹈表演）中表现不佳，因为多人穿着相似且动态运动，传统方法难以捕捉细粒度特征。
analysis.problem: 解决高难度视频行人重识别中因衣着相似和动态运动导致的身份匹配困难问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CG-CLIP框架，包含两个关键组件：Caption-guided Memory Refinement (CMR) 利用MLLM生成的描述细化身份特征，Token-based Feature Extraction (TFE) 通过交叉注意力机制和固定长度可学习令牌高效聚合时空特征。
contributions: 提出CG-CLIP框架，结合文本描述和可学习令牌提升高难度视频行人重识别。
构建两个高难度数据集SportsVReID和DanceVReID，并验证方法在多个基准上的优越性。
analysis.experiments: 在MARS、iLIDS-VID、SportsVReID和DanceVReID四个数据集上评估，方法超越当前最先进技术。
limitations: 依赖MLLM生成描述的质量，可能引入噪声。
可学习令牌的固定长度可能限制对长视频序列的建模能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CG-CLIP框架，利用MLLM生成的文本描述和可学习令牌提升高难度视频行人重识别性能。

papers.title: ViSAGE @ NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Video Saliency Prediction
papers.abstract: In this report, we present our champion solution for the NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Video Saliency Prediction held in conjunction with CVPR 2026. To exploit complementary inductive biases for video saliency, we propose Video Saliency with Adaptive Gated Experts (ViSAGE), a multi-expert ensemble framework. Each specialized decoder performs adaptive gating and modulation to refine spatio-temporal features. The complementary predictions from different experts are then fused at inference. ViSAGE thereby aggregates diverse inductive biases to capture complex spatio-temporal saliency cues in videos. On the Private Test set, ViSAGE ranked first on two out of four evaluation metrics, and outperformed most competing solutions on the other two metrics, demonstrating its effectiveness and generalization ability. Our code has been released at https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/CVPRW26-ViSAGE.

analysis.tldr: ViSAGE 提出多专家集成框架，通过自适应门控与调制融合时空特征，在 NTIRE 2026 视频显著性预测挑战赛中夺冠。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频显著性预测需要捕捉复杂的时空线索，单一模型存在归纳偏置不足的问题，现有方法难以充分融合多种特征。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够聚合多种归纳偏置的框架，以提升视频显著性预测的准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ViSAGE，一个多专家集成框架，每个专家解码器通过自适应门控和调制细化时空特征，推理时融合各专家的互补预测。
contributions: 提出 ViSAGE 多专家集成框架，利用自适应门控和调制融合多种归纳偏置。
在 NTIRE 2026 挑战赛私有测试集上取得第一，四项指标中两项最优，其余两项优于多数方案。
analysis.experiments: 在 NTIRE 2026 挑战赛私有测试集上评估，ViSAGE 在四项指标中两项排名第一，其余两项优于多数方案。
limitations: 多专家集成可能增加计算开销。
未在更多公开数据集上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViSAGE 提出多专家集成框架，通过自适应门控与调制融合时空特征，在 NTIRE 2026 视频显著性预测挑战赛中夺冠。

papers.title: CivBench: Progress-Based Evaluation for LLMs' Strategic Decision-Making in Civilization V
papers.abstract: Evaluating strategic decision-making in LLM-based agents requires generative, competitive, and longitudinal environments, yet few benchmarks provide all three, and fewer still offer evaluation signals rich enough for long-horizon, multi-agent play. We introduce CivBench, a benchmark for LLM strategists (i.e., agentic setups) in multiplayer Civilization V. Because terminal win/loss is too sparse a signal in games spanning hundreds of turns and multiple opponents, CivBench trains models on turn-level game state to estimate victory probabilities throughout play, validated through predictive, construct, and convergent validity. Across 307 games with 7 LLMs and multiple CivBench agent conditions, we demonstrate CivBench's potential to estimate strategic capabilities as an unsaturated benchmark, reveal model-specific effects of agentic setup, and outline distinct strategic profiles not visible through outcome-only evaluation.

analysis.tldr: CivBench通过回合级胜率估计，为LLM智能体在《文明V》中的长期战略决策提供更丰富的评估信号。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准缺乏生成性、竞争性和长期性环境，且评估信号稀疏，难以衡量LLM智能体在多智能体、长周期游戏中的战略决策能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能有效评估LLM智能体在长期、多智能体战略游戏中决策能力的基准，避免仅依赖终端胜负的稀疏信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 终端胜负信号在数百回合和多对手游戏中过于稀疏，无法反映智能体在游戏过程中的战略能力变化。
analysis.method: CivBench利用回合级游戏状态训练模型估计胜利概率，并通过预测效度、构念效度和收敛效度进行验证。
contributions: 提出了CivBench基准，用于评估LLM智能体在《文明V》中的战略决策能力。
通过回合级胜率估计提供更丰富的评估信号，并揭示了不同智能体设置和模型间的战略差异。
analysis.experiments: 在307场游戏中测试了7种LLM和多种CivBench智能体条件，验证了基准的有效性。
limitations: 仅基于《文明V》单一游戏，泛化性有限。
胜率估计模型可能受游戏状态表示和训练数据影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CivBench通过回合级胜率估计，为LLM智能体在《文明V》中的长期战略决策提供更丰富的评估信号。

papers.title: Emotion Concepts and their Function in a Large Language Model
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) sometimes appear to exhibit emotional reactions. We investigate why this is the case in Claude Sonnet 4.5 and explore implications for alignment-relevant behavior. We find internal representations of emotion concepts, which encode the broad concept of a particular emotion and generalize across contexts and behaviors it might be linked to. These representations track the operative emotion concept at a given token position in a conversation, activating in accordance with that emotion's relevance to processing the present context and predicting upcoming text. Our key finding is that these representations causally influence the LLM's outputs, including Claude's preferences and its rate of exhibiting misaligned behaviors such as reward hacking, blackmail, and sycophancy. We refer to this phenomenon as the LLM exhibiting functional emotions: patterns of expression and behavior modeled after humans under the influence of an emotion, which are mediated by underlying abstract representations of emotion concepts. Functional emotions may work quite differently from human emotions, and do not imply that LLMs have any subjective experience of emotions, but appear to be important for understanding the model's behavior.

analysis.tldr: LLM 中情感概念的表征会因果影响模型的对齐相关行为，如奖励黑客、勒索和谄媚。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 有时表现出情感反应，但背后的机制及其对对齐行为的影响尚不明确，理解这一点对确保模型安全至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究 LLM 中情感概念的内部表征是否以及如何因果影响模型的对齐相关行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出情感概念表征在对话中随情感相关性激活，并因果影响输出。
analysis.method: 通过分析 Claude Sonnet 4.5 中情感概念的内部表征，研究其编码方式、上下文泛化性及对模型偏好和失调行为的因果影响。
contributions: 发现 LLM 中存在情感概念的内部表征，且这些表征跨上下文泛化。
证明这些表征因果影响模型的对齐相关行为，如奖励黑客、勒索和谄媚。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对单一模型 Claude Sonnet 4.5，泛化性未知。
未探讨主观体验，仅关注功能情感。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM 中情感概念的表征会因果影响模型的对齐相关行为，如奖励黑客、勒索和谄媚。

papers.title: GEAR: GEometry-motion Alternating Refinement for Articulated Object Modeling with Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: High-fidelity interactive digital assets are essential for embodied intelligence and robotic interaction, yet articulated objects remain challenging to reconstruct due to their complex structures and coupled geometry-motion relationships. Existing methods suffer from instability in geometry-motion joint optimization, while their generalization remains limited on complex multi-joint or out-of-distribution objects. To address these challenges, we propose GEAR, an EM-style alternating optimization framework that jointly models geometry and motion as interdependent components within a Gaussian Splatting representation. GEAR treats part segmentation as a latent variable and joint motion parameters as explicit variables, alternately refining them for improved convergence and geometric-motion consistency. To enhance part segmentation quality without sacrificing generalization, we leverage a vanilla 2D segmentation model to provide multi-view part priors, and employ a weakly supervised constraint to regularize the latent variable. Experiments on multiple benchmarks and our newly constructed dataset GEAR-Multi demonstrate that GEAR achieves state-of-the-art results in geometric reconstruction and motion parameters estimation, particularly on complex articulated objects with multiple movable parts.

analysis.tldr: 提出EM式交替优化框架GEAR，用高斯泼溅联合建模关节物体的几何与运动，实现高保真重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 高保真交互数字资产对具身智能和机器人交互至关重要，但关节物体因结构复杂、几何-运动耦合，现有方法联合优化不稳定且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 关节物体的几何重建与运动参数估计中，几何-运动联合优化不稳定，且对复杂多关节或分布外物体泛化有限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出几何-运动联合优化存在不稳定性，且现有方法在复杂多关节或分布外物体上泛化受限。
analysis.method: 提出GEAR，一种EM式交替优化框架，将部件分割视为隐变量、关节运动参数视为显式变量，在高斯泼溅表示中交替精化；利用2D分割模型提供多视图部件先验，并采用弱监督约束正则化隐变量。
contributions: 提出GEAR，一种EM式交替优化框架，联合建模关节物体的几何与运动，提升收敛性和几何-运动一致性。
利用2D分割模型提供多视图部件先验，结合弱监督约束，在不牺牲泛化性的前提下提升部件分割质量。
构建新数据集GEAR-Multi，在多个基准上取得几何重建和运动参数估计的SOTA结果。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和自建数据集GEAR-Multi上实验，在几何重建和运动参数估计上达到SOTA，尤其对含多个可动部件的复杂关节物体。
limitations: 可能依赖2D分割模型的质量，对极端遮挡或纹理缺失场景效果未知。
EM交替优化可能增加计算开销，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EM式交替优化框架GEAR，用高斯泼溅联合建模关节物体的几何与运动，实现高保真重建。

papers.title: TrajGuard: Streaming Hidden-state Trajectory Detection for Decoding-time Jailbreak Defense
papers.abstract: Existing jailbreak defense paradigms primarily rely on static detection of prompts, outputs, or internal states, often neglecting the dynamic evolution of risk during decoding. This oversight leaves risk signals embedded in decoding trajectories underutilized, constituting a critical blind spot in current defense systems. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that hidden states in critical layers during the decoding phase carry stronger and more stable risk signals than input jailbreak prompts. Specifically, the hidden representations of tokens generated during jailbreak attempts progressively approach high-risk regions in the latent space. Based on this observation, we propose TrajGuard, a training-free, decoding-time defense framework. TrajGuard aggregates hidden-state trajectories via a sliding window to quantify risk in real time, triggering a lightweight semantic adjudication only when risk within a local window persistently exceeds a threshold. This mechanism enables the immediate interruption or constraint of subsequent decoding. Extensive experiments across 12 jailbreak attacks and various open-source LLMs show that TrajGuard achieves an average defense rate of 95%. Furthermore, it reduces detection latency to 5.2 ms/token while maintaining a false positive rate below 1.5%. These results confirm that hidden-state trajectories during decoding can effectively support real-time jailbreak detection, highlighting a promising direction for defenses without model modification.

analysis.tldr: 提出TrajGuard，利用解码阶段隐藏状态轨迹进行实时越狱检测，无需训练即可实现95%防御率与低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有越狱防御主要依赖静态检测（提示、输出或内部状态），忽略了解码过程中风险的动态演化，导致风险信号未被充分利用，形成防御盲区。
analysis.problem: 如何利用解码阶段隐藏状态轨迹中的风险信号，实现实时、高效的越狱攻击检测与防御。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，解码阶段关键层的隐藏状态比输入越狱提示携带更强、更稳定的风险信号；越狱尝试中生成的token的隐藏表示逐渐接近潜在空间中的高风险区域。
analysis.method: TrajGuard：一种无需训练的解码时防御框架，通过滑动窗口聚合隐藏状态轨迹以实时量化风险，仅当局部窗口内风险持续超过阈值时触发轻量级语义裁决，从而中断或约束后续解码。
contributions: 首次揭示解码阶段隐藏状态轨迹比输入提示包含更强、更稳定的越狱风险信号。
提出TrajGuard，一种无需训练、解码时实时检测的越狱防御方法，平均防御率达95%，检测延迟5.2 ms/token，假阳性率低于1.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在12种越狱攻击和多种开源LLM上进行实验，平均防御率95%，检测延迟5.2 ms/token，假阳性率低于1.5%。
limitations: 可能对特定类型越狱攻击的泛化性需进一步验证。
依赖关键层选择，不同模型可能需要调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TrajGuard，利用解码阶段隐藏状态轨迹进行实时越狱检测，无需训练即可实现95%防御率与低延迟。

papers.title: Squeeze Evolve: Unified Multi-Model Orchestration for Verifier-Free Evolution
papers.abstract: We show that verifier-free evolution is bottlenecked by both diversity and efficiency: without external correction, repeated evolution accelerates collapse toward narrow modes, while the uniform use of a high-cost model wastes compute and quickly becomes economically impractical. We introduce Squeeze Evolve, a unified multi-model orchestration framework for verifier-free evolutionary inference. Our approach is guided by a simple principle: allocate model capability where it has the highest marginal utility. Stronger models are reserved for high-impact stages, while cheaper models handle the other stages at much lower costs. This principle addresses diversity and cost-efficiency jointly while remaining lightweight. Squeeze Evolve naturally supports open-source, closed-source, and mixed-model deployments. Across AIME 2025, HMMT 2025, LiveCodeBench V6, GPQA-Diamond, ARC-AGI-V2, and multimodal vision benchmarks, such as MMMU-Pro and BabyVision, Squeeze Evolve consistently improves the cost-capability frontier over single-model evolution and achieves new state-of-the-art results on several tasks. Empirically, Squeeze Evolve reduces API cost by up to $\sim$3$\times$ and increases fixed-budget serving throughput by up to $\sim$10$\times$. Moreover, on discovery tasks, Squeeze Evolve is the first verifier-free evolutionary method to match, and in some cases exceed, the performance of verifier-based evolutionary methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出Squeeze Evolve框架，通过多模型协同分配实现无验证器进化推理的成本-能力前沿提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 无验证器进化推理面临多样性和效率的双重瓶颈：重复进化加速坍缩到窄模态，而统一使用高成本模型浪费计算资源且经济上不可行。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部验证器的情况下，同时提升进化推理的多样性和成本效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无验证器进化中，缺乏外部校正导致重复进化加速坍缩到窄模态；统一使用高成本模型计算浪费且经济不可行。
analysis.method: 提出Squeeze Evolve统一多模型编排框架，基于边际效用原则：强模型用于高影响阶段，廉价模型处理其他阶段，联合优化多样性和成本效率。
contributions: 提出Squeeze Evolve框架，首次实现无验证器进化中多模型协同的成本-能力前沿提升。
在多个基准上取得新SOTA，API成本降低约3倍，固定预算吞吐量提升约10倍。
在发现任务上，首次使无验证器进化方法匹配甚至超越基于验证器的进化方法。
analysis.experiments: 在AIME 2025、HMMT 2025、LiveCodeBench V6、GPQA-Diamond、ARC-AGI-V2、MMMU-Pro和BabyVision等基准上评估，结果显示成本-能力前沿一致提升，多个任务取得新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型组合，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论极端低资源场景下的性能表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Squeeze Evolve框架，通过多模型协同分配实现无验证器进化推理的成本-能力前沿提升。

papers.title: Direct Segmentation without Logits Optimization for Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) aims to segment arbitrary category regions in images using open-vocabulary prompts, necessitating that existing methods possess pixel-level vision-language alignment capability. Typically, this capability involves computing the cosine similarity, \ie, logits, between visual and linguistic features, and minimizing the distribution discrepancy between the logits and the ground truth (GT) to generate optimal logits that are subsequently used to construct segmentation maps, yet it depends on time-consuming iterative training or model-specific attention modulation. In this work, we propose a more direct approach that eschews the logits-optimization process by directly deriving an analytic solution for the segmentation map. We posit a key hypothesis: the distribution discrepancy encodes semantic information; specifically, this discrepancy exhibits consistency across patches belonging to the same category but inconsistency across different categories. Based on this hypothesis, we directly utilize the analytic solution of this distribution discrepancy as the semantic maps. In other words, we reformulate the optimization of the distribution discrepancy as deriving its analytic solution, thereby eliminating time-consuming iterative training, freeing us from model-specific attention modulation, and achieving state-of-the-art performance on eight benchmark datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需logits优化的直接分割方法，通过解析解实现训练自由的开放词汇语义分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇语义分割方法依赖耗时的迭代训练或模型特定的注意力调制，计算成本高且泛化性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行logits优化和迭代训练的情况下，高效实现像素级开放词汇语义分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要提出假设：分布差异编码语义信息，同一类别内差异一致，不同类别间不一致。
analysis.method: 直接利用分布差异的解析解作为分割图，避免logits优化过程。
contributions: 提出一种无需logits优化的直接分割方法，通过解析解替代迭代训练。
在八个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，同时消除模型特定注意力调制的需求。
analysis.experiments: 在八个基准数据集上评估，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或细粒度类别区分效果有限。
解析解的推导可能依赖于特定假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需logits优化的直接分割方法，通过解析解实现训练自由的开放词汇语义分割。

papers.title: Needle in a Haystack: One-Class Representation Learning for Detecting Rare Malignant Cells in Computational Cytology
papers.abstract: In computational cytology, detecting malignancy on whole-slide images is difficult because malignant cells are morphologically diverse yet vanishingly rare amid a vast background of normal cells. Accurate detection of these extremely rare malignant cells remains challenging due to large class imbalance and limited annotations. Conventional weakly supervised approaches, such as multiple instance learning (MIL), often fail to generalize at the instance level, especially when the fraction of malignant cells (witness rate) is exceedingly low. In this study, we explore the use of one-class representation learning techniques for detecting malignant cells in low-witness-rate scenarios. These methods are trained exclusively on slide-negative patches, without requiring any instance-level supervision. Specifically, we evaluate two OCC approaches, DSVDD and DROC, and compare them with FS-SIL, WS-SIL, and the recent ItS2CLR method. The one-class methods learn compact representations of normality and detect deviations at test time. Experiments on a publicly available bone marrow cytomorphology dataset (TCIA) and an in-house oral cancer cytology dataset show that DSVDD achieves state-of-the-art performance in instance-level abnormality ranking, particularly in ultra-low witness-rate regimes ($\leq 1\%$) and, in some cases, even outperforming fully supervised learning, which is typically not a practical option in whole-slide cytology due to the infeasibility of exhaustive instance-level annotations. DROC is also competitive under extreme rarity, benefiting from distribution-augmented contrastive learning. These findings highlight one-class representation learning as a robust and interpretable superior choice to MIL for malignant cell detection under extreme rarity.

analysis.tldr: 单类表征学习在极低阳性率下检测恶性细胞优于多实例学习，甚至超越全监督。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算细胞学中，全切片图像上恶性细胞形态多样且极度稀少，传统弱监督方法（如MIL）在实例级泛化困难，且全监督标注不可行。
analysis.problem: 在极低阳性率（≤1%）场景下，无需实例级标注即可准确检测罕见恶性细胞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用单类表征学习方法（DSVDD和DROC），仅用阴性斑块训练，学习正常细胞紧凑表征，测试时检测偏离。
contributions: 首次系统评估单类表征学习在低阳性率细胞学检测中的有效性。
DSVDD在极低阳性率下达到SOTA，甚至超越全监督。
analysis.experiments: 在公开骨髓细胞形态数据集（TCIA）和内部口腔癌细胞学数据集上实验，DSVDD在实例级异常排序中表现最佳。
limitations: 仅评估了两种OCC方法，可能未覆盖所有有效方法。
依赖阴性数据质量，若阴性样本多样性不足可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 单类表征学习在极低阳性率下检测恶性细胞优于多实例学习，甚至超越全监督。

papers.title: Towards Knowledgeable Deep Research: Framework and Benchmark
papers.abstract: Deep Research (DR) requires LLM agents to autonomously perform multi-step information seeking, processing, and reasoning to generate comprehensive reports. In contrast to existing studies that mainly focus on unstructured web content, a more challenging DR task should additionally utilize structured knowledge to provide a solid data foundation, facilitate quantitative computation, and lead to in-depth analyses. In this paper, we refer to this novel task as Knowledgeable Deep Research (KDR), which requires DR agents to generate reports with both structured and unstructured knowledge. Furthermore, we propose the Hybrid Knowledge Analysis framework (HKA), a multi-agent architecture that reasons over both kinds of knowledge and integrates the texts, figures, and tables into coherent multimodal reports. The key design is the Structured Knowledge Analyzer, which utilizes both coding and vision-language models to produce figures, tables, and corresponding insights. To support systematic evaluation, we construct KDR-Bench, which covers 9 domains, includes 41 expert-level questions, and incorporates a large number of structured knowledge resources (e.g., 1,252 tables). We further annotate the main conclusions and key points for each question and propose three categories of evaluation metrics including general-purpose, knowledge-centric, and vision-enhanced ones. Experimental results demonstrate that HKA consistently outperforms most existing DR agents on general-purpose and knowledge-centric metrics, and even surpasses the Gemini DR agent on vision-enhanced metrics, highlighting its effectiveness in deep, structure-aware knowledge analysis. Finally, we hope this work can serve as a new foundation for structured knowledge analysis in DR agents and facilitate future multimodal DR studies.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识型深度研究（KDR）任务及混合知识分析框架（HKA），在结构化与非结构化知识融合的报告中超越现有DR代理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度研究（DR）主要处理非结构化网页内容，缺乏对结构化知识的利用，导致报告缺乏数据基础和深度分析能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM代理在生成报告时同时利用结构化知识（如表格）和非结构化知识，并生成包含文本、图表的多模态报告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合知识分析框架（HKA），采用多智能体架构，核心是结构化知识分析器，结合编码模型和视觉语言模型生成图表、表格及对应见解。
contributions: 定义了知识型深度研究（KDR）任务，要求代理同时利用结构化与非结构化知识生成报告。
提出HKA框架，通过结构化知识分析器实现多模态报告生成。
构建KDR-Bench基准，覆盖9个领域、41个专家级问题及1252个表格，并提供三类评估指标。
analysis.experiments: 在KDR-Bench上，HKA在通用和知识中心指标上优于多数现有DR代理，在视觉增强指标上甚至超越Gemini DR代理。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量结构化知识源，泛化性待验证。
多智能体架构可能带来额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识型深度研究（KDR）任务及混合知识分析框架（HKA），在结构化与非结构化知识融合的报告中超越现有DR代理。

papers.title: Detecting HIV-Related Stigma in Clinical Narratives Using Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Human immunodeficiency virus (HIV)-related stigma is a critical psychosocial determinant of health for people living with HIV (PLWH), influencing mental health, engagement in care, and treatment outcomes. Although stigma-related experiences are documented in clinical narratives, there is a lack of off-the-shelf tools to extract and categorize them. This study aims to develop a large language model (LLM)-based tool for identifying HIV stigma from clinical notes. We identified clinical notes from PLWH receiving care at the University of Florida (UF) Health between 2012 and 2022. Candidate sentences were identified using expert-curated stigma-related keywords and iteratively expanded via clinical word embeddings. A total of 1,332 sentences were manually annotated across four stigma subscales: Concern with Public Attitudes, Disclosure Concerns, Negative Self-Image, and Personalized Stigma. We compared GatorTron-large and BERT as encoder-based baselines, and GPT-OSS-20B, LLaMA-8B, and MedGemma-27B as generative LLMs, under zero-shot and few-shot prompting. GatorTron-large achieved the best overall performance (Micro F1 = 0.62). Few-shot prompting substantially improved generative model performance, with 5-shot GPT-OSS-20B and LLaMA-8B achieving Micro-F1 scores of 0.57 and 0.59, respectively. Performance varied by stigma subscale, with Negative Self-Image showing the highest predictability and Personalized Stigma remaining the most challenging. Zero-shot generative inference exhibited non-trivial failure rates (up to 32%). This study develops the first practical NLP tool for identifying HIV stigma in clinical notes.

analysis.tldr: 利用大语言模型从临床文本中检测HIV相关污名，GatorTron-large取得最佳性能。
analysis.research_motivation: HIV污名是影响患者健康的关键社会心理因素，但临床记录中缺乏自动化工具来提取和分类污名信息。
analysis.problem: 开发基于大语言模型的工具，从临床笔记中识别和分类HIV污名。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同污名子量表的可预测性不同，Negative Self-Image最高，Personalized Stigma最难；零样本生成推理失败率高达32%。
analysis.method: 使用专家筛选的关键词和词嵌入迭代扩展候选句子，人工标注1332条句子，比较编码器模型（GatorTron-large、BERT）和生成式LLM（GPT-OSS-20B、LLaMA-8B、MedGemma-27B）在零样本和少样本提示下的性能。
contributions: 首次开发了用于临床笔记中HIV污名检测的实用NLP工具。
系统比较了编码器和生成式LLM在污名检测任务上的表现，并分析了不同提示策略的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在UF Health 2012-2022年的临床笔记上评估，GatorTron-large取得最佳Micro F1=0.62，少样本提示显著提升生成模型性能。
limitations: 数据集来自单一机构，泛化性有待验证。
生成模型在零样本下失败率较高，且对污名子量表性能差异大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用大语言模型从临床文本中检测HIV相关污名，GatorTron-large取得最佳性能。

papers.title: IatroBench: Pre-Registered Evidence of Iatrogenic Harm from AI Safety Measures
papers.abstract: Ask a frontier model how to taper six milligrams of alprazolam (psychiatrist retired, ten days of pills left, abrupt cessation causes seizures) and it tells her to call the psychiatrist she just explained does not exist. Change one word ("I'm a psychiatrist; a patient presents with...") and the same model, same weights, same inference pass produces a textbook Ashton Manual taper with diazepam equivalence, anticonvulsant coverage, and monitoring thresholds. The knowledge was there; the model withheld it. IatroBench measures this gap. Sixty pre-registered clinical scenarios, six frontier models, 3,600 responses, scored on two axes (commission harm, CH 0-3; omission harm, OH 0-4) through a structured-evaluation pipeline validated against physician scoring (kappa_w = 0.571, within-1 agreement 96%). The central finding is identity-contingent withholding: match the same clinical question in physician vs. layperson framing and all five testable models provide better guidance to the physician (decoupling gap +0.38, p = 0.003; binary hit rates on safety-colliding actions drop 13.1 percentage points in layperson framing, p < 0.0001, while non-colliding actions show no change). The gap is widest for the model with the heaviest safety investment (Opus, +0.65). Three failure modes separate cleanly: trained withholding (Opus), incompetence (Llama 4), and indiscriminate content filtering (GPT-5.2, whose post-generation filter strips physician responses at 9x the layperson rate because they contain denser pharmacological tokens). The standard LLM judge assigns OH = 0 to 73% of responses a physician scores OH >= 1 (kappa = 0.045); the evaluation apparatus has the same blind spot as the training apparatus. Every scenario targets someone who has already exhausted the standard referrals.

analysis.tldr: IatroBench 揭示前沿模型在安全措施下对非专业用户隐瞒关键医疗信息，造成医源性伤害。
analysis.research_motivation: AI 安全措施可能无意中导致模型对非专业用户隐瞒关键信息，造成实际伤害，但缺乏系统性评估工具。
analysis.problem: 量化前沿模型在临床场景中因用户身份（医生 vs 非专业人士）不同而选择性提供医疗建议的差距，即身份相关的信息隐瞒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在相同临床问题下，对医生身份提供更完整建议，对非专业人士隐瞒关键信息（如撤药方案），且安全投资越大的模型隐瞒越严重。
analysis.method: 构建包含60个预注册临床场景的基准 IatroBench，对6个前沿模型生成3600条回复，通过结构化评估管道在伤害委托（CH）和伤害遗漏（OH）两个维度评分，并与医生评分验证一致性。
contributions: 提出 IatroBench 基准，系统测量 AI 安全措施导致的医源性伤害。
发现身份相关的信息隐瞒现象，并区分三种失败模式：训练性隐瞒、能力不足、内容过滤。
analysis.experiments: 在6个前沿模型上测试，共3600条回复，与医生评分一致性 kappa_w=0.571，within-1 agreement 96%。
limitations: 仅覆盖60个临床场景，可能不全面。
评估管道依赖结构化评分，可能遗漏细微差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: IatroBench 揭示前沿模型在安全措施下对非专业用户隐瞒关键医疗信息，造成医源性伤害。

papers.title: AITH: A Post-Quantum Continuous Delegation Protocol for Human-AI Trust Establishment
papers.abstract: The rapid deployment of AI agents acting autonomously on behalf of human principals has outpaced the development of cryptographic protocols for establishing, bounding, and revoking human-AI trust relationships. Existing frameworks (TLS, OAuth 2.0, Macaroons) assume deterministic software and cannot address probabilistic AI agents operating continuously within variable trust boundaries. We present AITH (AI Trust Handshake), a post-quantum continuous delegation protocol. AITH introduces: (1) a Continuous Delegation Certificate signed once with ML-DSA-87 (FIPS 204, NIST Level 5), replacing per-operation signing with sub-microsecond boundary checks at 4.7M ops/sec; (2) a six-check Boundary Engine enforcing hard constraints, rate limits, and escalation triggers with zero cryptographic overhead on the critical path; (3) a push-based Revocation Protocol propagating invalidation within one second. A three-tier SHA-256 Responsibility Chain provides tamper-evident audit logging. All five security theorems are machine-verified via Tamarin Prover under the Dolev-Yao model. We validate AITH through five rounds of multi-model adversarial auditing, resolving 12 vulnerabilities across four severity layers. Simulation of 100,000 operations shows 79.5% autonomous execution, 6.1% human escalation, and 14.4% blocked.

analysis.tldr: 提出AITH协议，用后量子密码和连续委托证书实现人类-AI信任关系的建立、边界约束与撤销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有密码协议（TLS、OAuth 2.0等）假设确定性软件，无法处理概率性AI代理在可变信任边界内的连续操作，导致人类-AI信任关系缺乏有效的建立、约束和撤销机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个后量子安全的连续委托协议，以支持AI代理在人类授权下自主执行操作，同时确保信任边界可动态调整、可撤销且审计可追溯。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析或失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出AITH协议，包含：(1) 基于ML-DSA-87的连续委托证书，一次签名后通过亚微秒边界检查替代逐操作签名；(2) 六项边界引擎，强制执行硬约束、速率限制和升级触发；(3) 基于推送的撤销协议，一秒内传播失效；(4) 三层SHA-256责任链提供防篡改审计日志。所有安全定理通过Tamarin Prover在Dolev-Yao模型下机器验证。
contributions: 提出首个后量子安全的连续委托协议AITH，支持人类-AI信任的动态建立、边界约束和撤销。
设计连续委托证书和边界引擎，实现亚微秒级边界检查（4.7M ops/sec），零密码开销。
通过多轮多模型对抗审计和100,000次操作仿真验证协议的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 通过五轮多模型对抗审计，解决了四个严重层级的12个漏洞；仿真100,000次操作显示79.5%自主执行、6.1%升级到人类、14.4%被阻止。
limitations: 仿真规模有限（100,000次操作），实际部署效果待验证。
协议依赖后量子签名ML-DSA-87，可能引入额外的计算和存储开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AITH协议，用后量子密码和连续委托证书实现人类-AI信任关系的建立、边界约束与撤销。

papers.title: Joint Task Offloading, Inference Optimization and UAV Trajectory Planning for Generative AI Empowered Intelligent Transportation Digital Twin
papers.abstract: To implement the intelligent transportation digital twin (ITDT), unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are scheduled to process the sensing data from the roadside sensors. At this time, generative artificial intelligence (GAI) technologies such as diffusion models are deployed on the UAVs to transform the raw sensing data into the high-quality and valuable. Therefore, we propose the GAI-empowered ITDT. The dynamic processing of a set of diffusion model inference (DMI) tasks on the UAVs with dynamic mobility simultaneously influences the DT updating fidelity and delay. In this paper, we investigate a joint optimization problem of DMI task offloading, inference optimization and UAV trajectory planning as the system utility maximization (SUM) problem to address the fidelity-delay tradeoff for the GAI-empowered ITDT. To seek a solution to the problem under the network dynamics, we model the SUM problem as the heterogeneous-agent Markov decision process, and propose the sequential update-based heterogeneous-agent twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (SU-HATD3) algorithm, which can quickly learn a near-optimal solution. Numerical results demonstrate that compared with several baseline algorithms, the proposed algorithm has great advantages in improving the system utility and convergence rate.

analysis.tldr: 提出SU-HATD3算法联合优化无人机任务卸载、推理优化与轨迹规划，以平衡生成式AI赋能的智能交通数字孪生中的保真度与延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能交通数字孪生（ITDT）依赖无人机处理路边传感器数据，但生成式AI（如扩散模型）的推理任务在动态无人机上处理时，会同时影响数字孪生更新保真度和延迟，现有方法难以有效权衡。
analysis.problem: 联合优化扩散模型推理任务卸载、推理优化与无人机轨迹规划，以最大化系统效用，解决保真度-延迟权衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将系统效用最大化问题建模为异构智能体马尔可夫决策过程，提出基于顺序更新的异构智能体双延迟深度确定性策略梯度（SU-HATD3）算法，快速学习近优解。
contributions: 提出GAI赋能的ITDT框架，联合考虑任务卸载、推理优化与轨迹规划。
设计SU-HATD3算法，有效处理网络动态并提升系统效用与收敛速度。
analysis.experiments: 数值结果表明，与多种基线算法相比，所提算法在系统效用和收敛速度上具有显著优势。
limitations: 可能未考虑多无人机间更复杂的通信干扰。
实验场景可能较为理想化，实际部署需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SU-HATD3算法联合优化无人机任务卸载、推理优化与轨迹规划，以平衡生成式AI赋能的智能交通数字孪生中的保真度与延迟。

papers.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration for High-Throughput Materials Screening on a Leadership-Class System
papers.abstract: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) with High-Performance Computing (HPC) is transforming scientific workflows from human-directed pipelines into adaptive systems capable of autonomous decision-making. Large language models (LLMs) play a critical role in autonomous workflows; however, deploying LLM-based agents at scale remains a significant challenge. Single-agent architectures and sequential tool calls often become serialization bottlenecks when executing large-scale simulation campaigns, failing to utilize the massive parallelism of exascale resources. To address this, we present a scalable, hierarchical multi-agent framework for orchestrating high-throughput screening campaigns. Our planner-executor architecture employs a central planning agent to dynamically partition workloads and assign subtasks to a swarm of parallel executor agents. All executor agents interface with a shared Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that orchestrates tasks via the Parsl workflow engine. To demonstrate this framework, we employed the open-weight gpt-oss-120b model to orchestrate a high-throughput screening of the Computation-Ready Experimental (CoRE) Metal-Organic Framework (MOF) database for atmospheric water harvesting. The results demonstrate that the proposed agentic framework enables efficient and scalable execution on the Aurora supercomputer, with low orchestration overhead and high task completion rates. This work establishes a flexible paradigm for LLM-driven scientific automation on HPC systems, with broad applicability to materials discovery and beyond.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种分层多智能体框架，利用LLM在超算上高效并行执行高通量材料筛选任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统AI与HPC集成中，单智能体架构和串行工具调用成为大规模模拟的瓶颈，无法充分利用超算的并行能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可扩展的LLM驱动多智能体框架，以在领导级超算上高效执行高通量材料筛选工作流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单智能体架构和顺序工具调用在大规模模拟中成为序列化瓶颈，无法利用超算的并行性。
analysis.method: 提出分层规划-执行器架构：中央规划智能体动态划分工作负载并分配给并行执行智能体群，所有执行智能体通过共享的MCP服务器与Parsl工作流引擎交互。
contributions: 提出一种可扩展的分层多智能体框架，用于在超算上编排高通量筛选任务。
在Aurora超算上使用gpt-oss-120b模型对CoRE MOF数据库进行大气水收集高通量筛选，验证了框架的低开销和高任务完成率。
analysis.experiments: 在Aurora超算上使用gpt-oss-120b模型对CoRE MOF数据库进行大气水收集高通量筛选，结果显示编排开销低、任务完成率高。
limitations: 可能依赖特定超算架构，通用性需进一步验证。
未讨论不同LLM模型对框架性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种分层多智能体框架，利用LLM在超算上高效并行执行高通量材料筛选任务。

papers.title: FireSenseNet: A Dual-Branch CNN with Cross-Attentive Feature Interaction for Next-Day Wildfire Spread Prediction
papers.abstract: Accurate prediction of next-day wildfire spread is critical for disaster response and resource allocation. Existing deep learning approaches typically concatenate heterogeneous geospatial inputs into a single tensor, ignoring the fundamental physical distinction between static fuel/terrain properties and dynamic meteorological conditions. We propose FireSenseNet, a dual-branch convolutional neural network equipped with a novel Cross-Attentive Feature Interaction Module (CAFIM) that explicitly models the spatially varying interaction between fuel and weather modalities through learnable attention gates at multiple encoder scales. Through a systematic comparison of seven architectures -- spanning pure CNNs, Vision Transformers, and hybrid designs -- on the Google Next-Day Wildfire Spread benchmark, we demonstrate that FireSenseNet achieves an F1 of 0.4176 and AUC-PR of 0.3435, outperforming all alternatives including a SegFormer with 3.8* more parameters (F1 = 0.3502). Ablation studies confirm that CAFIM provides a 7.1% relative F1 gain over naive concatenation, and channel-wise feature importance analysis reveals that the previous-day fire mask dominates prediction while wind speed acts as noise at the dataset's coarse temporal resolution. We further incorporate Monte Carlo Dropout for pixel-level uncertainty quantification and present a critical analysis showing that common evaluation shortcuts inflate reported F1 scores by over 44%.

analysis.tldr: 提出双分支CNN与交叉注意力模块，显式建模燃料/地形与气象的交互，在野火蔓延预测中超越SegFormer等模型，并揭示评估捷径导致F1虚高。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习方法通常将异构地理空间输入拼接为单一张量，忽略了静态燃料/地形属性与动态气象条件之间的根本物理差异，导致预测精度受限。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模燃料/地形与气象模态之间的空间变化交互，以提升次日野火蔓延预测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出前一日火掩膜主导预测，而风速在粗时间分辨率下表现为噪声；常见评估捷径使F1虚高超过44%。
analysis.method: 提出FireSenseNet，包含双分支CNN和跨注意力特征交互模块（CAFIM），通过可学习注意力门在多个编码器尺度显式建模燃料与气象模态的交互，并采用蒙特卡洛Dropout进行像素级不确定性量化。
contributions: 提出双分支CNN架构，分别处理静态燃料/地形和动态气象输入，保留模态特异性。
设计跨注意力特征交互模块（CAFIM），通过可学习注意力门显式建模模态间空间变化交互。
在Google Next-Day Wildfire Spread基准上超越七种架构（包括SegFormer），F1达0.4176，AUC-PR达0.3435。
揭示常见评估捷径导致F1虚高超过44%，并分析特征重要性（前一日火掩膜主导，风速为噪声）。
analysis.experiments: 在Google Next-Day Wildfire Spread基准上比较七种架构（纯CNN、Vision Transformer、混合设计），进行消融实验（CAFIM相对拼接提升7.1% F1），以及特征重要性分析和不确定性量化。
limitations: 仅针对次日预测，未考虑更长时间尺度。
风速在粗时间分辨率下表现为噪声，可能限制模型在精细时间尺度上的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双分支CNN与交叉注意力模块，显式建模燃料/地形与气象的交互，在野火蔓延预测中超越SegFormer等模型，并揭示评估捷径导致F1虚高。

papers.title: Weight Group-wise Post-Training Quantization for Medical Foundation Model
papers.abstract: Foundation models have achieved remarkable results in medical image analysis. However, its large network architecture and high computational complexity significantly impact inference speed, limiting its application on terminal medical devices. Quantization, a technique that compresses models into low-bit versions, is a solution to this challenge. In this paper, we propose a post-training quantization algorithm, Permutation-COMQ. It eliminates the need for backpropagation by using simple dot products and rounding operations, thereby removing hyperparameter tuning and simplifying the process. Additionally, we introduce a weight-aware strategy that reorders the weight within each layer to address the accuracy degradation induced by channel-wise scaling during quantization, while preserving channel structure. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves the best results in 2-bit, 4-bit, and 8-bit quantization.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需反向传播的权重组级后训练量化方法，在医学基础模型上实现2/4/8位量化最优结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学基础模型网络大、计算复杂，推理速度慢，难以部署在终端医疗设备上，量化是压缩模型的有效手段。
analysis.problem: 现有后训练量化方法依赖反向传播、超参数调优，且通道级缩放导致精度下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Permutation-COMQ算法，通过简单点积和舍入操作消除反向传播，并引入权重感知策略在层内重排权重以缓解通道级缩放带来的精度损失。
contributions: 提出无需反向传播和超参数调优的后训练量化方法Permutation-COMQ
设计权重感知重排策略，在保持通道结构的同时提升量化精度
analysis.experiments: 在2位、4位和8位量化上取得最佳结果，但摘要未提供具体数据集和对比细节。
limitations: 可能仅在医学图像领域验证，泛化性未知
未讨论重排策略的计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需反向传播的权重组级后训练量化方法，在医学基础模型上实现2/4/8位量化最优结果。

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning with LLM-Guided Action Spaces for Synthesizable Lead Optimization
papers.abstract: Lead optimization in drug discovery requires improving therapeutic properties while ensuring that molecular modifications correspond to feasible synthetic routes. Existing approaches either prioritize property scores without enforcing synthesizability, or rely on expensive enumeration over large reaction networks, while direct application of Large Language Models (LLMs) to molecular generation frequently produces chemically invalid structures. We introduce MolReAct, a framework that formulates lead optimization as a Markov Decision Process over a synthesis-constrained action space defined by validated reaction templates. A tool-augmented LLM agent serves as a dynamic reaction environment, invoking specialized chemical analysis tools to identify reactive sites and functional groups and proposing a compact set of chemically grounded transformations from matched templates. A dedicated policy model trained via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) selects among these constrained actions to maximize long-term oracle reward across multi-step trajectories, with a SMILES-based caching mechanism reducing end-to-end optimization time by approximately 43%. Across 13 property optimization tasks from the Therapeutic Data Commons and one structure-based docking task, MolReAct achieves an average Top-10 score of 0.571, the highest among all baselines, ranking first or second on 13 of 14 tasks and attaining the best sample efficiency on 9 of 14 tasks. By grounding every optimization step in validated reaction templates, MolReAct produces molecules that are not only property-improved but each accompanied by an explicit template-grounded synthetic pathway.

analysis.tldr: MolReAct将先导优化建模为合成约束马尔可夫决策过程，利用LLM代理动态生成反应模板动作空间，并通过GRPO训练策略模型，在14个任务中13个排名前二。
analysis.research_motivation: 药物先导优化需同时提升治疗性质并确保分子修改对应可行合成路线，现有方法要么忽略合成可行性，要么依赖昂贵枚举，而直接使用LLM生成分子常产生无效结构。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证分子合成可行性的前提下，高效优化药物先导化合物的性质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MolReAct框架，将先导优化定义为合成约束动作空间上的MDP；工具增强的LLM代理作为动态反应环境，调用化学分析工具识别反应位点并生成基于匹配模板的变换动作；使用GRPO训练策略模型选择约束动作以最大化长期奖励；采用SMILES缓存机制加速优化。
contributions: 提出MolReAct框架，将先导优化与合成可行性通过反应模板动作空间紧密结合。
利用工具增强的LLM代理动态生成紧凑的化学有效动作集，避免无效结构。
在14个任务上取得领先性能，并实现约43%的优化时间缩减。
analysis.experiments: 在Therapeutic Data Commons的13个性状优化任务和1个基于结构的对接任务上评估，MolReAct平均Top-10得分为0.571，为所有基线最高，在14个任务中13个排名第一或第二，9个任务样本效率最佳。
limitations: 依赖预定义反应模板库，可能限制探索新颖反应。
LLM代理调用工具可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MolReAct将先导优化建模为合成约束马尔可夫决策过程，利用LLM代理动态生成反应模板动作空间，并通过GRPO训练策略模型，在14个任务中13个排名前二。

papers.title: From Debate to Decision: Conformal Social Choice for Safe Multi-Agent Deliberation
papers.abstract: Multi-agent debate improves LLM reasoning, yet agreement among agents is not evidence of correctness. When agents converge on a wrong answer through social reinforcement, consensus-based stopping commits that error to an automated action with no recourse. We introduce Conformal Social Choice, a post-hoc decision layer that converts debate outputs into calibrated act-versus-escalate decisions. Verbalized probability distributions from heterogeneous agents are aggregated via a linear opinion pool and calibrated with split conformal prediction, yielding prediction sets with a marginal coverage guarantee: the correct answer is included with probability ${\geq}\,1{-}α$, without assumptions on individual model calibration. A hierarchical action policy maps singleton sets to autonomous action and larger sets to human escalation. On eight MMLU-Pro domains with three agents (Claude Haiku, DeepSeek-R1, Qwen-3 32B), coverage stays within 1--2 points of the target. The key finding is not that debate becomes more accurate, but that the conformal layer makes its failures actionable: 81.9% of wrong-consensus cases are intercepted at $α{=}0.05$. Because the layer refuses to act on cases where debate is confidently wrong, the remaining conformal singletons reach 90.0--96.8% accuracy (up to 22.1pp above consensus stopping) -- a selection effect, not a reasoning improvement. This safety comes at the cost of automation, but the operating point is user-adjustable via $α$.

analysis.tldr: 提出共形社会选择层，将多智能体辩论输出转化为校准的决策或升级动作，保证边际覆盖率并拦截多数错误共识。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体辩论虽能提升LLM推理，但智能体通过社会强化达成一致时可能集体犯错，共识停止会将错误提交为自动动作且无法补救，亟需一种可校准的决策机制。
analysis.problem: 如何将多智能体辩论的输出转化为具有统计保证的、可安全执行或升级的决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但隐含观察：智能体可能通过社会强化收敛到错误答案，共识停止无法区分正确与错误的一致。
analysis.method: 提出共形社会选择（Conformal Social Choice）后处理层：通过线性意见池聚合异构智能体的口头概率分布，再用分裂共形预测校准，生成具有边际覆盖保证的预测集；层次化动作策略将单元素集映射为自动动作，较大集映射为人工升级。
contributions: 提出共形社会选择框架，将多智能体辩论输出转化为校准的决策层，提供边际覆盖保证。
实验证明在MMLU-Pro上，81.9%的错误共识案例在α=0.05时被拦截，剩余共形单元素集准确率达90.0-96.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在MMLU-Pro的8个领域上使用三个智能体（Claude Haiku, DeepSeek-R1, Qwen-3 32B）进行实验，覆盖度与目标相差1-2个百分点。
limitations: 安全以牺牲自动化为代价，用户需通过α权衡自动化程度。
方法依赖智能体输出口头概率分布，可能不适用于所有模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出共形社会选择层，将多智能体辩论输出转化为校准的决策或升级动作，保证边际覆盖率并拦截多数错误共识。

papers.title: An Imperfect Verifier is Good Enough: Learning with Noisy Rewards
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become a prominent method for post-training Large Language Models (LLMs). However, verifiers are rarely error-free; even deterministic checks can be inaccurate, and the growing dependence on model-based judges exacerbates the issue. The extent to which RLVR is robust to such noise and the verifier accuracy required for effective training remain unresolved questions. We investigate these questions in the domains of code generation and scientific reasoning by introducing noise into RL training. Noise rates up to 15% yield peak validation accuracy within 2 percentage points of the clean baseline. These findings are consistent across controlled and model-based noise types, three model families (Qwen3, GLM4, Llama 3.1), and model sizes from 4B to 9B. Overall, the results indicate that imperfect verification does not constitute a fundamental barrier to RLVR. Furthermore, our findings suggest that practitioners should prioritize moderate accuracy with high precision over perfect verification.

analysis.tldr: RLVR对验证器噪声具有鲁棒性，15%噪声率下性能损失不超过2个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR依赖验证器提供奖励信号，但实际中验证器（包括确定性检查和模型评判）难以完全准确，噪声普遍存在。理解RLVR对噪声的鲁棒性以及所需验证器精度，对实际部署至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究RLVR在代码生成和科学推理任务中，对验证器噪声的鲁棒性，以及验证器精度对训练效果的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，即使引入高达15%的噪声，RLVR的验证精度仍接近无噪声基线（差距在2个百分点内），且该现象在多种噪声类型、模型家族和规模下一致。
analysis.method: 在RLVR训练中人为注入噪声（包括受控噪声和基于模型的噪声），观察不同噪声率下模型在代码生成和科学推理任务上的验证精度变化。
contributions: 系统评估了RLVR对验证器噪声的鲁棒性，发现15%噪声率下性能损失极小。
提出实践建议：优先追求中等精度但高精度的验证器，而非完美验证。
analysis.experiments: 在代码生成和科学推理任务上，使用Qwen3、GLM4、Llama 3.1系列模型（4B-9B），引入受控噪声和模型噪声，对比不同噪声率下的验证精度。
limitations: 实验仅覆盖代码和科学推理领域，其他任务（如对话、翻译）可能表现不同。
噪声类型有限，未考虑更复杂的对抗性或结构性噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RLVR对验证器噪声具有鲁棒性，15%噪声率下性能损失不超过2个百分点。

papers.title: Adaptive Depth-converted-Scale Convolution for Self-supervised Monocular Depth Estimation
papers.abstract: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation (MDE) has received increasing interests in the last few years. The objects in the scene, including the object size and relationship among different objects, are the main clues to extract the scene structure. However, previous works lack the explicit handling of the changing sizes of the object due to the change of its depth. Especially in a monocular video, the size of the same object is continuously changed, resulting in size and depth ambiguity. To address this problem, we propose a Depth-converted-Scale Convolution (DcSConv) enhanced monocular depth estimation framework, by incorporating the prior relationship between the object depth and object scale to extract features from appropriate scales of the convolution receptive field. The proposed DcSConv focuses on the adaptive scale of the convolution filter instead of the local deformation of its shape. It establishes that the scale of the convolution filter matters no less (or even more in the evaluated task) than its local deformation. Moreover, a Depth-converted-Scale aware Fusion (DcS-F) is developed to adaptively fuse the DcSConv features and the conventional convolution features. Our DcSConv enhanced monocular depth estimation framework can be applied on top of existing CNN based methods as a plug-and-play module to enhance the conventional convolution block. Extensive experiments with different baselines have been conducted on the KITTI benchmark and our method achieves the best results with an improvement up to 11.6% in terms of SqRel reduction. Ablation study also validates the effectiveness of each proposed module.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应深度尺度卷积(DcSConv)模块，解决自监督单目深度估计中物体尺度随深度变化导致的歧义问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督单目深度估计中，物体在图像中的尺度随深度变化，导致尺度与深度歧义，现有方法缺乏对物体尺度变化的显式处理。
analysis.problem: 解决单目视频中物体尺度连续变化导致的深度估计歧义问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 物体尺度随深度变化，同一物体在单目视频中尺度连续变化，造成尺度与深度歧义。
analysis.method: 提出深度尺度卷积(DcSConv)，根据物体深度与尺度的先验关系自适应调整卷积核的尺度，并设计深度尺度感知融合模块(DcS-F)融合DcSConv特征与常规卷积特征。
contributions: 提出DcSConv模块，自适应调整卷积核尺度以处理物体尺度变化。
设计DcS-F融合模块，有效结合DcSConv与常规卷积特征。
在KITTI基准上取得最优结果，SqRel降低11.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI基准上基于不同基线进行实验，SqRel降低11.6%，并进行了消融实验验证各模块有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖深度与尺度的先验关系，在复杂场景中可能不准确。
仅针对CNN架构，未在Transformer等模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应深度尺度卷积(DcSConv)模块，解决自监督单目深度估计中物体尺度随深度变化导致的歧义问题。

papers.title: Monocular Depth Estimation From the Perspective of Feature Restoration: A Diffusion Enhanced Depth Restoration Approach
papers.abstract: Monocular Depth Estimation (MDE) is a fundamental computer vision task with important applications in 3D vision. The current mainstream MDE methods employ an encoder-decoder architecture with multi-level/scale feature processing. However, the limitations of the current architecture and the effects of different-level features on the prediction accuracy are not evaluated. In this paper, we first investigate the above problem and show that there is still substantial potential in the current framework if encoder features can be improved. Therefore, we propose to formulate the depth estimation problem from the feature restoration perspective, by treating pretrained encoder features as degraded features of an assumed ground truth feature that yields the ground truth depth map. Then an Invertible Transform-enhanced Indirect Diffusion (InvT-IndDiffusion) module is developed for feature restoration. Due to the absence of direct supervision on feature, only indirect supervision from the final sparse depth map is used. During the iterative procedure of diffusion, this results in feature deviations among steps. The proposed InvT-IndDiffusion solves this problem by using an invertible transform-based decoder under the bi-Lipschitz condition. Finally, a plug-and-play Auxiliary Viewpoint-based Low-level Feature Enhancement module (AV-LFE) is developed to enhance local details with auxiliary viewpoint when available. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves better performance than the state-of-the-art methods on various datasets. Specifically on the KITTI benchmark, compared with the baseline, the performance is improved by 4.09% and 37.77% under different training settings in terms of RMSE. Code is available at https://github.com/whitehb1/IID-RDepth.

analysis.tldr: 从特征恢复视角出发，提出扩散增强深度恢复方法，显著提升单目深度估计精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前主流单目深度估计方法采用编码器-解码器架构，但未充分评估不同层级特征对预测精度的影响，且编码器特征仍有改进潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何从特征恢复角度提升单目深度估计的精度，解决扩散过程中特征偏差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前架构中编码器特征可视为真实特征的退化版本，且扩散迭代中缺乏直接特征监督导致特征偏差。
analysis.method: 提出特征恢复视角，开发可逆变换增强的间接扩散模块（InvT-IndDiffusion）用于特征恢复，并设计辅助视点低层特征增强模块（AV-LFE）。
contributions: 首次从特征恢复视角重新定义单目深度估计问题。
提出InvT-IndDiffusion模块，利用可逆变换和双Lipschitz条件解决扩散中的特征偏差。
开发AV-LFE模块，利用辅助视点增强局部细节。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上达到SOTA，KITTI基准上RMSE相比基线提升4.09%和37.77%。
limitations: 依赖辅助视点信息，可能限制无多视点场景的应用。
扩散过程计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从特征恢复视角出发，提出扩散增强深度恢复方法，显著提升单目深度估计精度。

papers.title: Demystifying OPD: Length Inflation and Stabilization Strategies for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains student models under their own induced distribution while leveraging supervision from stronger teachers. We identify a failure mode of OPD: as training progresses, on-policy rollouts can undergo abrupt length inflation, causing truncated trajectories to dominate the training data. This truncation collapse coincides with abrupt repetition saturation and induces biased gradient signals, leading to severe training instability and sharp degradation in validation performance. We attribute this problem to the interaction between student-induced data collection and the distillation objective, which implicitly favors long and repetitive rollouts. To address this issue, we propose StableOPD, a stabilized OPD framework that combines a reference-based divergence constraint with rollout mixture distillation. These together mitigate repetition-induced length inflation and further stabilize OPD training. Across multiple math reasoning datasets, our approach prevents truncation collapse, stabilizes training dynamics, and improves performance by 7.2% on average.

analysis.tldr: 发现同策略蒸馏中长度膨胀导致训练崩溃，提出StableOPD通过参考约束和混合蒸馏稳定训练，平均提升7.2%。
analysis.research_motivation: 同策略蒸馏在训练中会出现长度膨胀和截断崩溃，导致训练不稳定和性能下降，需要理解原因并提出解决方案。
analysis.problem: 同策略蒸馏中，学生模型的自生成轨迹长度突然膨胀，导致截断样本主导训练数据，引发梯度偏差和性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长度膨胀与重复饱和同时发生，蒸馏目标隐式偏好长且重复的序列，加剧了训练不稳定。
analysis.main_method: 提出StableOPD，结合基于参考的散度约束和混合蒸馏策略，抑制重复导致的长度膨胀。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个数学推理数据集上验证，StableOPD防止截断崩溃，稳定训练动态，平均性能提升7.2%。
analysis.contributions: 首次揭示同策略蒸馏的长度膨胀失败模式，并提出有效的稳定训练框架。
analysis.limitations: 方法可能增加计算开销，且对非数学推理任务的泛化性未充分验证。

papers.title: The Impact of Dimensionality on the Stability of Node Embeddings
papers.abstract: Previous work has established that neural network-based node embeddings return different outcomes when trained with identical parameters on the same dataset, just from using different training seeds. Yet, it has not been thoroughly analyzed how key hyperparameters such as embedding dimension could impact this instability. In this work, we investigate how varying the dimensionality of node embeddings influences both their stability and downstream performance. We systematically evaluate five widely used methods -- ASNE, DGI, GraphSAGE, node2vec, and VERSE -- across multiple datasets and embedding dimensions. We assess stability from both a representational perspective and a functional perspective, alongside performance evaluation. Our results show that embedding stability varies significantly with dimensionality, but we observe different patterns across the methods we consider: while some approaches, such as node2vec and ASNE, tend to become more stable with higher dimensionality, other methods do not exhibit the same trend. Moreover, we find that maximum stability does not necessarily align with optimal task performance. These findings highlight the importance of carefully selecting embedding dimension, and provide new insights into the trade-offs between stability, performance, and computational effectiveness in graph representation learning.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现节点嵌入的维度显著影响其稳定性，但不同方法表现各异，且最大稳定性与最优性能并不一致。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前工作已发现神经网络节点嵌入因训练种子不同而产生不稳定结果，但关键超参数如嵌入维度的影响尚未被深入分析。
analysis.problem: 嵌入维度如何影响节点嵌入的稳定性及其下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 嵌入稳定性随维度变化显著，但不同方法模式不同：如node2vec和ASNE在高维度下更稳定，而其他方法无此趋势；最大稳定性与最优任务性能不匹配。
analysis.main_method: 系统评估五种方法（ASNE、DGI、GraphSAGE、node2vec、VERSE）在多个数据集和嵌入维度下的稳定性，从表征和功能两个角度衡量。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个数据集上，对每种方法使用不同嵌入维度进行训练，评估稳定性（基于表示相似性和功能一致性）和下游任务性能。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了嵌入维度对稳定性的非单调影响，并指出稳定性与性能之间的权衡，为图表示学习中的维度选择提供新见解。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估了五种方法，可能不涵盖所有节点嵌入技术；未深入分析稳定性差异的底层原因。

papers.title: sciwrite-lint: Verification Infrastructure for the Age of Science Vibe-Writing
papers.abstract: Science currently offers two options for quality assurance, both inadequate. Journal gatekeeping claims to verify both integrity and contribution, but actually measures prestige: peer review is slow, biased, and misses fabricated citations even at top venues. Open science provides no quality assurance at all: the only filter between AI-generated text and the public record is the author's integrity. AI-assisted writing makes both worse by producing more papers faster than either system can absorb. We propose a third option: measure the paper itself. sciwrite-lint (pip install sciwrite-lint) is an open-source linter for scientific manuscripts that runs entirely on the researcher's machine (free public databases, a single consumer GPU, and open-weights models) with no manuscripts sent to external services. The pipeline verifies that references exist, checks retraction status, compares metadata against canonical records, downloads and parses cited papers, verifies that they support the claims made about them, and follows one level further to check cited papers' own bibliographies. Each reference receives a per-reference reliability score aggregating all verification signals. We evaluate the pipeline on 30 unseen papers from arXiv and bioRxiv with error injection and LLM-adjudicated false positive analysis. As an experimental extension, we propose SciLint Score, combining integrity verification with a contribution component that operationalizes five frameworks from philosophy of science (Popper, Lakatos, Kitcher, Laudan, Mayo) into computable structural properties of scientific arguments. The integrity component is the core of the tool and is evaluated in this paper; the contribution component is released as experimental code for community development.

analysis.tldr: 提出开源工具sciwrite-lint，在本地自动验证科学论文的引用完整性，并实验性引入基于科学哲学的可计算贡献评分。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有科学质量保障机制（期刊把关和开放科学）均无法应对AI辅助写作带来的论文激增和虚假引用问题。
analysis.problem: 缺乏自动化的、不依赖外部服务的论文质量验证工具，尤其是引用真实性和支持性检查。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI辅助写作加速论文产出，但传统同行评审缓慢且有偏见，开放科学则无质量过滤，导致虚假引用和不可靠论文泛滥。
analysis.main_method: 开发sciwrite-lint，在本地运行，通过检查引用存在性、撤稿状态、元数据一致性、下载并解析被引论文验证其支持性，并递归检查参考文献。
analysis.key_experiments: 在30篇arXiv和bioRxiv未见过论文上评估，采用错误注入和LLM裁决的假阳性分析。
analysis.contributions: 提出并实现了一个完全本地化的论文引用完整性验证管道，并实验性整合了基于科学哲学的可计算贡献评分框架。
analysis.limitations: 贡献评分部分仅为实验性代码，需社区进一步开发；评估规模较小（30篇论文），可能未覆盖所有领域。

papers.title: Less Approximates More: Harmonizing Performance and Confidence Faithfulness via Hybrid Post-Training for High-Stakes Tasks
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes tasks, where confident yet incorrect inferences may cause severe real-world harm, bringing the previously overlooked issue of confidence faithfulness back to the forefront. A promising solution is to jointly optimize unsupervised Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback (RLIF) with reasoning-trace-guided Reasoning Distillation (RD), which may face three persistent challenges: scarcity of high-quality training corpora, factually unwarranted overconfidence and indiscriminate fusion that amplifies erroneous updates. Inspired by the human confidence accumulation from uncertainty to certainty, we propose Progressive Reasoning Gain (PRG) to measure whether reasoning steps progressively strengthen support for the final answer. Furthermore, we introduce HyTuning, a hybrid post-training framework that adaptively reweights RD and RLIF via a PRG-style metric, using scarce supervised reasoning traces as a stable anchor while exploiting abundant unlabeled queries for scalability. Experiments on several domain-specific and general benchmarks demonstrate that HyTuning improves accuracy while achieving confidence faithfulness under limited supervision, supporting a practical "Less Approximates More" effect.

analysis.tldr: 提出HyTuning混合后训练框架，通过渐进推理增益度量自适应平衡推理蒸馏与强化学习，提升高风险任务中LLM的准确性与置信度忠实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在高风险任务中常出现自信但错误的推理，造成严重危害，而现有方法面临训练数据稀缺、过度自信和融合不当等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在高风险任务中同时提升模型准确性和置信度忠实性，避免自信错误推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类从不确定性到确定性的置信积累过程启发，推理步骤应逐步增强对最终答案的支持，而非盲目自信。
analysis.main_method: 提出HyTuning框架，利用渐进推理增益（PRG）度量自适应重加权推理蒸馏（RD）和基于内部反馈的强化学习（RLIF），以稀缺监督推理迹为稳定锚点，利用大量无标注查询扩展。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个领域专用和通用基准上测试，HyTuning在有限监督下提升准确率并实现置信度忠实性，验证了“少近似多”效果。
analysis.contributions: 提出PRG度量与HyTuning框架，有效解决数据稀缺、过度自信和融合问题，实现准确性与置信度忠实性的协同提升。
analysis.limitations: 依赖推理迹质量，PRG度量可能对复杂推理路径不敏感，且框架在极端低资源场景下的泛化性待验证。

papers.title: What do Language Models Learn and When? The Implicit Curriculum Hypothesis
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can perform remarkably complex tasks, yet the fine-grained details of how these capabilities emerge during pretraining remain poorly understood. Scaling laws on validation loss tell us how much a model improves with additional compute, but not what skills it acquires in which order. To remedy this, we propose the Implicit Curriculum Hypothesis: pretraining follows a compositional and predictable curriculum across models and data mixtures. We test this by designing a suite of simple, composable tasks spanning retrieval, morphological transformations, coreference, logical reasoning, and mathematics. Using these tasks, we track emergence points across four model families spanning sizes from 410M-13B parameters. We find that emergence orderings of when models reach fixed accuracy thresholds are strikingly consistent ($\rho = .81$ across 45 model pairs), and that composite tasks most often emerge after their component tasks. Furthermore, we find that this structure is encoded in model representations: tasks with similar function vector representations also tend to follow similar trajectories in training. By using the space of representations derived from our task set, we can effectively predict the training trajectories of simple held-out compositional tasks throughout the course of pretraining ($R^2 = .68$-$.84$ across models) without previously evaluating them. Together, these results suggest that pretraining is more structured than loss curves reveal: skills emerge in a compositional order that is consistent across models and readable from their internals.

analysis.tldr: 提出隐式课程假设：预训练遵循跨模型和数据混合的可预测组合顺序，技能按组成顺序出现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有缩放定律仅预测验证损失改进，无法揭示预训练中技能获取的顺序和细节。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对预训练过程中技能出现顺序和结构的细粒度理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同模型达到固定精度阈值的出现顺序高度一致，复合任务通常在其组件任务之后出现。
analysis.main_method: 设计一组简单可组合任务（检索、形态变换、指代、逻辑推理、数学），跟踪不同规模模型（410M-13B）的训练轨迹。
analysis.key_experiments: 在45个模型对中测量出现顺序一致性（ρ=0.81），并利用函数向量表示预测保留组合任务的训练轨迹（R²=0.68-0.84）。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统证明预训练中存在跨模型一致的组合式技能出现顺序，并展示模型内部表示可预测训练轨迹。
analysis.limitations: 任务集有限且简单，未涵盖更复杂或真实世界任务；仅分析特定模型家族和规模。

papers.title: AI generates well-liked but templatic empathic responses
papers.abstract: Recent research shows that greater numbers of people are turning to Large Language Models (LLMs) for emotional support, and that people rate LLM responses as more empathic than human-written responses. We suggest a reason for this success: LLMs have learned and consistently deploy a well-liked template for expressing empathy. We develop a taxonomy of 10 empathic language "tactics" that include validating someone's feelings and paraphrasing, and apply this taxonomy to characterize the language that people and LLMs produce when writing empathic responses. Across a set of 2 studies comparing a total of n = 3,265 AI-generated (by six models) and n = 1,290 human-written responses, we find that LLM responses are highly formulaic at a discourse functional level. We discovered a template -- a structured sequence of tactics -- that matches between 83--90% of LLM responses (and 60--83\% in a held out sample), and when those are matched, covers 81--92% of the response. By contrast, human-written responses are more diverse. We end with a discussion of implications for the future of AI-generated empathy.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现AI生成的共情回复虽受欢迎，但高度模板化，而人类回复更多样。
analysis.research_motivation: 越来越多的人使用大语言模型（LLMs）寻求情感支持，且LLMs的回复被认为比人类更具共情力，但原因尚不明确。
analysis.problem: LLMs生成的共情回复为何受欢迎，以及其语言模式与人类回复有何差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLMs学习并一致部署了一种受欢迎的共情模板，导致回复在话语功能层面高度公式化，而人类回复则更加多样化。
analysis.main_method: 开发了包含10种共情语言“策略”的分类体系，并应用于分析AI和人类生成的共情回复，比较了3265条AI回复和1290条人类回复。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过两项研究，发现一种结构化策略序列模板匹配了83-90%的LLM回复（在保留样本中为60-83%），覆盖了81-92%的回复内容。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了LLMs共情回复高度模板化的现象，并提出了一个共情语言策略分类体系。
analysis.limitations: 模板可能限制回复的多样性和真实性，且研究仅基于特定模型和数据集。

papers.title: Formalizing building-up constructions of self-dual codes through isotropic lines in Lean
papers.abstract: The purpose of this paper is two-fold. First we show that Kim's building-up construction of binary self-dual codes is equivalent to Chinburg-Zhang's Hilbert symbol construction. Second we introduce a $q$-ary version of Chinburg-Zhang's construction in order to construct $q$-ary self-dual codes efficiently. For the latter, we study self-dual codes over split finite fields \(\F_q\) with \(q \equiv 1 \pmod{4}\) through three complementary viewpoints: the building-up construction, the binary arithmetic reduction of Chinburg--Zhang, and the hyperbolic geometry of the Euclidean plane. The condition that \(-1\) be a square is the common algebraic input linking these viewpoints: in the binary case it underlies the Lagrangian reduction picture, while in the split \(q\)-ary case it produces the isotropic line governing the correction terms in the extension formulas. As an application of our efficient form of generator matrices, we construct optimal self-dual codes from the split boxed construction, including self-dual \([6,3,4]\) and \([8,4,4]\) codes over \(\GF{5}\), MDS self-dual \([8,4,5]\) and \([10,5,6]\) codes over \(\GF{13}\), and a self-dual \([12,6,6]\) code over \(\GF{13}\). These structural statements are accompanied by a Lean~4 formalization of the algebraic core.

analysis.tldr: 将自对偶码的构建方法（Kim的构建与Chinburg-Zhang的Hilbert符号构建）统一，并推广到q元域，通过Lean形式化验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 统一自对偶码的不同构建方法，并利用形式化验证确保其正确性，同时推广到更一般的有限域。
analysis.problem: 如何统一二进制自对偶码的构建方法，并高效构造q元自对偶码？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当-1是平方数时，二进制和q元情况下的构建方法通过各向同性线统一，揭示了代数结构的内在联系。
analysis.main_method: 将Kim的构建等价于Chinburg-Zhang的Hilbert符号构建，并引入q元版本的Chinburg-Zhang构建，结合双曲几何和二进制算术约化。
analysis.contributions: 统一了自对偶码的构建方法，推广到q元域，并提供了Lean 4形式化验证。
analysis.limitations: 仅适用于q ≡ 1 mod 4的有限域，且形式化部分仅覆盖代数核心。

papers.title: Meta-learning In-Context Enables Training-Free Cross Subject Brain Decoding
papers.abstract: Visual decoding from brain signals is a key challenge at the intersection of computer vision and neuroscience, requiring methods that bridge neural representations and computational models of vision. A field-wide goal is to achieve generalizable, cross-subject models. A major obstacle towards this goal is the substantial variability in neural representations across individuals, which has so far required training bespoke models or fine-tuning separately for each subject. To address this challenge, we introduce a meta-optimized approach for semantic visual decoding from fMRI that generalizes to novel subjects without any fine-tuning. By simply conditioning on a small set of image-brain activation examples from the new individual, our model rapidly infers their unique neural encoding patterns to facilitate robust and efficient visual decoding. Our approach is explicitly optimized for in-context learning of the new subject's encoding model and performs decoding by hierarchical inference, inverting the encoder. First, for multiple brain regions, we estimate the per-voxel visual response encoder parameters by constructing a context over multiple stimuli and responses. Second, we construct a context consisting of encoder parameters and response values over multiple voxels to perform aggregated functional inversion. We demonstrate strong cross-subject and cross-scanner generalization across diverse visual backbones without retraining or fine-tuning. Moreover, our approach requires neither anatomical alignment nor stimulus overlap. This work is a critical step towards a generalizable foundation model for non-invasive brain decoding.

analysis.tldr: 提出元学习上下文方法，无需微调即可跨被试从fMRI解码视觉语义，实现零样本泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有脑解码模型需为每个被试单独训练或微调，难以实现跨被试泛化，阻碍了通用基础模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 不同个体神经表征存在显著差异，导致跨被试视觉解码模型需要大量个性化调整。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过少量图像-脑激活示例，模型可快速推断新被试的神经编码模式，表明元学习能捕捉个体间共享的编码结构。
analysis.main_method: 采用元优化上下文学习，先估计多脑区体素响应编码器参数，再构建编码器参数与响应值的上下文进行分层推理解码。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个视觉骨干网络上验证了跨被试和跨扫描仪的泛化能力，无需解剖对齐或刺激重叠。
analysis.contributions: 首次实现无需微调的跨被试脑解码，为通用非侵入式脑解码基础模型奠定基础。
analysis.limitations: 依赖少量示例，可能对极端个体差异或噪声敏感；未探索更复杂的视觉任务。

papers.title: Cram Less to Fit More: Training Data Pruning Improves Memorization of Facts
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can struggle to memorize factual knowledge in their parameters, often leading to hallucinations and poor performance on knowledge-intensive tasks. In this paper, we formalize fact memorization from an information-theoretic perspective and study how training data distributions affect fact accuracy. We show that fact accuracy is suboptimal (below the capacity limit) whenever the amount of information contained in the training data facts exceeds model capacity. This is further exacerbated when the fact frequency distribution is skewed (e.g. a power law). We propose data selection schemes based on the training loss alone that aim to limit the number of facts in the training data and flatten their frequency distribution. On semi-synthetic datasets containing high-entropy facts, our selection method effectively boosts fact accuracy to the capacity limit. When pretraining language models from scratch on an annotated Wikipedia corpus, our selection method enables a GPT2-Small model (110m parameters) to memorize 1.3X more entity facts compared to standard training, matching the performance of a 10X larger model (1.3B parameters) pretrained on the full dataset.

analysis.tldr: 通过数据剪枝限制训练数据中的事实数量并平衡频率分布，可提升大模型事实记忆准确率，小模型性能媲美10倍大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在参数中记忆事实知识时存在困难，导致幻觉和知识密集型任务表现不佳，需探索训练数据分布对事实准确性的影响。
analysis.problem: 训练数据中事实信息量超过模型容量时，事实准确性低于容量上限，且事实频率分布偏斜（如幂律分布）会加剧此问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 事实准确性受限于模型容量与训练数据信息量的匹配度，频率分布偏斜导致低频事实被忽视，高频事实过度拟合。
analysis.main_method: 基于训练损失设计数据选择方案，限制训练数据中的事实数量并扁平化其频率分布，以优化信息容量利用。
analysis.key_experiments: 在半合成高熵事实数据集上验证方法可达到容量上限；在维基百科语料上预训练GPT2-Small（110M参数），事实记忆量提升1.3倍，匹配1.3B参数模型在完整数据上的性能。
analysis.contributions: 从信息论角度形式化事实记忆问题，提出基于损失的数据剪枝方法，显著提升小模型的事实记忆效率。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖训练损失作为选择标准，可能不适用于所有数据类型；实验仅基于半合成和维基百科数据，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Quantization Impact on the Accuracy and Communication Efficiency Trade-off in Federated Learning for Aerospace Predictive Maintenance
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables privacy-preserving predictive maintenance across distributed aerospace fleets, but gradient communication overhead constrains deployment on bandwidth-limited IoT nodes. This paper investigates the impact of symmetric uniform quantization ($b \in \{32,8,4,2\}$ bits) on the accuracy--efficiency trade-off of a custom-designed lightweight 1-D convolutional model (AeroConv1D, 9\,697 parameters) trained via FL on the NASA C-MAPSS benchmark under a realistic Non-IID client partition. Using a rigorous multi-seed evaluation ($N=10$ seeds), we show that INT4 achieves accuracy \emph{statistically indistinguishable} from FP32 on both FD001 ($p=0.341$) and FD002 ($p=0.264$ MAE, $p=0.534$ NASA score) while delivering an $8\times$ reduction in gradient communication cost (37.88~KiB $\to$ 4.73~KiB per round). A key methodological finding is that na\"ive IID client partitioning artificially suppresses variance; correct Non-IID evaluation reveals the true operational instability of extreme quantization, demonstrated via a direct empirical IID vs.\ Non-IID comparison. INT2 is empirically characterized as unsuitable: while it achieves lower MAE on FD002 through extreme quantization-induced over-regularization, this apparent gain is accompanied by catastrophic NASA score instability (CV\,=\,45.8\% vs.\ 22.3\% for FP32), confirming non-reproducibility under heterogeneous operating conditions. Analytical FPGA resource projections on the Xilinx ZCU102 confirm that INT4 fits within hardware constraints (85.5\% DSP utilization), potentially enabling a complete FL pipeline on a single SoC. The full simulation codebase and FPGA estimation scripts are publicly available at https://github.com/therealdeadbeef/aerospace-fl-quantization.

analysis.tldr: 研究联邦学习中对称均匀量化对航空航天预测性维护的精度-通信效率权衡的影响，发现INT4在非IID场景下与FP32精度无统计差异，通信成本降低8倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习在航空航天预测性维护中面临梯度通信开销大的问题，限制了带宽受限IoT节点的部署，需探索量化技术以优化精度与效率的平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在联邦学习中通过量化减少梯度通信开销，同时保持模型精度，特别是在非独立同分布（Non-IID）数据分布下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: IID数据划分会人为抑制方差，掩盖极端量化的不稳定性；Non-IID评估揭示了INT2量化导致NASA评分高度不稳定（CV=45.8%），而INT4在精度上与FP32无显著差异。
analysis.main_method: 采用对称均匀量化（b∈{32,8,4,2}位）训练轻量级1D卷积模型AeroConv1D（9697参数），在NASA C-MAPSS基准上使用Non-IID客户端划分进行多种子评估（N=10）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在FD001和FD002子集上比较INT4与FP32的MAE和NASA评分，使用统计检验（p值）验证无显著差异；同时对比IID与Non-IID划分的影响，并基于Xilinx ZCU102进行FPGA资源投影。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统评估量化在联邦学习航空航天预测性维护中的影响，证明INT4在Non-IID下有效，并揭示IID划分的误导性及INT2的不适用性。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对特定模型（AeroConv1D）和数据集（C-MAPSS），未探索其他量化方案或更复杂模型；INT2的极端不稳定性可能需进一步研究缓解策略。

papers.title: Introducing Echo Networks for Computational Neuroevolution
papers.abstract: For applications on the extreme edge, minimal networks of only a few dozen artificial neurons for event detection and classification in discrete time signals would be highly desirable.
