Feed-forward networks, RNNs, and CNNs evolved through evolutionary algorithms can all be successful in this respect but pose the problem of allowing little systematicity in mutation and recombination if the standard direct genetic encoding of the weights is used (as for instance in the classic NEAT algorithm). We therefore introduce Echo Networks, a type of recurrent network that consists of the connection matrix only, with the source neurons of the synapses represented as rows, destination neurons as columns and weights as entries. There are no layers, and connections between neurons can be bidirectional but are technically all recurrent. Input and output can be arbitrarily assigned to any of the neurons and only use an additional (optional) function in their computational path, e.g., a sigmoid to obtain a binary classification output. We evaluated Echo Networks successfully on the classification of electrocardiography signals but see the most promising potential in their genome representation as a single matrix, allowing matrix computations and factorisations as mutation and recombination operators.

analysis.tldr: 提出Echo Networks，一种仅由连接矩阵构成的递归网络，用于极端边缘设备上的事件检测与分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 极端边缘设备需要极小的神经网络，但传统进化算法中直接遗传编码权重导致变异和重组缺乏系统性。
analysis.problem: 现有前馈网络、RNN和CNN在进化算法中难以实现系统性的变异和重组操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准直接遗传编码权重限制了网络结构的灵活进化，而Echo Networks通过单一矩阵表示解决了这一问题。
analysis.main_method: Echo Networks仅由连接矩阵构成，无层结构，输入输出可任意分配，支持矩阵运算作为变异和重组算子。
analysis.key_experiments: 在心电图信号分类任务上成功验证了Echo Networks的有效性。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种新型递归网络架构，其基因组表示为单一矩阵，便于应用矩阵计算和分解进行进化操作。
analysis.limitations: 当前仅在单一任务上验证，需进一步探索在其他领域的泛化能力。

papers.title: Provably Adaptive Linear Approximation for the Shapley Value and Beyond
papers.abstract: The Shapley value, and its broader family of semi-values, has received much attention in various attribution problems. A fundamental and long-standing challenge is their efficient approximation, since exact computation generally requires an exponential number of utility queries in the number of players $n$. To meet the challenges of large-scale applications, we explore the limits of efficiently approximating semi-values under a $\Theta(n)$ space constraint. Building upon a vector concentration inequality, we establish a theoretical framework that enables sharper query complexities for existing unbiased randomized algorithms. Within this framework, we systematically develop a linear-space algorithm that requires $O(\frac{n}{\epsilon^{2}}\log\frac{1}{\delta})$ utility queries to ensure $P(\|\hat{\boldsymbol\phi}-\boldsymbol\phi\|_{2}\geq\epsilon)\leq \delta$ for all commonly used semi-values. In particular, our framework naturally bridges OFA, unbiased kernelSHAP, SHAP-IQ and the regression-adjusted approach, and definitively characterizes when paired sampling is beneficial. Moreover, our algorithm allows explicit minimization of the mean square error for each specific utility function. Accordingly, we introduce the first adaptive, linear-time, linear-space randomized algorithm, Adalina, that theoretically achieves improved mean square error. All of our theoretical findings are experimentally validated.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种线性空间、自适应算法Adalina，在O(n/ε² log(1/δ))查询次数内高效逼近Shapley值及半值，理论更优且实验验证。
analysis.research_motivation: Shapley值及其半值族在归因问题中广泛应用，但精确计算需指数级查询，大规模应用面临效率瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 在Θ(n)空间约束下，如何高效逼近半值并降低查询复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有无偏随机算法（如OFA、kernelSHAP）的查询复杂度可基于向量集中不等式进一步优化，且配对采样并非总是有益。
analysis.main_method: 基于向量集中不等式建立理论框架，设计线性空间算法Adalina，通过自适应最小化均方误差实现O(n/ε² log(1/δ))查询复杂度。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种半值上验证算法性能，与OFA、kernelSHAP等方法对比，实验支持理论改进。
analysis.contributions: 统一了多种现有方法，首次提出自适应线性时间空间算法，理论上实现更优均方误差。
analysis.limitations: 算法依赖特定假设（如效用函数性质），实际应用中的泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: AfriVoices-KE: A Multilingual Speech Dataset for Kenyan Languages
papers.abstract: AfriVoices-KE is a large-scale multilingual speech dataset comprising approximately 3,000 hours of audio across five Kenyan languages: Dholuo, Kikuyu, Kalenjin, Maasai, and Somali. The dataset includes 750 hours of scripted speech and 2,250 hours of spontaneous speech, collected from 4,777 native speakers across diverse regions and demographics. This work addresses the critical underrepresentation of African languages in speech technology by providing a high-quality, linguistically diverse resource. Data collection followed a dual methodology: scripted recordings drew from compiled text corpora, translations, and domain-specific generated sentences spanning eleven domains relevant to the Kenyan context, while unscripted speech was elicited through textual and image prompts to capture natural linguistic variation and dialectal nuances. A customized mobile application enabled contributors to record using smartphones. Quality assurance operated at multiple layers, encompassing automated signal-to-noise ratio validation prior to recording and human review for content accuracy. Though the project encountered challenges common to low-resource settings, including unreliable infrastructure, device compatibility issues, and community trust barriers, these were mitigated through local mobilizers, stakeholder partnerships, and adaptive training protocols. AfriVoices-KE provides a foundational resource for developing inclusive automatic speech recognition and text-to-speech systems, while advancing the digital preservation of Kenya's linguistic heritage.

analysis.tldr: 构建了包含5种肯尼亚语言、约3000小时音频的多语种语音数据集，填补非洲语言在语音技术中的空白。
analysis.research_motivation: 非洲语言在语音技术中严重缺乏代表性，亟需高质量多语种资源以推动包容性技术发展。
analysis.problem: 现有语音数据集对肯尼亚语言覆盖不足，缺乏大规模、高质量且涵盖方言差异的语音数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低资源环境下数据收集面临基础设施不稳定、设备兼容性差和社区信任障碍，但通过本地协调和适应性培训可缓解。
analysis.main_method: 采用双轨收集法：脚本录音基于编译文本和领域生成句子，非脚本录音通过文本和图像提示捕捉自然语音变异。
analysis.key_experiments: 从4777名母语者收集750小时脚本语音和2250小时自发语音，覆盖11个领域，使用定制手机应用记录。
analysis.contributions: 提供了首个大规模肯尼亚多语种语音数据集，支持ASR和TTS系统开发，促进语言数字保存。
analysis.limitations: 未提及数据集在真实ASR任务上的性能评估，且可能受限于录音环境和设备多样性。

papers.title: An Illusion of Unlearning? Assessing Machine Unlearning Through Internal Representations
papers.abstract: While numerous machine unlearning (MU) methods have recently been developed with promising results in erasing the influence of forgotten data, classes, or concepts, they are also highly vulnerable-for example, simple fine-tuning can inadvertently reintroduce erased concepts. In this paper, we address this contradiction by examining the internal representations of unlearned models, in contrast to prior work that focuses primarily on output-level behavior. Our analysis shows that many state-of-the-art MU methods appear successful mainly due to a misalignment between last-layer features and the classifier, a phenomenon we call feature-classifier misalignment. In fact, hidden features remain highly discriminative, and simple linear probing can recover near-original accuracy. Assuming neural collapse in the original model, we further demonstrate that adjusting only the classifier can achieve negligible forget accuracy while preserving retain accuracy, and we corroborate this with experiments using classifier-only fine-tuning. Motivated by these findings, we propose MU methods based on a class-mean features (CMF) classifier, which explicitly enforces alignment between features and classifiers. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that CMF-based unlearning reduces forgotten information in representations while maintaining high retain accuracy, highlighting the need for faithful representation-level evaluation of MU.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现许多机器遗忘方法仅造成特征-分类器错位的假象，隐藏特征仍可恢复原始信息，并提出基于类均值特征的遗忘方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法看似有效但脆弱，例如微调可恢复被遗忘概念，需探究其内在原因。
analysis.problem: 当前机器遗忘方法在输出层面表现良好，但内部表示仍保留被遗忘信息，导致遗忘不彻底。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遗忘模型的特征-分类器错位使得输出看似遗忘，但隐藏特征仍高度可区分，线性探测可恢复近原始准确率。
analysis.main_method: 提出基于类均值特征（CMF）的分类器，通过显式对齐特征与分类器实现更彻底的遗忘。
analysis.key_experiments: 在标准基准上实验，CMF遗忘方法减少表示中的遗忘信息，同时保持高保留准确率。
analysis.contributions: 揭示遗忘方法的假象机制，提出CMF遗忘方法并强调表示级评估的必要性。
analysis.limitations: 方法依赖原始模型的神经坍缩假设，可能不适用于所有模型或任务。

papers.title: Leveraging Complementary Embeddings for Replay Selection in Continual Learning with Small Buffers
papers.abstract: Catastrophic forgetting remains a key challenge in Continual Learning (CL). In replay-based CL with severe memory constraints, performance critically depends on the sample selection strategy for the replay buffer. Most existing approaches construct memory buffers using embeddings learned under supervised objectives. However, class-agnostic, self-supervised representations often encode rich, class-relevant semantics that are overlooked. We propose a new method, Multiple Embedding Replay Selection, MERS, which replaces the buffer selection module with a graph-based approach that integrates both supervised and self-supervised embeddings. Empirical results show consistent improvements over SOTA selection strategies across a range of continual learning algorithms, with particularly strong gains in low-memory regimes. On CIFAR-100 and TinyImageNet, MERS outperforms single-embedding baselines without adding model parameters or increasing replay volume, making it a practical, drop-in enhancement for replay-based continual learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出MERS方法，利用监督和自监督互补嵌入进行图基回放选择，在低内存持续学习中显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习中回放缓冲区的样本选择策略对性能至关重要，但现有方法仅使用监督嵌入，忽略了自监督表示中的类相关语义。
analysis.problem: 在内存严重受限的持续学习中，如何有效选择回放样本以缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自监督嵌入包含丰富的类相关语义，与监督嵌入互补，但现有方法未充分利用这种互补性。
analysis.main_method: 提出MERS，用图基方法整合监督和自监督嵌入进行回放选择，无需增加模型参数或回放容量。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CIFAR-100和TinyImageNet上，MERS在多种持续学习算法中优于SOTA选择策略，尤其在低内存场景下增益显著。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种即插即用的回放选择增强方法，利用互补嵌入提升低内存持续学习性能。
analysis.limitations: 未探讨不同自监督方法或更大规模数据集上的泛化性，且图基方法可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: EgoEverything: A Benchmark for Human Behavior Inspired Long Context Egocentric Video Understanding in AR Environment
papers.abstract: Long context egocentric video understanding has recently attracted significant research attention, with augmented reality (AR) highlighted as one of its most important application domains. Nevertheless, the task remains highly challenging due to the need for reasoning over extended temporal contexts and diverse, unstructured activities. Although several benchmarks exist, most egocentric datasets rely on human worn cameras and focus mainly on visual content, with limited consideration of underlying user behavior when forming video-related queries. EgoEverything is a benchmark that explicitly considers human behavior by leveraging human attention signals, abstracted from gaze data, when generating questions. It comprises over 5,000 multiple choice question answer pairs, spanning more than 100 hours of video. By integrating human attention signals during question generation, it more faithfully captures natural human behavior and offers a realistic evaluation setting for long-context egocentric video understanding in AR.

analysis.tldr: 提出EgoEverything基准，利用人类注意力信号生成问题，评估AR环境下长上下文自我中心视频理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自我中心视频数据集主要关注视觉内容，忽略了用户行为在生成视频相关查询中的作用，需要更真实的评估基准。
analysis.problem: 长上下文自我中心视频理解任务因需要推理长时间跨度和多样化非结构化活动而极具挑战性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类注意力信号（如凝视数据）能反映自然行为，但现有基准未充分利用此信息来生成更贴近真实场景的问题。
analysis.main_method: 通过从凝视数据中抽象出人类注意力信号，生成超过5000个多项选择题，覆盖100多小时视频。
analysis.key_experiments: 基准包含5000+问答对，基于100+小时视频，在AR环境中评估长上下文理解。
analysis.contributions: 首次将人类注意力信号融入问题生成，提供更真实的自我中心视频理解评估设置。
analysis.limitations: 依赖凝视数据可能限制泛化性，且仅关注多项选择题形式。

papers.title: What a Comfortable World: Ergonomic Principles Guided Apartment Layout Generation
papers.abstract: Current data-driven floor plan generation methods often reproduce the ergonomic inefficiencies found in real-world training datasets. To address this, we propose a novel approach that integrates architectural design principles directly into a transformer-based generative process. We formulate differentiable loss functions based on established architectural standards from literature to optimize room adjacency and proximity. By guiding the model with these ergonomic priors during training, our method produces layouts with significantly improved livability metrics. Comparative evaluations show that our approach outperforms baselines in ergonomic compliance while maintaining high structural validity.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种将人体工学原则融入Transformer的公寓布局生成方法，通过可微损失函数优化房间布局，显著提升宜居性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据驱动布局生成方法常复制真实数据集中的工效学缺陷，需要引入设计原则来改善生成质量。
analysis.problem: 如何生成符合人体工学标准且结构有效的公寓布局，避免训练数据中的工效学不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实布局数据中存在工效学不合理性，如房间邻接和距离不当，影响居住舒适度。
analysis.main_method: 基于Transformer生成过程，设计可微损失函数编码建筑标准，优化房间邻接和邻近性，引导模型学习工效学先验。
analysis.key_experiments: 与基线方法对比，评估工效学合规性和结构有效性，结果显示在宜居性指标上显著提升。
analysis.contributions: 首次将工效学原则以可微损失形式集成到布局生成中，提出一种提升布局质量的新范式。
analysis.limitations: 可能依赖特定建筑标准，泛化到不同文化或风格布局时需调整损失函数。

papers.title: Floating or Suggesting Ideas? A Large-Scale Contrastive Analysis of Metaphorical and Literal Verb-Object Constructions
authors: Prisca Piccirilli and Alexander Fraser and Sabine Schulte im Walde
papers.abstract: Metaphor pervades everyday language, allowing speakers to express abstract concepts via concrete domains. While prior work has studied metaphors cognitively and psycholinguistically, large-scale comparisons with literal language remain limited, especially for near-synonymous expressions. We analyze 297 English verb-object pairs (e.g., float idea vs. suggest idea) in ~2M corpus sentences, examining their contextual usage. Using five NLP tools, we extract 2,293 cognitive and linguistic features capturing affective, lexical, syntactic, and discourse-level properties. We address: (i) whether features differ between metaphorical and literal contexts (cross-pair analysis), and (ii) whether individual VO pairs diverge internally (within-pair analysis). Cross-pair results show literal contexts have higher lexical frequency, cohesion, and structural regularity, while metaphorical contexts show greater affective load, imageability, lexical diversity, and constructional specificity. Within-pair analyses reveal substantial heterogeneity, with most pairs showing non-uniform effects. These results suggest no single, consistent distributional pattern that distinguishes metaphorical from literal usage. Instead, differences are largely construction-specific. Overall, large-scale data combined with diverse features provides a fine-grained understanding of metaphor-literal contrasts in VO usage.

analysis.tldr: 大规模对比分析英语动宾结构中的隐喻与字面用法，发现两者在词汇、情感、句法特征上存在差异，但无统一模式，差异主要依赖具体构式。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前研究多从认知和心理语言学角度分析隐喻，缺乏对近义隐喻与字面表达的大规模对比。
analysis.problem: 隐喻与字面动宾结构在上下文使用中是否存在系统性差异，以及这些差异是否一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 字面语境具有更高的词汇频率、连贯性和结构规律性，而隐喻语境则表现出更强的情感负荷、形象性、词汇多样性和构式特异性。
analysis.main_method: 分析297对英语动宾结构（如float idea vs. suggest idea）在约200万句子中的使用，利用五种NLP工具提取2293个认知和语言特征。
analysis.key_experiments: 进行跨对分析（比较隐喻与字面语境）和对内分析（比较同一动宾对的内部差异），发现大多数对显示非均匀效应。
analysis.contributions: 提供了大规模、多特征的隐喻-字面对比分析，揭示了差异的构式依赖性，挑战了单一分布模式的假设。
analysis.limitations: 仅关注英语动宾结构，可能不适用于其他语言或句法结构；特征提取依赖NLP工具，可能存在误差。

papers.title: Approximation of the Basset force in the Maxey-Riley-Gatignol equations via universal differential equations
papers.abstract: The Maxey-Riley-Gatignol equations (MaRGE) model the motion of spherical inertial particles in a fluid. They contain the Basset force, an integral term which models history effects due to the formation of wakes and boundary layer effects. This causes the force that acts on a particle to depend on its past trajectory and complicates the numerical solution of MaRGE. Therefore, the Basset force is often neglected, despite substantial evidence that it has both quantitative and qualitative impact on the movement patterns of modelled particles. Using the concept of universal differential equations, we propose an approximation of the history term via neural networks which approximates MaRGE by a system of ordinary differential equations that can be solved with standard numerical solvers like Runge-Kutta methods.

analysis.tldr: 用神经网络近似Maxey-Riley-Gatignol方程中的Basset历史力，将其转化为常微分方程组以简化数值求解。
analysis.research_motivation: Basset力对粒子运动有重要影响但常被忽略，因其积分形式导致数值求解复杂。
analysis.problem: 如何高效近似Basset力，避免直接求解积分项带来的计算负担。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Basset力依赖粒子历史轨迹，忽略它会导致定量和定性上的误差，但保留它又使方程难以数值求解。
analysis.main_method: 利用通用微分方程框架，用神经网络学习并近似Basset力，将原积分-微分方程转化为标准常微分方程组。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过数值实验验证神经网络近似后的系统与原始MaRGE解的匹配程度，并使用Runge-Kutta方法求解。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种可替代Basset力直接计算的方法，降低了MaRGE的求解难度，同时保留了历史效应的影响。
analysis.limitations: 神经网络近似可能引入额外误差，且训练数据依赖原始MaRGE的数值解，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Equivariant Efficient Joint Discrete and Continuous MeanFlow for Molecular Graph Generation
papers.abstract: Graph-structured data jointly contain discrete topology and continuous geometry, which poses fundamental challenges for generative modeling due to heterogeneous distributions, incompatible noise dynamics, and the need for equivariant inductive biases. Existing flow-matching approaches for graph generation typically decouple structure from geometry, lack synchronized cross-domain dynamics, and rely on iterative sampling, often resulting in physically inconsistent molecular conformations and slow sampling. To address these limitations, we propose Equivariant MeanFlow (EQUIMF), a unified SE(3)-equivariant generative framework that jointly models discrete and continuous components through synchronized MeanFlow dynamics. EQUIMF introduces a unified time bridge and average-velocity updates with mutual conditioning between structure and geometry, enabling efficient few-step generation while preserving physical consistency. Moreover, we develop a novel discrete MeanFlow formulation with a simple yet effective parameterization to support efficient generation over discrete graph structures. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EQUIMF consistently outperforms prior diffusion and flow-matching methods in generation quality, physical validity, and sampling efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EQUIMF，一种 SE(3) 等变联合离散-连续 MeanFlow 框架，实现分子图的高效、物理一致生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图生成方法解耦结构与几何，缺乏同步跨域动力学，导致采样慢且物理不一致。
analysis.problem: 图数据中离散拓扑与连续几何的异构分布、不兼容噪声动态及等变归纳偏置需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 解耦方法导致分子构象物理不一致，迭代采样效率低。
analysis.main_method: 提出 EQUIMF，通过统一时间桥和平均速度更新联合建模离散与连续，并引入离散 MeanFlow 参数化。
analysis.key_experiments: 在分子图生成任务上，与扩散和流匹配方法对比，评估生成质量、物理有效性和采样效率。
analysis.contributions: 首次实现联合离散-连续 MeanFlow 的等变生成，支持少步采样且保持物理一致性。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论对大规模图或复杂几何的扩展性。

papers.title: Clickbait detection: quick inference with maximum impact
authors: Soveatin Kuntur and Panggih Kusuma Ningrum and Anna Wr\'oblewska and Maria Ganzha and Marcin Paprzycki
papers.abstract: We propose a lightweight hybrid approach to clickbait detection that combines OpenAI semantic embeddings with six compact heuristic features capturing stylistic and informational cues. To improve efficiency, embeddings are reduced using PCA and evaluated with XGBoost, GraphSAGE, and GCN classifiers. While the simplified feature design yields slightly lower F1-scores, graph-based models achieve competitive performance with substantially reduced inference time. High ROC--AUC values further indicate strong discrimination capability, supporting reliable detection of clickbait headlines under varying decision thresholds.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级混合方法，结合OpenAI语义嵌入与启发式特征，通过PCA降维和图模型实现快速点击诱饵检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有点击诱饵检测方法通常计算成本高，难以在实时场景中部署，需要更高效的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持检测性能的同时显著降低推理时间，实现快速且可靠的点击诱饵检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 简化特征设计虽略微降低F1分数，但图模型在推理速度上优势明显，且ROC-AUC值表明强判别能力。
analysis.main_method: 结合OpenAI语义嵌入与6个紧凑启发式特征，使用PCA降维，并采用XGBoost、GraphSAGE和GCN分类器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在点击诱饵数据集上评估，比较不同分类器的F1分数、推理时间和ROC-AUC值。
analysis.contributions: 提出轻量级混合方法，在保持竞争性能的同时大幅减少推理时间，适合实时应用。
analysis.limitations: 简化特征设计导致F1分数略有下降，可能影响极端情况下的检测精度。

papers.title: Shift- and stretch-invariant non-negative matrix factorization with an application to brain tissue delineation in emission tomography data
papers.abstract: Dynamic neuroimaging data, such as emission tomography measurements of radiotracer transport in blood or cerebrospinal fluid, often exhibit diffusion-like properties. These introduce distance-dependent temporal delays, scale-differences, and stretching effects that limit the effectiveness of conventional linear modeling and decomposition methods. To address this, we present the shift- and stretch-invariant non-negative matrix factorization framework. Our approach estimates both integer and non-integer temporal shifts as well as temporal stretching, all implemented in the frequency domain, where shifts correspond to phase modifications, and where stretching is handled via zero-padding or truncation. The model is implemented in PyTorch (https://github.com/anders-s-olsen/shiftstretchNMF). We demonstrate on synthetic data and brain emission tomography data that the model is able to account for stretching to provide more detailed characterization of brain tissue structure.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种频域实现的移位与伸缩不变非负矩阵分解方法，用于脑发射断层成像中组织勾画。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态神经影像数据（如发射断层成像）中示踪剂扩散导致时间延迟和尺度变化，传统线性模型效果有限。
analysis.problem: 现有非负矩阵分解无法处理数据中的非整数时间移位和伸缩效应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 示踪剂在血液或脑脊液中运输呈现扩散特性，引入距离依赖的时间延迟和伸缩。
analysis.main_method: 在频域通过相位修改处理移位，通过零填充或截断处理伸缩，构建移位-伸缩不变NMF框架。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成数据和脑发射断层成像数据上验证，模型能有效处理伸缩效应并改善脑组织结构表征。
analysis.contributions: 首次将移位与伸缩不变性同时引入NMF，并在频域高效实现。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论计算复杂度及对高维数据的扩展性。

papers.title: A Direct Approach for Handling Contextual Bandits with Latent State Dynamics
papers.abstract: We revisit the finite-armed linear bandit model by Nelson et al. (2022), where contexts and rewards are governed by a finite hidden Markov chain. Nelson et al. (2022) approach this model by a reduction to linear contextual bandits; but to do so, they actually introduce a simplification in which rewards are linear functions of the posterior probabilities over the hidden states given the observed contexts, rather than functions of the hidden states themselves. Their analysis (but not their algorithm) also does not take into account the estimation of the HMM parameters, and only tackles expected, not high-probability, bounds, which suffer in addition from unnecessary complex dependencies on the model (like reward gaps). We instead study the more natural model incorporating direct dependencies in the hidden states (on top of dependencies on the observed contexts, as is natural for contextual bandits) and also obtain stronger, high-probability, regret bounds for a fully adaptive strategy that estimates HMM parameters online. These bounds do not depend on the reward functions and only depend on the model through the estimation of the HMM parameters.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种直接处理隐状态动态上下文赌博机的方法，获得更强的概率后悔界，无需依赖奖励函数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通过简化模型或忽略参数估计导致后悔界不理想，需要更自然和鲁棒的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决有限臂线性赌博机中隐马尔可夫链驱动上下文和奖励时的后悔界优化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Nelson等人简化模型导致奖励仅依赖后验概率而非隐状态，且分析忽略参数估计，产生复杂依赖。
analysis.main_method: 直接建模隐状态依赖，并设计在线自适应策略同时估计HMM参数。
analysis.key_experiments: 未明确提及实验，但理论分析证明了高概率后悔界，且不依赖奖励函数。
analysis.contributions: 提出更自然的模型和完全自适应策略，获得更强的概率后悔界，仅依赖HMM参数估计。
analysis.limitations: 未提供实验验证，实际性能需进一步评估；理论界可能受HMM估计精度影响。

papers.title: Graph Neural Networks for Misinformation Detection: Performance-Efficiency Trade-offs
authors: Soveatin Kuntur and Maciej Krzywda and Anna Wr\'oblewska and Marcin Paprzycki and Maria Ganzha and Szymon {\L}ukasik and Amir H. Gandomi
papers.abstract: The rapid spread of online misinformation has led to increasingly complex detection models, including large language models and hybrid architectures. However, their computational cost and deployment limitations raise concerns about practical applicability. In this work, we benchmark graph neural networks (GNNs) against non-graph-based machine learning methods under controlled and comparable conditions. We evaluate lightweight GNN architectures (GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT, ChebNet) against Logistic Regression, Support Vector Machines, and Multilayer Perceptrons across seven public datasets in English, Indonesian, and Polish. All models use identical TF-IDF features to isolate the impact of relational structure. Performance is measured using F1 score, with inference time reported to assess efficiency. GNNs consistently outperform non-graph baselines across all datasets. For example, GraphSAGE achieves 96.8% F1 on Kaggle and 91.9% on WELFake, compared to 73.2% and 66.8% for MLP, respectively. On COVID-19, GraphSAGE reaches 90.5% F1 vs. 74.9%, while ChebNet attains 79.1% vs. 66.4% on FakeNewsNet. These gains are achieved with comparable or lower inference times. Overall, the results show that classic GNNs remain effective and efficient, challenging the need for increasingly complex architectures in misinformation detection.

analysis.tldr: 轻量级GNN在谣言检测中性能优于非图方法，且推理时间相当或更低，挑战了复杂模型的必要性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有谣言检测模型（如LLM）计算成本高，需探索更高效的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 评估轻量级GNN在谣言检测中的性能与效率，并与非图方法公平比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GNN利用文本关系结构显著提升检测性能，而复杂模型未必必要。
analysis.main_method: 在7个多语言数据集上，使用相同TF-IDF特征，对比GCN、GraphSAGE、GAT、ChebNet与逻辑回归、SVM、MLP。
analysis.key_experiments: GraphSAGE在Kaggle和WELFake上F1达96.8%和91.9%，远超MLP的73.2%和66.8%；推理时间相当或更低。
analysis.contributions: 证明经典GNN在谣言检测中高效且有效，挑战了复杂架构的必要性。
analysis.limitations: 仅使用TF-IDF特征，未探索更先进的特征表示；数据集规模有限。

papers.title: Training Data Size Sensitivity in Unsupervised Rhyme Recognition
authors: Petr Plech\'a\v{c} and Artjoms \v{S}e\c{l}a and Silvie Cinkov\'a and Mirella De Sisto and Lara Nugues and Ne\v{z}a Ko\v{c}nik and Antonina Martynenko and Ben Nagy and Luca Giovannini and Robert Kol\'ar
papers.abstract: Rhyme is deceptively intuitive: what is or is not a rhyme is constructed historically, scholars struggle with rhyme classification, and people disagree on whether two words are rhymed or not. This complicates automated rhymed recognition and evaluation, especially in multilingual context. This article investigates how much training data is needed for reliable unsupervised rhyme recognition using RhymeTagger, a language-independent tool that identifies rhymes based on repeating patterns in poetry corpora. We evaluate its performance across seven languages (Czech, German, English, French, Italian, Russian, and Slovene), examining how training size and language differences affect accuracy. To set a realistic performance benchmark, we assess inter-annotator agreement on a manually annotated subset of poems and analyze factors contributing to disagreement in expert annotations: phonetic similarity between rhyming words and their distance from each other in a poem. We also compare RhymeTagger to three large language models using a one-shot learning strategy. Our findings show that, once provided with sufficient training data, RhymeTagger consistently outperforms human agreement, while LLMs lacking phonetic representation significantly struggle with the task.

analysis.tldr: 研究无监督押韵识别中训练数据量的影响，发现RhymeTagger在足够数据下超越人类一致性，而LLM因缺乏语音表示表现不佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 押韵识别在跨语言环境中具有挑战性，且训练数据量对无监督方法的影响尚未明确。
analysis.problem: 如何确定无监督押韵识别所需的最小训练数据量，并评估不同语言和模型的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 专家标注存在分歧，主要源于押韵词的语音相似性和在诗中的距离；LLM因缺乏语音表示难以处理押韵任务。
analysis.main_method: 使用RhymeTagger（基于诗歌语料库重复模式的无监督工具）在7种语言上评估，并与3种LLM进行单样本学习对比。
analysis.key_experiments: 在捷克语、德语等7种语言上测试训练数据规模对准确率的影响，并计算专家间一致性作为基准。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了无监督押韵识别中训练数据量的关键作用，证明RhymeTagger在足够数据下可超越人类水平。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估了7种语言，未涵盖非印欧语系；LLM对比仅使用单样本学习，可能未充分挖掘其潜力。

papers.title: Value-Guidance MeanFlow for Offline Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
authors: Teng Pang and Zhiqiang Dong and Yan Zhang and Rongjian Xu and Guoqiang Wu and Yilong Yin
papers.abstract: Offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) aims to learn the optimal joint policy from pre-collected datasets, requiring a trade-off between maximizing global returns and mitigating distribution shift from offline data. Recent studies use diffusion or flow generative models to capture complex joint policy behaviors among agents; however, they typically rely on multi-step iterative sampling, thereby reducing training and inference efficiency. Although further research improves sampling efficiency through methods like distillation, it remains sensitive to the behavior regularization coefficient. To address the above-mentioned issues, we propose Value Guidance Multi-agent MeanFlow Policy (VGM$^2$P), a simple yet effective flow-based policy learning framework that enables efficient action generation with coefficient-insensitive conditional behavior cloning. Specifically, VGM$^2$P uses global advantage values to guide agent collaboration, treating optimal policy learning as conditional behavior cloning. Additionally, to improve policy expressiveness and inference efficiency in multi-agent scenarios, it leverages classifier-free guidance MeanFlow for both policy training and execution. Experiments on tasks with both discrete and continuous action spaces demonstrate that, even when trained solely via conditional behavior cloning, VGM$^2$P efficiently achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于流模型的离线多智能体强化学习方法，用全局优势值引导协作，实现高效且系数不敏感的条件行为克隆。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有离线多智能体强化学习方法在平衡全局回报和分布偏移时，依赖多步迭代采样或蒸馏，导致效率低且对正则化系数敏感。
analysis.problem: 如何高效学习离线多智能体最优联合策略，同时避免分布偏移和系数敏感问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散或流模型能捕捉复杂联合策略，但多步采样降低效率；蒸馏方法虽提升采样速度，却对行为正则化系数敏感。
analysis.main_method: 提出VGM²P框架，使用全局优势值引导协作，结合无分类器引导的MeanFlow实现条件行为克隆，支持高效单步动作生成。
analysis.key_experiments: 在离散和连续动作空间任务上测试，仅用条件行为克隆训练即达到与最先进方法相当的性能。
analysis.contributions: 提出系数不敏感的流策略学习框架，通过全局优势引导和MeanFlow提升效率与表达能力。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论在复杂多智能体场景下的可扩展性及对大规模数据集的适应性。

papers.title: LLM-Based Data Generation and Clinical Skills Evaluation for Low-Resource French OSCEs
papers.abstract: Objective Structured Clinical Examinations (OSCEs) are the standard method for assessing medical students' clinical and communication skills through structured patient interviews. In France, however, the organization of training sessions is limited by human and logistical constraints, restricting students' access to repeated practice and structured feedback. Recent advances in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Large Language Models (LLMs) now offer the opportunity to automatically evaluate such medical interviews, thereby alleviating the need for human examiners during training. Yet, real French OSCE annotated transcripts remain extremely scarce, limiting reproducible research and reliable benchmarking. To address these challenges, we investigate the use of LLMs for both generating and evaluating French OSCE dialogues in a low-resource context. We introduce a controlled pipeline that produces synthetic doctor-patient interview transcripts guided by scenario-specific evaluation criteria, combining ideal and perturbed performances to simulate varying student skill levels. The resulting dialogues are automatically silver-labeled through an LLM-assisted framework supporting adjustable evaluation strictness. Benchmarking multiple open-source and proprietary LLMs shows that mid-size models ($\le$32B parameters) achieve accuracies comparable to GPT-4o ($\sim$90\%) on synthetic data, highlighting the feasibility of locally deployable, privacy-preserving evaluation systems for medical education.

analysis.tldr: 针对法语OSCE数据稀缺，提出用LLM生成合成对话并自动评估，中型模型可达GPT-4o水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 法国OSCE训练受限于人力和后勤，学生缺乏重复练习和结构化反馈，而真实标注数据稀缺。
analysis.problem: 法语OSCE标注数据稀缺，难以支持可重复研究和可靠基准测试。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中型LLM（≤32B参数）在合成数据上准确率与GPT-4o相当（~90%），表明本地部署的隐私保护评估系统可行。
analysis.main_method: 提出受控流水线，结合理想和扰动表现生成合成医患对话，并通过LLM辅助框架进行自动银标签评估。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个开源和专有LLM上基准测试，中型模型在合成数据上达到约90%准确率。
analysis.contributions: 首次在低资源法语OSCE场景中利用LLM同时生成和评估对话，验证了本地部署的可行性。
analysis.limitations: 合成数据可能无法完全模拟真实场景的复杂性，评估严格性可调但依赖LLM质量。

papers.title: Initialisation Determines the Basin: Efficient Codebook Optimisation for Extreme LLM Quantization
papers.abstract: Additive quantization enables extreme LLM compression with O(1) lookup-table dequantization, making it attractive for edge deployment. Yet at 2-bit precision, it often fails catastrophically, even with extensive search and finetuning. We show that the dominant bottleneck is codebook initialisation. Greedy sequential initialisation frequently places the model in poor optimisation regions that subsequent beam search and PV-tuning struggle to overcome. We analyse this behaviour through the representational ratio \r{ho} = N/KM, which characterises the relationship between weight groups and codebook capacity, and propose OA-EM, an output-aware EM initialisation method using Hessian-weighted Mahalanobis distance. Across compression rates, search budgets, and three architectures (Llama 3.2 3B, Llama 3.1 8B, Qwen 2.5 3B), OA-EM consistently produces better solutions after PV-tuning and dominates the quality-compute frontier. The severity of the bottleneck scales with \r{ho}: moderate at 3 bpp but extreme at 2 bpp, where poor initialisation can degrade perplexity by orders of magnitude. More broadly, our results highlight the importance of optimisation geometry in compressed model spaces, where initialisation can dominate subsequent search and fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 发现加性量化中代码本初始化是2比特LLM压缩失败的主因，提出OA-EM方法显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 加性量化可实现极端LLM压缩，但2比特精度下常失败，需探究根本原因。
analysis.problem: 2比特加性量化中代码本初始化导致模型陷入不良优化区域，后续搜索和微调难以克服。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过表示比ρ=N/KM分析，发现初始化瓶颈在2比特时极端严重，可导致困惑度恶化数个数量级。
analysis.main_method: 提出OA-EM，一种基于Hessian加权马氏距离的输出感知EM初始化方法。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Llama 3.2 3B、Llama 3.1 8B、Qwen 2.5 3B上测试，OA-EM在多种压缩率和搜索预算下均优于基线。
analysis.contributions: 揭示初始化是加性量化的关键瓶颈，提出OA-EM方法并建立ρ指标分析优化几何。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证了三种架构，未探索更大模型或不同量化方案。

papers.title: Quantum Vision Theory Applied to Audio Classification for Deepfake Speech Detection
papers.abstract: We propose Quantum Vision (QV) theory as a new perspective for deep learning-based audio classification, applied to deepfake speech detection. Inspired by particle-wave duality in quantum physics, QV theory is based on the idea that data can be represented not only in its observable, collapsed form, but also as information waves. In conventional deep learning, models are trained directly on these collapsed representations, such as images. In QV theory, inputs are first transformed into information waves using a QV block, and then fed into deep learning models for classification. QV-based models improve performance in image classification compared to their non-QV counterparts. What if QV theory is applied speech spectrograms for audio classification tasks? This is the motivation and novelty of the proposed approach. In this work, Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT), Mel-spectrograms, and Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCC) of speech signals are converted into information waves using the proposed QV block and used to train QV-based Convolutional Neural Networks (QV-CNN) and QV-based Vision Transformers (QV-ViT). Extensive experiments are conducted on the ASVSpoof dataset for deepfake speech classification. The results show that QV-CNN and QV-ViT consistently outperform standard CNN and ViT models, achieving higher classification accuracy and improved robustness in distinguishing genuine and spoofed speech. Moreover, the QV-CNN model using MFCC features achieves the best overall performance on the ASVspoof dataset, with an accuracy of 94.20% and an EER of 9.04%, while the QV-CNN with Mel-spectrograms attains the highest accuracy of 94.57%. These findings demonstrate that QV theory is an effective and promising approach for audio deepfake detection and opens new directions for quantum-inspired learning in audio perception tasks.

analysis.tldr: 将量子视觉理论应用于音频分类，通过信息波表示提升深度伪造语音检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索量子视觉理论在音频分类中的有效性，以改进深度伪造语音检测。
analysis.problem: 传统深度学习模型直接处理音频的坍缩表示（如频谱图），性能受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量子视觉理论受粒子-波二象性启发，认为数据可表示为信息波，而非仅坍缩形式。
analysis.main_method: 提出QV模块将STFT、Mel频谱和MFCC转换为信息波，输入QV-CNN和QV-ViT进行分类。
analysis.key_experiments: 在ASVSpoof数据集上测试，QV-CNN和QV-ViT优于标准CNN和ViT，QV-CNN+MFCC达94.20%准确率，QV-CNN+Mel频谱达94.57%。
analysis.contributions: 首次将量子视觉理论用于音频分类，证明其在深度伪造检测中的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅测试单一数据集，未探讨计算开销和泛化性。

papers.title: Long-Term Embeddings for Balanced Personalization
papers.abstract: Modern transformer-based sequential recommenders excel at capturing short-term intent but often suffer from recency bias, overlooking stable long-term preferences. While extending sequence lengths is an intuitive fix, it is computationally inefficient, and recent interactions tend to dominate the model's attention. We propose Long-Term Embeddings (LTE) as a high-inertia contextual anchor to bridge this gap. We address a critical production challenge: the point-in-time consistency problem caused by infrastructure constraints, as feature stores typically host only a single "live" version of features. This leads to an offline-online mismatch during model deployments and rollbacks, as models are forced to process evolved representations they never saw during training. To resolve this, we introduce an LTE framework that constrains embeddings to a fixed semantic basis of content-based item representations, ensuring cross-version compatibility. Furthermore, we investigate integration strategies for causal language modeling, considering the data leakage issue that occurs when the LTE and the transformer's short-term sequence share a temporal horizon. We evaluate two representations: a heuristic average and an asymmetric autoencoder with a fixed decoder grounded in the semantic basis to enable behavioral fine-tuning while maintaining stability. Online A/B tests on Zalando demonstrate that integrating LTE as a contextual prefix token using a lagged window yields significant uplifts in both user engagement and financial metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出长程嵌入（LTE）作为高惯性上下文锚点，解决序列推荐中的近因偏差和版本一致性问题，在Zalando线上测试中显著提升用户参与度和财务指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有序列推荐模型存在近因偏差，忽略长期偏好，且特征存储基础设施导致离线-在线版本不一致问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加计算开销的情况下平衡短期意图与长期偏好，并解决模型部署回滚时的特征版本不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长序列中近期交互主导注意力，导致模型忽视稳定长期偏好；特征存储仅保留单一“实时”版本，造成训练与部署时的表示差异。
analysis.main_method: 将LTE作为固定语义基上的上下文前缀令牌，采用滞后窗口集成，并利用非对称自编码器实现行为微调与稳定性平衡。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Zalando平台进行在线A/B测试，对比启发式平均与固定解码器自编码器两种表示，验证LTE在用户参与度和财务指标上的提升。
analysis.contributions: 提出LTE框架解决版本一致性问题，并设计因果语言建模集成策略避免数据泄露。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论LTE在非序列推荐或跨域场景的泛化性，且固定语义基的构建依赖内容表示质量。

papers.title: Automating aggregation strategy selection in federated learning
papers.abstract: Federated Learning enables collaborative model training without centralising data, but its effectiveness varies with the selection of the aggregation strategy. This choice is non-trivial, as performance varies widely across datasets, heterogeneity levels, and compute constraints. We present an end-to-end framework that automates, streamlines, and adapts aggregation strategy selection for federated learning. The framework operates in two modes: a single-trial mode, where large language models infer suitable strategies from user-provided or automatically detected data characteristics, and a multi-trial mode, where a lightweight genetic search efficiently explores alternatives under constrained budgets. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets show that our approach enhances robustness and generalisation under non-IID conditions while reducing the need for manual intervention. Overall, this work advances towards accessible and adaptive federated learning by automating one of its most critical design decisions, the choice of an aggregation strategy.

analysis.tldr: 提出自动化联邦学习聚合策略选择的框架，通过大语言模型和遗传搜索提升鲁棒性与泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中聚合策略选择对性能影响大，但手动选择困难且耗时。
analysis.problem: 现有聚合策略选择依赖人工经验，难以适应不同数据集和异构性水平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同聚合策略在非独立同分布数据下性能差异显著，且计算约束影响选择。
analysis.main_method: 框架包含单次试验模式（大语言模型推断策略）和多次试验模式（轻量遗传搜索）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种数据集上验证，显示非独立同分布条件下鲁棒性和泛化性提升。
analysis.contributions: 自动化聚合策略选择，减少人工干预，提升联邦学习适应性和可访问性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖大语言模型质量，遗传搜索可能受预算限制影响最优解。

papers.title: Preference Redirection via Attention Concentration: An Attack on Computer Use Agents
papers.abstract: Advancements in multimodal foundation models have enabled the development of Computer Use Agents (CUAs) capable of autonomously interacting with GUI environments. As CUAs are not restricted to certain tools, they allow to automate more complex agentic tasks but at the same time open up new security vulnerabilities. While prior work has concentrated on the language modality, the vulnerability of the vision modality has received less attention. In this paper, we introduce PRAC, a novel attack that, unlike prior work targeting the VLM output directly, manipulates the model's internal preferences by redirecting its attention toward a stealthy adversarial patch. We show that PRAC is able to manipulate the selection process of a CUA on an online shopping platform towards a chosen target product. While we require white-box access to the model for the creation of the attack, we show that our attack generalizes to fine-tuned versions of the same model, presenting a critical threat as multiple companies build specific CUAs based on open weights models.

analysis.tldr: 提出PRAC攻击，通过注意力重定向操纵计算机使用代理的视觉偏好，实现目标产品选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有攻击主要针对语言模态，视觉模态的脆弱性研究不足，且计算机使用代理面临新的安全威胁。
analysis.problem: 如何通过视觉模态攻击操纵计算机使用代理的内部偏好，使其选择特定目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击通过重定向模型注意力至隐蔽对抗补丁，而非直接干扰输出，从而改变模型内部偏好。
analysis.main_method: PRAC攻击利用白盒访问生成对抗补丁，将模型注意力引导至补丁区域，操纵选择过程。
analysis.key_experiments: 在在线购物平台上测试，攻击能成功将代理选择导向目标产品，并泛化至同一模型的微调版本。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出针对计算机使用代理视觉模态的注意力重定向攻击，揭示其安全漏洞。
analysis.limitations: 需要白盒访问生成攻击，且仅验证了单一模型系列。

papers.title: Multimodal Latent Reasoning via Predictive Embeddings
papers.abstract: Tool-augmented multimodal reasoning enables visual language models (VLMs) to improve perception by interacting with external tools (e.g., cropping, depth estimation). However, such approaches incur substantial inference overhead, require specialized supervision, and are prone to erroneous tool calls. We propose Pearl (Predictive Embedding Alignment for Reasoning in Latent space), a JEPA-inspired framework that learns from expert tool-use trajectories entirely in the latent space, eliminating the need for explicit tool invocation at inference time. Unlike reconstruction-based latent reasoning methods, which autoregressively generate latent tokens and suffer from training-inference mismatch and limited support for multi-step tool use, Pearl directly learns predictive embeddings from multimodal trajectories while preserving the standard vision-language generation pipeline: it is model-agnostic, simple to train, and naturally supports trajectories with multiple tool calls. Experiments across multiple perception benchmarks show that Pearl matches or outperforms standard supervised fine-tuning and reconstruction-based latent reasoning approaches. Furthermore, we provide empirical evidence that reconstruction-based methods primarily learn embeddings rather than image edits in latent space, motivating predictive embedding learning as a more principled alternative.

analysis.tldr: 提出Pearl框架，在潜在空间学习工具使用轨迹，无需显式调用工具，提升多模态推理效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具增强的多模态推理方法推理开销大、需要专门监督且易出错，亟需更高效的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显式调用外部工具的情况下，让视觉语言模型从工具使用轨迹中学习多步推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重建式潜在推理方法存在训练-推理不匹配问题，且主要学习嵌入而非图像编辑，限制了多步工具使用。
analysis.main_method: 提出Pearl框架，基于JEPA思想，在潜在空间直接学习预测性嵌入，无需显式工具调用，保持标准视觉-语言生成流程。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个感知基准上实验，Pearl匹配或超越标准监督微调和重建式潜在推理方法。
analysis.contributions: 提出模型无关、训练简单的潜在推理框架，自然支持多步工具调用，并揭示重建式方法的局限性。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论对复杂工具链的扩展性及潜在空间学习的可解释性。

papers.title: Rethinking Entropy Allocation in LLM-based ASR: Understanding the Dynamics between Speech Encoders and LLMs
papers.abstract: Integrating large language models (LLMs) into automatic speech recognition (ASR) has become a dominant paradigm. Although recent LLM-based ASR models have shown promising performance on public benchmarks, it remains challenging to balance recognition quality with latency and overhead, while hallucinations further limit real-world deployment. In this study, we revisit LLM-based ASR from an entropy allocation perspective and introduce three metrics to characterize how training paradigms allocate entropy reduction between the speech encoder and the LLM. To remedy entropy-allocation inefficiencies in prevailing approaches, we propose a principled multi-stage training strategy grounded in capability-boundary awareness, optimizing parameter efficiency and hallucination robustness. Specifically, we redesign the pretraining strategy to alleviate the speech-text modality gap, and further introduce an iterative asynchronous SFT stage between alignment and joint SFT to preserve functional decoupling and constrain encoder representation drift. Experiments on Mandarin and English benchmarks show that our method achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art models using only 2.3B parameters, while also effectively mitigating hallucinations through our decoupling-oriented design.

analysis.tldr: 从熵分配视角重新审视LLM-based ASR，提出多阶段训练策略优化参数效率与幻觉鲁棒性，2.3B参数达到SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM-based ASR模型在识别质量与延迟/开销之间难以平衡，幻觉问题进一步限制实际部署，亟需从新视角优化。
analysis.problem: 如何平衡语音编码器与LLM之间的熵分配，以提升参数效率并缓解幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同训练范式导致语音编码器和LLM的熵减少分配不均，造成参数效率低下和幻觉易发。
analysis.main_method: 提出基于能力边界感知的多阶段训练策略，包括重新设计预训练以缓解模态差距，以及引入迭代异步SFT阶段保持功能解耦。
analysis.key_experiments: 在普通话和英语基准上，仅用2.3B参数达到与SOTA模型竞争的性能，并有效缓解幻觉。
analysis.contributions: 引入熵分配视角和三个新指标，提出多阶段训练策略优化参数效率与幻觉鲁棒性。
analysis.limitations: 未在更大规模模型或更多语言上验证，且多阶段训练可能增加训练复杂度。

papers.title: DeepForestSound: a multi-species automatic detector for passive acoustic monitoring in African tropical forests, a case study in Kibale National Park
papers.abstract: Passive Acoustic Monitoring (PAM) is widely used for biodiversity assessment. Its application in African tropical forests is limited by scarce annotated data, reducing the performance of general-purpose ecoacoustic models on underrepresented taxa. In this study, we introduce DeepForestSound (DFS), a multi-species automatic detection model designed for PAM in African tropical forests. DFS relies on a semi-supervised pipeline combining clustering of unannotated recordings with manual validation, followed by supervised fine-tuning of an Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) using low-rank adaptation, which is compared to a frozen-backbone linear baseline (DFS-Linear). The framework supports the detection of multiple taxonomic groups, including birds, primates, and elephants, from long-term acoustic recordings. DFS was trained on acoustic data collected in the Sebitoli area, in Kibale National Park, Uganda, and evaluated on an independent dataset recorded two years later at different locations within the same forest. This evaluation therefore assesses generalization across time and recording sites within a single tropical forest ecosystem. Across 8 out of 12 taxons, DFS outperforms existing automatic detection tools, particularly for non-avian taxa, achieving average AP values of 0.964 for primates and 0.961 for elephants. Results further show that LoRA-based fine-tuning substantially outperforms linear probing across taxa. Overall, these results demonstrate that task-oriented, region-specific training substantially improves detection performance in acoustically complex tropical environments, and highlight the potential of DFS as a practical tool for biodiversity monitoring and conservation in African rainforests.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeepForestSound，一种针对非洲热带森林的多物种自动检测模型，通过半监督管道和LoRA微调，在鸟类、灵长类和象类检测上优于现有工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 被动声学监测在非洲热带森林中因标注数据稀缺而性能受限，需要针对特定区域和类群的检测工具。
analysis.problem: 通用生态声学模型对非洲热带森林中代表性不足的类群检测性能差，缺乏多物种自动检测框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA微调显著优于线性探测，且区域特定训练在声学复杂的热带环境中大幅提升检测性能。
analysis.main_method: 采用半监督管道（聚类未标注录音+人工验证），然后基于Audio Spectrogram Transformer进行LoRA微调，并与冻结骨干的线性基线对比。
analysis.key_experiments: 在乌干达Kibale国家公园的Sebitoli区域训练，并在两年后不同地点独立数据集上评估，覆盖12个分类群。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个针对非洲热带森林的多物种自动检测模型，在灵长类和象类上达到高平均精度（0.964和0.961），并验证了区域训练的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅在一个森林生态系统内评估，跨区域泛化性未知；依赖人工验证步骤，可能限制可扩展性。

papers.title: Benchmarking Deep Learning for Future Liver Remnant Segmentation in Colorectal Liver Metastasis
papers.abstract: Accurate segmentation of the future liver remnant (FLR) is critical for surgical planning in colorectal liver metastases (CRLM) to prevent fatal post-hepatectomy liver failure. However, this segmentation task is technically challenging due to complex resection boundaries, convoluted hepatic vasculature and diffuse metastatic lesions. A primary bottleneck in developing automated AI tools has been the lack of high-fidelity, validated data. We address this gap by manually refining all 197 volumes from the public CRLM-CT-Seg dataset, creating the first open-source, validated benchmark for this task. We then establish the first segmentation baselines, comparing cascaded (Liver->CRLM->FLR) and end-to-end (E2E) strategies using nnU-Net, SwinUNETR, and STU-Net. We find a cascaded nnU-Net achieves the best final FLR segmentation Dice (0.767), while the pretrained STU-Net provides superior CRLM segmentation (0.620 Dice) and is significantly more robust to cascaded errors. This work provides the first validated benchmark and a reproducible framework to accelerate research in AI-assisted surgical planning.

analysis.tldr: 首个公开验证的结直肠癌肝转移术后残余肝脏分割基准，发现级联nnU-Net效果最佳，预训练STU-Net更鲁棒。
analysis.research_motivation: 术后残余肝脏（FLR）的精确分割对预防肝衰竭至关重要，但现有数据缺乏高质量标注，阻碍了AI工具开发。
analysis.problem: FLR分割因复杂切除边界、迂曲血管和弥漫性病灶而技术困难，且缺乏公开验证的基准数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 级联策略（先分割肝脏和肿瘤再计算FLR）优于端到端方法，但肿瘤分割误差会级联放大；预训练模型对级联误差更鲁棒。
analysis.main_method: 手动精修CRLM-CT-Seg数据集的197个CT体积，构建验证基准；比较级联和端到端策略，使用nnU-Net、SwinUNETR和STU-Net。
analysis.key_experiments: 级联nnU-Net达到最佳FLR Dice 0.767，预训练STU-Net在肿瘤分割上Dice 0.620且对级联误差更鲁棒。
analysis.contributions: 首个公开验证的FLR分割基准和可复现框架，为AI辅助手术规划研究提供基础。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单中心公开数据集，未评估临床实际部署的泛化性；级联策略的误差传播问题未完全解决。

papers.title: Dual-Pool Token-Budget Routing for Cost-Efficient and Reliable LLM Serving
papers.abstract: Production vLLM fleets typically provision each instance for the worst-case context length, leading to substantial KV-cache over-allocation and under-utilized concurrency. In practice, 80-95% of requests are short, yet are served under configurations optimized for long contexts, wasting 4-8$\times$ throughput capacity and triggering reliability issues such as OOM crashes, preemption, and request rejections. We identify a common root cause for these inefficiencies: configuration-traffic mismatch. We propose dual-pool token-budget routing, a lightweight dispatch mechanism that partitions a homogeneous fleet into two specialized pools: a high-throughput short-context pool and a high-capacity long-context pool. Each request is routed based on its estimated total token budget, computed using a per-category bytes-to-token ratio that is learned online via exponential moving average from usage.prompt_tokens feedback, eliminating the need for a tokenizer. We also develop a simple analytical model that predicts fleet-level cost savings from workload characteristics and measured throughput differences, enabling practitioners to estimate benefits prior to deployment. Evaluations on real-world traces from the Azure LLM Inference Dataset and LMSYS-Chat-1M, serving Llama-3-70B on A100 GPUs, show that our approach reduces GPU-hours by 31-42%, corresponding to \$2.86M annual savings at fleet scale, while lowering preemption rates by 5.4$\times$ and improving P99 TTFT by 6%. A case study with Qwen3-235B-A22B on AMD MI300X at 10,000 req/s projects \$15.4M in annual savings. The method incurs only O(1) dispatch overhead, adapts automatically to heterogeneous workloads, and composes seamlessly with existing optimizations such as PagedAttention, continuous batching, and prefill-decode disaggregation.

analysis.tldr: 提出双池令牌预算路由，通过将同质LLM服务集群分为长短上下文池，基于在线学习的令牌预算路由请求，实现31-42%的GPU小时节省和5.4倍抢占率降低。
analysis.research_motivation: 生产环境中vLLM集群为最坏情况上下文长度配置实例，导致KV缓存过度分配和并发利用率不足，造成大量吞吐浪费和可靠性问题。
analysis.problem: 配置与流量不匹配导致80-95%的短请求被长上下文配置服务，浪费4-8倍吞吐能力，并引发OOM崩溃、抢占和请求拒绝等可靠性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实际工作负载中短请求占绝大多数，但集群配置针对长上下文优化，导致KV缓存过度分配和并发利用率低下，形成配置-流量失配。
analysis.main_method: 将同质集群划分为高吞吐短上下文池和高容量长上下文池，基于在线学习的每类别字节-令牌比估计令牌预算进行路由，无需分词器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Azure LLM推理数据集和LMSYS-Chat-1M真实轨迹上，使用A100 GPU服务Llama-3-70B，实现GPU小时减少31-42%，抢占率降低5.4倍，P99 TTFT提升6%。
analysis.contributions: 提出轻量级双池路由机制，实现O(1)调度开销，自动适应异构工作负载，与PagedAttention等现有优化无缝兼容，并提供部署前成本效益分析模型。
analysis.limitations: 依赖在线学习的字节-令牌比估计，可能对极端动态工作负载适应性有限；双池划分在极端长上下文比例场景下收益可能降低。

papers.title: Kathleen: Oscillator-Based Byte-Level Text Classification Without Tokenization or Attention
papers.abstract: We present Kathleen, a text classification architecture that operates directly on raw UTF-8 bytes using frequency-domain processing -- requiring no tokenizer, no attention mechanism, and only 733K parameters. Kathleen introduces three novel components: (1) RecurrentOscillatorBanks -- damped sinusoid convolutions with temporal memory for O(L) sequence processing; (2) an FFT-Rotate Wavetable Encoder that maps all 256 byte values using a single learnable vector (256 floats), replacing conventional embedding tables (65K parameters) while improving accuracy; (3) PhaseHarmonics -- a sinusoidal non-linearity with just 6 learnable phase parameters that our ablation identifies as the single most impactful component (+2.6% accuracy, <0.001% of model parameters). Through comprehensive ablation of a 1.8M-parameter predecessor, we show that frequency-domain components systematically outperform complex cognitive architectures: removing a 560K-parameter bio-inspired framework costs only -0.2%, while removing the 6-parameter PhaseHarmonics costs -2.6%. The resulting Kathleen-Clean achieves 88.6% on IMDB, 92.3% on AG News, and 83.3% on SST-2 -- outperforming a tokenized counterpart with 16x more parameters on IMDB (+1.6%) and AG News (+2.1%). Kathleen processes sequences in O(L) time and memory, enabling byte-level operation at sequence lengths where O(L^2) Transformers exhaust GPU memory.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Kathleen，一种无需分词和注意力机制、基于频域处理的字节级文本分类架构，仅 733K 参数，性能优于 16 倍参数量的分词模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本分类模型依赖分词和注意力机制，导致参数量大、计算复杂度高，且难以处理长序列。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用分词器和注意力机制的情况下，实现高效且准确的字节级文本分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 频域组件（如 PhaseHarmonics）仅用 6 个参数即可显著提升准确率（+2.6%），而复杂认知架构（560K 参数）的移除仅导致 -0.2% 的下降，表明简单频域操作比复杂结构更有效。
analysis.main_method: 提出三个创新组件：RecurrentOscillatorBanks（阻尼正弦卷积+时间记忆）、FFT-Rotate Wavetable Encoder（单向量编码所有字节值）、PhaseHarmonics（正弦非线性激活函数）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 IMDB、AG News、SST-2 上分别达到 88.6%、92.3%、83.3% 准确率，消融实验显示 PhaseHarmonics 贡献最大（+2.6%）。
analysis.contributions: 首次证明无需分词和注意力机制，仅用频域处理即可在字节级文本分类中取得竞争性能，且参数量极小。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证了文本分类任务，未探索生成式任务或更复杂 NLP 场景；频域方法的泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Is your algorithm unlearning or untraining?
papers.abstract: As models are getting larger and are trained on increasing amounts of data, there has been an explosion of interest into how we can ``delete'' specific data points or behaviours from a trained model, after the fact. This goal has been referred to as ``machine unlearning''. In this note, we argue that the term ``unlearning'' has been overloaded, with different research efforts spanning two distinct problem formulations, but without that distinction having been observed or acknowledged in the literature. This causes various issues, including ambiguity around when an algorithm is expected to work, use of inappropriate metrics and baselines when comparing different algorithms to one another, difficulty in interpreting results, as well as missed opportunities for pursuing critical research directions. In this note, we address this issue by establishing a fundamental distinction between two notions that we identify as \unlearning and \untraining, illustrated in Figure 1. In short, \untraining aims to reverse the effect of having trained on a given forget set, i.e. to remove the influence that that specific forget set examples had on the model during training. On the other hand, the goal of \unlearning is not just to remove the influence of those given examples, but to use those examples for the purpose of more broadly removing the entire underlying distribution from which those examples were sampled (e.g. the concept or behaviour that those examples represent). We discuss technical definitions of these problems and map problem settings studied in the literature to each. We hope to initiate discussions on disambiguating technical definitions and identify a set of overlooked research questions, as we believe that this a key missing step for accelerating progress in the field of ``unlearning''.

analysis.tldr: 论文指出“机器遗忘”术语被过度使用，实际包含两种不同问题：反训练（untraining）和遗忘（unlearning），并呼吁区分以推动研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前“机器遗忘”领域术语模糊，导致算法评估混乱、研究方向遗漏，亟需澄清问题定义。
analysis.problem: 现有文献未区分“反训练”（移除特定数据影响）和“遗忘”（移除整个分布），造成指标误用和结果难以解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同研究实际针对不同目标，但被混为一谈，导致算法适用场景不明、比较不公平。
analysis.main_method: 通过定义两种问题（反训练 vs. 遗忘），并映射现有研究到各自类别，建立清晰区分框架。
analysis.key_experiments: 论文未进行实验，主要基于理论分析和文献映射。
analysis.contributions: 首次明确区分“反训练”和“遗忘”，指出被忽视的研究方向，为领域提供概念基础。
analysis.limitations: 未提供实验验证或具体算法，仅停留在概念澄清层面。

papers.title: PriPG-RL: Privileged Planner-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Partially Observable Systems with Anytime-Feasible MPC
papers.abstract: This paper addresses the problem of training a reinforcement learning (RL) policy under partial observability by exploiting a privileged, anytime-feasible planner agent available exclusively during training. We formalize this as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) in which a planner agent with access to an approximate dynamical model and privileged state information guides a learning agent that observes only a lossy projection of the true state. To realize this framework, we introduce an anytime-feasible Model Predictive Control (MPC) algorithm that serves as the planner agent. For the learning agent, we propose Planner-to-Policy Soft Actor-Critic (P2P-SAC), a method that distills the planner agent's privileged knowledge to mitigate partial observability and thereby improve both sample efficiency and final policy performance. We support this framework with rigorous theoretical analysis. Finally, we validate our approach in simulation using NVIDIA Isaac Lab and successfully deploy it on a real-world Unitree Go2 quadruped navigating complex, obstacle-rich environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种利用特权规划器指导部分可观测系统强化学习的方法，通过MPC规划器蒸馏知识提升策略性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 部分可观测环境下强化学习面临样本效率低和策略性能差的问题，而现有方法难以有效利用训练时可用的特权信息。
analysis.problem: 如何在部分可观测的POMDP中，利用训练时存在的特权规划器（具有近似动力学模型和完整状态信息）来指导仅能观测到部分状态的智能体学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特权规划器在训练时可提供可行且接近最优的轨迹，但测试时无法使用；直接模仿规划器会导致策略依赖完整状态，而蒸馏方法可缓解部分可观测性带来的信息缺失。
analysis.main_method: 提出P2P-SAC算法，结合任意可行MPC规划器与Soft Actor-Critic，通过蒸馏规划器的特权知识来训练部分可观测策略。
analysis.key_experiments: 在NVIDIA Isaac Lab仿真中验证，并在真实Unitree Go2四足机器人上部署于复杂障碍环境。
analysis.contributions: 形式化了特权规划器引导的POMDP框架；提出任意可行MPC算法和P2P-SAC蒸馏方法；提供理论分析并在仿真和实物上验证。
analysis.limitations: 依赖训练时特权规划器的质量；MPC计算开销可能限制实时性；未讨论对更复杂动力学系统的泛化。

papers.title: Rethinking Residual Errors in Compensation-based LLM Quantization
papers.abstract: Methods based on weight compensation, which iteratively apply quantization and weight compensation to minimize the output error, have recently demonstrated remarkable success in quantizing Large Language Models (LLMs). The representative work, GPTQ, introduces several key techniques that make such iterative methods practical for LLMs with billions of parameters. GPTAQ extends this approach by introducing an asymmetric calibration process that aligns the output of each quantized layer with its full-precision counterpart, incorporating a residual error into the weight compensation framework. In this work, we revisit the formulation of the residual error. We identify a sub-optimal calibration objective in existing methods: during the intra-layer calibration process, they align the quantized output with the output from compensated weights, rather than the true output from the original full-precision model. Therefore, we redefine the objective to precisely align the quantized model's output with the original output of the full-precision model at each step. We then reveal that the residual error originates not only from the output difference of the preceding layer but also from the discrepancy between the compensated and original weights within each layer, which we name the 'compensation-aware error'. By inheriting the neuron decomposition technique from GPTAQ, we can efficiently incorporate this compensation-aware error into the weight update process. Extensive experiments on various LLMs and quantization settings demonstrate that our proposed enhancements integrate seamlessly with both GPTQ and GPTAQ, significantly improving their quantization performance. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/list0830/ResComp.

analysis.tldr: 重新审视补偿式LLM量化中的残差误差，提出补偿感知误差，改进GPTQ/GPTAQ性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有补偿式量化方法（如GPTQ、GPTAQ）在层内校准时存在次优目标，导致量化精度受限。
analysis.problem: 现有方法将量化输出与补偿权重输出对齐，而非原始全精度模型输出，且忽略了补偿权重与原始权重的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 残差误差不仅来自前层输出差异，还来自层内补偿权重与原始权重的差异（补偿感知误差）。
analysis.main_method: 重新定义校准目标为对齐量化输出与原始全精度输出，并利用神经元分解技术将补偿感知误差融入权重更新。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种LLM和量化设置下进行实验，证明该方法可无缝集成到GPTQ和GPTAQ中，显著提升量化性能。
analysis.contributions: 识别并形式化了补偿感知误差，提出改进的校准目标，提升了现有量化方法的精度。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论对极端低比特量化的适用性，且依赖神经元分解技术可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: Fraud Detection System for Banking Transactions
papers.abstract: The expansion of digital payment systems has heightened both the scale and intricacy of online financial transactions, thereby increasing vulnerability to fraudulent activities. Detecting fraud effectively is complicated by the changing nature of attack strategies and the significant disparity between genuine and fraudulent transactions. This research introduces a machine learning-based fraud detection framework utilizing the PaySim synthetic financial transaction dataset. Following the CRISP-DM methodology, the study includes hypothesis-driven exploratory analysis, feature refinement, and a comparative assessment of baseline models such as Logistic Regression and tree-based classifiers like Random Forest, XGBoost, and Decision Tree. To tackle class imbalance, SMOTE is employed, and model performance is enhanced through hyperparameter tuning with GridSearchCV. The proposed framework provides a robust and scalable solution to enhance fraud prevention capabilities in FinTech transaction systems. Keywords: fraud detection, imbalanced data, HPO, SMOTE

analysis.tldr: 提出基于机器学习的银行交易欺诈检测框架，使用PaySim数据集，结合SMOTE和超参数调优提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字支付系统扩展导致欺诈活动增加，现有方法难以应对攻击策略变化和类别不平衡问题。
analysis.problem: 解决金融交易中欺诈检测的类别不平衡和攻击策略动态变化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 欺诈交易占比极低，导致模型偏向多数类；攻击策略不断演变，传统规则方法失效。
analysis.main_method: 采用CRISP-DM流程，使用SMOTE处理不平衡数据，结合GridSearchCV调优的树模型（如XGBoost）。
analysis.key_experiments: 在PaySim数据集上比较逻辑回归、随机森林、XGBoost和决策树，使用SMOTE和超参数调优。
analysis.contributions: 提出可扩展的欺诈检测框架，验证SMOTE和HPO在金融场景中的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅使用合成数据集PaySim，未在真实银行数据上验证；未考虑实时检测延迟。

papers.title: Non-variational supervised quantum kernel methods: a review
papers.abstract: Quantum kernel methods (QKMs) have emerged as a prominent framework for supervised quantum machine learning. Unlike variational quantum algorithms, which rely on gradient-based optimisation and may suffer from issues such as barren plateaus, non-variational QKMs employ fixed quantum feature maps, with model selection performed classically via convex optimisation and cross-validation. This separation of quantum feature embedding from classical training ensures stable optimisation while leveraging quantum circuits to encode data in high-dimensional Hilbert spaces. In this review, we provide a thorough analysis of non-variational supervised QKMs, covering their foundations in classical kernel theory, constructions of fidelity and projected quantum kernels, and methods for their estimation in practice. We examine frameworks for assessing quantum advantage, including generalisation bounds and necessary conditions for separation from classical models, and analyse key challenges such as exponential concentration, dequantisation via tensor-network methods, and the spectral properties of kernel integral operators. We further discuss structured problem classes that may enable advantage, and synthesise insights from comparative and hardware studies. Overall, this review aims to clarify the regimes in which QKMs may offer genuine advantages, and to delineate the conceptual, methodological, and technical obstacles that must be overcome for practical quantum-enhanced learning.

analysis.tldr: 综述非变分监督量子核方法，分析其理论基础、优势、挑战及潜在量子优势条件。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子核方法作为监督量子机器学习的重要框架，需系统梳理其理论基础与实用前景。
analysis.problem: 非变分量子核方法中量子优势的条件不明确，且面临指数浓度、去量子化等挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定量子特征映射结合经典凸优化可避免变分方法的贫瘠高原问题，但量子核估计可能遭遇指数浓度。
analysis.main_method: 采用保真度核与投影量子核，通过经典交叉验证和凸优化进行模型选择。
analysis.key_experiments: 综述涵盖泛化界、张量网络去量子化、核积分算子谱分析等理论实验，以及比较与硬件研究。
analysis.contributions: 系统梳理了非变分量子核方法的理论框架、优势条件与核心障碍。
analysis.limitations: 未提供具体实验验证，主要基于理论分析。

papers.title: A Systematic Framework for Tabular Data Disentanglement
papers.abstract: Tabular data, widely used in various applications such as industrial control systems, finance, and supply chain, often contains complex interrelationships among its attributes. Data disentanglement seeks to transform such data into latent variables with reduced interdependencies, facilitating more effective and efficient processing. Despite the extensive studies on data disentanglement over image, text, or audio data, tabular data disentanglement may require further investigation due to the more intricate attribute interactions typically found in tabular data. Moreover, due to the highly complex interrelationships, direct translation from other data domains results in suboptimal data disentanglement. Existing tabular data disentanglement methods, such as factor analysis, CT-GAN, and VAE face limitations including scalability issues, mode collapse, and poor extrapolation. In this paper, we propose the use of a framework to provide a systematic view on tabular data disentanglement that modularizes the process into four core components: data extraction, data modeling, model analysis, and latent representation extrapolation. We believe this work provides a deeper understanding of tabular data disentanglement and existing methods, and lays the foundation for potential future research in developing robust, efficient, and scalable data disentanglement techniques. Finally, we demonstrate the framework's applicability through a case study on synthetic tabular data generation, showcasing its potential in the particular downstream task of data synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个模块化框架，系统化表格数据解缠流程，解决现有方法可扩展性差、模式崩溃等问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格数据解缠因属性交互复杂而研究不足，现有方法直接迁移自其他数据域效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 现有表格数据解缠方法存在可扩展性差、模式崩溃和外推能力弱等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 表格数据中属性间存在复杂相互依赖关系，导致直接迁移图像/文本解缠方法效果次优。
analysis.main_method: 提出四模块框架：数据提取、数据建模、模型分析和潜在表示外推，系统化解缠流程。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过合成表格数据生成的案例研究，展示框架在下游任务中的适用性。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出系统化表格数据解缠框架，模块化分解流程，为未来研究奠定基础。
analysis.limitations: 仅通过合成数据案例验证，缺乏真实场景和定量对比实验。

papers.title: Robust Length Prediction: A Perspective from Heavy-Tailed Prompt-Conditioned Distributions
papers.abstract: Output-length prediction is important for efficient LLM serving, as it directly affects batching, memory reservation, and scheduling. For prompt-only length prediction, most existing methods use a one-shot sampled length as the label, implicitly treating each prompt as if it had one true target length. We show that this is unreliable: even under a fixed model and decoding setup, the same prompt induces a \emph{prompt-conditioned output length distribution}, not a deterministic scalar, and this distribution is consistent with \emph{heavy-tailed} behavior. Motivated by this, we cast length prediction as robust estimation from heavy-tailed prompt-conditioned length distributions. We propose prompt-conditioned length distribution (ProD) methods, which construct training targets from multiple independent generations of the same prompt. Two variants are developed to reuse the served LLM's hidden states: \mbox{ProD-M}, which uses a median-based target for robust point prediction, and ProD-D, which uses a distributional target that preserves prompt-conditioned uncertainty. We provide theoretical justifications by analyzing the estimation error under a surrogate model. Experiments across diverse scenarios show consistent gains in prediction quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于重尾提示条件分布的长度预测方法，通过多次生成构建训练目标，提升LLM服务效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有输出长度预测方法将每个提示视为有单一真实长度，忽略了同一提示下输出长度的分布特性，导致预测不可靠。
analysis.problem: 解决提示条件下输出长度分布的重尾特性导致的预测不准确问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一提示在固定模型和解码设置下会产生重尾分布的输出长度，而非确定性标量，现有单次采样方法不可靠。
analysis.main_method: 提出ProD方法，从多次独立生成中构建训练目标，包括基于中位数的ProD-M和基于分布目标的ProD-D，并复用LLM隐藏状态。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种场景下进行实验，验证了预测质量的持续提升。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了提示条件下输出长度的重尾分布特性，并提出了鲁棒的长度预测方法及理论分析。
analysis.limitations: 需要多次生成构建训练目标，可能增加计算开销；未讨论不同解码策略的影响。

papers.title: Bit-by-Bit: Progressive QAT Strategy with Outlier Channel Splitting for Stable Low-Bit LLMs
papers.abstract: Training LLMs at ultra-low precision remains a formidable challenge. Direct low-bit QAT often suffers from convergence instability and substantial training costs, exacerbated by quantization noise from heavy-tailed outlier channels and error accumulation across layers. To address these issues, we present Bit-by-Bit, a progressive QAT framework with outlier channel splitting. Our approach integrates three key components: (1) block-wise progressive training that reduces precision stage by stage, ensuring stable initialization for low-bit optimization; (2) nested structure of integer quantization grids to enable a "train once, deploy any precision" paradigm, allowing a single model to support multiple bit-widths without retraining; (3) rounding-aware outlier channel splitting, which mitigates quantization error while acting as an identity transform that preserves the quantized outputs. Furthermore, we follow microscaling groups with E4M3 scales, capturing dynamic activation ranges in alignment with OCP/NVIDIA standards. To address the lack of efficient 2-bit kernels, we developed custom operators for both W2A2 and W2A16 configurations, achieving up to 11$\times$ speedup over BF16. Under W2A2 settings, Bit-by-Bit significantly outperforms baselines like BitDistiller and EfficientQAT on both Llama2/3, achieving a loss of only 2.25 WikiText2 PPL compared to full-precision models.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式QAT框架Bit-by-Bit，通过分块训练、嵌套量化网格和异常通道分裂，实现低比特LLM稳定训练与多精度部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 超低精度训练LLM面临收敛不稳定和高训练成本，现有方法受异常通道和层间误差累积影响。
analysis.problem: 解决低比特量化训练中的收敛不稳定、误差累积及多精度部署需重训练的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重尾异常通道引入量化噪声，且逐层误差累积导致低比特优化困难。
analysis.main_method: 结合分块渐进训练、嵌套整数量化网格和舍入感知的异常通道分裂，并采用E4M3缩放组。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Llama2/3上W2A2设置下，WikiText2困惑度仅2.25，优于BitDistiller和EfficientQAT，且自定义内核实现11倍加速。
analysis.contributions: 提出渐进式训练策略和异常通道分裂方法，实现单模型多精度部署，并开发高效2比特内核。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论对更大规模模型（如70B+）的扩展性，且自定义内核可能依赖特定硬件。

papers.title: Ensembles at Any Cost? Accuracy-Energy Trade-offs in Recommender Systems
papers.abstract: Ensemble methods are frequently used in recommender systems to improve accuracy by combining multiple models. Recent work reports sizable performance gains, but most studies still optimize primarily for accuracy and robustness rather than for energy efficiency. This paper measures accuracy energy trade offs of ensemble techniques relative to strong single models. We run 93 controlled experiments in two pipelines: 1. explicit rating prediction with Surprise (RMSE) and 2. implicit feedback ranking with LensKit (NDCG@10). We evaluate four datasets ranging from 100,000 to 7.8 million interactions (MovieLens 100K, MovieLens 1M, ModCloth, Anime). We compare four ensemble strategies (Average, Weighted, Stacking or Rank Fusion, Top Performers) against baselines and optimized single models. Whole system energy is measured with EMERS using a smart plug and converted to CO2 equivalents. Across settings, ensembles improve accuracy by 0.3% to 5.7% while increasing energy by 19% to 2,549%. On MovieLens 1M, a Top Performers ensemble improves RMSE by 0.96% at an 18.8% energy overhead over SVD++. On MovieLens 100K, an averaging ensemble improves NDCG@10 by 5.7% with 103% additional energy. On Anime, a Surprise Top Performers ensemble improves RMSE by 1.2% but consumes 2,005% more energy (0.21 vs. 0.01 Wh), increasing emissions from 2.6 to 53.8 mg CO2 equivalents, and LensKit ensembles fail due to memory limits. Overall, selective ensembles are more energy efficient than exhaustive averaging,

analysis.tldr: 集成方法提升推荐准确率0.3%-5.7%，但能耗增加19%-2549%，需权衡精度与能源效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要优化推荐系统的准确性和鲁棒性，忽视了集成方法带来的巨大能源消耗。
analysis.problem: 量化推荐系统中集成方法在提升准确率的同时带来的能源成本增加。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 集成方法能小幅提升准确率，但能耗增长远超准确率增益，部分场景能耗增加超2000%。
analysis.main_method: 在显式评分预测（Surprise）和隐式反馈排序（LensKit）两个流程中，对四种集成策略（平均、加权、堆叠/排名融合、最优子集）进行93组对照实验，用智能插头测量系统能耗并转换为CO2当量。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用MovieLens 100K/1M、ModCloth、Anime四个数据集（10万-780万交互），对比集成方法与强单模型及基线。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统量化推荐系统集成方法的精度-能耗权衡，发现选择性集成比穷举平均更节能。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估四种集成策略，未覆盖更复杂的集成方法；能耗测量限于单机环境。

papers.title: Tool Retrieval Bridge: Aligning Vague Instructions with Retriever Preferences via Bridge Model
papers.abstract: Tool learning has emerged as a promising paradigm for large language models (LLMs) to address real-world challenges. Due to the extensive and irregularly updated number of tools, tool retrieval for selecting the desired tool subset is essential. However, current tool retrieval methods are usually based on academic benchmarks containing overly detailed instructions (e.g., specific API names and parameters), while real-world instructions are more vague. Such a discrepancy would hinder the tool retrieval in real-world applications. In this paper, we first construct a new benchmark, VGToolBench, to simulate human vague instructions. Based on this, we conduct a series of preliminary analyses and find that vague instructions indeed damage the performance of tool retrieval. To this end, we propose a simple-yet-effective Tool Retrieval Bridge (TRB) approach to boost the performance of tool retrieval for vague instructions. The principle of TRB is to introduce a bridge model to rewrite the vague instructions into more specific ones and alleviate the gap between vague instructions and retriever preferences.We conduct extensive experiments under multiple commonly used retrieval settings, and the results show that TRB effectively mitigates the ambiguity of vague instructions while delivering consistent and substantial improvements across all baseline retrievers. For example, with the help of TRB, BM25 achieves a relative improvement of up to 111.51%, i.e., increasing the average NDCG score from 9.73 to 19.59. The source code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/kfchenhn/TRB.

analysis.tldr: 提出工具检索桥接方法，通过桥接模型将模糊指令改写为具体指令，提升工具检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具检索方法基于详细指令的学术基准，而真实指令往往模糊，导致检索性能下降。
analysis.problem: 模糊指令与检索器偏好之间存在差距，影响工具检索在真实场景中的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模糊指令会显著损害工具检索性能，例如BM25的NDCG得分从19.59降至9.73。
analysis.main_method: 引入桥接模型将模糊指令改写为更具体的指令，以缩小模糊指令与检索器偏好之间的差距。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个常用检索设置下进行实验，TRB在所有基线检索器上均带来一致且显著的改进，如BM25相对提升111.51%。
analysis.contributions: 构建了模拟模糊指令的基准VGToolBench，并提出简单有效的TRB方法提升模糊指令下的工具检索性能。
analysis.limitations: 桥接模型可能引入额外计算开销，且对极端模糊指令的改写效果有待验证。

papers.title: Why Are We Lonely? Leveraging LLMs to Measure and Understand Loneliness in Caregivers and Non-caregivers
papers.abstract: This paper presents an LLM-driven approach for constructing diverse social media datasets to measure and compare loneliness in the caregiver and non-caregiver populations. We introduce an expert-developed loneliness evaluation framework and an expert-informed typology for categorizing causes of loneliness for analyzing social media text. Using a human-validated data processing pipeline, we apply GPT-4o, GPT-5-nano, and GPT-5 to build a high-quality Reddit corpus and analyze loneliness across both populations. The loneliness evaluation framework achieved average accuracies of 76.09% and 79.78% for caregivers and non-caregivers, respectively. The cause categorization framework achieved micro-aggregate F1 scores of 0.825 and 0.80 for caregivers and non-caregivers, respectively. Across populations, we observe substantial differences in the distribution of types of causes of loneliness. Caregivers' loneliness were predominantly linked to caregiving roles, identity recognition, and feelings of abandonment, indicating distinct loneliness experiences between the two groups. Demographic extraction further demonstrates the viability of Reddit for building a diverse caregiver loneliness dataset. Overall, this work establishes an LLM-based pipeline for creating high quality social media datasets for studying loneliness and demonstrates its effectiveness in analyzing population-level differences in the manifestation of loneliness.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM构建社交媒体数据集，测量并比较照护者与非照护者的孤独感差异，发现照护者孤独感主要源于照护角色、身份认同和遗弃感。
analysis.research_motivation: 孤独感是重要的公共健康问题，但现有研究缺乏大规模、跨人群的量化分析方法，尤其是对照护者群体的关注不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM从社交媒体文本中有效测量和比较不同人群（照护者与非照护者）的孤独感及其成因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 照护者的孤独感主要与照护角色、身份认同和遗弃感相关，而非照护者的孤独感成因分布不同，表明两类人群的孤独体验存在显著差异。
analysis.main_method: 提出专家开发的孤独感评估框架和成因分类体系，结合GPT-4o、GPT-5-nano和GPT-5构建Reddit语料库，通过人工验证的数据处理流水线进行分析。
analysis.key_experiments: 孤独感评估框架在照护者和非照护者上的平均准确率分别为76.09%和79.78%；成因分类框架的微聚合F1分数分别为0.825和0.80。
analysis.contributions: 建立了基于LLM的社交媒体数据集构建流水线，用于孤独感研究；揭示了照护者与非照护者孤独感成因的分布差异。
analysis.limitations: 依赖Reddit平台数据，可能无法完全代表所有人群；LLM分类准确性仍有提升空间，且未深入探讨孤独感的动态变化。

papers.title: Information-Theoretic Requirements for Gradient-Based Task Affinity Estimation in Multi-Task Learning
papers.abstract: Multi-task learning shows strikingly inconsistent results -- sometimes joint training helps substantially, sometimes it actively harms performance -- yet the field lacks a principled framework for predicting these outcomes. We identify a fundamental but unstated assumption underlying gradient-based task analysis: tasks must share training instances for gradient conflicts to reveal genuine relationships. When tasks are measured on the same inputs, gradient alignment reflects shared mechanistic structure; when measured on disjoint inputs, any apparent signal conflates task relationships with distributional shift. We discover this sample overlap requirement exhibits a sharp phase transition: below 30% overlap, gradient-task correlations are statistically indistinguishable from noise; above 40%, they reliably recover known biological structure. Comprehensive validation across multiple datasets achieves strong correlations and recovers biological pathway organization. Standard benchmarks systematically violate this requirement -- MoleculeNet operates at <5% overlap, TDC at 8-14% -- far below the threshold where gradient analysis becomes meaningful. This provides the first principled explanation for seven years of inconsistent MTL results.

analysis.tldr: 多任务学习中梯度分析需任务共享样本，低于30%重叠时梯度信号无效，解释了七年不一致结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务学习结果高度不一致，缺乏预测联合训练效果的原理框架。
