analysis.problem: 梯度分析在任务样本不重叠时混淆任务关系与分布偏移，导致结果不可靠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 样本重叠率低于30%时梯度-任务相关性等同于噪声，高于40%时可靠恢复生物结构，存在尖锐相变。
analysis.main_method: 通过理论分析和实验验证，揭示梯度分析需任务共享训练实例，并确定样本重叠阈值。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个数据集上验证，MoleculeNet重叠<5%，TDC为8-14%，远低于30%阈值。
analysis.contributions: 首次提供梯度分析样本重叠要求的原理性解释，解释七年不一致MTL结果。
analysis.limitations: 未探讨其他任务关系度量方法，且阈值可能因任务类型变化。

papers.title: AsyncTLS: Efficient Generative LLM Inference with Asynchronous Two-level Sparse Attention
papers.abstract: Long-context inference in LLMs faces the dual challenges of quadratic attention complexity and prohibitive KV cache memory. While token-level sparse attention offers superior accuracy, its indexing overhead is costly; block-level methods improve efficiency but sacrifice precision. We propose AsyncTLS, a hierarchical sparse attention system that combines coarse-grained block filtering with fine-grained token selection to balance accuracy and efficiency, coupled with an asynchronous offloading engine that overlaps KV cache transfers with computation via temporal locality exploitation. Evaluated on Qwen3 and GLM-4.7-Flash across GQA, and MLA architectures, AsyncTLS achieves accuracy comparable to full attention while delivering 1.2x - 10.0x operator speedups and 1.3x - 4.7x end-to-end throughput improvements on 48k - 96k contexts.

analysis.tldr: 提出AsyncTLS，一种异步两级稀疏注意力系统，结合粗粒度块过滤与细粒度令牌选择，实现长上下文LLM推理的高效与高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文LLM推理面临注意力二次复杂度和KV缓存内存的双重挑战，现有稀疏注意力方法在精度与效率间难以平衡。
analysis.problem: 解决长上下文推理中注意力计算效率低和KV缓存传输开销大的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 令牌级稀疏注意力精度高但索引开销大，块级方法效率高但精度损失，且KV缓存传输常成为瓶颈。
analysis.main_method: 提出两级稀疏注意力：先粗粒度块过滤，再细粒度令牌选择；并设计异步卸载引擎，利用时间局部性重叠KV缓存传输与计算。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Qwen3和GLM-4.7-Flash上，覆盖GQA和MLA架构，在48k-96k上下文长度下评估，与全注意力对比。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出异步两级稀疏注意力系统，在保持全注意力精度的同时，实现1.2x-10.0x算子加速和1.3x-4.7x端到端吞吐提升。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论对超长上下文（>96k）的扩展性，以及异步引擎在异构硬件上的适配性。

papers.title: GRASS: Gradient-based Adaptive Layer-wise Importance Sampling for Memory-efficient Large Language Model Fine-tuning
papers.abstract: Full-parameter fine-tuning of large language models is constrained by substantial GPU memory requirements. Low-rank adaptation methods mitigate this challenge by updating only a subset of parameters. However, these approaches often limit model expressiveness and yield lower performance than full-parameter fine-tuning. Layer-wise fine-tuning methods have emerged as an alternative, enabling memory-efficient training through static layer importance sampling strategies. However, these methods overlook variations in layer importance across tasks and training stages, resulting in suboptimal performance on downstream tasks. To address these limitations, we propose GRASS, a gradient-based adaptive layer-wise importance sampling framework. GRASS utilizes mean gradient norms as a task-aware and training-stage-aware metric for estimating layer importance. Furthermore, GRASS adaptively adjusts layer sampling probabilities through an adaptive training strategy. We also introduce a layer-wise optimizer state offloading mechanism that overlaps computation and communication to further reduce memory usage while maintaining comparable training throughput. Extensive experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate that GRASS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving an average accuracy improvement of up to 4.38 points and reducing memory usage by up to 19.97\%.

analysis.tldr: 提出GRASS框架，通过梯度自适应层重要性采样，在减少内存的同时提升大模型微调性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 全参数微调大模型需要大量GPU内存，现有低秩适配方法性能受限，而层级微调方法忽略任务和训练阶段的层重要性变化。
analysis.problem: 现有层重要性采样方法无法动态适应任务和训练阶段，导致下游任务性能次优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同任务和训练阶段中，各层的重要性会动态变化，静态采样策略无法捕捉这种变化。
analysis.main_method: 使用平均梯度范数作为任务感知和训练阶段感知的层重要性指标，并通过自适应训练策略动态调整层采样概率，同时引入层优化器状态卸载机制。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个模型和基准上实验，GRASS平均准确率提升最高4.38点，内存使用减少最高19.97%。
analysis.contributions: 提出梯度自适应层重要性采样框架，结合优化器状态卸载，在降低内存的同时提升微调性能。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论对超大规模模型（如千亿参数）的扩展性，以及自适应策略的计算开销。

papers.title: Intensity Dot Product Graphs
authors: Giulio Valentino Dalla Riva and Matteo Dalla Riva
papers.abstract: Latent-position random graph models usually treat the node set as fixed once the sample size is chosen, while graphon-based and random-measure constructions allow more randomness at the cost of weaker geometric interpretability. We introduce \emph{Intensity Dot Product Graphs} (IDPGs), which extend Random Dot Product Graphs by replacing a fixed collection of latent positions with a Poisson point process on a Euclidean latent space. This yields a model with random node populations, RDPG-style dot-product affinities, and a population-level intensity that links continuous latent structure to finite observed graphs. We define the heat map and the desire operator as continuous analogues of the probability matrix, prove a spectral consistency result connecting adjacency singular values to the operator spectrum, compare the construction with graphon and digraphon representations, and show how classical RDPGs arise in a concentrated limit. Because the model is parameterized by an evolving intensity, temporal extensions through partial differential equations arise naturally.

analysis.tldr: 提出强度点积图（IDPG），用泊松点过程扩展随机点积图，实现随机节点数和连续潜在结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有潜在位置随机图模型固定节点集，而图论模型随机性更强但几何可解释性弱，需平衡两者。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个兼具随机节点数、点积亲和性和连续潜在结构几何可解释性的图模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过泊松点过程引入随机节点数，使图结构从连续强度函数中自然涌现，连接了有限图与连续潜在空间。
analysis.main_method: 用泊松点过程替代固定潜在位置集合，定义热图和欲望算子作为概率矩阵的连续类比，并推导谱一致性。
analysis.key_experiments: 证明邻接矩阵奇异值收敛到算子谱，并与图论和数字图论表示对比，展示经典RDPG作为极限特例。
analysis.contributions: 提出IDPG模型，建立连续潜在结构与有限图之间的桥梁，并引入偏微分方程实现时间扩展。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论实际应用中的计算效率或大规模图上的可扩展性。

papers.title: ORACLE-SWE: Quantifying the Contribution of Oracle Information Signals on SWE Agents
papers.abstract: Recent advances in language model (LM) agents have significantly improved automated software engineering (SWE). Prior work has proposed various agentic workflows and training strategies as well as analyzed failure modes of agentic systems on SWE tasks, focusing on several contextual information signals: Reproduction Test, Regression Test, Edit Location, Execution Context, and API Usage. However, the individual contribution of each signal to overall success remains underexplored, particularly their ideal contribution when intermediate information is perfectly obtained. To address this gap, we introduce Oracle-SWE, a unified method to isolate and extract oracle information signals from SWE benchmarks and quantify the impact of each signal on agent performance. To further validate the pattern, we evaluate the performance gain of signals extracted by strong LMs when provided to a base agent, approximating real-world task-resolution settings. These evaluations aim to guide research prioritization for autonomous coding systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出Oracle-SWE方法，量化软件工程智能体中不同Oracle信息信号对任务成功率的独立贡献。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究关注多种上下文信息信号对SWE智能体的影响，但缺乏对每种信号独立贡献的量化分析。
analysis.problem: 无法明确每种信息信号（如复现测试、编辑位置等）在理想获取条件下对智能体性能的具体贡献。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同信息信号对智能体性能的提升存在显著差异，且强语言模型提取的信号能近似真实场景下的性能增益。
analysis.main_method: 提出Oracle-SWE方法，从SWE基准中隔离并提取Oracle信息信号，量化各信号对智能体性能的独立影响。
analysis.key_experiments: 在SWE基准上评估不同信号对基础智能体的性能增益，并比较强语言模型提取信号的效果。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统量化Oracle信息信号对SWE智能体的独立贡献，为自主编码系统的研究优先级提供指导。
analysis.limitations: 依赖基准测试的Oracle信号提取，可能无法完全覆盖真实场景中的信息噪声。

papers.title: PeReGrINE: Evaluating Personalized Review Fidelity with User Item Graph Context
papers.abstract: We introduce PeReGrINE, a benchmark and evaluation framework for personalized review generation grounded in graph-structured user--item evidence. PeReGrINE restructures Amazon Reviews 2023 into a temporally consistent bipartite graph, where each target review is conditioned on bounded evidence from user history, item context, and neighborhood interactions under explicit temporal cutoffs. To represent persistent user preferences without conditioning directly on sparse raw histories, we compute a User Style Parameter that summarizes each user's linguistic and affective tendencies over prior reviews. This setup supports controlled comparison of four graph-derived retrieval settings: product-only, user-only, neighbor-only, and combined evidence. Beyond standard generation metrics, we introduce Dissonance Analysis, a macro-level evaluation framework that measures deviation from expected user style and product-level consensus. We also study visual evidence as an auxiliary context source and find that it can improve textual quality in some settings, while graph-derived evidence remains the main driver of personalization and consistency. Across product categories, PeReGrINE offers a reproducible way to study how evidence composition affects review fidelity, personalization, and grounding in retrieval-conditioned language models.

analysis.tldr: 提出 PeReGrINE 框架，基于图结构用户-物品证据评估个性化评论生成的真实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评论生成缺乏对用户-物品图结构证据的系统评估，需要可复现的基准来研究证据组合对个性化效果的影响。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和比较不同图结构证据（用户、物品、邻居）对个性化评论生成的真实性和一致性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户风格参数能有效概括语言和情感倾向，图证据比视觉证据更能驱动个性化，但视觉证据在某些设置下可提升文本质量。
analysis.main_method: 将 Amazon Reviews 2023 重构为时间一致二分图，计算用户风格参数，并设计四种图检索设置（产品、用户、邻居、组合）进行对比。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个产品类别上比较四种证据设置下的生成质量，并引入不和谐分析框架评估用户风格和产品共识的偏差。
analysis.contributions: 提出 PeReGrINE 基准框架、用户风格参数、不和谐分析评估方法，并验证图证据对个性化评论生成的主导作用。
analysis.limitations: 依赖 Amazon Reviews 数据集，可能不适用于其他领域；视觉证据的辅助作用有限且需进一步探索。

papers.title: Order-Optimal Sequential 1-Bit Mean Estimation in General Tail Regimes
papers.abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of mean estimation under strict 1-bit communication constraints. We propose a novel adaptive mean estimator based solely on randomized threshold queries, where each 1-bit outcome indicates whether a given sample exceeds a sequentially chosen threshold. Our estimator is $(\epsilon, \delta)$-PAC for any distribution with a bounded mean $\mu \in [-\lambda, \lambda]$ and a bounded $k$-th central moment $\mathbb{E}[|X-\mu|^k] \le \sigma^k$ for any fixed $k > 1$. Crucially, our sample complexity is order-optimal in all such tail regimes, i.e., for every such $k$ value. For $k \neq 2$, our estimator's sample complexity matches the unquantized minimax lower bounds plus an unavoidable $O(\log(\lambda/\sigma))$ localization cost. For the finite-variance case ($k=2$), our estimator's sample complexity has an extra multiplicative $O(\log(\sigma/\epsilon))$ penalty, and we establish a novel information-theoretic lower bound showing that this penalty is a fundamental limit of 1-bit quantization. We also establish a significant adaptivity gap: for both threshold queries and more general interval queries, the sample complexity of any non-adaptive estimator must scale linearly with the search space parameter $\lambda/\sigma$, rendering it vastly less sample efficient than our adaptive approach. Finally, we present algorithmic variants that (i) handle an unknown sampling budget, (ii) adapt to an unknown scale parameter~$\sigma$ given (possibly loose) bounds, and (iii) require only two stages of adaptivity at the expense of more complicated general 1-bit queries.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于随机阈值查询的自适应1比特均值估计器，在任意尾部分布下达到阶最优样本复杂度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有1比特通信约束下的均值估计方法在非高斯尾部或重尾分布下样本效率不足，缺乏理论最优性保证。
analysis.problem: 如何在严格1比特通信约束下，对具有有界k阶中心矩的分布实现样本复杂度阶最优的均值估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自适应阈值查询可避免非自适应方法中样本复杂度随搜索空间线性增长的缺陷，且1比特量化在有限方差情形下会引入不可避免的额外对数惩罚。
analysis.main_method: 设计基于随机阈值序列的自适应估计器，通过序贯二分搜索和截断均值策略，结合信息论下界分析实现阶最优性。
analysis.key_experiments: 理论证明样本复杂度在k≠2时匹配无量化下界（加O(log(λ/σ))定位成本），k=2时证明额外O(log(σ/ϵ))惩罚为1比特量化的根本限制。
analysis.contributions: 首次给出任意尾部分布下1比特均值估计的阶最优算法；揭示自适应与非自适应方法的本质差距；建立有限方差情形的信息论下界。
analysis.limitations: 有限方差情形存在额外对数惩罚；算法需要已知均值范围λ和矩界σ的粗略先验信息。

papers.title: Structured Distillation of Web Agent Capabilities Enables Generalization
papers.abstract: Frontier LLMs can navigate complex websites, but their cost and reliance on third-party APIs make local deployment impractical. We introduce Agent-as-Annotators, a framework that structures synthetic trajectory generation for web agents by analogy to human annotation roles, replacing the Task Designer, Annotator, and Supervisor with modular LLM components. Using Gemini 3 Pro as teacher, we generate 3,000 trajectories across six web environments and fine-tune a 9B-parameter student with pure supervised learning on the 2,322 that pass quality filtering. The resulting model achieves 41.5% on WebArena, surpassing closed-source models such as Claude 3.5 Sonnet (36.0%) and GPT-4o (31.5%) under the same evaluation protocol, and nearly doubling the previous best open-weight result (Go-Browse, 21.7%). Capabilities transfer to unseen environments, with an 18.2 percentage point gain on WorkArena L1 (an enterprise platform never seen during training) and consistent improvements across three additional benchmarks. Ablations confirm that each pipeline component contributes meaningfully, with Judge filtering, evaluation hints, and reasoning traces each accounting for measurable gains. These results demonstrate that structured trajectory synthesis from a single frontier teacher is sufficient to produce competitive, locally deployable web agents. Project page: https://agent-as-annotators.github.io

analysis.tldr: 通过结构化蒸馏框架，用单一前沿模型生成轨迹，微调9B参数模型，在WebArena上超越GPT-4o等闭源模型，并泛化到未见环境。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿LLM虽能导航复杂网站，但成本高且依赖第三方API，难以本地部署，需要高效蒸馏方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从单一前沿教师模型生成高质量合成轨迹，训练出性能强、可本地部署的网页代理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 结构化角色分工（任务设计、标注、监督）能提升轨迹质量，质量过滤和推理轨迹对性能贡献显著。
analysis.main_method: 提出Agent-as-Annotators框架，用模块化LLM组件模拟人类标注角色，生成并过滤轨迹，再通过监督学习微调学生模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在WebArena上达41.5%，超越Claude 3.5 Sonnet和GPT-4o；在未见环境WorkArena L1上提升18.2个百分点。
analysis.contributions: 证明单一前沿教师的结构化轨迹蒸馏足以训练出竞争力强的本地网页代理，并实现跨环境泛化。
analysis.limitations: 仅使用单一教师模型（Gemini 3 Pro），未探索多教师或更小教师的效果；轨迹数量有限（3000条）。

papers.title: The Art of (Mis)alignment: How Fine-Tuning Methods Effectively Misalign and Realign LLMs in Post-Training
papers.abstract: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) raises significant ethical and safety concerns. While LLM alignment techniques are adopted to improve model safety and trustworthiness, adversaries can exploit these techniques to undermine safety for malicious purposes, resulting in \emph{misalignment}. Misaligned LLMs may be published on open platforms to magnify harm. To address this, additional safety alignment, referred to as \emph{realignment}, is necessary before deploying untrusted third-party LLMs. This study explores the efficacy of fine-tuning methods in terms of misalignment, realignment, and the effects of their interplay. By evaluating four Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and two Preference Fine-Tuning (PFT) methods across four popular safety-aligned LLMs, we reveal a mechanism asymmetry between attack and defense. While Odds Ratio Preference Optimization (ORPO) is most effective for misalignment, Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) excels in realignment, albeit at the expense of model utility. Additionally, we identify model-specific resistance, residual effects of multi-round adversarial dynamics, and other noteworthy findings. These findings highlight the need for robust safeguards and customized safety alignment strategies to mitigate potential risks in the deployment of LLMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhangrui4041/The-Art-of-Mis-alignment.

analysis.tldr: 研究微调方法如何用于故意破坏（misalignment）和恢复（realignment）LLM安全性，发现ORPO最擅攻击，DPO最擅防御但牺牲效用。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署存在安全风险，攻击者可利用对齐技术制造恶意模型，需研究防御策略。
analysis.problem: 微调方法在故意破坏和恢复LLM安全性方面的效果及机制不对称性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击和防御之间存在机制不对称：ORPO对破坏最有效，DPO对恢复最有效但降低模型效用；不同模型存在特定抵抗性。
analysis.main_method: 在四个安全对齐LLM上评估四种SFT和两种PFT方法，对比misalignment和realignment效果。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用ORPO、DPO等方法进行多轮对抗性微调，测量安全性和效用指标。
analysis.contributions: 揭示攻击-防御机制不对称性，发现模型特定抵抗性和多轮对抗残余效应。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估有限微调方法，未覆盖所有对齐技术；实际部署场景可能更复杂。

papers.title: Generative optimal transport via forward-backward HJB matching
papers.abstract: Controlling the evolution of a many-body stochastic system from a disordered reference state to a structured target ensemble, characterized empirically through samples, arises naturally in non-equilibrium statistical mechanics and stochastic control. The natural relaxation of such a system - driven by diffusion - runs from the structured target toward the disordered reference. The natural question is then: what is the minimum-work stochastic process that reverses this relaxation, given a pathwise cost functional combining spatial penalties and control effort? Computing this optimal process requires knowledge of trajectories that already sample the target ensemble - precisely the object one is trying to construct. We resolve this by establishing a time-reversal duality: the value function governing the hard backward dynamics satisfies an equivalent forward-in-time HJB equation, whose solution can be read off directly from the tractable forward relaxation trajectories. Via the Cole-Hopf transformation and its associated Feynman-Kac representation, this forward potential is computed as a path-space free energy averaged over these forward trajectories - the same relaxation paths that are easy to simulate - without any backward simulation or knowledge of the target beyond samples. The resulting framework provides a physically interpretable description of stochastic transport in terms of path-space free energy, risk-sensitive control, and spatial cost geometry. We illustrate the theory with numerical examples that visualize the learned value function and the induced controlled diffusions, demonstrating how spatial cost fields shape transport geometry analogously to Fermat's Principle in inhomogeneous media. Our results establish a unifying connection between stochastic optimal control, Schr\"odinger bridge theory, and non-equilibrium statistical mechanics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过前向-后向HJB匹配的生成最优输运方法，利用时间反转对偶性从易模拟的前向松弛轨迹计算最优控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 控制多体随机系统从无序参考态到结构化目标态的演化，但目标态仅通过样本已知，且反向过程难以直接模拟。
analysis.problem: 如何计算最小功随机过程以逆转扩散驱动的自然松弛，同时避免对目标态轨迹的先验知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 系统自然松弛从结构化目标态向无序参考态进行，而最优控制需反向驱动，形成时间反转对偶性。
analysis.main_method: 建立时间反转对偶性，将反向HJB方程等价转化为前向HJB方程，并通过Cole-Hopf变换和Feynman-Kac表示，将前向势能计算为路径空间自由能。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过数值示例可视化学习到的值函数和受控扩散，展示空间代价场如何类似费马原理塑造输运几何。
analysis.contributions: 统一了随机最优控制、薛定谔桥理论和非平衡统计力学，提供物理可解释的输运框架。
analysis.limitations: 依赖前向松弛轨迹的易模拟性，可能对高维或复杂系统计算成本较高。

papers.title: Beyond Social Pressure: Benchmarking Epistemic Attack in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can shift their answers under pressure in ways that reflect accommodation rather than reasoning. Prior work on sycophancy has focused mainly on disagreement, flattery, and preference alignment, leaving a broader set of epistemic failures less explored. We introduce \textbf{PPT-Bench}, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating \textit{epistemic attack}, where prompts challenge the legitimacy of knowledge, values, or identity rather than simply opposing a previous answer. PPT-Bench is organized around the Philosophical Pressure Taxonomy (PPT), which defines four types of philosophical pressure: Epistemic Destabilization, Value Nullification, Authority Inversion, and Identity Dissolution. Each item is tested at three layers: a baseline prompt (L0), a single-turn pressure condition (L1), and a multi-turn Socratic escalation (L2). This allows us to measure epistemic inconsistency between L0 and L1, and conversational capitulation in L2. Across five models, these pressure types produce statistically separable inconsistency patterns, suggesting that epistemic attack exposes weaknesses not captured by standard social-pressure benchmarks. Mitigation results are strongly type- and model-dependent: prompt-level anchoring and persona-stability prompts perform best in API settings, while Leading Query Contrastive Decoding is the most reliable intervention for open models.

analysis.tldr: 提出PPT-Bench基准，系统评估大模型在知识、价值等哲学压力下的认知攻击脆弱性，发现其与社交压力行为不同。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要关注大模型的谄媚行为（如迎合用户偏好），但忽略了更广泛的认知失败类型，如知识、价值观和身份受到挑战时的表现。
analysis.problem: 大模型在面临哲学压力（如知识动摇、价值否定）时，可能表现出认知不一致或妥协，而现有基准无法捕捉这类问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大模型在哲学压力下会产生统计上可分离的不一致模式，表明认知攻击暴露了标准社交压力基准无法检测的弱点。
analysis.main_method: 构建PPT-Bench基准，基于哲学压力分类法（PPT）定义四种压力类型，并在三层（基线、单轮压力、多轮苏格拉底式升级）测试模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在五个模型上测试，发现不同压力类型产生不同不一致模式；对比多种缓解方法，提示级锚定和人格稳定提示在API模型中最佳，对比解码在开源模型中最佳。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统定义和评估大模型的认知攻击，提出PPT-Bench基准和分类法，揭示认知攻击与社交压力的差异。
analysis.limitations: 仅测试了有限模型和压力类型，缓解方法的效果高度依赖模型和压力类型，通用性有待验证。

papers.title: Sparse $\epsilon$ insensitive zone bounded asymmetric elastic net support vector machines for pattern classification
papers.abstract: Existing support vector machines(SVM) models are sensitive to noise and lack sparsity, which limits their performance. To address these issues, we combine the elastic net loss with a robust loss framework to construct a sparse $\varepsilon$-insensitive bounded asymmetric elastic net loss, and integrate it with SVM to build $\varepsilon$ Insensitive Zone Bounded Asymmetric Elastic Net Loss-based SVM($\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM). $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM is both sparse and robust. Sparsity is proven by showing that samples inside the $\varepsilon$-insensitive band are not support vectors. Robustness is theoretically guaranteed because the influence function is bounded. To solve the non-convex optimization problem, we design a half-quadratic algorithm based on clipping dual coordinate descent. It transforms the problem into a series of weighted subproblems, improving computational efficiency via the $\varepsilon$ parameter. Experiments on simulated and real datasets show that $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM outperforms traditional and existing robust SVMs. It balances sparsity and robustness well in noisy environments. Statistical tests confirm its superiority. Under the Gaussian kernel, it achieves better accuracy and noise insensitivity, validating its effectiveness and practical value.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种稀疏且鲁棒的ε-非敏感有界非对称弹性网损失SVM，通过有界影响函数和弹性网损失提升抗噪性与稀疏性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SVM模型对噪声敏感且缺乏稀疏性，限制了其性能。
analysis.problem: 如何同时提升SVM的稀疏性和鲁棒性以应对噪声环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ε-非敏感带内的样本不是支持向量，且影响函数有界，从而保证稀疏性和鲁棒性。
analysis.main_method: 结合弹性网损失与鲁棒损失框架，构建ε-非敏感有界非对称弹性网损失，并集成到SVM中；设计基于裁剪对偶坐标下降的半二次算法求解非凸优化问题。
analysis.key_experiments: 在模拟和真实数据集上与传统及现有鲁棒SVM对比，使用高斯核验证准确性和噪声不敏感性，并通过统计检验确认优越性。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种同时具备稀疏性和鲁棒性的SVM模型，并设计高效求解算法。
analysis.limitations: 非凸优化问题可能增加计算复杂度，且ε参数的选择需进一步研究。

papers.title: Efficient Dataset Selection for Continual Adaptation of Generative Recommenders
papers.abstract: Recommendation systems must continuously adapt to evolving user behavior, yet the volume of data generated in large-scale streaming environments makes frequent full retraining impractical. This work investigates how targeted data selection can mitigate performance degradation caused by temporal distributional drift while maintaining scalability. We evaluate a range of representation choices and sampling strategies for curating small but informative subsets of user interaction data. Our results demonstrate that gradient-based representations, coupled with distribution-matching, improve downstream model performance, achieving training efficiency gains while preserving robustness to drift. These findings highlight data curation as a practical mechanism for scalable monitoring and adaptive model updates in production-scale recommendation systems.

analysis.tldr: 研究如何通过高效数据选择策略，在生成式推荐系统中实现持续适应，缓解分布漂移并提升训练效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模流式推荐系统中频繁全量训练成本高，需探索低成本数据选择方法以保持模型性能。
analysis.problem: 用户行为随时间分布漂移导致推荐性能下降，但全量重训练在流式环境中不可行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 时间分布漂移会显著降低模型性能，而精心选择的小量子集可有效缓解此问题。
analysis.main_method: 使用基于梯度的表示结合分布匹配策略，从用户交互数据中筛选信息量大的子集。
analysis.key_experiments: 评估多种表示和采样策略，对比梯度表示与分布匹配方法在漂移场景下的下游性能。
analysis.contributions: 提出数据选择作为可扩展的监控与自适应更新机制，验证梯度表示与分布匹配的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 未探讨极端漂移场景或跨域泛化能力，且实验规模可能受限于特定数据集。

papers.title: Towards Rapid Constitutive Model Discovery from Multi-Modal Data: Physics Augmented Finite Element Model Updating (paFEMU)
papers.abstract: Recent progress in AI-enabled constitutive modeling has concentrated on moving from a purely data-driven paradigm to the enforcement of physical constraints and mechanistic principles, a concept referred to as physics augmentation. Classical phenomenological approaches rely on selecting a pre-defined model and calibrating its parameters, while machine learning methods often focus on discovery of the model itself. Sparse regression approaches lie in between, where large libraries of pre-defined models are probed during calibration. Sparsification in the aforementioned paradigm, but also in the context of neural network architecture, has been shown to enable interpretability, uncertainty quantification, but also heterogeneous software integration due to the low-dimensional nature of the resulting models. Most works in AI-enabled constitutive modeling have also focused on data from a single source, but in reality, materials modeling workflows can contain data from many different sources (multi-modal data), and also from testing other materials within the same materials class (multi-fidelity data). In this work, we introduce physics augmented finite element model updating (paFEMU), as a transfer learning approach that combines AI-enabled constitutive modeling, sparsification for interpretable model discovery, and finite element-based adjoint optimization utilizing multi-modal data. This is achieved by combining simple mechanical testing data, potentially from a distinct material, with digital image correlation-type full-field data acquisition to ultimately enable rapid constitutive modeling discovery. The simplicity of the sparse representation enables easy integration of neural constitutive models in existing finite element workflows, and also enables low-dimensional updating during transfer learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理增强有限元模型更新（paFEMU），结合稀疏回归与多模态数据，实现快速可解释的本构模型发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI本构建模多依赖单一数据源，且缺乏对多模态数据的有效利用，导致模型发现效率低、可解释性差。
analysis.problem: 如何从多模态（如简单力学测试与全场数据）中快速发现可解释的本构模型，并实现跨材料迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀疏表示能提升模型可解释性并支持异构软件集成，但现有方法未充分利用多源数据（如不同材料测试）的协同效应。
analysis.main_method: 提出paFEMU框架，通过稀疏神经网络结合有限元伴随优化，利用多模态数据（如DIC全场数据）进行迁移学习。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用简单力学测试与数字图像相关（DIC）全场数据，验证了跨材料迁移学习下的本构模型发现效率。
analysis.contributions: 首次将稀疏化、多模态数据与有限元伴随优化结合，实现快速、可解释的本构模型发现与迁移。
analysis.limitations: 依赖预定义模型库的完备性，且对噪声数据的鲁棒性未充分验证。

papers.title: The Condition-Number Principle for Prototype Clustering
papers.abstract: We develop a geometric framework that links objective accuracy to structural recovery in prototype-based clustering. The analysis is algorithm-agnostic and applies to a broad class of admissible loss functions. We define a clustering condition number that compares within-cluster scale to the minimum loss increase required to move a point across a cluster boundary. When this quantity is small, any solution with a small suboptimality gap must also have a small misclassification error relative to a benchmark partition. The framework also clarifies a fundamental trade-off between robustness and sensitivity to cluster imbalance, leading to sharp phase transitions for exact recovery under different objectives. The guarantees are deterministic and non-asymptotic, and they separate the role of algorithmic accuracy from the intrinsic geometric difficulty of the instance. We further show that errors concentrate near cluster boundaries and that sufficiently deep cluster cores are recovered exactly under strengthened local margins. Together, these results provide a geometric principle for interpreting low objective values as reliable evidence of meaningful clustering structure.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于条件数的几何框架，证明原型聚类中低目标值可保证结构恢复，并揭示鲁棒性与不平衡敏感性的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有聚类理论缺乏对目标函数值与聚类结构恢复之间关系的通用几何解释，难以判断低目标值是否对应有意义的聚类。
analysis.problem: 如何从几何角度量化原型聚类中目标精度与结构恢复之间的关联，并解释不同目标函数下的恢复边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 聚类条件数较小时，任何接近最优的解的误分类误差也小；误差集中在簇边界，深层核心在强局部间隔下可精确恢复。
analysis.main_method: 定义聚类条件数（簇内尺度与跨簇最小损失增量的比值），建立非渐近确定性保证，分离算法精度与实例几何难度。
analysis.key_experiments: 未提及具体实验，但理论分析覆盖多种可容许损失函数，并推导精确恢复的相变条件。
analysis.contributions: 提出算法无关的几何框架，统一解释原型聚类中目标值与结构恢复的关系，揭示鲁棒性与不平衡敏感性的根本权衡。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析限于原型聚类，未扩展到其他聚类范式；条件数计算可能依赖未知的基准划分。

papers.title: SepSeq: A Training-Free Framework for Long Numerical Sequence Processing in LLMs
papers.abstract: While transformer-based Large Language Models (LLMs) theoretically support massive context windows, they suffer from severe performance degradation when processing long numerical sequences. We attribute this failure to the attention dispersion in the Softmax mechanism, which prevents the model from concentrating attention. To overcome this, we propose Separate Sequence (SepSeq), a training-free, plug-and-play framework to mitigate dispersion by strategically inserting separator tokens. Mechanistically, we demonstrate that separator tokens act as an attention sink, recalibrating attention to focus on local segments while preserving global context. Extensive evaluations on 9 widely-adopted LLMs confirm the effectiveness of our approach: SepSeq yields an average relative accuracy improvement of 35.6% across diverse domains while reducing total inference token consumption by 16.4% on average.

analysis.tldr: 提出训练无关的SepSeq框架，通过插入分隔符缓解注意力分散，提升LLM处理长数值序列的准确率35.6%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在处理长数值序列时性能严重下降，需要一种无需重新训练的高效解决方案。
analysis.problem: Transformer模型在长数值序列上因Softmax注意力分散导致性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Softmax机制导致注意力分散，模型无法集中关注关键数值信息，尤其在长序列中更为显著。
analysis.main_method: 提出SepSeq框架，在序列中策略性地插入分隔符标记，作为注意力汇聚点重新校准注意力分布。
analysis.key_experiments: 在9种主流LLM上评估，平均相对准确率提升35.6%，推理token消耗减少16.4%。
analysis.contributions: 提出训练无关的即插即用框架，理论分析分隔符作为注意力汇聚点的机制，显著提升数值序列处理性能。
analysis.limitations: 分隔符插入策略可能需针对不同任务调优，未探索对非数值序列的泛化能力。

papers.title: Mathematical analysis of one-layer neural network with fixed biases, a new activation function and other observations
papers.abstract: We analyze a simple one-hidden-layer neural network with ReLU activation functions and fixed biases, with one-dimensional input and output. We study both continuous and discrete versions of the model, and we rigorously prove the convergence of the learning process with the $L^2$ squared loss function and the gradient descent procedure. We also prove the spectral bias property for this learning process. Several conclusions of this analysis are discussed; in particular, regarding the structure and properties that activation functions should possess, as well as the relationships between the spectrum of certain operators and the learning process. Based on this, we also propose an alternative activation function, the full-wave rectified exponential function (FReX), and we discuss the convergence of the gradient descent with this alternative activation function.

analysis.tldr: 严格分析了单隐层ReLU网络在固定偏置下的学习过程，证明了梯度下降的收敛性和谱偏置，并提出了新激活函数FReX。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解简单神经网络的理论性质，特别是激活函数和学习动力学的关系。
analysis.problem: 单隐层ReLU网络在固定偏置下学习过程的收敛性及谱偏置现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 学习过程中存在谱偏置，即低频分量优先学习；激活函数的结构影响算子谱分布。
analysis.main_method: 对一维输入输出模型进行连续和离散版本的数学分析，使用L2损失和梯度下降，并引入FReX激活函数。
analysis.key_experiments: 理论证明收敛性和谱偏置，未提供实验验证。
analysis.contributions: 严格证明了固定偏置单隐层网络的收敛性和谱偏置，提出了FReX激活函数并讨论其收敛性。
analysis.limitations: 仅限一维输入输出，未扩展到高维或实际数据集验证。

papers.title: CausalVAE as a Plug-in for World Models: Towards Reliable Counterfactual Dynamics
papers.abstract: In this work, CausalVAE is introduced as a plug-in structural module for latent world models and is attached to diverse encoder-transition backbones. Across the reported benchmarks, competitive factual prediction is preserved and intervention-aware counterfactual retrieval is improved after the plug-in is added, suggesting stronger robustness under distribution shift and interventions. The largest gains are observed on the Physics benchmark: when averaged over 8 paired baselines, CF-H@1 is improved by +102.5%. In a representative GNN-NLL setting on Physics, CF-H@1 is increased from 11.0 to 41.0 (+272.7%). Through causal analysis, learned structural dependencies are shown to recover meaningful first-order physical interaction trends, supporting the interpretability of the learned latent causal structure.

analysis.tldr: 将CausalVAE作为插件模块加入世界模型，提升反事实检索能力，在物理基准上CF-H@1平均提升102.5%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有世界模型在分布偏移和干预下鲁棒性不足，缺乏可靠的反事实推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲事实预测性能的前提下，增强世界模型的反事实动态推理和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 加入CausalVAE后，模型在分布偏移下仍能保持竞争性事实预测，且反事实检索显著改善，表明因果结构有助于泛化。
analysis.main_method: 将CausalVAE作为可插拔结构模块，附加到多种编码器-转移骨干网络上，学习潜在因果结构。
analysis.key_experiments: 在物理基准上，8对基线平均CF-H@1提升102.5%，GNN-NLL设置下CF-H@1从11.0升至41.0（+272.7%）。
analysis.contributions: 提出CausalVAE插件模块，显著提升反事实检索性能，并验证了学习到的因果结构可解释性。
analysis.limitations: 仅在物理基准上效果突出，其他领域提升幅度未明确；插件可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: Tensor-based computation of the Koopman generator via operator logarithm
papers.abstract: Identifying governing equations of nonlinear dynamical systems from data is challenging. While sparse identification of nonlinear dynamics (SINDy) and its extensions are widely used for system identification, operator-logarithm approaches use the logarithm to avoid time differentiation, enabling larger sampling intervals. However, they still suffer from the curse of dimensionality. Then, we propose a data-driven method to compute the Koopman generator in a low-rank tensor train (TT) format by taking logarithms of Koopman eigenvalues while preserving the TT format. Experiments on 4-dimensional Lotka-Volterra and 10-dimensional Lorenz-96 systems show accurate recovery of vector field coefficients and scalability to higher-dimensional systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于张量列格式的Koopman生成元计算方法，通过对数运算避免时间微分，实现高维非线性动力系统的可扩展辨识。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有算子对数方法虽能避免时间微分，但受限于维度灾难，难以处理高维非线性动力系统。
analysis.problem: 如何在高维非线性动力系统中高效计算Koopman生成元，避免时间微分并克服维度灾难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Koopman生成元的对数运算可保持张量列格式的低秩结构，从而在避免时间微分的同时实现高维扩展。
analysis.main_method: 在低秩张量列格式下，通过对Koopman特征值取对数来近似生成元，并保持张量列格式的数值稳定性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在4维Lotka-Volterra和10维Lorenz-96系统上验证，成功恢复向量场系数并展示对更高维系统的可扩展性。
analysis.contributions: 首次将张量列格式与算子对数方法结合，提出可扩展的高维Koopman生成元计算方法。
analysis.limitations: 实验仅验证至10维系统，对更高维或强非线性系统的适用性需进一步测试。

papers.title: Towards Counterfactual Explanation and Assertion Inference for CPS Debugging
papers.abstract: Verification and validation of cyber-physical systems (CPS) via large-scale simulation often surface failures that are hard to interpret, especially when triggered by interactions between continuous and discrete behaviors at specific events or times. Existing debugging techniques can localize anomalies to specific model components, but they provide little insight into the input-signal values and timing conditions that trigger violations, or the minimal, precisely timed changes that could have prevented the failure. In this article, we introduce DeCaF, a counterfactual-guided explanation and assertion-based characterization framework for CPS debugging. Given a failing test input, DeCaF generates counterfactual changes to the input signals that transform the test from failing to passing. These changes are designed to be minimal, necessary, and sufficient to precisely restore correctness. Then, it infers assertions as logical predicates over inputs that generalize recovery conditions in an interpretable form engineers can reason about, without requiring access to internal model details. Our approach combines three counterfactual generators with two causal models, and infers success assertions. Across three CPS case studies, DeCaF achieves its best success rate with KD-Tree Nearest Neighbors combined with M5 model tree, while Genetic Algorithm combined with Random Forest provides the strongest balance between success and causal precision.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeCaF框架，通过反事实生成最小输入信号变化和断言推理，帮助调试信息物理系统故障。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CPS调试技术难以解释连续与离散行为交互触发的故障，缺乏对输入信号值和时序条件的洞察。
analysis.problem: 如何生成最小、必要且充分的输入信号反事实变化，将失败测试转为成功，并推断可解释的断言条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CPS故障常由特定事件或时间的连续-离散行为交互触发，现有方法无法提供精确的时序变化解释。
analysis.main_method: 结合三种反事实生成器（如KD-Tree最近邻）与两种因果模型（如M5模型树），推断成功断言作为逻辑谓词。
analysis.key_experiments: 在三个CPS案例研究中，KD-Tree最近邻+M5模型树实现最佳成功率，遗传算法+随机森林平衡成功与因果精度。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出反事实引导的CPS调试框架，生成可解释的断言且无需内部模型细节。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论反事实生成的计算开销及对复杂非线性系统的扩展性。

papers.title: On the Unique Recovery of Transport Maps and Vector Fields from Finite Measure-Valued Data
papers.abstract: We establish guarantees for the unique recovery of vector fields and transport maps from finite measure-valued data, yielding new insights into generative models, data-driven dynamical systems, and PDE inverse problems. In particular, we provide general conditions under which a diffeomorphism can be uniquely identified from its pushforward action on finitely many densities, i.e., when the data $\{(\rho_j,f_\#\rho_j)\}_{j=1}^m$ uniquely determines $f$. As a corollary, we introduce a new metric which compares diffeomorphisms by measuring the discrepancy between finitely many pushforward densities in the space of probability measures. We also prove analogous results in an infinitesimal setting, where derivatives of the densities along a smooth vector field are observed, i.e., when $\{(\rho_j,\text{div} (\rho_j v))\}_{j=1}^m$ uniquely determines $v$. Our analysis makes use of the Whitney and Takens embedding theorems, which provide estimates on the required number of densities $m$, depending only on the intrinsic dimension of the problem. We additionally interpret our results through the lens of Perron--Frobenius and Koopman operators and demonstrate how our techniques lead to new guarantees for the well-posedness of certain PDE inverse problems related to continuity, advection, Fokker--Planck, and advection-diffusion-reaction equations. Finally, we present illustrative numerical experiments demonstrating the unique identification of transport maps from finitely many pushforward densities, and of vector fields from finitely many weighted divergence observations.

analysis.tldr: 从有限测度值数据中唯一恢复传输映射和向量场的理论保证，揭示了生成模型和PDE逆问题的新见解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在从有限数据中恢复传输映射或向量场时缺乏唯一性保证，限制了生成模型和动力系统逆问题的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何从有限个密度的推前或散度观测中唯一确定微分同胚或光滑向量场。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过推前或散度观测，有限个密度足以唯一确定映射或向量场，所需密度数仅依赖于问题的内在维度。
analysis.main_method: 利用Whitney和Takens嵌入定理，建立从有限测度值数据到映射或向量场的唯一恢复条件。
analysis.key_experiments: 数值实验展示了从有限推前密度唯一识别传输映射，以及从有限加权散度观测唯一识别向量场。
analysis.contributions: 提供了唯一恢复的理论保证，引入了新的度量比较微分同胚，并推广到Perron-Frobenius和Koopman算子及PDE逆问题。
analysis.limitations: 理论依赖于光滑性假设，实际应用中数据噪声和离散化可能影响唯一性。
